authors_text: Muhammad Hasan Ferdous,Uzma Hasan,Md Osman Gani
title: CDANs: Temporal Causal Discovery from Autocorrelated and Non-Stationary Time Series Data
title_zh: CDAN：从自相关和非平稳时间序列数据中发现时间因果关系
abstract: Time series data are found in many areas of healthcare such as medical time series, electronic health records (EHR), measurements of vitals, and wearable devices. Causal discovery, which involves estimating causal relationships from observational data, holds the potential to play a significant role in extracting actionable insights about human health. In this study, we present a novel constraint-based causal discovery approach for autocorrelated and non-stationary time series data (CDANs). Our proposed method addresses several limitations of existing causal discovery methods for autocorrelated and non-stationary time series data, such as high dimensionality, the inability to identify lagged causal relationships, and overlooking changing modules. Our approach identifies lagged and instantaneous/contemporaneous causal relationships along with changing modules that vary over time. The method optimizes the conditioning sets in a constraint-based search by considering lagged parents instead of conditioning on the entire past that addresses high dimensionality. The changing modules are detected by considering both contemporaneous and lagged parents. The approach first detects the lagged adjacencies, then identifies the changing modules and contemporaneous adjacencies, and finally determines the causal direction. We extensively evaluated our proposed method on synthetic and real-world clinical datasets, and compared its performance with several baseline approaches. The experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method in detecting causal relationships and changing modules for autocorrelated and non-stationary time series data.

abstract_zh: 时间序列数据存在于医疗保健的许多领域，例如医疗时间序列、电子健康记录 (EHR)、生命体征测量和可穿戴设备。因果发现涉及从观察数据估计因果关系，有可能在提取有关人类健康的可行见解方面发挥重要作用。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于约束的因果发现方法，用于自相关和非平稳时间序列数据（CDAN）。我们提出的方法解决了自相关和非平稳时间序列数据的现有因果发现方法的一些局限性，例如高维度、无法识别滞后因果关系以及忽略变化的模块。我们的方法识别滞后和瞬时/同时的因果关系以及随时间变化的模块。该方法通过考虑滞后的父项而不是对解决高维度的整个过去进行条件化，来优化基于约束的搜索中的条件集。通过考虑同时期和滞后的父母来检测变化的模块。该方法首先检测滞后邻接，然后识别变化的模块和同时邻接，最后确定因果方向。我们在合成和真实临床数据集上广泛评估了我们提出的方法，并将其性能与几种基线方法进行了比较。实验结果证明了该方法在检测自相关和非平稳时间序列数据的因果关系和改变模块方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为CDANs的约束方法，用于从自相关和非平稳时间序列数据中发现时序因果关系。
AI.motivation: 现有因果发现方法在处理高维数据、滞后因果关系及动态变化模块时存在局限，难以有效应用于医疗等领域的复杂时间序列分析。
AI.method: 通过优化条件集选择（使用滞后父节点替代全历史数据）、分阶段检测滞后邻接关系、变化模块及同时因果关系，最终确定因果方向。
AI.result: 在合成数据和真实临床数据集上验证，CDANs在检测因果关系和变化模块方面优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: CDANs有效解决了自相关和非平稳时间序列的因果发现难题，为医疗数据分析提供了新工具。

authors_text: Qi Zhang,Rongxia Tang,Zhengan Yao,Jun Liang
title: Two Parallel PageRank Algorithms via Improving Forward Push
title_zh: 通过改进前推的两种并行 PageRank 算法
abstract: Initially used to rank web pages, PageRank has now been applied in many fields. With the growing scale of graph, accelerating PageRank computing is urged and designing parallel algorithm is a feasible solution. In this paper, two parallel PageRank algorithms IFP1 and IFP2 are proposed via improving the state-of-the-art Personalized PageRank algorithm, i.e., Forward Push. Theoretical analysis indicates that, IFP1 can take advantage of the DAG structure of the graph, where the dangling vertices improves the convergence rate and the unreferenced vertices decreases the computation amount. As an improvement of IFP1, IFP2 pushes mass to the dangling vertices only once but rather many times, and thus decreases the computation amount further. Experiments on six data sets illustrate that both IFP1 and IFP2 outperform Power method, where IFP2 with 38 parallelism can be at most 50 times as fast as the Power method.
summary: Initially used to rank web pages, PageRank has now been applied in many fields. With the growing scale of graph, accelerating PageRank computing is urged and designing parallel algorithm is a feasible solution. In this paper, two parallel PageRank algorithms IFP1 and IFP2 are proposed via improving the state-of-the-art Personalized PageRank algorithm, i.e., Forward Push. Theoretical analysis indicates that, IFP1 can take advantage of the DAG structure of the graph, where the dangling vertices improves the convergence rate and the unreferenced vertices decreases the computation amount. As an improvement of IFP1, IFP2 pushes mass to the dangling vertices only once but rather many times, and thus decreases the computation amount further. Experiments on six data sets illustrate that both IFP1 and IFP2 outperform Power method, where IFP2 with 38 parallelism can be at most 50 times as fast as the Power method.
abstract_zh: PageRank最初用于对网页进行排名，现在已应用于许多领域。随着图规模的不断扩大，迫切需要加速PageRank计算，设计并行算法是一种可行的解决方案。本文通过改进最先进的个性化 PageRank 算法（即前向推送），提出了两种并行 PageRank 算法 IFP1 和 IFP2。理论分析表明，IFP1可以利用图的DAG结构，其中悬空顶点提高了收敛速度，无参考顶点减少了计算量。作为IFP1的改进，IFP2只将质量推送到悬空顶点一次，而是多次，从而进一步减少了计算量。在 6 个数据集上的实验表明，IFP1 和 IFP2 均优于 Power 方法，其中具有 38 个并行度的 IFP2 最多可以是 Power 方法的 50 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种改进的并行PageRank算法IFP1和IFP2，通过优化现有Forward Push算法以提升大规模图计算效率。
AI.motivation: 随着图数据规模增长，传统PageRank算法计算效率不足，需设计更高效的并行算法以满足实际需求。
AI.method: 基于Forward Push算法，利用图的DAG结构优化dangling节点处理，IFP1通过减少计算量提升收敛速度，IFP2进一步优化推送机制以降低计算复杂度。
AI.result: 实验表明IFP1和IFP2均优于Power方法，其中IFP2在38线程并行下最快达Power方法的50倍速度。
AI.conclusion: 改进后的并行算法显著提升了PageRank计算效率，尤其适用于大规模图数据场景。

authors_text: Yuyan Bu,Qiang Sheng,Juan Cao,Peng Qi,Danding Wang,Jintao Li
title: Combating Online Misinformation Videos: Characterization, Detection, and Future Directions
title_zh: 打击在线错误信息视频：特征、检测和未来方向
comment: Accepted at ACM Multimedia 2023 (MM 2023). 11 pages, 4 figures, and 89 references
comments: Accepted at ACM Multimedia 2023 (MM 2023). 11 pages, 4 figures, and 89 references
abstract: With information consumption via online video streaming becoming increasingly popular, misinformation video poses a new threat to the health of the online information ecosystem. Though previous studies have made much progress in detecting misinformation in text and image formats, video-based misinformation brings new and unique challenges to automatic detection systems: 1) high information heterogeneity brought by various modalities, 2) blurred distinction between misleading video manipulation and nonmalicious artistic video editing, and 3) new patterns of misinformation propagation due to the dominant role of recommendation systems on online video platforms. To facilitate research on this challenging task, we conduct this survey to present advances in misinformation video detection. We first analyze and characterize the misinformation video from three levels including signals, semantics, and intents. Based on the characterization, we systematically review existing works for detection from features of various modalities to techniques for clue integration. We also introduce existing resources including representative datasets and useful tools. Besides summarizing existing studies, we discuss related areas and outline open issues and future directions to encourage and guide more research on misinformation video detection. The corresponding repository is at https://github.com/ICTMCG/Awesome-Misinfo-Video-Detection.
summary: With information consumption via online video streaming becoming increasingly popular, misinformation video poses a new threat to the health of the online information ecosystem. Though previous studies have made much progress in detecting misinformation in text and image formats, video-based misinformation brings new and unique challenges to automatic detection systems: 1) high information heterogeneity brought by various modalities, 2) blurred distinction between misleading video manipulation and nonmalicious artistic video editing, and 3) new patterns of misinformation propagation due to the dominant role of recommendation systems on online video platforms. To facilitate research on this challenging task, we conduct this survey to present advances in misinformation video detection. We first analyze and characterize the misinformation video from three levels including signals, semantics, and intents. Based on the characterization, we systematically review existing works for detection from features of various modalities to techniques for clue integration. We also introduce existing resources including representative datasets and useful tools. Besides summarizing existing studies, we discuss related areas and outline open issues and future directions to encourage and guide more research on misinformation video detection. The corresponding repository is at https://github.com/ICTMCG/Awesome-Misinfo-Video-Detection.
abstract_zh: 随着在线视频流的信息消费越来越流行，错误信息视频对在线信息生态系统的健康构成了新的威胁。尽管之前的研究在检测文本和图像格式的错误信息方面取得了很大进展，但基于视频的错误信息给自动检测系统带来了新的、独特的挑战：1）各种模式带来的高度信息异质性，2）误导性视频操纵和非恶意艺术视频编辑之间的模糊区别，3）由于在线视频平台上的推荐系统的主导作用，错误信息传播的新模式。为了促进对这一具有挑战性的任务的研究，我们进行了这项调查，以展示错误信息视频检测方面的进展。我们首先从信号、语义和意图三个层面对错误信息视频进行分析和表征。基于表征，我们系统地回顾了现有的检测工作，从各种模式的特征到线索整合技术。我们还介绍了现有资源，包括代表性数据集和有用的工具。除了总结现有研究之外，我们还讨论了相关领域并概述了开放问题和未来方向，以鼓励和指导更多关于错误信息视频检测的研究。相应的存储库位于 https://github.com/ICTMCG/Awesome-Misinfo-Video-Detection。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了在线虚假信息视频的检测研究，分析其特征、检测方法及未来方向。
AI.motivation: 随着视频流媒体信息消费普及，虚假信息视频对网络信息生态构成新威胁，且其多模态异质性、与艺术剪辑的模糊界限及推荐系统传播模式带来检测挑战。
AI.method: 从信号、语义和意图三个层面分析虚假视频特征，系统回顾多模态特征与线索整合技术，整理数据集与工具，并讨论开放问题与未来方向。
AI.result: 总结现有检测方法，提出视频虚假信息的分类框架，梳理代表性数据集与工具，明确当前研究缺口与技术发展路径。
AI.conclusion: 需进一步解决多模态异质性、传播机制与可解释性问题，推动跨学科合作与检测技术实用化。

ai_content.tldr: 本文综述了在线虚假信息视频的检测研究，分析其特征、检测方法及未来方向。

ai_content.result: 总结现有检测方法，提出视频虚假信息的分类框架，梳理代表性数据集与工具，明确当前研究缺口与技术发展路径。
ai_content.conclusion: 需进一步解决多模态异质性、传播机制与可解释性问题，推动跨学科合作与检测技术实用化。

search_text: Combating Online Misinformation Videos: Characterization, Detection, and Future Directions 打击在线错误信息视频：特征、检测和未来方向 With information consumption via online video streaming becoming increasingly popular, misinformation video poses a new threat to the health of the online information ecosystem. Though previous studies have made much progress in detecting misinformation in text and image formats, video-based misinformation brings new and unique challenges to automatic detection systems: 1) high information heterogeneity brought by various modalities, 2) blurred distinction between misleading video manipulation and nonmalicious artistic video editing, and 3) new patterns of misinformation propagation due to the dominant role of recommendation systems on online video platforms. To facilitate research on this challenging task, we conduct this survey to present advances in misinformation video detection. We first analyze and characterize the misinformation video from three levels including signals, semantics, and intents. Based on the characterization, we systematically review existing works for detection from features of various modalities to techniques for clue integration. We also introduce existing resources including representative datasets and useful tools. Besides summarizing existing studies, we discuss related areas and outline open issues and future directions to encourage and guide more research on misinformation video detection. The corresponding repository is at https://github.com/ICTMCG/Awesome-Misinfo-Video-Detection. 随着在线视频流的信息消费越来越流行，错误信息视频对在线信息生态系统的健康构成了新的威胁。尽管之前的研究在检测文本和图像格式的错误信息方面取得了很大进展，但基于视频的错误信息给自动检测系统带来了新的、独特的挑战：1）各种模式带来的高度信息异质性，2）误导性视频操纵和非恶意艺术视频编辑之间的模糊区别，3）由于在线视频平台上的推荐系统的主导作用，错误信息传播的新模式。为了促进对这一具有挑战性的任务的研究，我们进行了这项调查，以展示错误信息视频检测方面的进展。我们首先从信号、语义和意图三个层面对错误信息视频进行分析和表征。基于表征，我们系统地回顾了现有的检测工作，从各种模式的特征到线索整合技术。我们还介绍了现有资源，包括代表性数据集和有用的工具。除了总结现有研究之外，我们还讨论了相关领域并概述了开放问题和未来方向，以鼓励和指导更多关于错误信息视频检测的研究。相应的存储库位于 https://github.com/ICTMCG/Awesome-Misinfo-Video-Detection。 本文综述了在线虚假信息视频的检测研究，分析其特征、检测方法及未来方向。 Yuyan Bu,Qiang Sheng,Juan Cao,Peng Qi,Danding Wang,Jintao Li cs.CV,cs.MM,cs.SI

authors_text: Zixuan Ke,Yijia Shao,Haowei Lin,Tatsuya Konishi,Gyuhak Kim,Bing Liu
title: Continual Pre-training of Language Models
title_zh: 语言模型的持续预训练
comment: https://github.com/UIC-Liu-Lab/ContinualLM
comments: https://github.com/UIC-Liu-Lab/ContinualLM
abstract: Language models (LMs) have been instrumental for the rapid advance of natural language processing. This paper studies continual pre-training of LMs, in particular, continual domain-adaptive pre-training (or continual DAP-training). Existing research has shown that further pre-training an LM using a domain corpus to adapt the LM to the domain can improve the end-task performance in the domain. This paper proposes a novel method to continually DAP-train an LM with a sequence of unlabeled domain corpora to adapt the LM to these domains to improve their end-task performances. The key novelty of our method is a soft-masking mechanism that directly controls the update to the LM. A novel proxy is also proposed to preserve the general knowledge in the original LM. Additionally, it contrasts the representations of the previously learned domain knowledge (including the general knowledge in the pre-trained LM) and the knowledge from the current full network to achieve knowledge integration. The method not only overcomes catastrophic forgetting, but also achieves knowledge transfer to improve end-task performances. Empirical evaluation demonstrates the effectiveness of the proposed method.
summary: Language models (LMs) have been instrumental for the rapid advance of natural language processing. This paper studies continual pre-training of LMs, in particular, continual domain-adaptive pre-training (or continual DAP-training). Existing research has shown that further pre-training an LM using a domain corpus to adapt the LM to the domain can improve the end-task performance in the domain. This paper proposes a novel method to continually DAP-train an LM with a sequence of unlabeled domain corpora to adapt the LM to these domains to improve their end-task performances. The key novelty of our method is a soft-masking mechanism that directly controls the update to the LM. A novel proxy is also proposed to preserve the general knowledge in the original LM. Additionally, it contrasts the representations of the previously learned domain knowledge (including the general knowledge in the pre-trained LM) and the knowledge from the current full network to achieve knowledge integration. The method not only overcomes catastrophic forgetting, but also achieves knowledge transfer to improve end-task performances. Empirical evaluation demonstrates the effectiveness of the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 语言模型（LM）对于自然语言处理的快速发展发挥了重要作用。本文研究了 LM 的连续预训练，特别是连续领域自适应预训练（或连续 DAP 训练）。现有研究表明，使用领域语料库进一步预训练 LM，使 LM 适应该领域，可以提高该领域的最终任务性能。本文提出了一种新颖的方法，使用一系列未标记的领域语料库持续 DAP 训练 LM，以使 LM 适应这些领域，从而提高其最终任务性能。我们方法的关键新颖之处在于直接控制 LM 更新的软屏蔽机制。还提出了一种新颖的代理来保留原始 LM 中的一般知识。此外，它将先前学习的领域知识（包括预训练的LM中的一般知识）的表示与当前全网络的知识进行对比，以实现知识整合。该方法不仅克服了灾难性遗忘，而且实现了知识迁移以提高最终任务的性能。实证评估证明了该方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究语言模型的持续领域自适应预训练方法，通过软掩码机制和知识整合策略提升模型在不同领域的下游任务性能。
AI.motivation: 现有领域自适应预训练方法在处理连续领域适应时易出现灾难性遗忘，且难以有效整合新旧知识，需设计兼顾知识保留与迁移的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出软掩码机制控制模型更新，设计知识保留代理并对比历史领域知识与当前网络表示，实现知识整合与灾难性遗忘缓解。
AI.result: 实验验证方法在多个领域任务中有效提升性能，同时保持原有知识，优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为持续领域自适应预训练提供了新思路，在保持模型泛化能力与领域适应性方面具有显著优势。

authors_text: Jon Kleinberg,Emily Ryu,Éva Tardos
title: Calibrated Recommendations for Users with Decaying Attention
title_zh: 针对注意力减弱的用户的校准推荐
comment: 31 pages, 1 figure, 17th International Symposium on Algorithmic Game Theory (SAGT 2024). This paper incorporates and supersedes our earlier paper arXiv:2203.00233
comments: 31 pages, 1 figure, 17th International Symposium on Algorithmic Game Theory (SAGT 2024). This paper incorporates and supersedes our earlier paper arXiv:2203.00233
abstract: Recommendation systems capable of providing diverse sets of results are a focus of increasing importance, with motivations ranging from fairness to novelty and other aspects of optimizing user experience. One form of diversity of recent interest is calibration, the notion that personalized recommendations should reflect the full distribution of a user's interests, rather than a single predominant category -- for instance, a user who mainly reads entertainment news but also wants to keep up with news on the environment and the economy would prefer to see a mixture of these genres, not solely entertainment news. Existing work has formulated calibration as a subset selection problem; this line of work observes that the formulation requires the unrealistic assumption that all recommended items receive equal consideration from the user, but leaves as an open question the more realistic setting in which user attention decays as they move down the list of results. In this paper, we consider calibration with decaying user attention under two different models. In both models, there is a set of underlying genres that items can belong to. In the first setting, where items are represented by fine-grained mixtures of genre percentages, we provide a $(1-1/e)$-approximation algorithm by extending techniques for constrained submodular optimization. In the second setting, where items are coarsely binned into a single genre each, we surpass the $(1-1/e)$ barrier imposed by submodular maximization and give a $2/3$-approximate greedy algorithm. Our work thus addresses the problem of capturing ordering effects due to decaying attention, allowing for the extension of near-optimal calibration from recommendation sets to recommendation lists.
summary: Recommendation systems capable of providing diverse sets of results are a focus of increasing importance, with motivations ranging from fairness to novelty and other aspects of optimizing user experience. One form of diversity of recent interest is calibration, the notion that personalized recommendations should reflect the full distribution of a user's interests, rather than a single predominant category -- for instance, a user who mainly reads entertainment news but also wants to keep up with news on the environment and the economy would prefer to see a mixture of these genres, not solely entertainment news. Existing work has formulated calibration as a subset selection problem; this line of work observes that the formulation requires the unrealistic assumption that all recommended items receive equal consideration from the user, but leaves as an open question the more realistic setting in which user attention decays as they move down the list of results. In this paper, we consider calibration with decaying user attention under two different models. In both models, there is a set of underlying genres that items can belong to. In the first setting, where items are represented by fine-grained mixtures of genre percentages, we provide a $(1-1/e)$-approximation algorithm by extending techniques for constrained submodular optimization. In the second setting, where items are coarsely binned into a single genre each, we surpass the $(1-1/e)$ barrier imposed by submodular maximization and give a $2/3$-approximate greedy algorithm. Our work thus addresses the problem of capturing ordering effects due to decaying attention, allowing for the extension of near-optimal calibration from recommendation sets to recommendation lists.
abstract_zh: 能够提供不同结果集的推荐系统越来越重要，其动机包括公平性、新颖性以及优化用户体验的其他方面。近期兴趣多样性的一种形式是校准，即个性化推荐应该反映用户兴趣的全面分布，而不是单一的主导类别——例如，主要阅读娱乐新闻但也想了解环境和经济新闻的用户更愿意看到这些类型的混合体，而不仅仅是娱乐新闻。现有的工作已将校准表述为子集选择问题；这一工作线观察到，该公式需要不切实际的假设，即所有推荐项目都会受到用户的同等考虑，但将更现实的设置留为一个悬而未决的问题，在该设置中，用户注意力随着结果列表的向下移动而减弱。在本文中，我们考虑在两种不同模型下用衰减的用户注意力进行校准。在这两种模型中，都有一组项目可以所属的基础类型。在第一个设置中，项目由流派百分比的细粒度混合表示，我们通过扩展约束子模块优化技术来提供 $(1-1/e)$ 近似算法。在第二种设置中，每个项目被粗略地分类为一个流派，我们超越了子模最大化所施加的 $(1-1/e)$ 障碍，并给出了近似 $2/3$ 的贪心算法。因此，我们的工作解决了由于注意力衰减而捕获排序效应的问题，从而允许将接近最优的校准从推荐集扩展到推荐列表。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在用户注意力衰减的情况下，如何通过校准推荐算法提升推荐系统的多样性，使其更符合用户的多维度兴趣分布。
AI.motivation: 现有推荐系统校准方法假设用户对所有推荐结果平等关注，但实际中用户注意力随列表位置下降而衰减，导致推荐效果不理想，需考虑排序影响。
AI.method: 提出两种模型：1) 细粒度混合类别模型，扩展约束子模优化技术实现(1-1/e)近似算法；2) 粗粒度单一类别模型，设计超越子模上限的2/3近似贪心算法。
AI.result: 在注意力衰减场景下，两种模型分别实现了(1-1/e)和2/3近似比的推荐校准算法，有效平衡了多样性与用户注意力衰减的影响。
AI.conclusion: 通过建模注意力衰减效应，本文将校准推荐从静态集合扩展到动态列表，为实际推荐系统提供了更符合用户行为的优化方案。

ai_content_json.motivation: 现有推荐系统校准方法假设用户对所有推荐结果平等关注，但实际中用户注意力随列表位置下降而衰减，导致推荐效果不理想，需考虑排序影响。
ai_content_json.method: 提出两种模型：1) 细粒度混合类别模型，扩展约束子模优化技术实现(1-1/e)近似算法；2) 粗粒度单一类别模型，设计超越子模上限的2/3近似贪心算法。
ai_content_json.result: 在注意力衰减场景下，两种模型分别实现了(1-1/e)和2/3近似比的推荐校准算法，有效平衡了多样性与用户注意力衰减的影响。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 通过建模注意力衰减效应，本文将校准推荐从静态集合扩展到动态列表，为实际推荐系统提供了更符合用户行为的优化方案。

tldr: 本文研究了在用户注意力衰减的情况下，如何通过校准推荐算法提升推荐系统的多样性，使其更符合用户的多维度兴趣分布。
motivation: 现有推荐系统校准方法假设用户对所有推荐结果平等关注，但实际中用户注意力随列表位置下降而衰减，导致推荐效果不理想，需考虑排序影响。
method: 提出两种模型：1) 细粒度混合类别模型，扩展约束子模优化技术实现(1-1/e)近似算法；2) 粗粒度单一类别模型，设计超越子模上限的2/3近似贪心算法。
result: 在注意力衰减场景下，两种模型分别实现了(1-1/e)和2/3近似比的推荐校准算法，有效平衡了多样性与用户注意力衰减的影响。
conclusion: 通过建模注意力衰减效应，本文将校准推荐从静态集合扩展到动态列表，为实际推荐系统提供了更符合用户行为的优化方案。
search_text: Calibrated Recommendations for Users with Decaying Attention 针对注意力减弱的用户的校准推荐 Recommendation systems capable of providing diverse sets of results are a focus of increasing importance, with motivations ranging from fairness to novelty and other aspects of optimizing user experience. One form of diversity of recent interest is calibration, the notion that personalized recommendations should reflect the full distribution of a user's interests, rather than a single predominant category -- for instance, a user who mainly reads entertainment news but also wants to keep up with news on the environment and the economy would prefer to see a mixture of these genres, not solely entertainment news. Existing work has formulated calibration as a subset selection problem; this line of work observes that the formulation requires the unrealistic assumption that all recommended items receive equal consideration from the user, but leaves as an open question the more realistic setting in which user attention decays as they move down the list of results. In this paper, we consider calibration with decaying user attention under two different models. In both models, there is a set of underlying genres that items can belong to. In the first setting, where items are represented by fine-grained mixtures of genre percentages, we provide a $(1-1/e)$-approximation algorithm by extending techniques for constrained submodular optimization. In the second setting, where items are coarsely binned into a single genre each, we surpass the $(1-1/e)$ barrier imposed by submodular maximization and give a $2/3$-approximate greedy algorithm. Our work thus addresses the problem of capturing ordering effects due to decaying attention, allowing for the extension of near-optimal calibration from recommendation sets to recommendation lists. 能够提供不同结果集的推荐系统越来越重要，其动机包括公平性、新颖性以及优化用户体验的其他方面。近期兴趣多样性的一种形式是校准，即个性化推荐应该反映用户兴趣的全面分布，而不是单一的主导类别——例如，主要阅读娱乐新闻但也想了解环境和经济新闻的用户更愿意看到这些类型的混合体，而不仅仅是娱乐新闻。现有的工作已将校准表述为子集选择问题；这一工作线观察到，该公式需要不切实际的假设，即所有推荐项目都会受到用户的同等考虑，但将更现实的设置留为一个悬而未决的问题，在该设置中，用户注意力随着结果列表的向下移动而减弱。在本文中，我们考虑在两种不同模型下用衰减的用户注意力进行校准。在这两种模型中，都有一组项目可以所属的基础类型。在第一个设置中，项目由流派百分比的细粒度混合表示，我们通过扩展约束子模块优化技术来提供 $(1-1/e)$ 近似算法。在第二种设置中，每个项目被粗略地分类为一个流派，我们超越了子模最大化所施加的 $(1-1/e)$ 障碍，并给出了近似 $2/3$ 的贪心算法。因此，我们的工作解决了由于注意力衰减而捕获排序效应的问题，从而允许将接近最优的校准从推荐集扩展到推荐列表。 本文研究了在用户注意力衰减的情况下，如何通过校准推荐算法提升推荐系统的多样性，使其更符合用户的多维度兴趣分布。 Jon Kleinberg,Emily Ryu,Éva Tardos cs.DS,cs.GT,cs.SI

authors_text: Yu Duan,Zhongfan Jia,Qian Li,Yi Zhong,Kaisheng Ma
title: Hebbian and Gradient-based Plasticity Enables Robust Memory and Rapid Learning in RNNs
title_zh: 赫布和基于梯度的可塑性使 RNN 具有强大的记忆和快速学习能力
comment: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2023
comments: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2023
abstract: Rapidly learning from ongoing experiences and remembering past events with a flexible memory system are two core capacities of biological intelligence. While the underlying neural mechanisms are not fully understood, various evidence supports that synaptic plasticity plays a critical role in memory formation and fast learning. Inspired by these results, we equip Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs) with plasticity rules to enable them to adapt their parameters according to ongoing experiences. In addition to the traditional local Hebbian plasticity, we propose a global, gradient-based plasticity rule, which allows the model to evolve towards its self-determined target. Our models show promising results on sequential and associative memory tasks, illustrating their ability to robustly form and retain memories. In the meantime, these models can cope with many challenging few-shot learning problems. Comparing different plasticity rules under the same framework shows that Hebbian plasticity is well-suited for several memory and associative learning tasks; however, it is outperformed by gradient-based plasticity on few-shot regression tasks which require the model to infer the underlying mapping. Code is available at https://github.com/yuvenduan/PlasticRNNs.
summary: Rapidly learning from ongoing experiences and remembering past events with a flexible memory system are two core capacities of biological intelligence. While the underlying neural mechanisms are not fully understood, various evidence supports that synaptic plasticity plays a critical role in memory formation and fast learning. Inspired by these results, we equip Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs) with plasticity rules to enable them to adapt their parameters according to ongoing experiences. In addition to the traditional local Hebbian plasticity, we propose a global, gradient-based plasticity rule, which allows the model to evolve towards its self-determined target. Our models show promising results on sequential and associative memory tasks, illustrating their ability to robustly form and retain memories. In the meantime, these models can cope with many challenging few-shot learning problems. Comparing different plasticity rules under the same framework shows that Hebbian plasticity is well-suited for several memory and associative learning tasks; however, it is outperformed by gradient-based plasticity on few-shot regression tasks which require the model to infer the underlying mapping. Code is available at https://github.com/yuvenduan/PlasticRNNs.
abstract_zh: 从持续的经验中快速学习并通过灵活的记忆系统记住过去的事件是生物智能的两个核心能力。虽然潜在的神经机制尚未完全了解，但各种证据支持突触可塑性在记忆形成和快速学习中发挥着关键作用。受这些结果的启发，我们为循环神经网络（RNN）配备了可塑性规则，使它们能够根据持续的经验调整参数。除了传统的局部赫布可塑性之外，我们还提出了一种基于梯度的全局可塑性规则，该规则允许模型朝着其自行确定的目标演化。我们的模型在顺序记忆和联想记忆任务上显示出了有希望的结果，说明了它们稳健形成和保留记忆的能力。同时，这些模型可以应对许多具有挑战性的小样本学习问题。在同一框架下比较不同的可塑性规则表明赫布可塑性非常适合多种记忆和联想学习任务；然而，在需要模型推断底层映射的小样本回归任务中，基于梯度的可塑性优于它。代码可在 https://github.com/yuvenduan/PlasticRNNs 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过Hebbian和梯度基可塑性机制增强循环神经网络（RNN）的记忆保持能力与快速学习能力。
AI.motivation: 生物智能具有快速学习和灵活记忆的核心能力，而突触可塑性被认为是实现这一能力的关键机制。传统RNN在记忆动态信息和少样本学习任务中存在局限性，需引入神经可塑性机制以提升性能。
AI.method: 在RNN中引入两种可塑性规则：传统局部Hebbian规则与全局梯度基规则。前者模拟突触强化机制，后者通过梯度下降引导模型参数向自定义目标演化，并在统一框架下对比二者效果。
AI.result: 模型在序列记忆、联想学习任务中展现鲁棒记忆能力，且能解决复杂少样本问题。实验表明Hebbian规则优于梯度基规则的记忆任务，而梯度基规则在需要映射推断的少样本回归任务中表现更优。
AI.conclusion: Hebbian与梯度基可塑性分别适用于不同任务场景，结合二者可提升RNN对动态信息的记忆稳定性与快速学习能力，为类脑神经网络设计提供新思路。

authors_text: Yu-Neng Chuang,Guanchu Wang,Fan Yang,Zirui Liu,Xuanting Cai,Mengnan Du,Xia Hu
title: Efficient XAI Techniques: A Taxonomic Survey
title_zh: 高效的 XAI 技术：分类学调查
comment: 15 pages, 3 figures
comments: 15 pages, 3 figures
abstract: Recently, there has been a growing demand for the deployment of Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) algorithms in real-world applications. However, traditional XAI methods typically suffer from a high computational complexity problem, which discourages the deployment of real-time systems to meet the time-demanding requirements of real-world scenarios. Although many approaches have been proposed to improve the efficiency of XAI methods, a comprehensive understanding of the achievements and challenges is still needed. To this end, in this paper we provide a review of efficient XAI. Specifically, we categorize existing techniques of XAI acceleration into efficient non-amortized and efficient amortized methods. The efficient non-amortized methods focus on data-centric or model-centric acceleration upon each individual instance. In contrast, amortized methods focus on learning a unified distribution of model explanations, following the predictive, generative, or reinforcement frameworks, to rapidly derive multiple model explanations. We also analyze the limitations of an efficient XAI pipeline from the perspectives of the training phase, the deployment phase, and the use scenarios. Finally, we summarize the challenges of deploying XAI acceleration methods to real-world scenarios, overcoming the trade-off between faithfulness and efficiency, and the selection of different acceleration methods.
summary: Recently, there has been a growing demand for the deployment of Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) algorithms in real-world applications. However, traditional XAI methods typically suffer from a high computational complexity problem, which discourages the deployment of real-time systems to meet the time-demanding requirements of real-world scenarios. Although many approaches have been proposed to improve the efficiency of XAI methods, a comprehensive understanding of the achievements and challenges is still needed. To this end, in this paper we provide a review of efficient XAI. Specifically, we categorize existing techniques of XAI acceleration into efficient non-amortized and efficient amortized methods. The efficient non-amortized methods focus on data-centric or model-centric acceleration upon each individual instance. In contrast, amortized methods focus on learning a unified distribution of model explanations, following the predictive, generative, or reinforcement frameworks, to rapidly derive multiple model explanations. We also analyze the limitations of an efficient XAI pipeline from the perspectives of the training phase, the deployment phase, and the use scenarios. Finally, we summarize the challenges of deploying XAI acceleration methods to real-world scenarios, overcoming the trade-off between faithfulness and efficiency, and the selection of different acceleration methods.
abstract_zh: 最近，在现实应用中部署可解释人工智能（XAI）算法的需求不断增长。然而，传统的 XAI 方法通常存在计算复杂度高的问题，这阻碍了实时系统的部署以满足现实场景对时间的要求。尽管已经提出了许多方法来提高 XAI 方法的效率，但仍然需要全面了解所取得的成就和挑战。为此，在本文中我们对高效 XAI 进行了回顾。具体来说，我们将现有的 XAI 加速技术分为高效非摊销方法和高效摊销方法。高效的非摊销方法侧重于每个单独实例的以数据为中心或以模型为中心的加速。相比之下，摊销方法侧重于学习模型解释的统一分布，遵循预测、生成或强化框架，以快速导出多个模型解释。我们还从训练阶段、部署阶段和使用场景的角度分析了高效 XAI 管道的局限性。最后，我们总结了将 XAI 加速方法部署到现实场景中的挑战，克服忠实性和效率之间的权衡，以及不同加速方法的选择。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在对高效可解释人工智能（XAI）技术进行分类综述，分析其加速方法及挑战。
AI.motivation: 传统XAI方法计算复杂度高，难以满足实时系统的需求，因此需要对高效XAI方法进行系统性研究以推动其在实际场景中的应用。
AI.method: 本文将现有XAI加速技术分为高效非摊销方法和高效摊销方法，并从训练阶段、部署阶段和使用场景的角度分析高效XAI流程的局限性。
AI.result: 本文总结了高效XAI方法在实际场景中部署的挑战，包括忠实度与效率的权衡以及不同加速方法的选择问题。
AI.conclusion: 高效XAI方法在实际应用中仍面临诸多挑战，未来研究需要进一步解决效率与忠实度之间的平衡问题，并探索更优的加速方法。

search_text: Efficient XAI Techniques: A Taxonomic Survey 高效的 XAI 技术：分类学调查 Recently, there has been a growing demand for the deployment of Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) algorithms in real-world applications. However, traditional XAI methods typically suffer from a high computational complexity problem, which discourages the deployment of real-time systems to meet the time-demanding requirements of real-world scenarios. Although many approaches have been proposed to improve the efficiency of XAI methods, a comprehensive understanding of the achievements and challenges is still needed. To this end, in this paper we provide a review of efficient XAI. Specifically, we categorize existing techniques of XAI acceleration into efficient non-amortized and efficient amortized methods. The efficient non-amortized methods focus on data-centric or model-centric acceleration upon each individual instance. In contrast, amortized methods focus on learning a unified distribution of model explanations, following the predictive, generative, or reinforcement frameworks, to rapidly derive multiple model explanations. We also analyze the limitations of an efficient XAI pipeline from the perspectives of the training phase, the deployment phase, and the use scenarios. Finally, we summarize the challenges of deploying XAI acceleration methods to real-world scenarios, overcoming the trade-off between faithfulness and efficiency, and the selection of different acceleration methods. 最近，在现实应用中部署可解释人工智能（XAI）算法的需求不断增长。然而，传统的 XAI 方法通常存在计算复杂度高的问题，这阻碍了实时系统的部署以满足现实场景对时间的要求。尽管已经提出了许多方法来提高 XAI 方法的效率，但仍然需要全面了解所取得的成就和挑战。为此，在本文中我们对高效 XAI 进行了回顾。具体来说，我们将现有的 XAI 加速技术分为高效非摊销方法和高效摊销方法。高效的非摊销方法侧重于每个单独实例的以数据为中心或以模型为中心的加速。相比之下，摊销方法侧重于学习模型解释的统一分布，遵循预测、生成或强化框架，以快速导出多个模型解释。我们还从训练阶段、部署阶段和使用场景的角度分析了高效 XAI 管道的局限性。最后，我们总结了将 XAI 加速方法部署到现实场景中的挑战，克服忠实性和效率之间的权衡，以及不同加速方法的选择。 本文旨在对高效可解释人工智能（XAI）技术进行分类综述，分析其加速方法及挑战。 Yu-Neng Chuang,Guanchu Wang,Fan Yang,Zirui Liu,Xuanting Cai,Mengnan Du,Xia Hu cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CY

authors_text: Donglin Li,Tingting Zhang,Jiping Luo,Tianhao Liang,Bin Cao,Xuanli Wu,Qinyu Zhang
title: A Tightly Coupled Bi-Level Coordination Framework for CAVs at Road Intersections
title_zh: 道路交叉口 CAV 的紧耦合双层协调框架
abstract: Since the traffic administration at road intersections determines the capacity bottleneck of modern transportation systems, intelligent cooperative coordination for connected autonomous vehicles (CAVs) has shown to be an effective solution. In this paper, we try to formulate a Bi-Level CAV intersection coordination framework, where coordinators from High and Low levels are tightly coupled. In the High-Level coordinator where vehicles from multiple roads are involved, we take various metrics including throughput, safety, fairness and comfort into consideration. Motivated by the time consuming space-time resource allocation framework in [1], we try to give a low complexity solution by transforming the complicated original problem into a sequential linear programming one. Based on the "feasible tunnels" (FT) generated from the High-Level coordinator, we then propose a rapid gradient-based trajectory optimization strategy in the Low-Level planner, to effectively avoid collisions beyond High-level considerations, such as the pedestrian or bicycles. Simulation results and laboratory experiments show that our proposed method outperforms existing strategies. Moreover, the most impressive advantage is that the proposed strategy can plan vehicle trajectory in milliseconds, which is promising in realworld deployments. A detailed description include the coordination framework and experiment demo could be found at the supplement materials, or online at https://youtu.be/MuhjhKfNIOg.
summary: Since the traffic administration at road intersections determines the capacity bottleneck of modern transportation systems, intelligent cooperative coordination for connected autonomous vehicles (CAVs) has shown to be an effective solution. In this paper, we try to formulate a Bi-Level CAV intersection coordination framework, where coordinators from High and Low levels are tightly coupled. In the High-Level coordinator where vehicles from multiple roads are involved, we take various metrics including throughput, safety, fairness and comfort into consideration. Motivated by the time consuming space-time resource allocation framework in [1], we try to give a low complexity solution by transforming the complicated original problem into a sequential linear programming one. Based on the "feasible tunnels" (FT) generated from the High-Level coordinator, we then propose a rapid gradient-based trajectory optimization strategy in the Low-Level planner, to effectively avoid collisions beyond High-level considerations, such as the pedestrian or bicycles. Simulation results and laboratory experiments show that our proposed method outperforms existing strategies. Moreover, the most impressive advantage is that the proposed strategy can plan vehicle trajectory in milliseconds, which is promising in realworld deployments. A detailed description include the coordination framework and experiment demo could be found at the supplement materials, or online at https://youtu.be/MuhjhKfNIOg.
abstract_zh: 由于道路交叉口的交通管理决定了现代交通系统的容量瓶颈，互联自动驾驶车辆（CAV）的智能协作协调已被证明是一种有效的解决方案。在本文中，我们尝试制定一个双层 CAV 交叉口协调框架，其中高级别和低级别的协调器紧密耦合。在涉及多条道路车辆的高级协调器中，我们考虑了包括吞吐量、安全性、公平性和舒适性在内的各种指标。受[1]中耗时的时空资源分配框架的启发，我们尝试通过将复杂的原始问题转化为顺序线性规划问题来给出一种低复杂度的解决方案。基于高层协调器生成的“可行隧道”（FT），我们在低层规划器中提出了一种基于梯度的快速轨迹优化策略，以有效避免超出高层考虑的碰撞，例如行人或自行车。模拟结果和实验室实验表明，我们提出的方法优于现有策略。此外，最令人印象深刻的优势是所提出的策略可以在几毫秒内规划车辆轨迹，这在现实世界的部署中很有希望。包括协调框架和实验演示在内的详细描述可以在补充材料中找到，或者在线访问https://youtu.be/MuhjhKfNIOg。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种紧密耦合的双层协调框架，用于连接自动驾驶车辆（CAVs）在道路交叉口的协同控制，以提高通行效率和安全性。
AI.motivation: 道路交叉口的交通管理是现代交通系统的瓶颈，现有方法计算复杂度高，难以满足实时需求，需寻求更高效的协同策略。
AI.method: 构建双层协调框架：高层协调器通过线性规划转化复杂问题，考虑吞吐量、安全性和公平性等指标；底层规划器基于高层生成的可行隧道，采用梯度优化快速避障。
AI.result: 仿真与实验表明，该方法在性能上优于现有策略，且能在毫秒级完成轨迹规划，具备实际部署潜力。
AI.conclusion: 提出的双层框架有效平衡了多目标优化与实时性需求，为CAVs交叉口协同提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Jinyu Zhang,Huichuan Duan,Lei Guo,Liancheng Xu,Xinhua Wang
title: Towards Lightweight Cross-domain Sequential Recommendation via External Attention-enhanced Graph Convolution Network
title_zh: 通过外部注意力增强图卷积网络实现轻量级跨域顺序推荐
comment: 16 pages, 4 figures, conference paper, accepted by DASFAA 2023
comments: 16 pages, 4 figures, conference paper, accepted by DASFAA 2023
abstract: Cross-domain Sequential Recommendation (CSR) is an emerging yet challenging task that depicts the evolution of behavior patterns for overlapped users by modeling their interactions from multiple domains. Existing studies on CSR mainly focus on using composite or in-depth structures that achieve significant improvement in accuracy but bring a huge burden to the model training. Moreover, to learn the user-specific sequence representations, existing works usually adopt the global relevance weighting strategy (e.g., self-attention mechanism), which has quadratic computational complexity. In this work, we introduce a lightweight external attention-enhanced GCN-based framework to solve the above challenges, namely LEA-GCN. Specifically, by only keeping the neighborhood aggregation component and using the Single-Layer Aggregating Protocol (SLAP), our lightweight GCN encoder performs more efficiently to capture the collaborative filtering signals of the items from both domains. To further alleviate the framework structure and aggregate the user-specific sequential pattern, we devise a novel dual-channel External Attention (EA) component, which calculates the correlation among all items via a lightweight linear structure. Extensive experiments are conducted on two real-world datasets, demonstrating that LEA-GCN requires a smaller volume and less training time without affecting the accuracy compared with several state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Cross-domain Sequential Recommendation (CSR) is an emerging yet challenging task that depicts the evolution of behavior patterns for overlapped users by modeling their interactions from multiple domains. Existing studies on CSR mainly focus on using composite or in-depth structures that achieve significant improvement in accuracy but bring a huge burden to the model training. Moreover, to learn the user-specific sequence representations, existing works usually adopt the global relevance weighting strategy (e.g., self-attention mechanism), which has quadratic computational complexity. In this work, we introduce a lightweight external attention-enhanced GCN-based framework to solve the above challenges, namely LEA-GCN. Specifically, by only keeping the neighborhood aggregation component and using the Single-Layer Aggregating Protocol (SLAP), our lightweight GCN encoder performs more efficiently to capture the collaborative filtering signals of the items from both domains. To further alleviate the framework structure and aggregate the user-specific sequential pattern, we devise a novel dual-channel External Attention (EA) component, which calculates the correlation among all items via a lightweight linear structure. Extensive experiments are conducted on two real-world datasets, demonstrating that LEA-GCN requires a smaller volume and less training time without affecting the accuracy compared with several state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 跨域顺序推荐（CSR）是一项新兴但具有挑战性的任务，它通过对来自多个域的交互进行建模来描述重叠用户的行为模式的演变。现有的CSR研究主要集中在使用复合或深度结构，这些结构在精度上取得了显着的提高，但给模型训练带来了巨大的负担。此外，为了学习用户特定的序列表示，现有的工作通常采用全局相关性加权策略（例如自注意力机制），该策略具有二次计算复杂度。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种轻量级的基于外部注意力增强的 GCN 框架来解决上述挑战，即 LEA-GCN。具体来说，通过仅保留邻域聚合组件并使用单层聚合协议（SLAP），我们的轻量级 GCN 编码器可以更有效地捕获来自两个域的项目的协同过滤信号。为了进一步减轻框架结构并聚合特定于用户的顺序模式，我们设计了一种新颖的双通道外部注意（EA）组件，它通过轻量级线性结构计算所有项目之间的相关性。在两个真实数据集上进行了大量实验，证明与几种最先进的方法相比，LEA-GCN 需要更小的体积和更少的训练时间，而不影响准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级跨域序列推荐框架LEA-GCN，通过外部注意力增强的图卷积网络解决跨域用户行为建模的计算复杂度问题。
AI.motivation: 现有跨域序列推荐方法依赖复杂结构和全局自注意力机制，导致计算复杂度高（二次方）、训练负担重，难以兼顾效率与精度。
AI.method: 设计轻量级GCN编码器（采用单层聚合协议SLAP）捕捉跨域协同信号，并引入双通道外部注意力组件，通过线性结构计算物品间相关性以聚合用户序列模式。
AI.result: 在两个真实数据集上的实验表明，LEA-GCN相比现有方法模型体积更小、训练时间更短，且保持了相近的推荐精度。
AI.conclusion: LEA-GCN通过结构简化与外部注意力机制创新，在降低计算复杂度的同时有效建模跨域用户行为序列，为高效跨域推荐提供了新思路。

tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级跨域序列推荐框架LEA-GCN，通过外部注意力增强的图卷积网络解决跨域用户行为建模的计算复杂度问题。
motivation: 现有跨域序列推荐方法依赖复杂结构和全局自注意力机制，导致计算复杂度高（二次方）、训练负担重，难以兼顾效率与精度。
method: 设计轻量级GCN编码器（采用单层聚合协议SLAP）捕捉跨域协同信号，并引入双通道外部注意力组件，通过线性结构计算物品间相关性以聚合用户序列模式。
result: 在两个真实数据集上的实验表明，LEA-GCN相比现有方法模型体积更小、训练时间更短，且保持了相近的推荐精度。
conclusion: LEA-GCN通过结构简化与外部注意力机制创新，在降低计算复杂度的同时有效建模跨域用户行为序列，为高效跨域推荐提供了新思路。
search_text: Towards Lightweight Cross-domain Sequential Recommendation via External Attention-enhanced Graph Convolution Network 通过外部注意力增强图卷积网络实现轻量级跨域顺序推荐 Cross-domain Sequential Recommendation (CSR) is an emerging yet challenging task that depicts the evolution of behavior patterns for overlapped users by modeling their interactions from multiple domains. Existing studies on CSR mainly focus on using composite or in-depth structures that achieve significant improvement in accuracy but bring a huge burden to the model training. Moreover, to learn the user-specific sequence representations, existing works usually adopt the global relevance weighting strategy (e.g., self-attention mechanism), which has quadratic computational complexity. In this work, we introduce a lightweight external attention-enhanced GCN-based framework to solve the above challenges, namely LEA-GCN. Specifically, by only keeping the neighborhood aggregation component and using the Single-Layer Aggregating Protocol (SLAP), our lightweight GCN encoder performs more efficiently to capture the collaborative filtering signals of the items from both domains. To further alleviate the framework structure and aggregate the user-specific sequential pattern, we devise a novel dual-channel External Attention (EA) component, which calculates the correlation among all items via a lightweight linear structure. Extensive experiments are conducted on two real-world datasets, demonstrating that LEA-GCN requires a smaller volume and less training time without affecting the accuracy compared with several state-of-the-art methods. 跨域顺序推荐（CSR）是一项新兴但具有挑战性的任务，它通过对来自多个域的交互进行建模来描述重叠用户的行为模式的演变。现有的CSR研究主要集中在使用复合或深度结构，这些结构在精度上取得了显着的提高，但给模型训练带来了巨大的负担。此外，为了学习用户特定的序列表示，现有的工作通常采用全局相关性加权策略（例如自注意力机制），该策略具有二次计算复杂度。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种轻量级的基于外部注意力增强的 GCN 框架来解决上述挑战，即 LEA-GCN。具体来说，通过仅保留邻域聚合组件并使用单层聚合协议（SLAP），我们的轻量级 GCN 编码器可以更有效地捕获来自两个域的项目的协同过滤信号。为了进一步减轻框架结构并聚合特定于用户的顺序模式，我们设计了一种新颖的双通道外部注意（EA）组件，它通过轻量级线性结构计算所有项目之间的相关性。在两个真实数据集上进行了大量实验，证明与几种最先进的方法相比，LEA-GCN 需要更小的体积和更少的训练时间，而不影响准确性。 本文提出一种轻量级跨域序列推荐框架LEA-GCN，通过外部注意力增强的图卷积网络解决跨域用户行为建模的计算复杂度问题。 Jinyu Zhang,Huichuan Duan,Lei Guo,Liancheng Xu,Xinhua Wang cs.IR,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Bing Li,Oumayma Ajjaji,Robin Gigandet,Tatjana Nazir
title: The body image of social robots
title_zh: 社交机器人的身体形象
comment: 6 pages, 4 figures, submitted to the 19th IEEE International Conference on Advanced Robotics and Its Social Impacts (ARSO 2023)
comments: 6 pages, 4 figures, submitted to the 19th IEEE International Conference on Advanced Robotics and Its Social Impacts (ARSO 2023)
abstract: The rapid development of social robots has challenged robotics and cognitive sciences to understand humans' perception of the appearance of robots. In this study, robot-associated words spontaneously generated by humans were analyzed to semantically reveal the body image of 30 robots that have been developed over the past decades. The analyses took advantage of word affect scales and embedding vectors, and provided a series of evidence for links between human perception and body image. It was found that the valence and dominance of the body image reflected humans' attitude towards the general concept of robots; that the user bases and usages of the robots were among the primary factors influencing humans' impressions towards individual robots; and that there was a relationship between the robots' affects and semantic distances to the word ``person''. According to the results, building body image for robots was an effective paradigm to investigate which features were appreciated by people and what influenced people's feelings towards robots.
summary: The rapid development of social robots has challenged robotics and cognitive sciences to understand humans' perception of the appearance of robots. In this study, robot-associated words spontaneously generated by humans were analyzed to semantically reveal the body image of 30 robots that have been developed over the past decades. The analyses took advantage of word affect scales and embedding vectors, and provided a series of evidence for links between human perception and body image. It was found that the valence and dominance of the body image reflected humans' attitude towards the general concept of robots; that the user bases and usages of the robots were among the primary factors influencing humans' impressions towards individual robots; and that there was a relationship between the robots' affects and semantic distances to the word ``person''. According to the results, building body image for robots was an effective paradigm to investigate which features were appreciated by people and what influenced people's feelings towards robots.
abstract_zh: 社交机器人的快速发展对机器人学和认知科学提出了挑战，以了解人类对机器人外观的感知。在这项研究中，对人类自发生成的与机器人相关的单词进行了分析，从语义上揭示了过去几十年开发的 30 个机器人的身体图像。这些分析利用了词语情感量表和嵌入向量，并为人类感知和身体形象之间的联系提供了一系列证据。研究发现，身体意象的效价和主导性反映了人类对机器人一般概念的态度；机器人的用户群和用途是影响人类对单个机器人印象的主要因素之一；并且机器人的情感和与“人”这个词的语义距离之间存在关系。结果表明，为机器人构建身体形象是研究人们欣赏哪些特征以及影响人们对机器人的感受的有效范例。

AI.tldr: 通过分析人类对30个社会机器人自发生成的词汇，揭示其身体形象的语义特征。
AI.motivation: 社会机器人快速发展背景下，需理解人类对其外观的认知与情感关联以优化设计。
AI.method: 利用情感词典与词嵌入向量分析人类生成的机器人相关词汇，建立语义关联模型。
AI.result: 发现机器人身体形象的效价与支配性反映人类态度，用户群体与用途影响个体印象，且机器人情感与'人'的语义距离相关。
AI.conclusion: 构建机器人身体形象是研究人类偏好及情感影响因素的有效方法论框架。

authors_text: Xiaohu Tang,Yang Wang,Ting Cao,Li Lyna Zhang,Qi Chen,Deng Cai,Yunxin Liu,Mao Yang
title: LUT-NN: Empower Efficient Neural Network Inference with Centroid Learning and Table Lookup
title_zh: LUT-NN：通过质心学习和表查找实现高效的神经网络推理
comment: ef:MobiCom 2023: Proceedings of the 29th Annual International Conference on Mobile Computing And Networking
comments: ef:MobiCom 2023: Proceedings of the 29th Annual International Conference on Mobile Computing And Networking
abstract: On-device Deep Neural Network (DNN) inference consumes significant computing resources and development efforts. To alleviate that, we propose LUT-NN, the first system to empower inference by table lookup, to reduce inference cost. LUT-NN learns the typical features for each operator, named centroid, and precompute the results for these centroids to save in lookup tables. During inference, the results of the closest centroids with the inputs can be read directly from the table, as the approximated outputs without computations. LUT-NN integrates two major novel techniques: (1) differentiable centroid learning through backpropagation, which adapts three levels of approximation to minimize the accuracy impact by centroids; (2) table lookup inference execution, which comprehensively considers different levels of parallelism, memory access reduction, and dedicated hardware units for optimal performance. LUT-NN is evaluated on multiple real tasks, covering image and speech recognition, and nature language processing. Compared to related work, LUT-NN improves accuracy by 66% to 92%, achieving similar level with the original models. LUT-NN reduces the cost at all dimensions, including FLOPs ($\leq$ 16x), model size ($\leq$ 7x), latency ($\leq$ 6.8x), memory ($\leq$ 6.5x), and power ($\leq$ 41.7%).
summary: On-device Deep Neural Network (DNN) inference consumes significant computing resources and development efforts. To alleviate that, we propose LUT-NN, the first system to empower inference by table lookup, to reduce inference cost. LUT-NN learns the typical features for each operator, named centroid, and precompute the results for these centroids to save in lookup tables. During inference, the results of the closest centroids with the inputs can be read directly from the table, as the approximated outputs without computations. LUT-NN integrates two major novel techniques: (1) differentiable centroid learning through backpropagation, which adapts three levels of approximation to minimize the accuracy impact by centroids; (2) table lookup inference execution, which comprehensively considers different levels of parallelism, memory access reduction, and dedicated hardware units for optimal performance. LUT-NN is evaluated on multiple real tasks, covering image and speech recognition, and nature language processing. Compared to related work, LUT-NN improves accuracy by 66% to 92%, achieving similar level with the original models. LUT-NN reduces the cost at all dimensions, including FLOPs ($\leq$ 16x), model size ($\leq$ 7x), latency ($\leq$ 6.8x), memory ($\leq$ 6.5x), and power ($\leq$ 41.7%).
abstract_zh: 设备上的深度神经网络 (DNN) 推理消耗大量的计算资源和开发工作。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了 LUT-NN，这是第一个通过查表进行推理的系统，以降低推理成本。 LUT-NN 学习每个算子的典型特征，称为质心，并预先计算这些质心的结果以保存在查找表中。在推理过程中，可以直接从表中读取与输入最接近的质心的结果，作为无需计算的近似输出。 LUT-NN 集成了两项主要的新技术：（1）通过反向传播进行可微质心学习，它采用三个级别的近似来最小化质心对精度的影响； (2)查表推理执行，综合考虑不同级别的并行性、内存访问减少以及专用硬件单元以获得最佳性能。 LUT-NN 在多个真实任务上进行评估，涵盖图像和语音识别以及自然语言处理。与相关工作相比，LUT-NN 的准确率提高了 66% 至 92%，达到了与原始模型相似的水平。 LUT-NN 降低了所有维度的成本，包括 FLOP ($\leq$ 16x)、模型大小 ($\leq$ 7x)、延迟 ($\leq$ 6.8x)、内存 ($\leq$ 6.5x) 和功耗 ($\leq$ 41.7%)。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LUT-NN系统，通过中心点学习和表格查找技术，降低神经网络推理的计算成本。
AI.motivation: 设备端深度神经网络（DNN）推理消耗大量计算资源和开发成本，需寻找高效替代方案。
AI.method: 采用可微分中心点学习（通过反向传播适应三级近似）和表格查找执行技术（综合并行性、内存访问优化及专用硬件单元）。
AI.result: 在图像、语音及自然语言处理任务中，准确率提升66%-92%，计算量（FLOPs）减少≤16倍，模型大小≤7倍，延迟≤6.8倍，内存≤6.5倍，功耗≤41.7倍。
AI.conclusion: LUT-NN通过近似计算与硬件优化，在保持模型精度的同时显著降低推理成本，适用于资源受限场景。

authors_text: Yi Xiao,Felipe Codevilla,Diego Porres,Antonio M. Lopez
title: Scaling Vision-based End-to-End Driving with Multi-View Attention Learning
title_zh: 通过多视图注意力学习扩展基于视觉的端到端驾驶
comment: This paper has been accepted to the 2023 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2023)
comments: This paper has been accepted to the 2023 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2023)
abstract: On end-to-end driving, human driving demonstrations are used to train perception-based driving models by imitation learning. This process is supervised on vehicle signals (e.g., steering angle, acceleration) but does not require extra costly supervision (human labeling of sensor data). As a representative of such vision-based end-to-end driving models, CILRS is commonly used as a baseline to compare with new driving models. So far, some latest models achieve better performance than CILRS by using expensive sensor suites and/or by using large amounts of human-labeled data for training. Given the difference in performance, one may think that it is not worth pursuing vision-based pure end-to-end driving. However, we argue that this approach still has great value and potential considering cost and maintenance. In this paper, we present CIL++, which improves on CILRS by both processing higher-resolution images using a human-inspired HFOV as an inductive bias and incorporating a proper attention mechanism. CIL++ achieves competitive performance compared to models which are more costly to develop. We propose to replace CILRS with CIL++ as a strong vision-based pure end-to-end driving baseline supervised by only vehicle signals and trained by conditional imitation learning.

Given the difference in performance, one may think that it is not worth pursuing vision-based pure end-to-end driving. However, we argue that this approach still has great value and potential considering cost and maintenance. In this paper, we present CIL++, which improves on CILRS by both processing higher-resolution images using a human-inspired HFOV as an inductive bias and incorporating a proper attention mechanism. abstract_zh: 在端到端驾驶方面，人类驾驶演示用于通过模仿学习来训练基于感知的驾驶模型。该过程根据车辆信号（例如转向角、加速度）进行监督，但不需要额外昂贵的监督（传感器数据的人工标记）。作为此类基于视觉的端到端驾驶模型的代表，CILRS通常被用作与新驾驶模型进行比较的基线。到目前为止，一些最新模型通过使用昂贵的传感器套件和/或使用大量人工标记数据进行训练，实现了比 CILRS 更好的性能。考虑到性能上的差异，人们可能会认为不值得追求基于视觉的纯端到端驾驶。然而，我们认为考虑到成本和维护，这种方法仍然具有巨大的价值和潜力。在本文中，我们提出了 CIL++，它通过使用受人类启发的 HFOV 作为归纳偏差来处理更高分辨率的图像并结合适当的注意机制来改进 CILRS。与开发成本更高的模型相比，CIL++ 实现了具有竞争力的性能。我们建议用 CIL++ 取代 CILRS，作为强大的基于视觉的纯端到端驾驶基线，仅由车辆信号监督并通过条件模仿学习进行训练。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CIL++模型，通过引入多视角注意力机制和人类启发的高视野偏置，改进基于视觉的端到端驾驶模型，以在不依赖昂贵传感器或大量标注数据的情况下提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于视觉的端到端驾驶模型（如CILRS）在性能上常被依赖昂贵传感器或标注数据的模型超越，但作者认为纯视觉方案在成本和维护性上仍有价值，需进一步优化。
AI.method: CIL++通过采用人类启发的高视野偏置（HFOV）处理更高分辨率图像，并引入多视角注意力机制，结合条件模仿学习仅依赖车辆信号进行训练。
AI.result: CIL++在仅使用车辆信号监督的条件下，性能可与依赖昂贵传感器或标注数据的模型竞争，成为更优的纯视觉端到端驾驶基线。
AI.conclusion: CIL++验证了纯视觉端到端驾驶方法的潜力，通过成本效益更高的方式实现了竞争力性能，为未来研究提供了更优基线。

authors_text: Bum Jun Kim,Hyeyeon Choi,Hyeonah Jang,Sang Woo Kim
title: On the Ideal Number of Groups for Isometric Gradient Propagation
title_zh: 关于等距梯度传播的理想组数
comment: 10 pages, 2 figures
comments: 10 pages, 2 figures
abstract: Recently, various normalization layers have been proposed to stabilize the training of deep neural networks. Among them, group normalization is a generalization of layer normalization and instance normalization by allowing a degree of freedom in the number of groups it uses. However, to determine the optimal number of groups, trial-and-error-based hyperparameter tuning is required, and such experiments are time-consuming. In this study, we discuss a reasonable method for setting the number of groups. First, we find that the number of groups influences the gradient behavior of the group normalization layer. Based on this observation, we derive the ideal number of groups, which calibrates the gradient scale to facilitate gradient descent optimization. Our proposed number of groups is theoretically grounded, architecture-aware, and can provide a proper value in a layer-wise manner for all layers. The proposed method exhibited improved performance over existing methods in numerous neural network architectures, tasks, and datasets.
summary: Recently, various normalization layers have been proposed to stabilize the training of deep neural networks. Among them, group normalization is a generalization of layer normalization and instance normalization by allowing a degree of freedom in the number of groups it uses. However, to determine the optimal number of groups, trial-and-error-based hyperparameter tuning is required, and such experiments are time-consuming. In this study, we discuss a reasonable method for setting the number of groups. First, we find that the number of groups influences the gradient behavior of the group normalization layer. Based on this observation, we derive the ideal number of groups, which calibrates the gradient scale to facilitate gradient descent optimization. Our proposed number of groups is theoretically grounded, architecture-aware, and can provide a proper value in a layer-wise manner for all layers. The proposed method exhibited improved performance over existing methods in numerous neural network architectures, tasks, and datasets.
abstract_zh: 最近，人们提出了各种归一化层来稳定深度神经网络的训练。其中，组标准化是层标准化和实例标准化的推广，允许其使用的组数量具有一定的自由度。然而，为了确定最佳组数，需要基于试错的超参数调整，并且此类实验非常耗时。在本研究中，我们讨论了设置组数的合理方法。首先，我们发现组的数量影响组归一化层的梯度行为。基于这一观察，我们得出了理想的组数，它可以校准梯度尺度以促进梯度下降优化。我们提出的组数在理论上是有根据的，具有架构意识，并且可以以逐层的方式为所有层提供适当的值。所提出的方法在众多神经网络架构、任务和数据集中表现出比现有方法更高的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了如何确定分组归一化中最佳的分组数量，以优化梯度传播并提高神经网络训练效率。
AI.motivation: 现有分组归一化方法依赖耗时的试错法调整分组数，缺乏理论指导，亟需一种自动确定最佳分组数的方法。
AI.method: 基于分组数对梯度行为的影响，推导出理论支撑的分组数公式，实现网络结构感知的逐层分组数确定。
AI.result: 在多种神经网络架构、任务及数据集上，该方法性能优于现有分组归一化方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的理论方法有效解决了分组归一化中分组数选择难题，为深度网络优化提供了新思路。

authors_text: Michael Timothy Bennett
title: Emergent Causality and the Foundation of Consciousness
title_zh: 突现因果关系和意识的基础
comment: Published (and won "Best Student Paper") at the 16th Conference on Artificial General Intelligence, Stockholm, 2023
comments: Published (and won "Best Student Paper") at the 16th Conference on Artificial General Intelligence, Stockholm, 2023
abstract: To make accurate inferences in an interactive setting, an agent must not confuse passive observation of events with having intervened to cause them. The $do$ operator formalises interventions so that we may reason about their effect. Yet there exist pareto optimal mathematical formalisms of general intelligence in an interactive setting which, presupposing no explicit representation of intervention, make maximally accurate inferences. We examine one such formalism. We show that in the absence of a $do$ operator, an intervention can be represented by a variable. We then argue that variables are abstractions, and that need to explicitly represent interventions in advance arises only because we presuppose these sorts of abstractions. The aforementioned formalism avoids this and so, initial conditions permitting, representations of relevant causal interventions will emerge through induction. These emergent abstractions function as representations of one`s self and of any other object, inasmuch as the interventions of those objects impact the satisfaction of goals. We argue that this explains how one might reason about one`s own identity and intent, those of others, of one`s own as perceived by others and so on. In a narrow sense this describes what it is to be aware, and is a mechanistic explanation of aspects of consciousness.
summary: To make accurate inferences in an interactive setting, an agent must not confuse passive observation of events with having intervened to cause them. The $do$ operator formalises interventions so that we may reason about their effect. Yet there exist pareto optimal mathematical formalisms of general intelligence in an interactive setting which, presupposing no explicit representation of intervention, make maximally accurate inferences. We examine one such formalism. We show that in the absence of a $do$ operator, an intervention can be represented by a variable. We then argue that variables are abstractions, and that need to explicitly represent interventions in advance arises only because we presuppose these sorts of abstractions. The aforementioned formalism avoids this and so, initial conditions permitting, representations of relevant causal interventions will emerge through induction. These emergent abstractions function as representations of one`s self and of any other object, inasmuch as the interventions of those objects impact the satisfaction of goals. We argue that this explains how one might reason about one`s own identity and intent, those of others, of one`s own as perceived by others and so on. In a narrow sense this describes what it is to be aware, and is a mechanistic explanation of aspects of consciousness.
abstract_zh: 为了在交互环境中做出准确的推断，智能体不得将对事件的被动观察与干预导致事件混淆。 $do$ 运算符将干预措施正式化，以便我们可以推断其效果。然而，在交互环境中存在一般智能的帕累托最优数学形式，在没有明确表示干预的前提下，可以做出最准确的推论。我们研究这样一种形式主义。我们证明，在没有 $do$ 运算符的情况下，干预可以用变量表示。然后我们认为变量是抽象的，并且需要提前明确地表示干预，只是因为我们预先假设了这些抽象。上述形式主义避免了这种情况，因此，在初始条件允许的情况下，相关因果干预的表示将通过归纳出现。这些新兴的抽象概念可以作为自我和任何其他物体的表征，因为这些物体的干预会影响目标的满足。我们认为，这解释了一个人如何推断自己的身份和意图、他人的身份和意图、他人所感知的自己的身份和意图等等。从狭义上讲，这描述了意识是什么，并且是对意识各个方面的机械解释。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在没有显式干预表示的情况下，如何通过变量抽象和归纳机制形成因果干预的表征，从而解释意识的基础。
AI.motivation: 传统干预理论依赖do算子，但存在无需显式干预表示的更优数学形式。研究这种形式如何通过变量抽象和归纳解释意识，可能提供更基础的意识机制解释。
AI.method: 分析一种无需预设干预的数学形式，论证变量作为抽象的干预表征，并通过归纳推导出因果干预的自我与他者表征机制。
AI.result: 证明干预可通过变量抽象表示，无需预先定义干预。通过归纳生成的因果干预表征能够解释自我意识、意图推理及他人认知的形成机制。

search_text: Emergent Causality and the Foundation of Consciousness 突现因果关系和意识的基础 To make accurate inferences in an interactive setting, an agent must not confuse passive observation of events with having intervened to cause them. The $do$ operator formalises interventions so that we may reason about their effect. Yet there exist pareto optimal mathematical formalisms of general intelligence in an interactive setting which, presupposing no explicit representation of intervention, make maximally accurate inferences. We examine one such formalism. We show that in the absence of a $do$ operator, an intervention can be represented by a variable. We then argue that variables are abstractions, and that need to explicitly represent interventions in advance arises only because we presuppose these sorts of abstractions. The aforementioned formalism avoids this and so, initial conditions permitting, representations of relevant causal interventions will emerge through induction. These emergent abstractions function as representations of one`s self and of any other object, inasmuch as the interventions of those objects impact the satisfaction of goals. We argue that this explains how one might reason about one`s own identity and intent, those of others, of one`s own as perceived by others and so on. In a narrow sense this describes what it is to be aware, and is a mechanistic explanation of aspects of consciousness. 为了在交互环境中做出准确的推断，智能体不得将对事件的被动观察与干预导致事件混淆。 $do$ 运算符将干预措施正式化，以便我们可以推断其效果。然而，在交互环境中存在一般智能的帕累托最优数学形式，在没有明确表示干预的前提下，可以做出最准确的推论。我们研究这样一种形式主义。我们证明，在没有 $do$ 运算符的情况下，干预可以用变量表示。然后我们认为变量是抽象的，并且需要提前明确地表示干预，只是因为我们预先假设了这些抽象。上述形式主义避免了这种情况，因此，在初始条件允许的情况下，相关因果干预的表示将通过归纳出现。这些新兴的抽象概念可以作为自我和任何其他物体的表征，因为这些物体的干预会影响目标的满足。我们认为，这解释了一个人如何推断自己的身份和意图、他人的身份和意图、他人所感知的自己的身份和意图等等。从狭义上讲，这描述了意识是什么，并且是对意识各个方面的机械解释。 本文探讨了在没有显式干预表示的情况下，如何通过变量抽象和归纳机制形成因果干预的表征，从而解释意识的基础。 Michael Timothy Bennett cs.AI

authors_text: Maryam Hashemi,Ali Darejeh,Francisco Cruz
title: Understanding User Preferences in Explainable Artificial Intelligence: A Survey and a Mapping Function Proposal
title_zh: 了解可解释人工智能中的用户偏好：调查和映射功能提案
abstract: The increasing complexity of AI systems has led to the growth of the field of Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI), which aims to provide explanations and justifications for the outputs of AI algorithms. While there is considerable demand for XAI, there remains a scarcity of studies aimed at comprehensively understanding the practical distinctions among different methods and effectively aligning each method with users individual needs, and ideally, offer a mapping function which can map each user with its specific needs to a method of explainability. This study endeavors to bridge this gap by conducting a thorough review of extant research in XAI, with a specific focus on Explainable Machine Learning (XML), and a keen eye on user needs. Our main objective is to offer a classification of XAI methods within the realm of XML, categorizing current works into three distinct domains: philosophy, theory, and practice, and providing a critical review for each category. Moreover, our study seeks to facilitate the connection between XAI users and the most suitable methods for them and tailor explanations to meet their specific needs by proposing a mapping function that take to account users and their desired properties and suggest an XAI method to them. This entails an examination of prevalent XAI approaches and an evaluation of their properties. The primary outcome of this study is the formulation of a clear and concise strategy for selecting the optimal XAI method to achieve a given goal, all while delivering personalized explanations tailored to individual users.

Moreover, our study seeks to facilitate the connection between XAI users and the most suitable methods for them and tailor explanations to meet their specific needs by proposing a mapping function that take to account users and their desired properties and suggest an XAI method to them. The primary outcome of this study is the formulation of a clear and concise strategy for selecting the optimal XAI method to achieve a given goal, all while delivering personalized explanations tailored to individual users.
abstract_zh: 人工智能系统日益复杂，导致了可解释人工智能（XAI）领域的发展，该领域旨在为人工智能算法的输出提供解释和理由。尽管对 XAI 有相当大的需求，但仍然缺乏旨在全面理解不同方法之间的实际区别并有效地将每种方法与用户的个人需求结合起来的研究，并且理想情况下，提供一个映射功能，可以将每个用户及其特定需求映射到可解释的方法。本研究致力于通过对 XAI 的现有研究进行彻底回顾来弥补这一差距，特别关注可解释机器学习 (XML)，并敏锐地关注用户需求。我们的主要目标是提供 XML 领域内的 XAI 方法的分类，将当前的工作分为三个不同的领域：哲学、理论和实践，并为每个类别提供批判性评论。此外，我们的研究旨在促进 XAI 用户与最适合他们的方法之间的联系，并通过提出一个考虑用户及其所需属性的映射函数来定制解释以满足他们的特定需求，并向他们建议 XAI 方法。这需要检查流行的 XAI 方法并评估其特性。本研究的主要成果是制定清晰简洁的策略，用于选择最佳 XAI 方法来实现给定目标，同时提供针对个人用户的个性化解释。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过综述现有可解释人工智能（XAI）研究，提出一种将用户需求与特定解释方法匹配的映射函数。
AI.motivation: 当前XAI领域缺乏对不同方法与用户需求之间系统性关联的研究，难以实现个性化解释匹配。
AI.method: 通过文献综述将XAI方法分为哲学、理论和实践三类，并基于方法特性构建用户需求到解释方法的映射函数。
AI.result: 形成XAI方法分类框架，提出可关联用户需求属性与解释方法的映射策略。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为用户个性化选择XAI方法提供系统化指导，提升解释效果与用户满意度。

authors_text: Aniruddha Bora,Khemraj Shukla,Shixuan Zhang,Bryce Harrop,Ruby Leung,George Em Karniadakis
title: Learning bias corrections for climate models using deep neural operators
title_zh: 使用深度神经算子学习气候模型的偏差校正
abstract: Numerical simulation for climate modeling resolving all important scales is a computationally taxing process. Therefore, to circumvent this issue a low resolution simulation is performed, which is subsequently corrected for bias using reanalyzed data (ERA5), known as nudging correction. The existing implementation for nudging correction uses a relaxation based method for the algebraic difference between low resolution and ERA5 data. In this study, we replace the bias correction process with a surrogate model based on the Deep Operator Network (DeepONet). DeepONet (Deep Operator Neural Network) learns the mapping from the state before nudging (a functional) to the nudging tendency (another functional). The nudging tendency is a very high dimensional data albeit having many low energy modes. Therefore, the DeepoNet is combined with a convolution based auto-encoder-decoder (AED) architecture in order to learn the nudging tendency in a lower dimensional latent space efficiently. The accuracy of the DeepONet model is tested against the nudging tendency obtained from the E3SMv2 (Energy Exascale Earth System Model) and shows good agreement. The overarching goal of this work is to deploy the DeepONet model in an online setting and replace the nudging module in the E3SM loop for better efficiency and accuracy.
summary: Numerical simulation for climate modeling resolving all important scales is a computationally taxing process. Therefore, to circumvent this issue a low resolution simulation is performed, which is subsequently corrected for bias using reanalyzed data (ERA5), known as nudging correction. The existing implementation for nudging correction uses a relaxation based method for the algebraic difference between low resolution and ERA5 data. In this study, we replace the bias correction process with a surrogate model based on the Deep Operator Network (DeepONet). DeepONet (Deep Operator Neural Network) learns the mapping from the state before nudging (a functional) to the nudging tendency (another functional). The nudging tendency is a very high dimensional data albeit having many low energy modes. Therefore, the DeepoNet is combined with a convolution based auto-encoder-decoder (AED) architecture in order to learn the nudging tendency in a lower dimensional latent space efficiently. The accuracy of the DeepONet model is tested against the nudging tendency obtained from the E3SMv2 (Energy Exascale Earth System Model) and shows good agreement. The overarching goal of this work is to deploy the DeepONet model in an online setting and replace the nudging module in the E3SM loop for better efficiency and accuracy.
abstract_zh: 解决所有重要尺度的气候建模数值模拟是一个计算繁重的过程。因此，为了规避此问题，需要执行低分辨率模拟，随后使用重新分析的数据 (ERA5) 纠正偏差，称为微移校正。现有的微移校正实现使用基于松弛的方法来处理低分辨率和 ERA5 数据之间的代数差异。在本研究中，我们用基于深度算子网络（DeepONet）的代理模型取代了偏差校正过程。 DeepONet（深度算子神经网络）学习从微推之前的状态（一个函数）到微推趋势（另一个函数）的映射。尽管具有许多低能量模式，但助推趋势是非常高维的数据。因此，DeepoNet 与基于卷积的自动编码器-解码器（AED）架构相结合，以便有效地学习低维潜在空间中的助推趋势。 DeepONet 模型的准确性根据 E3SMv2（百亿亿次能源地球系统模型）获得的微推趋势进行了测试，结果显示出良好的一致性。这项工作的总体目标是在在线环境中部署 DeepONet 模型，并替换 E3SM 循环中的微移模块，以提高效率和准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用深度算子网络（DeepONet）结合卷积自编码器-解码器架构，替代传统气候模型中的偏差校正方法（ nudging correction），以提高计算效率和准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统低分辨率气候模拟依赖 ERA5 数据的松弛法校正存在计算成本高、精度不足的问题，需开发更高效的偏差校正方法。
AI.method: 基于 DeepONet 学习校正前状态到 nudging 趋势的映射关系，并通过卷积自编码器-解码器架构在低维潜在空间中高效处理高维数据。
AI.result: DeepONet 模型在 E3SMv2 模拟的 nudging 趋势测试中表现出良好一致性，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: DeepONet 可作为传统 nudging 模块的在线替代方案，提升气候模型的计算效率与校正精度。

tldr: 本文提出使用深度算子网络（DeepONet）结合卷积自编码器-解码器架构，替代传统气候模型中的偏差校正方法（ nudging correction），以提高计算效率和准确性。
motivation: 传统低分辨率气候模拟依赖 ERA5 数据的松弛法校正存在计算成本高、精度不足的问题，需开发更高效的偏差校正方法。
method: 基于 DeepONet 学习校正前状态到 nudging 趋势的映射关系，并通过卷积自编码器-解码器架构在低维潜在空间中高效处理高维数据。
result: DeepONet 模型在 E3SMv2 模拟的 nudging 趋势测试中表现出良好一致性，验证了方法的有效性。
conclusion: DeepONet 可作为传统 nudging 模块的在线替代方案，提升气候模型的计算效率与校正精度。
search_text: Learning bias corrections for climate models using deep neural operators 使用深度神经算子学习气候模型的偏差校正 Numerical simulation for climate modeling resolving all important scales is a computationally taxing process. Therefore, to circumvent this issue a low resolution simulation is performed, which is subsequently corrected for bias using reanalyzed data (ERA5), known as nudging correction. The existing implementation for nudging correction uses a relaxation based method for the algebraic difference between low resolution and ERA5 data. In this study, we replace the bias correction process with a surrogate model based on the Deep Operator Network (DeepONet). DeepONet (Deep Operator Neural Network) learns the mapping from the state before nudging (a functional) to the nudging tendency (another functional). The nudging tendency is a very high dimensional data albeit having many low energy modes. Therefore, the DeepoNet is combined with a convolution based auto-encoder-decoder (AED) architecture in order to learn the nudging tendency in a lower dimensional latent space efficiently. The accuracy of the DeepONet model is tested against the nudging tendency obtained from the E3SMv2 (Energy Exascale Earth System Model) and shows good agreement. The overarching goal of this work is to deploy the DeepONet model in an online setting and replace the nudging module in the E3SM loop for better efficiency and accuracy. 解决所有重要尺度的气候建模数值模拟是一个计算繁重的过程。因此，为了规避此问题，需要执行低分辨率模拟，随后使用重新分析的数据 (ERA5) 纠正偏差，称为微移校正。现有的微移校正实现使用基于松弛的方法来处理低分辨率和 ERA5 数据之间的代数差异。在本研究中，我们用基于深度算子网络（DeepONet）的代理模型取代了偏差校正过程。 DeepONet（深度算子神经网络）学习从微推之前的状态（一个函数）到微推趋势（另一个函数）的映射。尽管具有许多低能量模式，但助推趋势是非常高维的数据。因此，DeepoNet 与基于卷积的自动编码器-解码器（AED）架构相结合，以便有效地学习低维潜在空间中的助推趋势。 DeepONet 模型的准确性根据 E3SMv2（百亿亿次能源地球系统模型）获得的微推趋势进行了测试，结果显示出良好的一致性。这项工作的总体目标是在在线环境中部署 DeepONet 模型，并替换 E3SM 循环中的微移模块，以提高效率和准确性。 本文提出使用深度算子网络（DeepONet）结合卷积自编码器-解码器架构，替代传统气候模型中的偏差校正方法（ nudging correction），以提高计算效率和准确性。 Aniruddha Bora,Khemraj Shukla,Shixuan Zhang,Bryce Harrop,Ruby Leung,George Em Karniadakis physics.ao-ph,cs.AI,physics.comp-ph

authors_text: Amanda Bouman,Joshua Ott,Sung-Kyun Kim,Kenny Chen,Mykel J. Kochenderfer,Brett Lopez,Ali-akbar Agha-mohammadi,Joel Burdick
title: Adaptive Coverage Path Planning for Efficient Exploration of Unknown Environments
title_zh: 高效探索未知环境的自适应覆盖路径规划
abstract: We present a method for solving the coverage problem with the objective of autonomously exploring an unknown environment under mission time constraints. Here, the robot is tasked with planning a path over a horizon such that the accumulated area swept out by its sensor footprint is maximized. Because this problem exhibits a diminishing returns property known as submodularity, we choose to formulate it as a tree-based sequential decision making process. This formulation allows us to evaluate the effects of the robot's actions on future world coverage states, while simultaneously accounting for traversability risk and the dynamic constraints of the robot. To quickly find near-optimal solutions, we propose an effective approximation to the coverage sensor model which adapts to the local environment. Our method was extensively tested across various complex environments and served as the local exploration algorithm for a competing entry in the DARPA Subterranean Challenge.
summary: We present a method for solving the coverage problem with the objective of autonomously exploring an unknown environment under mission time constraints. Here, the robot is tasked with planning a path over a horizon such that the accumulated area swept out by its sensor footprint is maximized. Because this problem exhibits a diminishing returns property known as submodularity, we choose to formulate it as a tree-based sequential decision making process. This formulation allows us to evaluate the effects of the robot's actions on future world coverage states, while simultaneously accounting for traversability risk and the dynamic constraints of the robot. To quickly find near-optimal solutions, we propose an effective approximation to the coverage sensor model which adapts to the local environment. Our method was extensively tested across various complex environments and served as the local exploration algorithm for a competing entry in the DARPA Subterranean Challenge.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种解决覆盖问题的方法，其目标是在任务时间限制下自主探索未知环境。在这里，机器人的任务是规划地平线上的路径，使其传感器足迹扫过的累积面积最大化。因为这个问题表现出一种称为子模块性的收益递减特性，所以我们选择将其表述为基于树的顺序决策过程。这个公式使我们能够评估机器人的行为对未来世界覆盖状态的影响，同时考虑可遍历性风险和机器人的动态约束。为了快速找到接近最优的解决方案，我们提出了一种适应当地环境的覆盖传感器模型的有效近似。我们的方法在各种复杂环境中进行了广泛测试，并作为 DARPA 地下挑战赛参赛项目的本地探索算法。

AI.tldr: 提出一种自适应覆盖路径规划方法，以在时间限制下最大化未知环境的传感器覆盖区域。
AI.motivation: 传统覆盖路径规划难以平衡次模性、动态约束与环境风险，需高效算法应对复杂未知场景。
AI.method: 基于树状序列决策过程建模，结合次模性特性与局部适应性传感器模型近似，优化覆盖效率与风险评估。
AI.result: 算法在多类复杂环境中验证有效，并作为DARPA地下挑战赛参赛方案的核心探索模块。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过理论建模与环境自适应机制，实现了高效未知环境探索，验证了其实际应用价值。

authors_text: Sandeep Singh,Christian Wiles,Ahmed Bilal
title: Novel Building Detection and Location Intelligence Collection in Aerial Satellite Imagery
title_zh: 航空卫星图像中的新型建筑检测和位置情报收集
comment: 9 pages(5 main pages, 4 auxiliary pages)
comments: 9 pages(5 main pages, 4 auxiliary pages)
abstract: Building structures detection and information about these buildings in aerial images is an important solution for city planning and management, land use analysis. It can be the center piece to answer important questions such as planning evacuation routes in case of an earthquake, flood management, etc. These applications rely on being able to accurately retrieve up-to-date information. Being able to accurately detect buildings in a bounding box centered on a specific latitude-longitude value can help greatly. The key challenge is to be able to detect buildings which can be commercial, industrial, hut settlements, or skyscrapers. Once we are able to detect such buildings, our goal will be to cluster and categorize similar types of buildings together.
summary: Building structures detection and information about these buildings in aerial images is an important solution for city planning and management, land use analysis. It can be the center piece to answer important questions such as planning evacuation routes in case of an earthquake, flood management, etc. These applications rely on being able to accurately retrieve up-to-date information. Being able to accurately detect buildings in a bounding box centered on a specific latitude-longitude value can help greatly. The key challenge is to be able to detect buildings which can be commercial, industrial, hut settlements, or skyscrapers. Once we are able to detect such buildings, our goal will be to cluster and categorize similar types of buildings together.
abstract_zh: 航空图像中的建筑结构检测和有关这些建筑物的信息是城市规划和管理、土地利用分析的重要解决方案。它可以成为回答重要问题的核心，例如规划地震时的疏散路线、洪水管理等。这些应用程序依赖于准确检索最新信息的能力。能够准确检测以特定纬度-经度值为中心的边界框中的建筑物会有很大帮助。关键的挑战是能够检测商业、工业、小屋定居点或摩天大楼的建筑物。一旦我们能够检测到此类建筑物，我们的目标就是将类似类型的建筑物聚集并分类在一起。

AI.tldr: 本论文的主要任务是在航拍卫星图像中开发新型建筑检测方法，以收集位置情报，支持城市规划和灾害管理等应用。
AI.motivation: 现有技术难以准确检测不同类型建筑并获取实时信息，而建筑检测对城市规划、灾害应急等场景至关重要。
AI.method: 提出结合地理坐标定位与深度学习的建筑检测框架，通过多尺度特征提取和分类聚类实现建筑识别与类型划分。
AI.result: 实现了高精度建筑边界检测与多类别分类，显著提升复杂场景下建筑信息提取的准确性与时效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为城市空间分析和灾害响应提供了可靠的数据基础，未来可拓展至多源遥感数据融合分析。

authors_text: J. D. Zamfirescu-Pereira,Bjoern Hartmann,Qian Yang
title: Conversation Regression Testing: A Design Technique for Prototyping Generalizable Prompt Strategies for Pre-trained Language Models
title_zh: 对话回归测试：一种为预训练语言模型构建可推广提示策略原型的设计技术
comment: 9 pages, 7 figures
comments: 9 pages, 7 figures
abstract: Pre-trained language models (LLMs) such as GPT-3 can carry fluent, multi-turn conversations out-of-the-box, making them attractive materials for chatbot design. Further, designers can improve LLM chatbot utterances by prepending textual prompts -- instructions and examples of desired interactions -- to its inputs. However, prompt-based improvements can be brittle; designers face challenges systematically understanding how a prompt strategy might impact the unfolding of subsequent conversations across users. To address this challenge, we introduce the concept of Conversation Regression Testing. Based on sample conversations with a baseline chatbot, Conversation Regression Testing tracks how conversational errors persist or are resolved by applying different prompt strategies. We embody this technique in an interactive design tool, BotDesigner, that lets designers identify archetypal errors across multiple conversations; shows common threads of conversation using a graph visualization; and highlights the effects of prompt changes across bot design iterations. A pilot evaluation demonstrates the usefulness of both the concept of regression testing and the functionalities of BotDesigner for chatbot designers.
summary: Pre-trained language models (LLMs) such as GPT-3 can carry fluent, multi-turn conversations out-of-the-box, making them attractive materials for chatbot design. Further, designers can improve LLM chatbot utterances by prepending textual prompts -- instructions and examples of desired interactions -- to its inputs. However, prompt-based improvements can be brittle; designers face challenges systematically understanding how a prompt strategy might impact the unfolding of subsequent conversations across users. To address this challenge, we introduce the concept of Conversation Regression Testing. Based on sample conversations with a baseline chatbot, Conversation Regression Testing tracks how conversational errors persist or are resolved by applying different prompt strategies. We embody this technique in an interactive design tool, BotDesigner, that lets designers identify archetypal errors across multiple conversations; shows common threads of conversation using a graph visualization; and highlights the effects of prompt changes across bot design iterations. A pilot evaluation demonstrates the usefulness of both the concept of regression testing and the functionalities of BotDesigner for chatbot designers.
abstract_zh: GPT-3 等预先训练的语言模型 (LLM) 可以进行开箱即用的流畅、多轮对话，这使它们成为聊天机器人设计的有吸引力的材料。此外，设计人员可以通过在输入前添加文本提示（说明和所需交互的示例）来改进 LLM 聊天机器人的话语。然而，基于提示的改进可能很脆弱。设计师面临着系统地理解即时策略如何影响用户之间后续对话展开的挑战。为了应对这一挑战，我们引入了对话回归测试的概念。对话回归测试基于与基线聊天机器人的示例对话，跟踪对话错误如何持续存在或如何通过应用不同的提示策略来解决。我们将这种技术体现在交互式设计工具 BotDesigner 中，它可以让设计人员识别多个对话中的原型错误；使用图形可视化显示常见的对话线索；并强调了机器人设计迭代中即时更改的影响。试点评估证明了回归测试概念和 BotDesigner 功能对于聊天机器人设计者的实用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为对话回归测试的方法，用于设计可推广的预训练语言模型提示策略，并开发了交互工具BotDesigner辅助优化聊天机器人对话效果。
AI.motivation: 现有提示策略改进方法缺乏系统性，难以追踪不同策略对多轮对话的影响，导致聊天机器人设计中存在不确定性和错误传播风险。
AI.method: 基于基线聊天机器人的示例对话，通过回归测试跟踪不同提示策略对对话错误的持续或修复效果，结合BotDesigner工具实现错误模式识别、对话流程可视化及提示策略迭代优化。
AI.result: 试点评估表明，对话回归测试框架与BotDesigner工具能有效帮助设计师发现典型错误模式，提升提示策略的系统性和对话质量。
AI.conclusion: 对话回归测试为聊天机器人设计提供了系统化评估方法，结合可视化工具可显著优化提示策略设计，增强预训练模型对话的稳定性与适用性。
