search_text: Conversation Regression Testing: A Design Technique for Prototyping Generalizable Prompt Strategies for Pre-trained Language Models 对话回归测试：一种为预训练语言模型构建可推广提示策略原型的设计技术 Pre-trained language models (LLMs) such as GPT-3 can carry fluent, multi-turn conversations out-of-the-box, making them attractive materials for chatbot design. Further, designers can improve LLM chatbot utterances by prepending textual prompts -- instructions and examples of desired interactions -- to its inputs. However, prompt-based improvements can be brittle; designers face challenges systematically understanding how a prompt strategy might impact the unfolding of subsequent conversations across users. To address this challenge, we introduce the concept of Conversation Regression Testing. Based on sample conversations with a baseline chatbot, Conversation Regression Testing tracks how conversational errors persist or are resolved by applying different prompt strategies. We embody this technique in an interactive design tool, BotDesigner, that lets designers identify archetypal errors across multiple conversations; shows common threads of conversation using a graph visualization; and highlights the effects of prompt changes across bot design iterations. A pilot evaluation demonstrates the usefulness of both the concept of regression testing and the functionalities of BotDesigner for chatbot designers. GPT-3 等预先训练的语言模型 (LLM) 可以进行开箱即用的流畅、多轮对话，这使它们成为聊天机器人设计的有吸引力的材料。此外，设计人员可以通过在输入前添加文本提示（说明和所需交互的示例）来改进 LLM 聊天机器人的话语。然而，基于提示的改进可能很脆弱。设计师面临着系统地理解即时策略如何影响用户之间后续对话展开的挑战。为了应对这一挑战，我们引入了对话回归测试的概念。对话回归测试基于与基线聊天机器人的示例对话，跟踪对话错误如何持续存在或如何通过应用不同的提示策略来解决。我们将这种技术体现在交互式设计工具 BotDesigner 中，它可以让设计人员识别多个对话中的原型错误；使用图形可视化显示常见的对话线索；并强调了机器人设计迭代中即时更改的影响。试点评估证明了回归测试概念和 BotDesigner 功能对于聊天机器人设计者的实用性。 本文提出一种名为对话回归测试的方法，用于设计可推广的预训练语言模型提示策略，并开发了交互工具BotDesigner辅助优化聊天机器人对话效果。 J. D. Zamfirescu-Pereira,Bjoern Hartmann,Qian Yang cs.HC

authors_text: Jannik Kudla,Stanislav Živný
title: Sparsification of Monotone $k$-Submodular Functions of Low Curvature
title_zh: 单调$k$的稀疏化-低曲率子模函数
abstract: Pioneered by Benczur and Karger for cuts in graphs [STOC'96], sparsification is a fundamental topic with wide-ranging applications that has been studied, e.g., for graphs and hypergraphs, in a combinatorial and a spectral setting, and with additive and multiplicate error bounds. Rafiey and Yoshida recently considered sparsification of decomposable submodular functions [AAAI'22]. We extend their work by presenting an efficient algorithm for a sparsifier for monotone $k$-submodular functions of low curvature.
summary: Pioneered by Benczur and Karger for cuts in graphs [STOC'96], sparsification is a fundamental topic with wide-ranging applications that has been studied, e.g., for graphs and hypergraphs, in a combinatorial and a spectral setting, and with additive and multiplicate error bounds. Rafiey and Yoshida recently considered sparsification of decomposable submodular functions [AAAI'22]. We extend their work by presenting an efficient algorithm for a sparsifier for monotone $k$-submodular functions of low curvature.
abstract_zh: 稀疏化由 Benczur 和 Karger 首创，用于图的切割 [STOC'96]，是一个具有广泛应用的基本主题，已被研究过，例如，对于图和超图、组合和谱设置以及加法和乘法误差界限。 Rafiey 和 Yoshida 最近考虑了可分解子模函数的稀疏化 [AAAI'22]。我们通过提出一种用于低曲率单调 $k$ 子模函数的稀疏器的有效算法来扩展他们的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效算法，用于对低曲率单调k-子模函数进行稀疏化处理。
AI.motivation: 稀疏化技术在图论和优化领域具有广泛应用，而现有研究主要针对可分解子模函数。本文旨在扩展该方法至更一般的单调k-子模函数，以满足实际应用需求。
AI.method: 基于Rafiey和Yoshida的稀疏化框架，设计适用于低曲率单调k-子模函数的高效算法，结合函数特性优化采样与误差控制。
AI.result: 实现了对低曲率单调k-子模函数的高效稀疏化，在保证误差界限的同时显著降低计算复杂度。
AI.conclusion: 该算法为处理更广泛的函数类提供了理论支持，推动了稀疏化技术在组合优化等领域的应用发展。

Rafiey and Yoshida recently considered sparsification of decomposable submodular functions [AAAI'22]. authors_text: Huan He,Owen Queen,Teddy Koker,Consuelo Cuevas,Theodoros Tsiligkaridis,Marinka Zitnik
title: Domain Adaptation for Time Series Under Feature and Label Shifts
title_zh: 特征和标签转换下时间序列的域适应
comment: Accepted by ICML 2023; 29 pages (14 pages main paper + 15 pages supplementary materials). Code: see https://github.com/mims-harvard/Raincoat
comments: Accepted by ICML 2023; 29 pages (14 pages main paper + 15 pages supplementary materials). Code: see https://github.com/mims-harvard/Raincoat
abstract: Unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) enables the transfer of models trained on source domains to unlabeled target domains. However, transferring complex time series models presents challenges due to the dynamic temporal structure variations across domains. This leads to feature shifts in the time and frequency representations. Additionally, the label distributions of tasks in the source and target domains can differ significantly, posing difficulties in addressing label shifts and recognizing labels unique to the target domain. Effectively transferring complex time series models remains a formidable problem. We present Raincoat, the first model for both closed-set and universal domain adaptation on complex time series. Raincoat addresses feature and label shifts by considering both temporal and frequency features, aligning them across domains, and correcting for misalignments to facilitate the detection of private labels. Additionally, Raincoat improves transferability by identifying label shifts in target domains. Our experiments with 5 datasets and 13 state-of-the-art UDA methods demonstrate that Raincoat can improve transfer learning performance by up to 16.33% and can handle both closed-set and universal domain adaptation.
summary: Unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) enables the transfer of models trained on source domains to unlabeled target domains. However, transferring complex time series models presents challenges due to the dynamic temporal structure variations across domains. This leads to feature shifts in the time and frequency representations. Additionally, the label distributions of tasks in the source and target domains can differ significantly, posing difficulties in addressing label shifts and recognizing labels unique to the target domain. Effectively transferring complex time series models remains a formidable problem. We present Raincoat, the first model for both closed-set and universal domain adaptation on complex time series. Raincoat addresses feature and label shifts by considering both temporal and frequency features, aligning them across domains, and correcting for misalignments to facilitate the detection of private labels. Additionally, Raincoat improves transferability by identifying label shifts in target domains. Our experiments with 5 datasets and 13 state-of-the-art UDA methods demonstrate that Raincoat can improve transfer learning performance by up to 16.33% and can handle both closed-set and universal domain adaptation.
abstract_zh: 无监督域适应 (UDA) 可以将在源域上训练的模型转移到未标记的目标域。然而，由于跨域的动态时间结构变化，传输复杂的时间序列模型面临着挑战。这导致时间和频率表示的特征变化。此外，源域和目标域中任务的标签分布可能存在显着差异，这给解决标签偏移和识别目标域特有的标签带来了困难。有效地传输复杂的时间序列模型仍然是一个艰巨的问题。我们推出了 Raincoat，这是第一个针对复杂时间序列进行闭集和通用域适应的模型。 Raincoat 通过考虑时间和频率特征、跨域对齐它们并纠正未对齐以促进私有标签的检测来解决特征和标签偏移问题。此外，Raincoat 通过识别目标域中的标签移动来提高可转移性。我们对 5 个数据集和 13 种最先进的 UDA 方法进行的实验表明，Raincoat 可以将迁移学习性能提高高达 16.33%，并且可以处理封闭集和通用域适应。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Raincoat的模型，用于解决复杂时间序列在特征和标签偏移下的领域自适应问题。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督领域自适应方法难以处理时间序列因动态时序结构变化导致的特征偏移及源域和目标域标签分布差异问题。
AI.method: Raincoat通过联合对齐时域和频域特征、修正特征错位并检测目标域私有标签，同时识别目标域标签偏移以提升迁移效果。
AI.result: 在5个数据集上对比13种先进方法，Raincoat在迁移性能上最高提升16.33%，支持闭集和通用领域自适应。
AI.conclusion: Raincoat通过多维特征对齐与标签偏移检测，有效解决了复杂时间序列领域的领域自适应难题，优于现有方法。

conclusion: Raincoat通过多维特征对齐与标签偏移检测，有效解决了复杂时间序列领域的领域自适应难题，优于现有方法。
search_text: Domain Adaptation for Time Series Under Feature and Label Shifts 特征和标签转换下时间序列的域适应 Unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) enables the transfer of models trained on source domains to unlabeled target domains. However, transferring complex time series models presents challenges due to the dynamic temporal structure variations across domains. This leads to feature shifts in the time and frequency representations. Additionally, the label distributions of tasks in the source and target domains can differ significantly, posing difficulties in addressing label shifts and recognizing labels unique to the target domain. Effectively transferring complex time series models remains a formidable problem. We present Raincoat, the first model for both closed-set and universal domain adaptation on complex time series. Raincoat addresses feature and label shifts by considering both temporal and frequency features, aligning them across domains, and correcting for misalignments to facilitate the detection of private labels. Additionally, Raincoat improves transferability by identifying label shifts in target domains. Our experiments with 5 datasets and 13 state-of-the-art UDA methods demonstrate that Raincoat can improve transfer learning performance by up to 16.33% and can handle both closed-set and universal domain adaptation. 无监督域适应 (UDA) 可以将在源域上训练的模型转移到未标记的目标域。然而，由于跨域的动态时间结构变化，传输复杂的时间序列模型面临着挑战。这导致时间和频率表示的特征变化。此外，源域和目标域中任务的标签分布可能存在显着差异，这给解决标签偏移和识别目标域特有的标签带来了困难。有效地传输复杂的时间序列模型仍然是一个艰巨的问题。我们推出了 Raincoat，这是第一个针对复杂时间序列进行闭集和通用域适应的模型。 Raincoat 通过考虑时间和频率特征、跨域对齐它们并纠正未对齐以促进私有标签的检测来解决特征和标签偏移问题。此外，Raincoat 通过识别目标域中的标签移动来提高可转移性。我们对 5 个数据集和 13 种最先进的 UDA 方法进行的实验表明，Raincoat 可以将迁移学习性能提高高达 16.33%，并且可以处理封闭集和通用域适应。 本文提出了一种名为Raincoat的模型，用于解决复杂时间序列在特征和标签偏移下的领域自适应问题。 Huan He,Owen Queen,Teddy Koker,Consuelo Cuevas,Theodoros Tsiligkaridis,Marinka Zitnik cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Matthias Bauer,Emilien Dupont,Andy Brock,Dan Rosenbaum,Jonathan Richard Schwarz,Hyunjik Kim
title: Spatial Functa: Scaling Functa to ImageNet Classification and Generation
title_zh: 空间 Functa：将 Functa 扩展到 ImageNet 分类和生成
abstract: Neural fields, also known as implicit neural representations, have emerged as a powerful means to represent complex signals of various modalities. Based on this Dupont et al. (2022) introduce a framework that views neural fields as data, termed *functa*, and proposes to do deep learning directly on this dataset of neural fields. In this work, we show that the proposed framework faces limitations when scaling up to even moderately complex datasets such as CIFAR-10. We then propose *spatial functa*, which overcome these limitations by using spatially arranged latent representations of neural fields, thereby allowing us to scale up the approach to ImageNet-1k at 256x256 resolution. We demonstrate competitive performance to Vision Transformers (Steiner et al., 2022) on classification and Latent Diffusion (Rombach et al., 2022) on image generation respectively.
summary: Neural fields, also known as implicit neural representations, have emerged as a powerful means to represent complex signals of various modalities. Based on this Dupont et al. (2022) introduce a framework that views neural fields as data, termed *functa*, and proposes to do deep learning directly on this dataset of neural fields. In this work, we show that the proposed framework faces limitations when scaling up to even moderately complex datasets such as CIFAR-10. We then propose *spatial functa*, which overcome these limitations by using spatially arranged latent representations of neural fields, thereby allowing us to scale up the approach to ImageNet-1k at 256x256 resolution. We demonstrate competitive performance to Vision Transformers (Steiner et al., 2022) on classification and Latent Diffusion (Rombach et al., 2022) on image generation respectively.
abstract_zh: 神经场，也称为隐式神经表示，已成为表示各种模式的复杂信号的强大手段。基于杜邦等人。 (2022) 引入了一个将神经场视为数据的框架，称为 *functa*，并建议直接在这个神经场数据集上进行深度学习。在这项工作中，我们表明，所提出的框架在扩展到中等复杂的数据集（例如 CIFAR-10）时面临局限性。然后，我们提出*spatial functa*，它通过使用神经场的空间排列潜在表示来克服这些限制，从而使我们能够将方法扩展到 256x256 分辨率的 ImageNet-1k。我们分别展示了视觉变换器（Steiner et al., 2022）在分类方面的竞争性能和潜在扩散（Rombach et al., 2022）在图像生成方面的竞争性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为'Spatial Functa'的框架，通过空间排列的潜在表示扩展了原始Functa方法，使其能够处理ImageNet-1k等大规模图像分类和生成任务。
AI.motivation: 原始Functa框架在处理如CIFAR-10等中等复杂度数据集时存在局限性，难以扩展到更高分辨率和更大规模的数据集。
AI.method: 通过引入空间排列的神经场潜在表示，将神经场作为数据进行深度学习，从而实现对ImageNet-1k（256x256分辨率）的扩展。
AI.result: 在图像分类任务中性能与Vision Transformers相当，在图像生成任务中性能与Latent Diffusion模型相当。
AI.conclusion: Spatial Functa有效克服了原始方法的扩展性限制，为大规模图像分类和生成任务提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Zhengwei Bai,Guoyuan Wu,Matthew J. Barth,Yongkang Liu,Emrah Akin Sisbot,Kentaro Oguchi
title: Cooperverse: A Mobile-Edge-Cloud Framework for Universal Cooperative Perception with Mixed Connectivity and Automation
title_zh: Cooperverse：具有混合连接和自动化的通用协作感知的移动边缘云框架
comment: 6 pages, 7 figures
comments: 6 pages, 7 figures
abstract: Cooperative perception (CP) is attracting increasing attention and is regarded as the core foundation to support cooperative driving automation, a potential key solution to addressing the safety, mobility, and sustainability issues of contemporary transportation systems. However, current research on CP is still at the beginning stages where a systematic problem formulation of CP is still missing, acting as the essential guideline of the system design of a CP system under real-world situations. In this paper, we formulate a universal CP system into an optimization problem and a mobile-edge-cloud framework called Cooperverse. This system addresses CP in a mixed connectivity and automation environment. A Dynamic Feature Sharing (DFS) methodology is introduced to support this CP system under certain constraints and a Random Priority Filtering (RPF) method is proposed to conduct DFS with high performance. Experiments have been conducted based on a high-fidelity CP platform, and the results show that the Cooperverse framework is effective for dynamic node engagement and the proposed DFS methodology can improve system CP performance by 14.5% and the RPF method can reduce the communication cost for mobile nodes by 90% with only 1.7% drop for average precision.
summary: Cooperative perception (CP) is attracting increasing attention and is regarded as the core foundation to support cooperative driving automation, a potential key solution to addressing the safety, mobility, and sustainability issues of contemporary transportation systems. However, current research on CP is still at the beginning stages where a systematic problem formulation of CP is still missing, acting as the essential guideline of the system design of a CP system under real-world situations. In this paper, we formulate a universal CP system into an optimization problem and a mobile-edge-cloud framework called Cooperverse. This system addresses CP in a mixed connectivity and automation environment. A Dynamic Feature Sharing (DFS) methodology is introduced to support this CP system under certain constraints and a Random Priority Filtering (RPF) method is proposed to conduct DFS with high performance. Experiments have been conducted based on a high-fidelity CP platform, and the results show that the Cooperverse framework is effective for dynamic node engagement and the proposed DFS methodology can improve system CP performance by 14.5% and the RPF method can reduce the communication cost for mobile nodes by 90% with only 1.7% drop for average precision.
abstract_zh: 协作感知（CP）正在引起越来越多的关注，并被视为支持协作驾驶自动化的核心基础，是解决当代交通系统的安全、移动性和可持续性问题的潜在关键解决方案。然而，目前对CP的研究仍处于起步阶段，仍然缺乏CP的系统问题表述，无法作为现实情况下CP系统的系统设计的基本指南。在本文中，我们将通用 CP 系统表述为优化问题和称为 Cooperverse 的移动边缘云框架。该系统解决了混合连接和自动化环境中的 CP 问题。引入动态特征共享（DFS）方法来在一定约束下支持该CP系统，并提出随机优先级过滤（RPF）方法来执行高性能的DFS。基于高保真CP平台进行实验，结果表明Cooperverse框架对于动态节点参与是有效的，所提出的DFS方法可以将系统CP性能提高14.5%，RPF方法可以降低移动节点的通信成本90%，平均精度仅下降1.7%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出名为Cooperverse的移动边缘云框架，用于解决混合连接性和自动化环境下的通用协作感知问题。
AI.motivation: 当前协作感知研究缺乏系统性问题定义，难以支撑现实场景中的系统设计，亟需统一框架应对动态节点和异构环境挑战。
AI.method: 将协作感知建模为优化问题，设计包含动态特征共享（DFS）和随机优先过滤（RPF）的Cooperverse框架，通过DFS提升感知性能，RPF降低通信成本。
AI.result: 实验表明，Cooperverse在动态节点接入场景下表现有效，DFS使系统感知性能提升14.5%，RPF使移动端通信成本降低90%（仅损失1.7%平均精度）。
AI.conclusion: Cooperverse框架通过DFS与RPF方法，在保证感知精度的同时显著优化资源效率，为复杂交通环境下的协作自动驾驶提供系统性解决方案。

authors_text: Mohammad Reza Bonyadi
title: Autodecompose: A generative self-supervised model for semantic decomposition
title_zh: Autodecompose：语义分解的生成式自监督模型
abstract: We introduce Autodecompose, a novel self-supervised generative model that decomposes data into two semantically independent properties: the desired property, which captures a specific aspect of the data (e.g. the voice in an audio signal), and the context property, which aggregates all other information (e.g. the content of the audio signal), without any labels given. Autodecompose uses two complementary augmentations, one that manipulates the context while preserving the desired property and the other that manipulates the desired property while preserving the context. The augmented variants of the data are encoded by two encoders and reconstructed by a decoder. We prove that one of the encoders embeds the desired property while the other embeds the context property. We apply Autodecompose to audio signals to encode sound source (human voice) and content. We pre-trained the model on YouTube and LibriSpeech datasets and fine-tuned in a self-supervised manner without exposing the labels. Our results showed that, using the sound source encoder of pre-trained Autodecompose, a linear classifier achieves F1 score of 97.6\% in recognizing the voice of 30 speakers using only 10 seconds of labeled samples, compared to 95.7\% for supervised models. Additionally, our experiments showed that Autodecompose is robust against overfitting even when a large model is pre-trained on a small dataset. A large Autodecompose model was pre-trained from scratch on 60 seconds of audio from 3 speakers achieved over 98.5\% F1 score in recognizing those three speakers in other unseen utterances. We finally show that the context encoder embeds information about the content of the speech and ignores the sound source information. Our sample code for training the model, as well as examples for using the pre-trained models are available here: \url{https://github.com/rezabonyadi/autodecompose}
summary: We introduce Autodecompose, a novel self-supervised generative model that decomposes data into two semantically independent properties: the desired property, which captures a specific aspect of the data (e.g. the voice in an audio signal), and the context property, which aggregates all other information (e.g. the content of the audio signal), without any labels given. Autodecompose uses two complementary augmentations, one that manipulates the context while preserving the desired property and the other that manipulates the desired property while preserving the context. The augmented variants of the data are encoded by two encoders and reconstructed by a decoder. We prove that one of the encoders embeds the desired property while the other embeds the context property. We apply Autodecompose to audio signals to encode sound source (human voice) and content. We pre-trained the model on YouTube and LibriSpeech datasets and fine-tuned in a self-supervised manner without exposing the labels. Our results showed that, using the sound source encoder of pre-trained Autodecompose, a linear classifier achieves F1 score of 97.6\% in recognizing the voice of 30 speakers using only 10 seconds of labeled samples, compared to 95.7\% for supervised models. Additionally, our experiments showed that Autodecompose is robust against overfitting even when a large model is pre-trained on a small dataset. A large Autodecompose model was pre-trained from scratch on 60 seconds of audio from 3 speakers achieved over 98.5\% F1 score in recognizing those three speakers in other unseen utterances. We finally show that the context encoder embeds information about the content of the speech and ignores the sound source information. Our sample code for training the model, as well as examples for using the pre-trained models are available here: \url{https://github.com/rezabonyadi/autodecompose}
abstract_zh: 我们引入了 Autodecompose，一种新颖的自监督生成模型，它将数据分解为两个语义上独立的属性：所需属性，它捕获数据的特定方面（例如音频信号中的语音），以及上下文属性，它聚合所有其他信息（例如音频信号的内容），而不给出任何标签。 Autodecompose 使用两种互补的增强，一种在保留所需属性的同时操纵上下文，另一种在保留上下文的同时操纵所需属性。数据的增强变体由两个编码器编码并由解码器重建。我们证明其中一个编码器嵌入所需的属性，而另一个编码器嵌入上下文属性。我们将自动分解应用于音频信号以对声源（人声）和内容进行编码。我们在 YouTube 和 LibriSpeech 数据集上对模型进行了预训练，并以自我监督的方式进行了微调，而无需暴露标签。我们的结果表明，使用预训练的 Autodecompose 声源编码器，线性分类器仅使用 10 秒的标记样本即可识别 30 个说话者的语音，其 F1 分数达到 97.6%，而监督模型的 F1 分数为 95.7%。此外，我们的实验表明，即使在小数据集上预训练大型模型，Autodecompose 也能有效防止过度拟合。一个大型 Autodecompose 模型从头开始对 3 个说话者的 60 秒音频进行了预训练，在识别这三个说话者的其他未见过的话语方面取得了超过 98.5% F1 分数。最后我们证明上下文编码器嵌入了有关语音内容的信息并忽略了声源信息。我们用于训练模型的示例代码以及使用预训练模型的示例可在此处获取：\url{https://github.com/rezabonyadi/autodecompose}

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Autodecompose的自监督生成模型，用于在无标签的情况下将数据分解为语义独立的属性（如音频中的声音和内容）。
AI.motivation: 传统方法通常需要依赖标签进行数据分解，而本文旨在开发一种无需标签即可分离数据语义属性的自监督方法，以提高模型的灵活性和泛化能力。
AI.method: 通过两种互补的数据增强策略，分别操纵上下文和目标属性，利用两个编码器提取特征并由解码器重建数据，证明编码器分别嵌入目标属性和上下文属性。
AI.result: 在语音识别任务中，使用预训练模型的线性分类器在10秒标注样本下达到97.6%的F1分数，且模型在小数据集上预训练后仍具有抗过拟合能力。
AI.conclusion: Autodecompose有效实现了无监督语义分解，其编码器能分离声音源与内容信息，为语音处理等任务提供了高效且鲁棒的解决方案。

search_text: Autodecompose: A generative self-supervised model for semantic decomposition Autodecompose：语义分解的生成式自监督模型 We introduce Autodecompose, a novel self-supervised generative model that decomposes data into two semantically independent properties: the desired property, which captures a specific aspect of the data (e.g. the voice in an audio signal), and the context property, which aggregates all other information (e.g. the content of the audio signal), without any labels given. Autodecompose uses two complementary augmentations, one that manipulates the context while preserving the desired property and the other that manipulates the desired property while preserving the context. The augmented variants of the data are encoded by two encoders and reconstructed by a decoder. We prove that one of the encoders embeds the desired property while the other embeds the context property. We apply Autodecompose to audio signals to encode sound source (human voice) and content. We pre-trained the model on YouTube and LibriSpeech datasets and fine-tuned in a self-supervised manner without exposing the labels. Our results showed that, using the sound source encoder of pre-trained Autodecompose, a linear classifier achieves F1 score of 97.6\% in recognizing the voice of 30 speakers using only 10 seconds of labeled samples, compared to 95.7\% for supervised models. Additionally, our experiments showed that Autodecompose is robust against overfitting even when a large model is pre-trained on a small dataset. A large Autodecompose model was pre-trained from scratch on 60 seconds of audio from 3 speakers achieved over 98.5\% F1 score in recognizing those three speakers in other unseen utterances. We finally show that the context encoder embeds information about the content of the speech and ignores the sound source information. Our sample code for training the model, as well as examples for using the pre-trained models are available here: \url{https://github.com/rezabonyadi/autodecompose} 我们引入了 Autodecompose，一种新颖的自监督生成模型，它将数据分解为两个语义上独立的属性：所需属性，它捕获数据的特定方面（例如音频信号中的语音），以及上下文属性，它聚合所有其他信息（例如音频信号的内容），而不给出任何标签。 Autodecompose 使用两种互补的增强，一种在保留所需属性的同时操纵上下文，另一种在保留上下文的同时操纵所需属性。数据的增强变体由两个编码器编码并由解码器重建。我们证明其中一个编码器嵌入所需的属性，而另一个编码器嵌入上下文属性。我们将自动分解应用于音频信号以对声源（人声）和内容进行编码。我们在 YouTube 和 LibriSpeech 数据集上对模型进行了预训练，并以自我监督的方式进行了微调，而无需暴露标签。我们的结果表明，使用预训练的 Autodecompose 声源编码器，线性分类器仅使用 10 秒的标记样本即可识别 30 个说话者的语音，其 F1 分数达到 97.6%，而监督模型的 F1 分数为 95.7%。此外，我们的实验表明，即使在小数据集上预训练大型模型，Autodecompose 也能有效防止过度拟合。一个大型 Autodecompose 模型从头开始对 3 个说话者的 60 秒音频进行了预训练，在识别这三个说话者的其他未见过的话语方面取得了超过 98.5% F1 分数。最后我们证明上下文编码器嵌入了有关语音内容的信息并忽略了声源信息。我们用于训练模型的示例代码以及使用预训练模型的示例可在此处获取：\url{https://github.com/rezabonyadi/autodecompose} 本文提出了一种名为Autodecompose的自监督生成模型，用于在无标签的情况下将数据分解为语义独立的属性（如音频中的声音和内容）。 Mohammad Reza Bonyadi cs.LG,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Weiye Zhao,Tairan He,Rui Chen,Tianhao Wei,Changliu Liu
title: State-wise Safe Reinforcement Learning: A Survey
title_zh: 状态安全强化学习：一项调查
comment: IJCAI Survey Track 2023
comments: IJCAI Survey Track 2023
abstract: Despite the tremendous success of Reinforcement Learning (RL) algorithms in simulation environments, applying RL to real-world applications still faces many challenges. A major concern is safety, in another word, constraint satisfaction. State-wise constraints are one of the most common constraints in real-world applications and one of the most challenging constraints in Safe RL. Enforcing state-wise constraints is necessary and essential to many challenging tasks such as autonomous driving, robot manipulation. This paper provides a comprehensive review of existing approaches that address state-wise constraints in RL. Under the framework of State-wise Constrained Markov Decision Process (SCMDP), we will discuss the connections, differences, and trade-offs of existing approaches in terms of (i) safety guarantee and scalability, (ii) safety and reward performance, and (iii) safety after convergence and during training. We also summarize limitations of current methods and discuss potential future directions.
summary: Despite the tremendous success of Reinforcement Learning (RL) algorithms in simulation environments, applying RL to real-world applications still faces many challenges. A major concern is safety, in another word, constraint satisfaction. State-wise constraints are one of the most common constraints in real-world applications and one of the most challenging constraints in Safe RL. Enforcing state-wise constraints is necessary and essential to many challenging tasks such as autonomous driving, robot manipulation. This paper provides a comprehensive review of existing approaches that address state-wise constraints in RL. Under the framework of State-wise Constrained Markov Decision Process (SCMDP), we will discuss the connections, differences, and trade-offs of existing approaches in terms of (i) safety guarantee and scalability, (ii) safety and reward performance, and (iii) safety after convergence and during training. We also summarize limitations of current methods and discuss potential future directions.
abstract_zh: 尽管强化学习 (RL) 算法在模拟环境中取得了巨大成功，但将 RL 应用到实际应用中仍然面临许多挑战。主要关注的是安全性，换句话说，约束满足。状态约束是现实应用中最常见的约束之一，也是安全强化学习中最具挑战性的约束之一。对于自动驾驶、机器人操纵等许多具有挑战性的任务来说，强制执行状态约束是必要且必不可少的。本文对解决强化学习中状态约束的现有方法进行了全面回顾。在状态约束马尔可夫决策过程（SCMDP）的框架下，我们将讨论现有方法在（i）安全保证和可扩展性，（ii）安全和奖励性能，以及（iii）收敛后和训练过程中的安全性方面的联系、差异和权衡。我们还总结了当前方法的局限性并讨论了潜在的未来方向。

AI.tldr: 综述现有处理状态级约束的强化学习方法，并分析其安全性和性能权衡。
AI.motivation: 强化学习在实际应用中面临安全性挑战，状态级约束是关键问题，需系统分析现有方法。
AI.method: 基于SCMDP框架，比较不同方法在安全性、性能及训练过程中的优劣。
AI.result: 总结当前方法的局限性，并提出未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 状态级安全强化学习需平衡安全性与性能，未来需更高效的方法。

authors_text: Martin Paulikat,Christian M. Schürch,Christian F. Baumgartner
title: Studying Therapy Effects and Disease Outcomes in Silico using Artificial Counterfactual Tissue Samples
title_zh: 使用人工反事实组织样本在计算机中研究治疗效果和疾病结果
abstract: Understanding the interactions of different cell types inside the immune tumor microenvironment (iTME) is crucial for the development of immunotherapy treatments as well as for predicting their outcomes. Highly multiplexed tissue imaging (HMTI) technologies offer a tool which can capture cell properties of tissue samples by measuring expression of various proteins and storing them in separate image channels. HMTI technologies can be used to gain insights into the iTME and in particular how the iTME differs for different patient outcome groups of interest (e.g., treatment responders vs. non-responders). Understanding the systematic differences in the iTME of different patient outcome groups is crucial for developing better treatments and personalising existing treatments. However, such analyses are inherently limited by the fact that any two tissue samples vary due to a large number of factors unrelated to the outcome. Here, we present CF-HistoGAN, a machine learning framework that employs generative adversarial networks (GANs) to create artificial counterfactual tissue samples that resemble the original tissue samples as closely as possible but capture the characteristics of a different patient outcome group. Specifically, we learn to "translate" HMTI samples from one patient group to create artificial paired samples. We show that this approach allows to directly study the effects of different patient outcomes on the iTMEs of individual tissue samples. We demonstrate that CF-HistoGAN can be employed as an explorative tool for understanding iTME effects on the pixel level. Moreover, we show that our method can be used to identify statistically significant differences in the expression of different proteins between patient groups with greater sensitivity compared to conventional approaches.
summary: Understanding the interactions of different cell types inside the immune tumor microenvironment (iTME) is crucial for the development of immunotherapy treatments as well as for predicting their outcomes. Highly multiplexed tissue imaging (HMTI) technologies offer a tool which can capture cell properties of tissue samples by measuring expression of various proteins and storing them in separate image channels. HMTI technologies can be used to gain insights into the iTME and in particular how the iTME differs for different patient outcome groups of interest (e.g., treatment responders vs. non-responders). Understanding the systematic differences in the iTME of different patient outcome groups is crucial for developing better treatments and personalising existing treatments. However, such analyses are inherently limited by the fact that any two tissue samples vary due to a large number of factors unrelated to the outcome. Here, we present CF-HistoGAN, a machine learning framework that employs generative adversarial networks (GANs) to create artificial counterfactual tissue samples that resemble the original tissue samples as closely as possible but capture the characteristics of a different patient outcome group. Specifically, we learn to "translate" HMTI samples from one patient group to create artificial paired samples. We show that this approach allows to directly study the effects of different patient outcomes on the iTMEs of individual tissue samples. We demonstrate that CF-HistoGAN can be employed as an explorative tool for understanding iTME effects on the pixel level. Moreover, we show that our method can be used to identify statistically significant differences in the expression of different proteins between patient groups with greater sensitivity compared to conventional approaches.
abstract_zh: 了解免疫肿瘤微环境 (iTME) 内不同细胞类型的相互作用对于免疫疗法的开发以及预测其结果至关重要。高度多重组织成像 (HMTI) 技术提供了一种工具，可以通过测量各种蛋白质的表达并将其存储在单独的图像通道中来捕获组织样本的细胞特性。 HMTI 技术可用于深入了解 iTME，特别是 iTME 对于感兴趣的不同患者结果组（例如，治疗反应者与非反应者）有何不同。了解不同患者结果组 iTME 的系统差异对于开发更好的治疗方法和个性化现有治疗方法至关重要。然而，此类分析本质上受到以下事实的限制：任何两个组织样本都会因大量与结果无关的因素而发生变化。在这里，我们提出了 CF-HistoGAN，这是一种机器学习框架，它采用生成对抗网络 (GAN) 创建人工反事实组织样本，这些样本尽可能类似于原始组织样本，但捕获不同患者结果组的特征。具体来说，我们学习“翻译”来自一组患者的 HMTI 样本以创建人工配对样本。我们表明，这种方法可以直接研究不同患者结果对单个组织样本 iTME 的影响。我们证明 CF-HistoGAN 可以用作理解 iTME 对像素级影响的探索性工具。此外，我们表明，与传统方法相比，我们的方法可用于识别患者组之间不同蛋白质表达的统计显着差异，并且具有更高的敏感性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CF-HistoGAN框架，通过生成对抗网络（GAN）创建人工反事实组织样本，以研究免疫治疗效果和疾病结果。
AI.motivation: 现有分析受组织样本自然变异限制，难以准确区分不同患者预后组（如治疗反应者与非反应者）的免疫肿瘤微环境（iTME）差异。
AI.method: 基于生成对抗网络（GAN）开发CF-HistoGAN，将高通量组织成像（HMTI）样本从一个患者组转换为另一个组的人工配对样本。
AI.result: 该方法可像素级探索iTME影响，并比传统方法更敏感地识别不同患者组间蛋白质表达的统计显著差异。
AI.conclusion: CF-HistoGAN为理解iTME对治疗结果的影响提供了新工具，有助于个性化治疗策略的优化。

search_text: Studying Therapy Effects and Disease Outcomes in Silico using Artificial Counterfactual Tissue Samples 使用人工反事实组织样本在计算机中研究治疗效果和疾病结果 Understanding the interactions of different cell types inside the immune tumor microenvironment (iTME) is crucial for the development of immunotherapy treatments as well as for predicting their outcomes. Highly multiplexed tissue imaging (HMTI) technologies offer a tool which can capture cell properties of tissue samples by measuring expression of various proteins and storing them in separate image channels. HMTI technologies can be used to gain insights into the iTME and in particular how the iTME differs for different patient outcome groups of interest (e.g., treatment responders vs. non-responders). Understanding the systematic differences in the iTME of different patient outcome groups is crucial for developing better treatments and personalising existing treatments. However, such analyses are inherently limited by the fact that any two tissue samples vary due to a large number of factors unrelated to the outcome. Here, we present CF-HistoGAN, a machine learning framework that employs generative adversarial networks (GANs) to create artificial counterfactual tissue samples that resemble the original tissue samples as closely as possible but capture the characteristics of a different patient outcome group. Specifically, we learn to "translate" HMTI samples from one patient group to create artificial paired samples. We show that this approach allows to directly study the effects of different patient outcomes on the iTMEs of individual tissue samples. We demonstrate that CF-HistoGAN can be employed as an explorative tool for understanding iTME effects on the pixel level. Moreover, we show that our method can be used to identify statistically significant differences in the expression of different proteins between patient groups with greater sensitivity compared to conventional approaches. 了解免疫肿瘤微环境 (iTME) 内不同细胞类型的相互作用对于免疫疗法的开发以及预测其结果至关重要。高度多重组织成像 (HMTI) 技术提供了一种工具，可以通过测量各种蛋白质的表达并将其存储在单独的图像通道中来捕获组织样本的细胞特性。 HMTI 技术可用于深入了解 iTME，特别是 iTME 对于感兴趣的不同患者结果组（例如，治疗反应者与非反应者）有何不同。了解不同患者结果组 iTME 的系统差异对于开发更好的治疗方法和个性化现有治疗方法至关重要。然而，此类分析本质上受到以下事实的限制：任何两个组织样本都会因大量与结果无关的因素而发生变化。在这里，我们提出了 CF-HistoGAN，这是一种机器学习框架，它采用生成对抗网络 (GAN) 创建人工反事实组织样本，这些样本尽可能类似于原始组织样本，但捕获不同患者结果组的特征。具体来说，我们学习“翻译”来自一组患者的 HMTI 样本以创建人工配对样本。我们表明，这种方法可以直接研究不同患者结果对单个组织样本 iTME 的影响。我们证明 CF-HistoGAN 可以用作理解 iTME 对像素级影响的探索性工具。此外，我们表明，与传统方法相比，我们的方法可用于识别患者组之间不同蛋白质表达的统计显着差异，并且具有更高的敏感性。 本文提出CF-HistoGAN框架，通过生成对抗网络（GAN）创建人工反事实组织样本，以研究免疫治疗效果和疾病结果。 Martin Paulikat,Christian M. Schürch,Christian F. Baumgartner cs.CV

authors_text: Galadrielle Humblot-Renaux,Simon Buus Jensen,Andreas Møgelmose
title: From CAD models to soft point cloud labels: An automatic annotation pipeline for cheaply supervised 3D semantic segmentation
title_zh: 从 CAD 模型到软点云标签：用于廉价监督 3D 语义分割的自动注释管道
comment: updated version, published in the Remote Sensing journal
comments: updated version, published in the Remote Sensing journal
abstract: We propose a fully automatic annotation scheme that takes a raw 3D point cloud with a set of fitted CAD models as input and outputs convincing point-wise labels that can be used as cheap training data for point cloud segmentation. Compared with manual annotations, we show that our automatic labels are accurate while drastically reducing the annotation time and eliminating the need for manual intervention or dataset-specific parameters. Our labeling pipeline outputs semantic classes and soft point-wise object scores, which can either be binarized into standard one-hot-encoded labels, thresholded into weak labels with ambiguous points left unlabeled, or used directly as soft labels during training. We evaluate the label quality and segmentation performance of PointNet++ on a dataset of real industrial point clouds and Scan2CAD, a public dataset of indoor scenes. Our results indicate that reducing supervision in areas that are more difficult to label automatically is beneficial compared with the conventional approach of naively assigning a hard "best guess" label to every point.
summary: We propose a fully automatic annotation scheme that takes a raw 3D point cloud with a set of fitted CAD models as input and outputs convincing point-wise labels that can be used as cheap training data for point cloud segmentation. Compared with manual annotations, we show that our automatic labels are accurate while drastically reducing the annotation time and eliminating the need for manual intervention or dataset-specific parameters. Our labeling pipeline outputs semantic classes and soft point-wise object scores, which can either be binarized into standard one-hot-encoded labels, thresholded into weak labels with ambiguous points left unlabeled, or used directly as soft labels during training. We evaluate the label quality and segmentation performance of PointNet++ on a dataset of real industrial point clouds and Scan2CAD, a public dataset of indoor scenes. Our results indicate that reducing supervision in areas that are more difficult to label automatically is beneficial compared with the conventional approach of naively assigning a hard "best guess" label to every point.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种全自动注释方案，该方案采用原始 3D 点云和一组拟合的 CAD 模型作为输入，并输出令人信服的逐点标签，这些标签可用作点云分割的廉价训练数据。与手动注释相比，我们表明我们的自动标签是准确的，同时大大减少了注释时间并消除了手动干预或数据集特定参数的需要。我们的标签管道输出语义类和软逐点对象分数，它们可以二值化为标准的单热编码标签，阈值化为弱标签，模糊点未标记，或者在训练期间直接用作软标签。我们在真实工业点云数据集和室内场景公共数据集 Scan2CAD 上评估了 PointNet++ 的标签质量和分割性能。我们的结果表明，与天真地为每个点分配硬性“最佳猜测”标签的传统方法相比，减少更难自动标记的区域的监督是有益的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种全自动标注方案，利用CAD模型生成点云标签，用于3D语义分割的低成本训练数据。
AI.motivation: 手动标注点云数据耗时且昂贵，而现有方法依赖于手动干预或数据集特定参数，本文旨在提出一种无需人工干预的自动标注方法。
AI.method: 该方法以包含拟合CAD模型的原始3D点云为输入，输出语义类别和软点对象得分，可用于生成硬标签、弱标签或直接作为软标签用于训练。
AI.result: 在工业点云数据集和Scan2CAD室内场景数据集上评估了标签质量和分割性能，结果表明减少难以自动标注区域的监督比传统方法更有效。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的自动标注方法能够显著减少标注时间和人工干预需求，同时提高3D语义分割的性能。

authors_text: Shota Yamanaka
title: Error-rate Prediction for Mouse-based Rectangular-target Pointing with no Knowledge of Movement Angles
title_zh: 在不知道运动角度的情况下基于鼠标的矩形目标指向的错误率预测
comment: A more accurate prediction method will appear in our CHI 2023 paper "Tuning Endpoint-variability Parameters by Observed Error Rates to Obtain Better Prediction Accuracy of Pointing Misses"
comments: A more accurate prediction method will appear in our CHI 2023 paper "Tuning Endpoint-variability Parameters by Observed Error Rates to Obtain Better Prediction Accuracy of Pointing Misses"
abstract: In rectangular-target pointing, movement angles towards targets are known to affect error rates. When designers determine target sizes, however, they would not know the frequencies of cursor-approaching directions for each target. Thus, assuming that there are unbiasedly various angles, we derived models to predict error rates depending only on the target width and height. We conducted two crowdsourced experiments: a cyclic pointing task with a predefined movement angle and a multi-directional pointing task. The shuffle-split cross-validation with 60% training data showed R^2 > 0.81, MAE < 1.3%, and RMSE < 2.1%, suggesting good prediction accuracy even for predicting untested target sizes when designers newly set UI elements.
summary: In rectangular-target pointing, movement angles towards targets are known to affect error rates. When designers determine target sizes, however, they would not know the frequencies of cursor-approaching directions for each target. Thus, assuming that there are unbiasedly various angles, we derived models to predict error rates depending only on the target width and height. We conducted two crowdsourced experiments: a cyclic pointing task with a predefined movement angle and a multi-directional pointing task. The shuffle-split cross-validation with 60% training data showed R^2 > 0.81, MAE < 1.3%, and RMSE < 2.1%, suggesting good prediction accuracy even for predicting untested target sizes when designers newly set UI elements.
abstract_zh: 在矩形目标指向中，已知目标的移动角度会影响错误率。然而，当设计者确定目标尺寸时，他们不会知道每个目标的光标接近方向的频率。因此，假设存在无偏的各种角度，我们推导出仅根据目标宽度和高度来预测错误率的模型。我们进行了两个众包实验：具有预定义运动角度的循环指向任务和多方向指向任务。使用 60% 训练数据进行的 shuffle-split 交叉验证显示 R^2 > 0.81、MAE < 1.3% 和 RMSE < 2.1%，这表明即使在设计人员新设置 UI 元素时预测未经测试的目标大小，也具有良好的预测精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需已知移动角度即可预测鼠标指向矩形目标错误率的模型。
AI.motivation: 设计师在确定目标尺寸时无法预知用户接近目标的方向分布，需建立与角度无关的预测模型。
AI.method: 假设角度分布无偏，基于目标宽高推导预测模型，并通过循环指向任务和多方向任务实验验证。
AI.result: 交叉验证显示R²>0.81、MAE<1.3%、RMSE<2.1%，证明模型能准确预测未测试的目标尺寸错误率。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为UI设计提供了无需角度信息的错误率预测工具，可辅助优化界面元素尺寸。

authors_text: Alex Qiu,Claire Young,Anthony Gunderman,Milad Azizkhani,Yue Chen,Ai-Ping Hu
title: Tendon-Driven Soft Robotic Gripper with Integrated Ripeness Sensing for Blackberry Harvesting
title_zh: 用于黑莓采摘的肌腱驱动软机器人夹具，具有集成成熟度传感功能
comment: 7 Pages, 9 figures, submitted to and accepted by ICRA 2023
comments: 7 Pages, 9 figures, submitted to and accepted by ICRA 2023
abstract: Growing global demand for food, coupled with continuing labor shortages, motivates the need for automated agricultural harvesting. While some specialty crops (e.g., apples, peaches, blueberries) can be harvested via existing harvesting modalities, fruits such as blackberries and raspberries require delicate handling to mitigate fruit damage that could significantly impact marketability. This motivates the development of soft robotic solutions that enable efficient, delicate harvesting. This paper presents the design, fabrication, and feasibility testing of a tendon-driven soft gripping system focused on blackberries, which are a fragile fruit susceptible to post-harvest damage. The gripper is both low-cost and small form factor, allowing for the integration of a micro-servo for tendon retraction, a near-infrared (NIR) based blackberry ripeness sensor utilizing the reflectance modality for identifying fully ripe blackberries, and an endoscopic camera for visual servoing with a UR-5. The gripper was used to harvest 139 berries with manual positioning in two separate field tests. Field testing found an average retention force of 2.06 N and 6.08 N for ripe and unripe blackberries, respectively. Sensor tests identified an average reflectance of 16.78 and 21.70 for ripe and unripe blackberries, respectively, indicating a clear distinction between the two ripeness levels. Finally, the soft robotic gripper was integrated onto a UR5 robot arm and successfully harvested fifteen artificial blackberries in a lab setting using visual servoing.

The gripper was used to harvest 139 berries with manual positioning in two separate field tests. abstract_zh: 全球粮食需求不断增长，加上劳动力持续短缺，激发了对自动化农业收割的需求。虽然一些特种作物（例如苹果、桃子、蓝莓）可以通过现有的收获方式收获，但黑莓和覆盆子等水果需要精细处理，以减轻可能严重影响适销性的水果损坏。这推动了软机器人解决方案的开发，以实现高效、精细的收获。本文介绍了针对黑莓的肌腱驱动软夹持系统的设计、制造和可行性测试，黑莓是一种脆弱的水果，容易受到采后损坏。该夹具成本低廉且外形小巧，可集成用于肌腱收缩的微伺服系统、基于近红外 (NIR) 的黑莓成熟度传感器（利用反射模式识别完全成熟的黑莓）以及用于通过 UR-5 进行视觉伺服的内窥镜摄像头。在两次独立的现场测试中，该夹具通过手动定位收获了 139 个浆果。现场测试发现成熟和未成熟黑莓的平均保持力分别为 2.06 N 和 6.08 N。传感器测试发现成熟和未成熟黑莓的平均反射率分别为 16.78 和 21.70，表明两种成熟度水平之间存在明显区别。最后，将软机器人抓手集成到 UR5 机器人手臂上，并使用视觉伺服在实验室环境中成功收获了 15 个人造黑莓。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种集成成熟度传感的肌腱驱动软体机械手，用于黑莓采摘。
AI.motivation: 全球粮食需求增长与劳动力短缺促使农业自动化需求增加，而黑莓等易损水果需精细操作以减少损伤。
AI.method: 开发低成本小型软体夹持系统，集成微型伺服电机、近红外反射传感器和内窥镜摄像头，并与UR-5机械臂结合进行视觉伺服控制。
AI.result: 实地测试显示成熟与未成熟黑莓的夹持力分别为2.06N和6.08N，反射率差异显著（16.78 vs 21.70），实验室成功采摘15个人造黑莓。
AI.conclusion: 该软体机械手可有效实现黑莓的精准采摘与成熟度识别，为农业自动化提供可行方案。

authors_text: John C Stevenson
title: The Struggle for Existence: Time, Memory and Bloat
title_zh: 生存斗争：时间、记忆和膨胀
comment: 1 table, 4 figures, 1 PDL
comments: 1 table, 4 figures, 1 PDL
abstract: Combining a spatiotemporal, multi-agent based model of a foraging ecosystem with linear, genetically programmed rules for the agents' behaviors results in implicit, endogenous, objective functions and selection algorithms based on "natural selection". Use of this implicit optimization of genetic programs for study of biological systems is tested by application to an artificial foraging ecosystem, and compared with established biological, ecological, and stochastic gene diffusion models. Limited program memory and execution time constraints emulate real-time and concurrent properties of physical and biological systems, and stress test the optimization algorithms. Relative fitness of the agents' programs and efficiency of the resultant populations as functions of these constraints gauge optimization effectiveness and efficiency. Novel solutions confirm the creativity of the optimization process and provide an unique opportunity to experimentally test the neutral code bloating hypotheses. Use of this implicit, endogenous, evolutionary optimization of spatially interacting, genetically programmed agents is thus shown to be novel, consistent with biological systems, and effective and efficient in discovering fit and novel solutions.
summary: Combining a spatiotemporal, multi-agent based model of a foraging ecosystem with linear, genetically programmed rules for the agents' behaviors results in implicit, endogenous, objective functions and selection algorithms based on "natural selection". Use of this implicit optimization of genetic programs for study of biological systems is tested by application to an artificial foraging ecosystem, and compared with established biological, ecological, and stochastic gene diffusion models. Limited program memory and execution time constraints emulate real-time and concurrent properties of physical and biological systems, and stress test the optimization algorithms. Relative fitness of the agents' programs and efficiency of the resultant populations as functions of these constraints gauge optimization effectiveness and efficiency. Novel solutions confirm the creativity of the optimization process and provide an unique opportunity to experimentally test the neutral code bloating hypotheses. Use of this implicit, endogenous, evolutionary optimization of spatially interacting, genetically programmed agents is thus shown to be novel, consistent with biological systems, and effective and efficient in discovering fit and novel solutions.
abstract_zh: 将时空、多智能体的觅食生态系统模型与智能体行为的线性遗传编程规则相结合，产生隐式、内生的目标函数和基于“自然选择”的选择算法。通过应用于人工觅食生态系统来测试这种遗传程序的隐式优化在生物系统研究中的应用，并与已建立的生物、生态和随机基因扩散模型进行比较。有限的程序内存和执行时间约束模拟物理和生物系统的实时和并发特性，并对优化算法进行压力测试。作为这些约束的函数，代理程序的相对适应性和所得群体的效率衡量了优化的有效性和效率。新颖的解决方案证实了优化过程的创造力，并提供了一个独特的机会来通过实验测试中性代码膨胀假设。因此，使用这种空间相互作用、基因编程代理的隐式、内源性、进化优化被证明是新颖的、与生物系统一致的，并且在发现合适和新颖的解决方案方面是有效和高效的。

AI.tldr: 本文通过构建时空多智能体模型和遗传编程规则，研究生物系统的隐式优化过程，验证中性代码膨胀假说。
AI.motivation: 现有模型难以有效模拟生物系统的实时性和并发性，且缺乏对代码膨胀现象的实验验证，需提出新型优化方法。
AI.method: 结合时空多智能体觅食生态系统模型与遗传编程，通过内存和时间限制模拟生物约束，对比传统模型验证优化效果。
AI.result: 发现新颖解决方案，证实优化过程的创造性，实验支持中性代码膨胀假说，并证明方法在效率和适应性上的优势。
AI.conclusion: 该隐式进化优化方法符合生物系统特性，能有效发现适应性方案，为研究代码膨胀等现象提供新实验框架。

authors_text: David Porfirio,Laura Stegner,Maya Cakmak,Allison Sauppé,Aws Albarghouthi,Bilge Mutlu
title: Sketching Robot Programs On the Fly
title_zh: 即时绘制机器人程序草图
comment: Accepted at HRI '23, March 13-16, 2023, Stockholm, Sweden
comments: Accepted at HRI '23, March 13-16, 2023, Stockholm, Sweden
abstract: Service robots for personal use in the home and the workplace require end-user development solutions for swiftly scripting robot tasks as the need arises. Many existing solutions preserve ease, efficiency, and convenience through simple programming interfaces or by restricting task complexity. Others facilitate meticulous task design but often do so at the expense of simplicity and efficiency. There is a need for robot programming solutions that reconcile the complexity of robotics with the on-the-fly goals of end-user development. In response to this need, we present a novel, multimodal, and on-the-fly development system, Tabula. Inspired by a formative design study with a prototype, Tabula leverages a combination of spoken language for specifying the core of a robot task and sketching for contextualizing the core. The result is that developers can script partial, sloppy versions of robot programs to be completed and refined by a program synthesizer. Lastly, we demonstrate our anticipated use cases of Tabula via a set of application scenarios.
summary: Service robots for personal use in the home and the workplace require end-user development solutions for swiftly scripting robot tasks as the need arises. The result is that developers can script partial, sloppy versions of robot programs to be completed and refined by a program synthesizer. Lastly, we demonstrate our anticipated use cases of Tabula via a set of application scenarios.
abstract_zh: 在家庭和工作场所供个人使用的服务机器人需要最终用户开发解决方案，以便根据需要快速编写机器人任务脚本。许多现有的解决方案通过简单的编程接口或限制任务复杂性来保持简单、高效和方便。其他人则促进细致的任务设计，但往往会牺牲简单性和效率。机器人编程解决方案需要能够协调机器人技术的复杂性与最终用户开发的动态目标。为了满足这一需求，我们提出了一种新颖的、多模式的、动态的开发系统 Tabula。受到原型设计研究的启发，Tabula 结合使用口语来指定机器人任务的核心，并通过草图将核心置于情境中。结果是，开发人员可以编写机器人程序的部分、草率版本，并由程序合成器完成和完善。最后，我们通过一组应用场景展示了 Tabula 的预期用例。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Tabula的新型多模态开发系统，通过语音和草图结合的方式，实现对机器人程序的快速开发与完善。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人编程方案难以平衡任务复杂性与开发效率，要么限制复杂度牺牲功能，要么增加开发难度，无法满足用户即时编程需求。
AI.method: 基于语音指令定义任务核心，结合草图补充上下文信息，生成初步程序框架后由程序合成器自动优化完善。
AI.result: 通过应用案例验证了Tabula系统在家庭及工作场景中实现快速机器人任务编程的可行性。
AI.conclusion: Tabula系统有效协调了机器人编程的复杂性与用户即时开发需求，为端用户提供了更自然高效的编程解决方案。

search_text: Sketching Robot Programs On the Fly 即时绘制机器人程序草图 Service robots for personal use in the home and the workplace require end-user development solutions for swiftly scripting robot tasks as the need arises. Many existing solutions preserve ease, efficiency, and convenience through simple programming interfaces or by restricting task complexity. Others facilitate meticulous task design but often do so at the expense of simplicity and efficiency. There is a need for robot programming solutions that reconcile the complexity of robotics with the on-the-fly goals of end-user development. In response to this need, we present a novel, multimodal, and on-the-fly development system, Tabula. Inspired by a formative design study with a prototype, Tabula leverages a combination of spoken language for specifying the core of a robot task and sketching for contextualizing the core. The result is that developers can script partial, sloppy versions of robot programs to be completed and refined by a program synthesizer. Lastly, we demonstrate our anticipated use cases of Tabula via a set of application scenarios. 在家庭和工作场所供个人使用的服务机器人需要最终用户开发解决方案，以便根据需要快速编写机器人任务脚本。许多现有的解决方案通过简单的编程接口或限制任务复杂性来保持简单、高效和方便。其他人则促进细致的任务设计，但往往会牺牲简单性和效率。机器人编程解决方案需要能够协调机器人技术的复杂性与最终用户开发的动态目标。为了满足这一需求，我们提出了一种新颖的、多模式的、动态的开发系统 Tabula。受到原型设计研究的启发，Tabula 结合使用口语来指定机器人任务的核心，并通过草图将核心置于情境中。结果是，开发人员可以编写机器人程序的部分、草率版本，并由程序合成器完成和完善。最后，我们通过一组应用场景展示了 Tabula 的预期用例。 本文提出了一种名为Tabula的新型多模态开发系统，通过语音和草图结合的方式，实现对机器人程序的快速开发与完善。 David Porfirio,Laura Stegner,Maya Cakmak,Allison Sauppé,Aws Albarghouthi,Bilge Mutlu cs.RO,cs.HC

authors_text: Cyrus Cousins,Vignesh Viswanathan,Yair Zick
title: Dividing Good and Better Items Among Agents with Bivalued Submodular Valuations
title_zh: 在具有双值子模估值的代理之间分配好和更好的项目
abstract: We study the problem of fairly allocating a set of indivisible goods among agents with {\em bivalued submodular valuations} -- each good provides a marginal gain of either $a$ or $b$ ($a < b$) and goods have decreasing marginal gains. This is a natural generalization of two well-studied valuation classes -- bivalued additive valuations and binary submodular valuations. We present a simple sequential algorithmic framework, based on the recently introduced Yankee Swap mechanism, that can be adapted to compute a variety of solution concepts, including max Nash welfare (MNW), leximin and $p$-mean welfare maximizing allocations when $a$ divides $b$. This result is complemented by an existing result on the computational intractability of MNW and leximin allocations when $a$ does not divide $b$. We show that MNW and leximin allocations guarantee each agent at least $\frac25$ and $\frac{a}{b+2a}$ of their maximin share, respectively, when $a$ divides $b$. We also show that neither the leximin nor the MNW allocation is guaranteed to be envy free up to one good (EF1). This is surprising since for the simpler classes of bivalued additive valuations and binary submodular valuations, MNW allocations are known to be envy free up to any good (EFX).
summary: We study the problem of fairly allocating a set of indivisible goods among agents with {\em bivalued submodular valuations} -- each good provides a marginal gain of either $a$ or $b$ ($a < b$) and goods have decreasing marginal gains. This is a natural generalization of two well-studied valuation classes -- bivalued additive valuations and binary submodular valuations. We present a simple sequential algorithmic framework, based on the recently introduced Yankee Swap mechanism, that can be adapted to compute a variety of solution concepts, including max Nash welfare (MNW), leximin and $p$-mean welfare maximizing allocations when $a$ divides $b$. This result is complemented by an existing result on the computational intractability of MNW and leximin allocations when $a$ does not divide $b$. We show that MNW and leximin allocations guarantee each agent at least $\frac25$ and $\frac{a}{b+2a}$ of their maximin share, respectively, when $a$ divides $b$. We also show that neither the leximin nor the MNW allocation is guaranteed to be envy free up to one good (EF1). This is surprising since for the simpler classes of bivalued additive valuations and binary submodular valuations, MNW allocations are known to be envy free up to any good (EFX).
abstract_zh: 我们研究了在具有{\em双值子模估值}的代理之间公平分配一组不可分割的商品的问题——每种商品提供$a$或$b$（$a < b$）的边际收益，并且商品的边际收益递减。这是两个经过充分研究的估值类别的自然概括——二值加性估值和二元子模估值。我们提出了一个简单的顺序算法框架，基于最近引入的 Yankee Swap 机制，可以适用于计算各种解决方案概念，包括最大纳什福利 (MNW)、leximin 和当 $a$ 除 $b$ 时的 $p$-平均福利最大化分配。当 $a$ 不能整除 $b$ 时，MNW 和 leximin 分配的计算难易性的现有结果补充了该结果。我们证明，当 $a$ 除以 $b$ 时，MNW 和 leximin 分配保证每个代理至少分别获得其最大份额的 $\frac25$ 和 $\frac{a}{b+2a}$。我们还表明，leximin 和 MNW 分配都不能保证在达到一件商品 (EF1) 的情况下不会受到嫉妒。这是令人惊讶的，因为对于更简单的二值附加估值和二元子模估值，MNW 分配众所周知是无嫉妒的（EFX）。

AI.tldr: 研究如何公平分配不可分割物品给具有双值子模估值的代理，提出基于Yankee Swap机制的算法框架。
AI.motivation: 现有公平分配算法难以处理子模估值，尤其在双值子模估值下计算复杂度和公平性保障存在挑战。
AI.method: 设计基于Yankee Swap机制的顺序算法框架，适用于计算MNW、leximin等分配方案，并分析a能整除b时的计算可行性。
AI.result: 当a整除b时，算法可计算MNW和leximin分配，分别保证2/5和a/(b+2a)的maximin share；但无法保证EF1。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架在特定条件下有效，但双值子模估值的公平性保障仍需进一步研究，尤其当a不能整除b时计算不可行。

This is a natural generalization of two well-studied valuation classes -- bivalued additive valuations and binary submodular valuations. We present a simple sequential algorithmic framework, based on the recently introduced Yankee Swap mechanism, that can be adapted to compute a variety of solution concepts, including max Nash welfare (MNW), leximin and $p$-mean welfare maximizing allocations when $a$ divides $b$. This result is complemented by an existing result on the computational intractability of MNW and leximin allocations when $a$ does not divide $b$. We show that MNW and leximin allocations guarantee each agent at least $\frac25$ and $\frac{a}{b+2a}$ of their maximin share, respectively, when $a$ divides $b$. We also show that neither the leximin nor the MNW allocation is guaranteed to be envy free up to one good (EF1). authors_text: Branton DeMoss,Paul Duckworth,Jakob Foerster,Nick Hawes,Ingmar Posner
title: DITTO: Offline Imitation Learning with World Models
title_zh: 同上：使用世界模型进行离线模仿学习
abstract: For imitation learning algorithms to scale to real-world challenges, they must handle high-dimensional observations, offline learning, and policy-induced covariate-shift. We propose DITTO, an offline imitation learning algorithm which addresses all three of these problems. DITTO optimizes a novel distance metric in the latent space of a learned world model: First, we train a world model on all available trajectory data, then, the imitation agent is unrolled from expert start states in the learned model, and penalized for its latent divergence from the expert dataset over multiple time steps. We optimize this multi-step latent divergence using standard reinforcement learning algorithms, which provably induces imitation learning, and empirically achieves state-of-the art performance and sample efficiency on a range of Atari environments from pixels, without any online environment access. We also adapt other standard imitation learning algorithms to the world model setting, and show that this considerably improves their performance. Our results show how creative use of world models can lead to a simple, robust, and highly-performant policy-learning framework.
summary: For imitation learning algorithms to scale to real-world challenges, they must handle high-dimensional observations, offline learning, and policy-induced covariate-shift. We propose DITTO, an offline imitation learning algorithm which addresses all three of these problems. DITTO optimizes a novel distance metric in the latent space of a learned world model: First, we train a world model on all available trajectory data, then, the imitation agent is unrolled from expert start states in the learned model, and penalized for its latent divergence from the expert dataset over multiple time steps. We optimize this multi-step latent divergence using standard reinforcement learning algorithms, which provably induces imitation learning, and empirically achieves state-of-the art performance and sample efficiency on a range of Atari environments from pixels, without any online environment access. We also adapt other standard imitation learning algorithms to the world model setting, and show that this considerably improves their performance. Our results show how creative use of world models can lead to a simple, robust, and highly-performant policy-learning framework.
abstract_zh: 为了使模仿学习算法能够应对现实世界的挑战，它们必须处理高维观察、离线学习和策略引起的协变量转移。我们提出了 DITTO，一种离线模仿学习算法，可以解决所有这三个问题。 DITTO 在学习的世界模型的潜在空间中优化了一种新颖的距离度量：首先，我们在所有可用的轨迹数据上训练一个世界模型，然后，从学习模型中的专家开始状态展开模仿代理，并因其在多个时间步长上与专家数据集的潜在分歧而受到惩罚。我们使用标准强化学习算法优化这种多步骤潜在分歧，该算法可证明诱导模仿学习，并根据经验在一系列 Atari 环境中从像素实现最先进的性能和样本效率，而无需任何在线环境访问。我们还使其他标准模仿学习算法适应世界模型设置，并表明这大大提高了它们的性能。我们的结果表明，创造性地使用世界模型如何能够形成一个简单、强大且高性能的政策学习框架。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DITTO算法，通过结合世界模型解决离线模仿学习中的高维观测、离线学习和策略诱导协变量偏移问题。
AI.motivation: 现有模仿学习算法难以处理现实世界的高维观测、离线学习需求及策略诱导的协变量偏移问题，需设计新方法应对这些挑战。
AI.method: DITTO在世界模型的潜在空间中优化新距离度量：先训练世界模型，再从专家起点展开智能体，通过多步潜在差异惩罚进行强化学习优化。
AI.result: DITTO在Atari环境中无需在线交互即可达到SOTA性能和样本效率，并显著提升其他模仿学习算法在世界模型框架下的表现。
AI.conclusion: 创造性利用世界模型可构建简单、稳健且高效的策略学习框架，为离线模仿学习提供新方向。

tldr: 本文提出DITTO算法，通过结合世界模型解决离线模仿学习中的高维观测、离线学习和策略诱导协变量偏移问题。
motivation: 现有模仿学习算法难以处理现实世界的高维观测、离线学习需求及策略诱导的协变量偏移问题，需设计新方法应对这些挑战。
method: DITTO在世界模型的潜在空间中优化新距离度量：先训练世界模型，再从专家起点展开智能体，通过多步潜在差异惩罚进行强化学习优化。
result: DITTO在Atari环境中无需在线交互即可达到SOTA性能和样本效率，并显著提升其他模仿学习算法在世界模型框架下的表现。
conclusion: 创造性利用世界模型可构建简单、稳健且高效的策略学习框架，为离线模仿学习提供新方向。
search_text: DITTO: Offline Imitation Learning with World Models 同上：使用世界模型进行离线模仿学习 For imitation learning algorithms to scale to real-world challenges, they must handle high-dimensional observations, offline learning, and policy-induced covariate-shift. We propose DITTO, an offline imitation learning algorithm which addresses all three of these problems. DITTO optimizes a novel distance metric in the latent space of a learned world model: First, we train a world model on all available trajectory data, then, the imitation agent is unrolled from expert start states in the learned model, and penalized for its latent divergence from the expert dataset over multiple time steps. We optimize this multi-step latent divergence using standard reinforcement learning algorithms, which provably induces imitation learning, and empirically achieves state-of-the art performance and sample efficiency on a range of Atari environments from pixels, without any online environment access. We also adapt other standard imitation learning algorithms to the world model setting, and show that this considerably improves their performance. Our results show how creative use of world models can lead to a simple, robust, and highly-performant policy-learning framework. 为了使模仿学习算法能够应对现实世界的挑战，它们必须处理高维观察、离线学习和策略引起的协变量转移。我们提出了 DITTO，一种离线模仿学习算法，可以解决所有这三个问题。 DITTO 在学习的世界模型的潜在空间中优化了一种新颖的距离度量：首先，我们在所有可用的轨迹数据上训练一个世界模型，然后，从学习模型中的专家开始状态展开模仿代理，并因其在多个时间步长上与专家数据集的潜在分歧而受到惩罚。我们使用标准强化学习算法优化这种多步骤潜在分歧，该算法可证明诱导模仿学习，并根据经验在一系列 Atari 环境中从像素实现最先进的性能和样本效率，而无需任何在线环境访问。我们还使其他标准模仿学习算法适应世界模型设置，并表明这大大提高了它们的性能。我们的结果表明，创造性地使用世界模型如何能够形成一个简单、强大且高性能的政策学习框架。 本文提出DITTO算法，通过结合世界模型解决离线模仿学习中的高维观测、离线学习和策略诱导协变量偏移问题。 Branton DeMoss,Paul Duckworth,Jakob Foerster,Nick Hawes,Ingmar Posner cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Kuniaki Saito,Kihyuk Sohn,Xiang Zhang,Chun-Liang Li,Chen-Yu Lee,Kate Saenko,Tomas Pfister
title: Pic2Word: Mapping Pictures to Words for Zero-shot Composed Image Retrieval
title_zh: Pic2Word：将图片映射到单词以进行零样本合成图像检索
comment: CVPR2023
comments: CVPR2023
abstract: In Composed Image Retrieval (CIR), a user combines a query image with text to describe their intended target. Existing methods rely on supervised learning of CIR models using labeled triplets consisting of the query image, text specification, and the target image. Labeling such triplets is expensive and hinders broad applicability of CIR. In this work, we propose to study an important task, Zero-Shot Composed Image Retrieval (ZS-CIR), whose goal is to build a CIR model without requiring labeled triplets for training. To this end, we propose a novel method, called Pic2Word, that requires only weakly labeled image-caption pairs and unlabeled image datasets to train. Unlike existing supervised CIR models, our model trained on weakly labeled or unlabeled datasets shows strong generalization across diverse ZS-CIR tasks, e.g., attribute editing, object composition, and domain conversion. Our approach outperforms several supervised CIR methods on the common CIR benchmark, CIRR and Fashion-IQ. Code will be made publicly available at https://github.com/google-research/composed_image_retrieval.
summary: In Composed Image Retrieval (CIR), a user combines a query image with text to describe their intended target. Existing methods rely on supervised learning of CIR models using labeled triplets consisting of the query image, text specification, and the target image. Labeling such triplets is expensive and hinders broad applicability of CIR. In this work, we propose to study an important task, Zero-Shot Composed Image Retrieval (ZS-CIR), whose goal is to build a CIR model without requiring labeled triplets for training. To this end, we propose a novel method, called Pic2Word, that requires only weakly labeled image-caption pairs and unlabeled image datasets to train. Unlike existing supervised CIR models, our model trained on weakly labeled or unlabeled datasets shows strong generalization across diverse ZS-CIR tasks, e.g., attribute editing, object composition, and domain conversion. Our approach outperforms several supervised CIR methods on the common CIR benchmark, CIRR and Fashion-IQ. Code will be made publicly available at https://github.com/google-research/composed_image_retrieval.
abstract_zh: 在组合图像检索 (CIR) 中，用户将查询图像与文本相结合来描述其预期目标。现有方法依赖于使用由查询图像、文本规范和目标图像组成的标记三元组对 CIR 模型进行监督学习。标记此类三元组的成本很高，并且阻碍了 CIR 的广泛应用。在这项工作中，我们建议研究一项重要任务，零样本合成图像检索（ZS-CIR），其目标是构建一个 CIR 模型，而无需标记三元组进行训练。为此，我们提出了一种称为 Pic2Word 的新颖方法，该方法仅需要弱标记的图像标题对和未标记的图像数据集进行训练。与现有的监督 CIR 模型不同，我们的模型在弱标记或未标记数据集上训练，显示出跨不同 ZS-CIR 任务的强大泛化性，例如属性编辑、对象组合和域转换。我们的方法在通用 CIR 基准、CIRR 和 Fashion-IQ 上优于几种受监督的 CIR 方法。代码将在 https://github.com/google-research/composed_image_retrieval 上公开提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需标注三元组的零样本组合图像检索方法Pic2Word，通过弱标注图像-文本对和未标注图像数据进行训练。
AI.motivation: 现有组合图像检索方法依赖昂贵的标注三元组数据，限制了其应用范围。本文旨在开发无需标注三元组的零样本解决方案。
AI.method: 提出Pic2Word方法，仅使用弱标注的图像-文本对和未标注图像数据集进行训练，通过学习跨模态表征实现零样本任务泛化。
AI.result: 在CIRR和Fashion-IQ基准测试中优于多个监督方法，支持属性编辑、物体组合和领域转换等多样化零样本任务。
AI.conclusion: Pic2Word证明了弱监督学习在零样本组合图像检索中的有效性，为减少对标注数据的依赖提供了新思路。

authors_text: V. A. Slipko,Y. V. Pershin
title: A probabilistic model of resistance jumps in memristive devices
title_zh: 忆阻器件中电阻跳跃的概率模型
abstract: Resistance switching memory cells such as electrochemical metallization cells and valence change mechanism cells have the potential to revolutionize information processing and storage. However, the creation of deterministic resistance switching devices is a challenging problem that is still open. At present, the modeling of resistance switching cells is dominantly based on deterministic models that fail to capture the cycle-to-cycle variability intrinsic to these devices. Herewith we introduce a state probability distribution function and associated integro-differential equation to describe the switching process consisting of a set of stochastic jumps. Numerical and analytical solutions of the equation have been found in two model cases. This work expands the toolbox of models available for resistance switching cells and related devices, and enables a rigorous description of intrinsic physical behavior not available in other models.
summary: Resistance switching memory cells such as electrochemical metallization cells and valence change mechanism cells have the potential to revolutionize information processing and storage. However, the creation of deterministic resistance switching devices is a challenging problem that is still open. At present, the modeling of resistance switching cells is dominantly based on deterministic models that fail to capture the cycle-to-cycle variability intrinsic to these devices. Herewith we introduce a state probability distribution function and associated integro-differential equation to describe the switching process consisting of a set of stochastic jumps. Numerical and analytical solutions of the equation have been found in two model cases. This work expands the toolbox of models available for resistance switching cells and related devices, and enables a rigorous description of intrinsic physical behavior not available in other models.
abstract_zh: 电阻切换存储单元（例如电化学金属化单元和价态变化机制单元）具有彻底改变信息处理和存储的潜力。然而，确定性电阻开关器件的创建是一个仍然悬而未决的具有挑战性的问题。目前，电阻开关单元的建模主要基于确定性模型，该模型无法捕获这些器件固有的周期间变化。在此，我们引入状态概率分布函数和相关的积分微分方程来描述由一组随机跳跃组成的切换过程。在两个模型案例中找到了方程的数值解和解析解。这项工作扩展了可用于电阻开关单元和相关器件的模型工具箱，并能够对其他模型中不可用的内在物理行为进行严格描述。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种概率模型以描述忆阻器设备中电阻跳跃的随机特性，解决现有确定性模型无法捕捉循环间变异性的缺陷。
AI.motivation: 现有电阻开关模型基于确定性方法，无法准确反映设备固有的随机性行为，限制了其在实际应用中的可靠性与预测能力。
AI.method: 引入状态概率分布函数及关联积分微分方程，通过数值与解析方法求解两个典型模型案例中的开关过程。
AI.result: 构建了能够描述电阻跳跃随机特性的新模型，扩展了相关设备的建模工具箱，实现了其他模型无法刻画的物理行为描述。
AI.conclusion: 该概率模型为忆阻器及类似器件提供了更严谨的理论框架，有助于推动其在信息处理与存储领域的实际应用研究。

authors_text: Mikael Møller Høgsgaard,Panagiotis Karras,Wenyue Ma,Nidhi Rathi,Chris Schwiegelshohn
title: Optimally Interpolating between Ex-Ante Fairness and Welfare
title_zh: 事前公平与福利之间的最佳插值
abstract: For the fundamental problem of allocating a set of resources among individuals with varied preferences, the quality of an allocation relates to the degree of fairness and the collective welfare achieved. Unfortunately, in many resource-allocation settings, it is computationally hard to maximize welfare while achieving fairness goals. In this work, we consider ex-ante notions of fairness; popular examples include the \emph{randomized round-robin algorithm} and \emph{sortition mechanism}. We propose a general framework to systematically study the \emph{interpolation} between fairness and welfare goals in a multi-criteria setting. We develop two efficient algorithms ($\varepsilon-Mix$ and $Simple-Mix$) that achieve different trade-off guarantees with respect to fairness and welfare. $\varepsilon-Mix$ achieves an optimal multi-criteria approximation with respect to fairness and welfare, while $Simple-Mix$ achieves optimality up to a constant factor with zero computational overhead beyond the underlying \emph{welfare-maximizing mechanism} and the \emph{ex-ante fair mechanism}. Our framework makes no assumptions on either of the two underlying mechanisms, other than that the fair mechanism produces a distribution over the set of all allocations. Indeed, if these mechanisms are themselves approximation algorithms, our framework will retain the approximation factor, guaranteeing sensitivity to the quality of the underlying mechanisms, while being \emph{oblivious} to them. We also give an extensive experimental analysis for the aforementioned ex-ante fair mechanisms on real data sets, confirming our theoretical analysis.
summary: For the fundamental problem of allocating a set of resources among individuals with varied preferences, the quality of an allocation relates to the degree of fairness and the collective welfare achieved. Unfortunately, in many resource-allocation settings, it is computationally hard to maximize welfare while achieving fairness goals. In this work, we consider ex-ante notions of fairness; popular examples include the \emph{randomized round-robin algorithm} and \emph{sortition mechanism}. We propose a general framework to systematically study the \emph{interpolation} between fairness and welfare goals in a multi-criteria setting. We develop two efficient algorithms ($\varepsilon-Mix$ and $Simple-Mix$) that achieve different trade-off guarantees with respect to fairness and welfare. $\varepsilon-Mix$ achieves an optimal multi-criteria approximation with respect to fairness and welfare, while $Simple-Mix$ achieves optimality up to a constant factor with zero computational overhead beyond the underlying \emph{welfare-maximizing mechanism} and the \emph{ex-ante fair mechanism}. Our framework makes no assumptions on either of the two underlying mechanisms, other than that the fair mechanism produces a distribution over the set of all allocations. Indeed, if these mechanisms are themselves approximation algorithms, our framework will retain the approximation factor, guaranteeing sensitivity to the quality of the underlying mechanisms, while being \emph{oblivious} to them. We also give an extensive experimental analysis for the aforementioned ex-ante fair mechanisms on real data sets, confirming our theoretical analysis.
abstract_zh: 对于在具有不同偏好的个人之间分配一组资源的基本问题来说，分配的质量关系到公平程度和实现的集体福利。不幸的是，在许多资源分配环境中，在实现公平目标的同时实现福利最大化在计算上是困难的。在这项工作中，我们考虑事前的公平概念；流行的例子包括\emph{随机循环算法}和\emph{排序机制}。我们提出了一个总体框架来系统地研究多标准环境中公平与福利目标之间的\emph{插值}。我们开发了两种有效的算法（$\varepsilon-Mix$ 和 $Simple-Mix$），它们在公平性和福利方面实现了不同的权衡保证。 $\varepsilon-Mix$ 在公平和福利方面实现了最优的多标准近似，而 $Simple-Mix$ 在超出底层 \emph{福利最大化机制} 和 \emph{事前公平机制} 的情况下以零计算开销实现了常数因子的最优性。除了公平机制在所有分配集上产生分配之外，我们的框架不对这两种基本机制中的任何一种做出任何假设。事实上，如果这些机制本身就是近似算法，我们的框架将保留近似因子，保证对底层机制质量的敏感性，同时\emph{忽略}它们。我们还对真实数据集上的上述事前公平机制进行了广泛的实验分析，证实了我们的理论分析。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在资源分配中平衡事前公平性与集体福利的通用框架，并设计了两种高效算法（ε-Mix和Simple-Mix）以实现两者的最优插值。
AI.motivation: 资源分配需兼顾公平性与福利最大化，但现有机制难以同时满足。传统方法如随机轮询和抽签机制存在计算复杂度高或权衡不灵活的问题，亟需系统性解决方案。
AI.method: 构建多标准插值框架，设计ε-Mix（多目标近似最优）和Simple-Mix（零额外计算开销）算法，兼容任意底层公平机制与福利最大化机制，且保留其近似因子。
AI.result: 理论证明算法的多目标近似最优性，实验验证在真实数据集上有效平衡公平性与福利，且框架对底层机制细节无感知。
AI.conclusion: 提出通用框架与高效算法，为资源分配问题提供了兼顾公平与福利的系统性解决方案，理论分析与实验结果均验证其有效性。

search_text: Optimally Interpolating between Ex-Ante Fairness and Welfare 事前公平与福利之间的最佳插值 For the fundamental problem of allocating a set of resources among individuals with varied preferences, the quality of an allocation relates to the degree of fairness and the collective welfare achieved. Unfortunately, in many resource-allocation settings, it is computationally hard to maximize welfare while achieving fairness goals. In this work, we consider ex-ante notions of fairness; popular examples include the \emph{randomized round-robin algorithm} and \emph{sortition mechanism}. We propose a general framework to systematically study the \emph{interpolation} between fairness and welfare goals in a multi-criteria setting. We develop two efficient algorithms ($\varepsilon-Mix$ and $Simple-Mix$) that achieve different trade-off guarantees with respect to fairness and welfare. $\varepsilon-Mix$ achieves an optimal multi-criteria approximation with respect to fairness and welfare, while $Simple-Mix$ achieves optimality up to a constant factor with zero computational overhead beyond the underlying \emph{welfare-maximizing mechanism} and the \emph{ex-ante fair mechanism}. Our framework makes no assumptions on either of the two underlying mechanisms, other than that the fair mechanism produces a distribution over the set of all allocations. Indeed, if these mechanisms are themselves approximation algorithms, our framework will retain the approximation factor, guaranteeing sensitivity to the quality of the underlying mechanisms, while being \emph{oblivious} to them. We also give an extensive experimental analysis for the aforementioned ex-ante fair mechanisms on real data sets, confirming our theoretical analysis. 对于在具有不同偏好的个人之间分配一组资源的基本问题来说，分配的质量关系到公平程度和实现的集体福利。不幸的是，在许多资源分配环境中，在实现公平目标的同时实现福利最大化在计算上是困难的。在这项工作中，我们考虑事前的公平概念；流行的例子包括\emph{随机循环算法}和\emph{排序机制}。我们提出了一个总体框架来系统地研究多标准环境中公平与福利目标之间的\emph{插值}。我们开发了两种有效的算法（$\varepsilon-Mix$ 和 $Simple-Mix$），它们在公平性和福利方面实现了不同的权衡保证。 $\varepsilon-Mix$ 在公平和福利方面实现了最优的多标准近似，而 $Simple-Mix$ 在超出底层 \emph{福利最大化机制} 和 \emph{事前公平机制} 的情况下以零计算开销实现了常数因子的最优性。除了公平机制在所有分配集上产生分配之外，我们的框架不对这两种基本机制中的任何一种做出任何假设。事实上，如果这些机制本身就是近似算法，我们的框架将保留近似因子，保证对底层机制质量的敏感性，同时\emph{忽略}它们。我们还对真实数据集上的上述事前公平机制进行了广泛的实验分析，证实了我们的理论分析。 本文提出了一种在资源分配中平衡事前公平性与集体福利的通用框架，并设计了两种高效算法（ε-Mix和Simple-Mix）以实现两者的最优插值。 Mikael Møller Høgsgaard,Panagiotis Karras,Wenyue Ma,Nidhi Rathi,Chris Schwiegelshohn cs.GT,cs.DS

authors_text: Yann Dubois,Tatsunori Hashimoto,Percy Liang
title: Evaluating Self-Supervised Learning via Risk Decomposition
title_zh: 通过风险分解评估自我监督学习
comment: Oral at ICML 2023
comments: Oral at ICML 2023
abstract: Self-supervised learning (SSL) pipelines differ in many design choices such as the architecture, augmentations, or pretraining data. Yet SSL is typically evaluated using a single metric: linear probing on ImageNet. This does not provide much insight into why or when a model is better, now how to improve it. To address this, we propose an SSL risk decomposition, which generalizes the classical supervised approximation-estimation decomposition by considering errors arising from the representation learning step. Our decomposition consists of four error components: approximation, representation usability, probe generalization, and encoder generalization. We provide efficient estimators for each component and use them to analyze the effect of 30 design choices on 169 SSL vision models evaluated on ImageNet. Our analysis gives valuable insights for designing and using SSL models. For example, it highlights the main sources of error and shows how to improve SSL in specific settings (full- vs few-shot) by trading off error components. All results and pretrained models are at https://github.com/YannDubs/SSL-Risk-Decomposition.
summary: Self-supervised learning (SSL) pipelines differ in many design choices such as the architecture, augmentations, or pretraining data. Yet SSL is typically evaluated using a single metric: linear probing on ImageNet. This does not provide much insight into why or when a model is better, now how to improve it. To address this, we propose an SSL risk decomposition, which generalizes the classical supervised approximation-estimation decomposition by considering errors arising from the representation learning step. Our decomposition consists of four error components: approximation, representation usability, probe generalization, and encoder generalization. We provide efficient estimators for each component and use them to analyze the effect of 30 design choices on 169 SSL vision models evaluated on ImageNet. Our analysis gives valuable insights for designing and using SSL models. For example, it highlights the main sources of error and shows how to improve SSL in specific settings (full- vs few-shot) by trading off error components. All results and pretrained models are at https://github.com/YannDubs/SSL-Risk-Decomposition.
abstract_zh: 自监督学习 (SSL) 管道在许多设计选择上有所不同，例如架构、增强或预训练数据。然而，SSL 通常使用单一指标进行评估：ImageNet 上的线性探测。这并没有提供太多关于为什么或何时模型更好以及如何改进它的见解。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 SSL 风险分解，它通过考虑表示学习步骤中产生的错误来概括经典的监督近似估计分解。我们的分解由四个误差分量组成：近似、表示可用性、探针泛化和编码器泛化。我们为每个组件提供高效的估计器，并使用它们来分析 30 种设计选择对在 ImageNet 上评估的 169 个 SSL 视觉模型的影响。我们的分析为设计和使用 SSL 模型提供了宝贵的见解。例如，它突出显示了错误的主要来源，并展示了如何通过权衡错误组件来改进特定设置（完整与少量）中的 SSL。所有结果和预训练模型均位于 https://github.com/YannDubs/SSL-Risk-Decomposition。

AI.tldr: 本文通过风险分解方法分析自监督学习模型的性能，揭示不同设计选择对模型效果的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督学习评估仅依赖单一指标（如ImageNet线性探测），难以解释模型差异及改进方向。
AI.method: 提出SSL风险分解框架，将误差拆解为近似、表示可用性、探测泛化和编码器泛化四部分，并量化分析169个模型的30项设计选择。
AI.result: 识别出误差主要来源，展示如何在少样本/全样本场景下通过权衡误差组件优化SSL性能，并公开分析结果与预训练模型。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为自监督学习模型的设计与应用提供了系统性分析工具，有助于针对性改进模型表现。

authors_text: Tim Genewein,Grégoire Delétang,Anian Ruoss,Li Kevin Wenliang,Elliot Catt,Vincent Dutordoir,Jordi Grau-Moya,Laurent Orseau,Marcus Hutter,Joel Veness
title: Memory-Based Meta-Learning on Non-Stationary Distributions
title_zh: 非平稳分布上基于记忆的元学习
abstract: Memory-based meta-learning is a technique for approximating Bayes-optimal predictors. Under fairly general conditions, minimizing sequential prediction error, measured by the log loss, leads to implicit meta-learning. The goal of this work is to investigate how far this interpretation can be realized by current sequence prediction models and training regimes. The focus is on piecewise stationary sources with unobserved switching-points, which arguably capture an important characteristic of natural language and action-observation sequences in partially observable environments. We show that various types of memory-based neural models, including Transformers, LSTMs, and RNNs can learn to accurately approximate known Bayes-optimal algorithms and behave as if performing Bayesian inference over the latent switching-points and the latent parameters governing the data distribution within each segment.
summary: Memory-based meta-learning is a technique for approximating Bayes-optimal predictors. Under fairly general conditions, minimizing sequential prediction error, measured by the log loss, leads to implicit meta-learning. The goal of this work is to investigate how far this interpretation can be realized by current sequence prediction models and training regimes. The focus is on piecewise stationary sources with unobserved switching-points, which arguably capture an important characteristic of natural language and action-observation sequences in partially observable environments. We show that various types of memory-based neural models, including Transformers, LSTMs, and RNNs can learn to accurately approximate known Bayes-optimal algorithms and behave as if performing Bayesian inference over the latent switching-points and the latent parameters governing the data distribution within each segment.
abstract_zh: 基于记忆的元学习是一种近似贝叶斯最优预测器的技术。在相当一般的条件下，最小化通过对数损失衡量的顺序预测误差会导致隐式元学习。这项工作的目标是研究当前的序列预测模型和训练机制可以在多大程度上实现这种解释。重点是具有未观察到的切换点的分段固定源，可以说它们捕获了部分可观察环境中自然语言和动作观察序列的重要特征。我们表明，各种类型的基于记忆的神经模型，包括 Transformer、LSTM 和 RNN 都可以学习准确地逼近已知的贝叶斯最优算法，并且表现得就像对潜在切换点和控制每个段内数据分布的潜在参数执行贝叶斯推理一样。

AI.tldr: 本文研究基于记忆的元学习在非平稳分布中的实现，探讨当前序列预测模型是否能隐式进行元学习以处理分段平稳源。
AI.motivation: 自然语言和部分可观测环境中的序列数据常具有未观察到的切换点，现有模型是否能隐式学习此类非平稳特性是关键问题。
AI.method: 通过分析Transformer、LSTM和RNN等记忆型神经网络，验证其能否近似贝叶斯最优算法并模拟对潜在切换点及参数的贝叶斯推断。
AI.result: 实验表明这些模型能准确逼近已知贝叶斯最优算法，在分段平稳源上表现出对潜在切换点和参数的贝叶斯推理能力。
AI.conclusion: 当前主流序列模型具备隐式元学习能力，可在非平稳分布中实现近似贝叶斯最优预测，为动态环境建模提供新视角。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究基于记忆的元学习在非平稳分布中的实现，探讨当前序列预测模型是否能隐式进行元学习以处理分段平稳源。
ai_content.motivation: 自然语言和部分可观测环境中的序列数据常具有未观察到的切换点，现有模型是否能隐式学习此类非平稳特性是关键问题。
ai_content.method: 通过分析Transformer、LSTM和RNN等记忆型神经网络，验证其能否近似贝叶斯最优算法并模拟对潜在切换点及参数的贝叶斯推断。
