Finetuning the backbone or adjusting the classifier prototypes trained in the prior sessions would inevitably cause a misalignment between the feature and classifier of old classes, which explains the well-known catastrophic forgetting problem. In this paper, we deal with this misalignment dilemma in FSCIL inspired by the recently discovered phenomenon named neural collapse, which reveals that the last-layer features of the same class will collapse into a vertex, and the vertices of all classes are aligned with the classifier prototypes, which are formed as a simplex equiangular tight frame (ETF). It corresponds to an optimal geometric structure for classification due to the maximized Fisher Discriminant Ratio. We propose a neural collapse inspired framework for FSCIL. A group of classifier prototypes are pre-assigned as a simplex ETF for the whole label space, including the base session and all the incremental sessions. During training, the classifier prototypes are not learnable, and we adopt a novel loss function that drives the features into their corresponding prototypes. Theoretical analysis shows that our method holds the neural collapse optimality and does not break the feature-classifier alignment in an incremental fashion. Experiments on the miniImageNet, CUB-200, and CIFAR-100 datasets demonstrate that our proposed framework outperforms the state-of-the-art performances. Code address: https://github.com/NeuralCollapseApplications/FSCIL
abstract_zh: 少镜头类增量学习（FSCIL）一直是一个具有挑战性的问题，因为新会话中的每个新类只能访问少量训练样本。微调主干网络或调整之前训练的分类器原型将不可避免地导致旧类的特征和分类器之间的错位，这解释了众所周知的灾难性遗忘问题。在本文中，我们受最近发现的神经崩溃现象的启发，处理了 FSCIL 中的这种错位困境，该现象揭示了同一类的最后一层特征将崩溃为一个顶点，并且所有类的顶点与分类器原型对齐，分类器原型形成为单纯形等角紧框架（ETF）。由于费舍尔判别比最大化，它对应于分类的最佳几何结构。我们提出了一个受神经崩溃启发的 FSCIL 框架。一组分类器原型被预先分配为整个标签空间的单纯形 ETF，包括基本会话和所有增量会话。在训练过程中，分类器原型是不可学习的，我们采用了一种新颖的损失函数，将特征驱动到相应的原型中。理论分析表明，我们的方法保持了神经崩溃最优性，并且不会以增量方式破坏特征分类器对齐。在 miniImageNet、CUB-200 和 CIFAR-100 数据集上的实验表明，我们提出的框架优于最先进的性能。代码地址：https://github.com/NeuralCollapseApplications/FSCIL

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经崩溃现象的特征-分类器对齐框架，用于解决少样本类别增量学习（FSCIL）中的灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 在FSCIL中，新增类别仅有少量样本，传统微调或分类器调整方法会导致旧类别特征与分类器对齐失效，引发灾难性遗忘。神经崩溃现象表明，同类特征会坍缩为简单形（ETF）顶点，且与分类器原型对齐，这为分类提供了最优几何结构。
AI.method: 预分配整个标签空间（包括基础和增量类别）的分类器原型为简单形ETF，训练时固定分类器原型，通过新损失函数驱动特征向对应原型坍缩，理论分析证明方法保持神经崩溃最优性且增量不破坏对齐。
AI.result: 在miniImageNet、CUB-200和CIFAR-100数据集上的实验表明，该框架优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法通过神经崩溃启发的特征-分类器对齐机制，有效解决了FSCIL中的灾难性遗忘问题，实现了更优的增量学习性能。

authors_text: Wenhui Zhu,Peijie Qiu,Oana M. Dumitrascu,Jacob M. Sobczak,Mohammad Farazi,Zhangsihao Yang,Keshav Nandakumar,Yalin Wang
title: OTRE: Where Optimal Transport Guided Unpaired Image-to-Image Translation Meets Regularization by Enhancing
title_zh: OTRE：最佳传输引导的不成对图像到图像翻译通过增强满足正则化
comment: Accepted as a conference paper to The 28th biennial international conference on Information Processing in Medical Imaging (IPMI 2023)
comments: Accepted as a conference paper to The 28th biennial international conference on Information Processing in Medical Imaging (IPMI 2023)
abstract: Non-mydriatic retinal color fundus photography (CFP) is widely available due to the advantage of not requiring pupillary dilation, however, is prone to poor quality due to operators, systemic imperfections, or patient-related causes. Optimal retinal image quality is mandated for accurate medical diagnoses and automated analyses. Herein, we leveraged the Optimal Transport (OT) theory to propose an unpaired image-to-image translation scheme for mapping low-quality retinal CFPs to high-quality counterparts. Furthermore, to improve the flexibility, robustness, and applicability of our image enhancement pipeline in the clinical practice, we generalized a state-of-the-art model-based image reconstruction method, regularization by denoising, by plugging in priors learned by our OT-guided image-to-image translation network. We named it as regularization by enhancing (RE). We validated the integrated framework, OTRE, on three publicly available retinal image datasets by assessing the quality after enhancement and their performance on various downstream tasks, including diabetic retinopathy grading, vessel segmentation, and diabetic lesion segmentation. The experimental results demonstrated the superiority of our proposed framework over some state-of-the-art unsupervised competitors and a state-of-the-art supervised method.
summary: Non-mydriatic retinal color fundus photography (CFP) is widely available due to the advantage of not requiring pupillary dilation, however, is prone to poor quality due to operators, systemic imperfections, or patient-related causes. Optimal retinal image quality is mandated for accurate medical diagnoses and automated analyses. Herein, we leveraged the Optimal Transport (OT) theory to propose an unpaired image-to-image translation scheme for mapping low-quality retinal CFPs to high-quality counterparts. Furthermore, to improve the flexibility, robustness, and applicability of our image enhancement pipeline in the clinical practice, we generalized a state-of-the-art model-based image reconstruction method, regularization by denoising, by plugging in priors learned by our OT-guided image-to-image translation network. We named it as regularization by enhancing (RE). We validated the integrated framework, OTRE, on three publicly available retinal image datasets by assessing the quality after enhancement and their performance on various downstream tasks, including diabetic retinopathy grading, vessel segmentation, and diabetic lesion segmentation. The experimental results demonstrated the superiority of our proposed framework over some state-of-the-art unsupervised competitors and a state-of-the-art supervised method.
abstract_zh: 免散瞳视网膜彩色眼底照相（CFP）由于不需要散瞳的优点而被广泛应用，但由于操作人员、系统缺陷或患者相关原因，容易导致质量较差。准确的医疗诊断和自动分析需要最佳的视网膜图像质量。在此，我们利用最佳传输（OT）理论提出了一种不成对的图像到图像转换方案，用于将低质量的视网膜 CFP 映射到高质量的对应物。此外，为了提高图像增强流程在临床实践中的灵活性、鲁棒性和适用性，我们推广了一种最先进的基于模型的图像重建方法，通过插入由我们的 OT 引导的图像到图像翻译网络学习的先验知识进行去噪正则化。我们将其命名为增强正则化（RE）。我们通过评估增强后的质量及其在各种下游任务（包括糖尿病视网膜病变分级、血管分割和糖尿病病变分割）中的表现，在三个公开可用的视网膜图像数据集上验证了集成框架 OTRE。实验结果证明了我们提出的框架相对于一些最先进的无监督竞争对手和最先进的监督方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出OTRE框架，结合最优传输理论和增强正则化方法，将低质量视网膜图像转换为高质量图像以辅助医学诊断。
AI.motivation: 非散瞳视网膜彩色眼底摄影（CFP）因操作、系统或患者因素易出现低质量图像，影响医学诊断准确性，需有效增强方法。
AI.method: 基于最优传输（OT）理论设计无配对图像翻译模型，将低质量CFP映射为高质量图像；结合去噪正则化方法，引入OT模型学习的先验知识形成增强正则化（RE），构建OTRE框架。
AI.result: 在三个公开数据集上验证，OTRE在图像质量评估及糖尿病视网膜病变分级、血管分割等下游任务中优于现有无监督和监督方法。
AI.conclusion: OTRE框架通过结合最优传输与增强正则化，在视网膜图像增强及医学分析任务中表现出优越性能，具有临床应用潜力。

search_text: OTRE: Where Optimal Transport Guided Unpaired Image-to-Image Translation Meets Regularization by Enhancing OTRE：最佳传输引导的不成对图像到图像翻译通过增强满足正则化 Non-mydriatic retinal color fundus photography (CFP) is widely available due to the advantage of not requiring pupillary dilation, however, is prone to poor quality due to operators, systemic imperfections, or patient-related causes. Optimal retinal image quality is mandated for accurate medical diagnoses and automated analyses. Herein, we leveraged the Optimal Transport (OT) theory to propose an unpaired image-to-image translation scheme for mapping low-quality retinal CFPs to high-quality counterparts. Furthermore, to improve the flexibility, robustness, and applicability of our image enhancement pipeline in the clinical practice, we generalized a state-of-the-art model-based image reconstruction method, regularization by denoising, by plugging in priors learned by our OT-guided image-to-image translation network. We named it as regularization by enhancing (RE). We validated the integrated framework, OTRE, on three publicly available retinal image datasets by assessing the quality after enhancement and their performance on various downstream tasks, including diabetic retinopathy grading, vessel segmentation, and diabetic lesion segmentation. The experimental results demonstrated the superiority of our proposed framework over some state-of-the-art unsupervised competitors and a state-of-the-art supervised method. 免散瞳视网膜彩色眼底照相（CFP）由于不需要散瞳的优点而被广泛应用，但由于操作人员、系统缺陷或患者相关原因，容易导致质量较差。准确的医疗诊断和自动分析需要最佳的视网膜图像质量。在此，我们利用最佳传输（OT）理论提出了一种不成对的图像到图像转换方案，用于将低质量的视网膜 CFP 映射到高质量的对应物。此外，为了提高图像增强流程在临床实践中的灵活性、鲁棒性和适用性，我们推广了一种最先进的基于模型的图像重建方法，通过插入由我们的 OT 引导的图像到图像翻译网络学习的先验知识进行去噪正则化。我们将其命名为增强正则化（RE）。我们通过评估增强后的质量及其在各种下游任务（包括糖尿病视网膜病变分级、血管分割和糖尿病病变分割）中的表现，在三个公开可用的视网膜图像数据集上验证了集成框架 OTRE。实验结果证明了我们提出的框架相对于一些最先进的无监督竞争对手和最先进的监督方法的优越性。 本文提出OTRE框架，结合最优传输理论和增强正则化方法，将低质量视网膜图像转换为高质量图像以辅助医学诊断。 Wenhui Zhu,Peijie Qiu,Oana M. Dumitrascu,Jacob M. Sobczak,Mohammad Farazi,Zhangsihao Yang,Keshav Nandakumar,Yalin Wang eess.IV,cs.CV,stat.ML

authors_text: Wenhui Zhu,Peijie Qiu,Mohammad Farazi,Keshav Nandakumar,Oana M. Dumitrascu,Yalin Wang
title: Optimal Transport Guided Unsupervised Learning for Enhancing low-quality Retinal Images
title_zh: 优化传输引导的无监督学习增强低质量视网膜图像
comment: Accepted as a conference paper to 20th IEEE International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging(ISBI 2023)
comments: Accepted as a conference paper to 20th IEEE International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging(ISBI 2023)
abstract: Real-world non-mydriatic retinal fundus photography is prone to artifacts, imperfections and low-quality when certain ocular or systemic co-morbidities exist. Artifacts may result in inaccuracy or ambiguity in clinical diagnoses. In this paper, we proposed a simple but effective end-to-end framework for enhancing poor-quality retinal fundus images. Leveraging the optimal transport theory, we proposed an unpaired image-to-image translation scheme for transporting low-quality images to their high-quality counterparts. We theoretically proved that a Generative Adversarial Networks (GAN) model with a generator and discriminator is sufficient for this task. Furthermore, to mitigate the inconsistency of information between the low-quality images and their enhancements, an information consistency mechanism was proposed to maximally maintain structural consistency (optical discs, blood vessels, lesions) between the source and enhanced domains. Extensive experiments were conducted on the EyeQ dataset to demonstrate the superiority of our proposed method perceptually and quantitatively.
summary: Real-world non-mydriatic retinal fundus photography is prone to artifacts, imperfections and low-quality when certain ocular or systemic co-morbidities exist. Artifacts may result in inaccuracy or ambiguity in clinical diagnoses. In this paper, we proposed a simple but effective end-to-end framework for enhancing poor-quality retinal fundus images. Leveraging the optimal transport theory, we proposed an unpaired image-to-image translation scheme for transporting low-quality images to their high-quality counterparts. We theoretically proved that a Generative Adversarial Networks (GAN) model with a generator and discriminator is sufficient for this task. Furthermore, to mitigate the inconsistency of information between the low-quality images and their enhancements, an information consistency mechanism was proposed to maximally maintain structural consistency (optical discs, blood vessels, lesions) between the source and enhanced domains. Extensive experiments were conducted on the EyeQ dataset to demonstrate the superiority of our proposed method perceptually and quantitatively.
abstract_zh: 当存在某些眼部或全身合并症时，现实世界的免散瞳视网膜眼底摄影很容易出现伪影、缺陷和低质量。伪影可能会导致临床诊断不准确或含糊不清。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单但有效的端到端框架，用于增强质量较差的视网膜眼底图像。利用最优传输理论，我们提出了一种不成对的图像到图像转换方案，用于将低质量图像传输到高质量图像。我们从理论上证明，带有生成器和判别器的生成对抗网络（GAN）模型足以完成这项任务。此外，为了减轻低质量图像与其增强图像之间的信息不一致，提出了一种信息一致性机制，以最大限度地保持源域和增强域之间的结构一致性（视盘、血管、病变）。在 EyeQ 数据集上进行了大量的实验，以在感知和定量上证明我们提出的方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于最优传输理论的无监督学习框架，用于增强低质量视网膜图像。
AI.motivation: 现实中的非散瞳视网膜眼底摄影常因眼部或全身性疾病导致图像存在伪影和低质量问题，影响临床诊断准确性。
AI.method: 利用最优传输理论构建无配对图像到图像翻译方案，结合生成对抗网络（GAN）并引入信息一致性机制以保持结构特征。
AI.result: 在EyeQ数据集上的实验表明，该方法在感知和定量指标上均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 最优传输引导的GAN框架有效解决了低质量视网膜图像增强问题，验证了生成对抗网络在此任务中的充分性。

authors_text: Rickard Stureborg,Bhuwan Dhingra,Jun Yang
title: Interface Design for Crowdsourcing Hierarchical Multi-Label Text Annotations
title_zh: 众包分层多标签文本标注界面设计
comment: To appear in CHI-2023
comments: To appear in CHI-2023
abstract: Human data labeling is an important and expensive task at the heart of supervised learning systems. Hierarchies help humans understand and organize concepts. We ask whether and how concept hierarchies can inform the design of annotation interfaces to improve labeling quality and efficiency. We study this question through annotation of vaccine misinformation, where the labeling task is difficult and highly subjective. We investigate 6 user interface designs for crowdsourcing hierarchical labels by collecting over 18,000 individual annotations. Under a fixed budget, integrating hierarchies into the design improves crowdsource workers' F1 scores. We attribute this to (1) Grouping similar concepts, improving F1 scores by +0.16 over random groupings, (2) Strong relative performance on high-difficulty examples (relative F1 score difference of +0.40), and (3) Filtering out obvious negatives, increasing precision by +0.07. Ultimately, labeling schemes integrating the hierarchy outperform those that do not - achieving mean F1 of 0.70.
summary: Human data labeling is an important and expensive task at the heart of supervised learning systems. Hierarchies help humans understand and organize concepts. We ask whether and how concept hierarchies can inform the design of annotation interfaces to improve labeling quality and efficiency. We study this question through annotation of vaccine misinformation, where the labeling task is difficult and highly subjective. We investigate 6 user interface designs for crowdsourcing hierarchical labels by collecting over 18,000 individual annotations. Under a fixed budget, integrating hierarchies into the design improves crowdsource workers' F1 scores. We attribute this to (1) Grouping similar concepts, improving F1 scores by +0.16 over random groupings, (2) Strong relative performance on high-difficulty examples (relative F1 score difference of +0.40), and (3) Filtering out obvious negatives, increasing precision by +0.07. Ultimately, labeling schemes integrating the hierarchy outperform those that do not - achieving mean F1 of 0.70.
abstract_zh: 人类数据标记是监督学习系统核心的一项重要且昂贵的任务。层次结构帮助人类理解和组织概念。我们询问概念层次结构是否以及如何为注释界面的设计提供信息，以提高标签质量和效率。我们通过对疫苗错误信息的注释来研究这个问题，其中标签任务是困难且高度主观的。我们通过收集 18,000 多个单独的注释，研究了 6 种众包分层标签的用户界面设计。在固定预算下，将层次结构集成到设计中可以提高众包工作人员的 F1 分数。我们将其归因于（1）对相似的概念进行分组，与随机分组相比，F1 分数提高了 +0.16，（2）在高难度示例上具有较强的相对性能（相对 F1 分数差异为 +0.40），以及（3）过滤掉明显的负面因素，将精度提高了 +0.07。最终，整合层次结构的标签方案优于那些没有整合层次结构的标签方案——平均 F1 达到 0.70。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过整合概念层次结构设计注释界面，以提高众包多标签文本标注的质量和效率。
AI.motivation: 人类数据标注是监督学习系统中的关键但昂贵的任务，而概念层次结构有助于人类理解和组织概念，因此探索其在标注界面设计中的应用具有重要意义。
AI.method: 通过收集超过18,000条疫苗错误信息的标注数据，对比6种用户界面设计，分析层次结构整合对标注效果的影响。
AI.result: 在固定预算下，整合层次结构的设计使F1分数提升至0.70，具体表现为：相似概念分组使F1提高0.16，高难度样本相对F1差异达+0.40，过滤明显负样本使精确率提升0.07。
AI.conclusion: 整合概念层次结构的标注方案显著优于非整合方案，能有效提升标注质量与效率。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 整合概念层次结构的标注方案显著优于非整合方案，能有效提升标注质量与效率。

tldr: 本文研究如何通过整合概念层次结构设计注释界面，以提高众包多标签文本标注的质量和效率。
motivation: 人类数据标注是监督学习系统中的关键但昂贵的任务，而概念层次结构有助于人类理解和组织概念，因此探索其在标注界面设计中的应用具有重要意义。
method: 通过收集超过18,000条疫苗错误信息的标注数据，对比6种用户界面设计，分析层次结构整合对标注效果的影响。
result: 在固定预算下，整合层次结构的设计使F1分数提升至0.70，具体表现为：相似概念分组使F1提高0.16，高难度样本相对F1差异达+0.40，过滤明显负样本使精确率提升0.07。
conclusion: 整合概念层次结构的标注方案显著优于非整合方案，能有效提升标注质量与效率。
search_text: Interface Design for Crowdsourcing Hierarchical Multi-Label Text Annotations 众包分层多标签文本标注界面设计 Human data labeling is an important and expensive task at the heart of supervised learning systems. Hierarchies help humans understand and organize concepts. We ask whether and how concept hierarchies can inform the design of annotation interfaces to improve labeling quality and efficiency. We study this question through annotation of vaccine misinformation, where the labeling task is difficult and highly subjective. We investigate 6 user interface designs for crowdsourcing hierarchical labels by collecting over 18,000 individual annotations. Under a fixed budget, integrating hierarchies into the design improves crowdsource workers' F1 scores. We attribute this to (1) Grouping similar concepts, improving F1 scores by +0.16 over random groupings, (2) Strong relative performance on high-difficulty examples (relative F1 score difference of +0.40), and (3) Filtering out obvious negatives, increasing precision by +0.07. Ultimately, labeling schemes integrating the hierarchy outperform those that do not - achieving mean F1 of 0.70. 人类数据标记是监督学习系统核心的一项重要且昂贵的任务。层次结构帮助人类理解和组织概念。我们询问概念层次结构是否以及如何为注释界面的设计提供信息，以提高标签质量和效率。我们通过对疫苗错误信息的注释来研究这个问题，其中标签任务是困难且高度主观的。我们通过收集 18,000 多个单独的注释，研究了 6 种众包分层标签的用户界面设计。在固定预算下，将层次结构集成到设计中可以提高众包工作人员的 F1 分数。我们将其归因于（1）对相似的概念进行分组，与随机分组相比，F1 分数提高了 +0.16，（2）在高难度示例上具有较强的相对性能（相对 F1 分数差异为 +0.40），以及（3）过滤掉明显的负面因素，将精度提高了 +0.07。最终，整合层次结构的标签方案优于那些没有整合层次结构的标签方案——平均 F1 达到 0.70。 本文研究如何通过整合概念层次结构设计注释界面，以提高众包多标签文本标注的质量和效率。 Rickard Stureborg,Bhuwan Dhingra,Jun Yang cs.HC

authors_text: Maryam T. Abdulkhaleq,Tarik A. Rashid,Bryar A. Hassan,Abeer Alsadoon,Nebojsa Bacanin,Amit Chhabra,S. Vimal
title: Fitness Dependent Optimizer with Neural Networks for COVID-19 patients
title_zh: 针对 COVID-19 患者的具有神经网络的健身相关优化器
comment: 38 pages
comments: 38 pages
abstract: The Coronavirus, known as COVID-19, which appeared in 2019 in China, has significantly affected global health and become a huge burden on health institutions all over the world. These effects are continuing today. One strategy for limiting the virus's transmission is to have an early diagnosis of suspected cases and take appropriate measures before the disease spreads further. This work aims to diagnose and show the probability of getting infected by the disease according to textual clinical data. In this work, we used five machine learning techniques (GWO_MLP, GWO_CMLP, MGWO_MLP, FDO_MLP, FDO_CMLP) all of which aim to classify Covid-19 patients into two categories (Positive and Negative). Experiments showed promising results for all used models. The applied methods showed very similar performance, typically in terms of accuracy. However, in each tested dataset, FDO_MLP and FDO_CMLP produced the best results with 100% accuracy. The other models' results varied from one experiment to the other. It is concluded that the models on which the FDO algorithm was used as a learning algorithm had the possibility of obtaining higher accuracy. However, it is found that FDO has the longest runtime compared to the other algorithms. The link to the covid 19 models is found here: https://github.com/Tarik4Rashid4/covid19models
summary: The Coronavirus, known as COVID-19, which appeared in 2019 in China, has significantly affected global health and become a huge burden on health institutions all over the world. These effects are continuing today. One strategy for limiting the virus's transmission is to have an early diagnosis of suspected cases and take appropriate measures before the disease spreads further. This work aims to diagnose and show the probability of getting infected by the disease according to textual clinical data. In this work, we used five machine learning techniques (GWO_MLP, GWO_CMLP, MGWO_MLP, FDO_MLP, FDO_CMLP) all of which aim to classify Covid-19 patients into two categories (Positive and Negative). Experiments showed promising results for all used models. The applied methods showed very similar performance, typically in terms of accuracy. However, in each tested dataset, FDO_MLP and FDO_CMLP produced the best results with 100% accuracy. The other models' results varied from one experiment to the other. It is concluded that the models on which the FDO algorithm was used as a learning algorithm had the possibility of obtaining higher accuracy. However, it is found that FDO has the longest runtime compared to the other algorithms. The link to the covid 19 models is found here: https://github.com/Tarik4Rashid4/covid19models
abstract_zh: 2019年在中国出现的新型冠状病毒（即COVID-19）严重影响了全球健康，并成为世界各地卫生机构的巨大负担。这些影响今天仍在继续。限制病毒传播的一项策略是对疑似病例进行早期诊断，并在疾病进一步传播之前采取适当措施。这项工作旨在根据文本临床数据诊断并显示感染该疾病的可能性。在这项工作中，我们使用了五种机器学习技术（GWO_MLP、GWO_CMLP、MGWO_MLP、FDO_MLP、FDO_CMLP），所有这些技术都旨在将 Covid-19 患者分为两类（阳性和阴性）。实验显示所有使用的模型都取得了有希望的结果。所应用的方法表现出非常相似的性能，通常在准确性方面。然而，在每个测试数据集中，FDO_MLP 和 FDO_CMLP 均产生了 100% 准确度的最佳结果。其他模型的结果因实验而异。结论是，采用FDO算法作为学习算法的模型有可能获得更高的准确率。然而，我们发现与其他算法相比，FDO 的运行时间最长。 covid 19 模型的链接位于：https://github.com/Tarik4Rashid4/covid19models

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于神经网络的Fitness Dependent Optimizer（FDO）算法，用于根据文本临床数据对COVID-19患者进行分类诊断。
AI.motivation: 新冠疫情对全球健康造成严重影响，早期诊断疑似病例是遏制病毒传播的关键，因此需要开发高精度的分类模型。
AI.method: 采用五种机器学习方法（GWO_MLP、GWO_CMLP、MGWO_MLP、FDO_MLP、FDO_CMLP），结合神经网络对患者数据进行二分类（阳性/阴性）。
AI.result: 实验显示FDO_MLP和FDO_CMLP在所有数据集上均达到100%准确率，但运行时间最长；其他模型表现不稳定。
AI.conclusion: FDO算法在准确率上优于其他优化器，但计算成本较高，需在精度与效率间权衡。

authors_text: Dler O. Hasan,Aso M. Aladdin,Hardi Sabah Talabani,Tarik Ahmed Rashid,Seyedali Mirjalili
title: The Fifteen Puzzle- A New Approach through Hybridizing Three Heuristics Methods
title_zh: 十五个难题——混合三种启发式方法的新方法
comment: 18 pages
comments: 18 pages
abstract: Fifteen Puzzle problem is one of the most classical problems that have captivated mathematical enthusiasts for centuries. This is mainly because of the huge size of the state space with approximately 1013 states that have to be explored and several algorithms have been applied to solve the Fifteen Puzzle instances. In this paper, to deal with this large state space, Bidirectional A* (BA*) search algorithm with three heuristics, such as Manhattan distance (MD), linear conflict (LC), and walking distance (WD) has been used to solve the Fifteen Puzzle problems. The three mentioned heuristics will be hybridized in a way that can dramatically reduce the number of generated states by the algorithm. Moreover, all those heuristics require only 25KB of storage but help the algorithm effectively reduce the number of generated states and expand fewer nodes. Our implementation of BA* search can significantly reduce the space complexity, and guarantee either optimal or near-optimal solutions.1
summary: Fifteen Puzzle problem is one of the most classical problems that have captivated mathematical enthusiasts for centuries. This is mainly because of the huge size of the state space with approximately 1013 states that have to be explored and several algorithms have been applied to solve the Fifteen Puzzle instances. In this paper, to deal with this large state space, Bidirectional A* (BA*) search algorithm with three heuristics, such as Manhattan distance (MD), linear conflict (LC), and walking distance (WD) has been used to solve the Fifteen Puzzle problems. The three mentioned heuristics will be hybridized in a way that can dramatically reduce the number of generated states by the algorithm. Moreover, all those heuristics require only 25KB of storage but help the algorithm effectively reduce the number of generated states and expand fewer nodes. Our implementation of BA* search can significantly reduce the space complexity, and guarantee either optimal or near-optimal solutions.1
abstract_zh: 十五谜题是几个世纪以来吸引数学爱好者的最经典问题之一。这主要是因为状态空间规模巨大，需要探索大约 1013 个状态，并且已经应用​​了多种算法来解决十五个难题实例。在本文中，为了处理这种大的状态空间，采用曼哈顿距离（MD）、线性冲突（LC）和步行距离（WD）等三种启发式的双向A*（BA*）搜索算法来解决十五难题。上述三种启发式方法将以某种方式进行混合，可以显着减少算法生成的状态数量。此外，所有这些启发式方法仅需要 25KB 的存储空间，但有助于算法有效减少生成状态的数量并扩展更少的节点。我们实施的 BA* 搜索可以显着降低空间复杂度，并保证最优或接近最优的解决方案。1

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合三种启发式方法的混合算法，用于高效解决十五谜题问题。
AI.motivation: 十五谜题存在巨大的状态空间（约10^13个状态），传统算法难以高效求解，需探索更优的启发式方法以减少计算资源消耗。
AI.method: 采用双向A*搜索算法，融合曼哈顿距离（MD）、线性冲突（LC）和行走距离（WD）三种启发式方法，通过混合策略降低生成状态数量，仅需25KB存储空间。
AI.result: 算法显著降低空间复杂度，保证获得最优或近似最优解，有效减少扩展节点数量。
AI.conclusion: 混合启发式方法在解决十五谜题时表现出高效性，兼顾计算资源消耗与求解质量，为大规模状态空间问题提供新思路。

authors_text: Rowan Pellow-Jarman,Anban Pillay,Ilya Sinayskiy,Francesco Petruccione
title: Hybrid Genetic Optimisation for Quantum Feature Map Design
title_zh: 量子特征图设计的混合遗传优化
comment: 42 pages, 39 figures
comments: 42 pages, 39 figures
abstract: Kernel methods are an important class of techniques in machine learning. To be effective, good feature maps are crucial for mapping non-linearly separable input data into a higher dimensional (feature) space, thus allowing the data to be linearly separable in feature space. Previous work has shown that quantum feature map design can be automated for a given dataset using NSGA-II, a genetic algorithm, while both minimizing circuit size and maximizing classification accuracy. However, the evaluation of the accuracy achieved by a candidate feature map is costly. In this work, we demonstrate the suitability of kernel-target alignment as a substitute for accuracy in genetic algorithm-based quantum feature map design. Kernel-target alignment is faster to evaluate than accuracy and doesn't require some data points to be reserved for its evaluation. To further accelerate the evaluation of genetic fitness, we provide a method to approximate kernel-target alignment. To improve kernel-target alignment and root mean squared error, the final trainable parameters of the generated circuits are further trained using COBYLA to determine whether a hybrid approach applying conventional circuit parameter training can easily complement the genetic structure optimization approach. A total of eight new approaches are compared to the original across nine varied binary classification problems from the UCI machine learning repository, showing that kernel-target alignment and its approximation produce feature map circuits enabling comparable accuracy to the previous work but with larger margins on training data (in excess of 20\% larger) that improve further with circuit parameter training.

abstract_zh: 核方法是机器学习中的一类重要技术。为了有效，良好的特征图对于将非线性可分离的输入数据映射到更高维度（特征）空间至关重要，从而允许数据在特征空间中线性可分离。先前的工作表明，可以使用 NSGA-II（一种遗传算法）针对给定数据集实现量子特征图设计的自动化，同时最小化电路尺寸并最大化分类精度。然而，评估候选特征图所达到的精度是昂贵的。在这项工作中，我们证明了核目标对齐作为基于遗传算法的量子特征图设计中准确性的替代品的适用性。内核目标对齐的评估速度比准确性更快，并且不需要为其评估保留一些数据点。为了进一步加速遗传适应度的评估，我们提供了一种近似核目标对齐的方法。为了改善核目标对齐和均方根误差，使用 COBYLA 进一步训练生成电路的最终可训练参数，以确定应用传统电路参数训练的混合方法是否可以轻松补充遗传结构优化方法。将总共​​八种新方法与 UCI 机器学习存储库中的九种不同的二元分类问题的原始方法进行了比较，结果表明，内核目标对齐及其近似产生的特征映射电路可实现与之前的工作相当的精度，但训练数据的裕度更大（超过 20%），通过电路参数训练进一步改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种混合遗传优化方法，用于设计量子特征映射，通过替代传统准确率评估指标来提升效率。
AI.motivation: 传统量子特征映射设计依赖准确率评估，但该过程计算成本高且需保留验证数据，限制了优化效率。
AI.method: 采用核目标对齐（KTA）替代准确率评估，结合COBYLA算法优化电路参数，并提出KTA近似方法加速遗传算法的适应度评估。
AI.result: 在九个二分类问题上，新方法生成的特征映射电路在训练集上准确率提升超20%，且保持与原方法相当的分类性能。
AI.conclusion: 混合遗传优化与参数训练方法能有效提升量子特征映射设计效率，且无需牺牲分类性能。

authors_text: Rachael Harkness,Alejandro F Frangi,Kieran Zucker,Nishant Ravikumar
title: Learning disentangled representations for explainable chest X-ray classification using Dirichlet VAEs
title_zh: 使用 Dirichlet VAE 学习可解释的胸部 X 射线分类的解缠结表示
comment: 13 pages, 8 figures, to be published in SPIE Medical Imaging 2023
comments: 13 pages, 8 figures, to be published in SPIE Medical Imaging 2023
abstract: This study explores the use of the Dirichlet Variational Autoencoder (DirVAE) for learning disentangled latent representations of chest X-ray (CXR) images. Our working hypothesis is that distributional sparsity, as facilitated by the Dirichlet prior, will encourage disentangled feature learning for the complex task of multi-label classification of CXR images. The DirVAE is trained using CXR images from the CheXpert database, and the predictive capacity of multi-modal latent representations learned by DirVAE models is investigated through implementation of an auxiliary multi-label classification task, with a view to enforce separation of latent factors according to class-specific features. The predictive performance and explainability of the latent space learned using the DirVAE were quantitatively and qualitatively assessed, respectively, and compared with a standard Gaussian prior-VAE (GVAE). We introduce a new approach for explainable multi-label classification in which we conduct gradient-guided latent traversals for each class of interest. Study findings indicate that the DirVAE is able to disentangle latent factors into class-specific visual features, a property not afforded by the GVAE, and achieve a marginal increase in predictive performance relative to GVAE. We generate visual examples to show that our explainability method, when applied to the trained DirVAE, is able to highlight regions in CXR images that are clinically relevant to the class(es) of interest and additionally, can identify cases where classification relies on spurious feature correlations.
summary: This study explores the use of the Dirichlet Variational Autoencoder (DirVAE) for learning disentangled latent representations of chest X-ray (CXR) images. Our working hypothesis is that distributional sparsity, as facilitated by the Dirichlet prior, will encourage disentangled feature learning for the complex task of multi-label classification of CXR images. The DirVAE is trained using CXR images from the CheXpert database, and the predictive capacity of multi-modal latent representations learned by DirVAE models is investigated through implementation of an auxiliary multi-label classification task, with a view to enforce separation of latent factors according to class-specific features. The predictive performance and explainability of the latent space learned using the DirVAE were quantitatively and qualitatively assessed, respectively, and compared with a standard Gaussian prior-VAE (GVAE). We introduce a new approach for explainable multi-label classification in which we conduct gradient-guided latent traversals for each class of interest. Study findings indicate that the DirVAE is able to disentangle latent factors into class-specific visual features, a property not afforded by the GVAE, and achieve a marginal increase in predictive performance relative to GVAE. We generate visual examples to show that our explainability method, when applied to the trained DirVAE, is able to highlight regions in CXR images that are clinically relevant to the class(es) of interest and additionally, can identify cases where classification relies on spurious feature correlations.
abstract_zh: 本研究探讨了如何使用狄利克雷变分自编码器 (DirVAE) 来学习胸部 X 射线 (CXR) 图像的解缠结潜在表示。我们的工作假设是，狄利克雷先验促进的分布稀疏性将鼓励对 CXR 图像的多标签分类的复杂任务进行解缠结的特征学习。 DirVAE 使用 CheXpert 数据库中的 CXR 图像进行训练，并通过实施辅助多标签分类任务来研究 DirVAE 模型学习的多模态潜在表示的预测能力，以期根据类特定特征强制分离潜在因素。使用 DirVAE 学习的潜在空间的预测性能和可解释性分别进行了定量和定性评估，并与标准高斯先验 VAE (GVAE) 进行了比较。我们引入了一种可解释的多标签分类的新方法，其中我们对每个感兴趣的类别进行梯度引导的潜在遍历。研究结果表明，DirVAE 能够将潜在因素分解为特定类别的视觉特征，这是 GVAE 所不具备的特性，并且相对于 GVAE 而言，预测性能略有提高。我们生成视觉示例来表明，我们的可解释性方法在应用于经过训练的 DirVAE 时，能够突出显示 CXR 图像中与感兴趣的类别临床相关的区域，此外，还可以识别分类依赖于虚假特征相关性的情况。

AI.tldr: 本研究提出使用狄利克雷变分自编码器（DirVAE）学习胸部X光图像的解耦潜在表示，以提升多标签分类任务的可解释性。
AI.motivation: 传统变分自编码器（VAE）在处理复杂多标签分类任务时，潜在表示可能缺乏可解释性。狄利克雷先验通过分布稀疏性可能促进特征解耦，从而增强模型的可解释性。
AI.method: 基于CheXpert数据库训练DirVAE模型，通过引入辅助多标签分类任务分离潜在因子，并采用梯度引导的潜在空间遍历方法实现可视化解释，与高斯先验VAE（GVAE）进行对比。
AI.result: DirVAE在潜在空间解耦性和预测性能上均优于GVAE，且能通过可视化方法突出显示与目标类别相关的临床显著区域，识别分类中的虚假特征关联。
AI.conclusion: 狄利克雷先验有效提升了潜在表示的解耦性与可解释性，为医学影像分类提供了更可靠的可解释性分析框架。

authors_text: Md. Shahariar Nafiz,Shuvra Smaran Das,Md. Kishor Morol,Abdullah Al Juabir,Dip Nandi
title: ConvoWaste: An Automatic Waste Segregation Machine Using Deep Learning
title_zh: ConvoWaste：使用深度学习的自动垃圾分类机
comment: Accepted at ICREST 2023
comments: Accepted at ICREST 2023
abstract: Nowadays, proper urban waste management is one of the biggest concerns for maintaining a green and clean environment. An automatic waste segregation system can be a viable solution to improve the sustainability of the country and boost the circular economy. This paper proposes a machine to segregate waste into different parts with the help of a smart object detection algorithm using ConvoWaste in the field of deep convolutional neural networks (DCNN) and image processing techniques. In this paper, deep learning and image processing techniques are applied to precisely classify the waste, and the detected waste is placed inside the corresponding bins with the help of a servo motor-based system. This machine has the provision to notify the responsible authority regarding the waste level of the bins and the time to trash out the bins filled with garbage by using the ultrasonic sensors placed in each bin and the dual-band GSM-based communication technology. The entire system is controlled remotely through an Android app in order to dump the separated waste in the desired place thanks to its automation properties. The use of this system can aid in the process of recycling resources that were initially destined to become waste, utilizing natural resources, and turning these resources back into usable products. Thus, the system helps fulfill the criteria of a circular economy through resource optimization and extraction. Finally, the system is designed to provide services at a low cost while maintaining a high level of accuracy in terms of technological advancement in the field of artificial intelligence (AI). We have gotten 98% accuracy for our ConvoWaste deep learning model.

abstract_zh: 如今，适当的城市废物管理是维护绿色清洁环境的最大问题之一。自动废物分类系统可以成为提高国家可持续性和促进循环经济的可行解决方案。本文提出了一种机器，借助深度卷积神经网络（DCNN）和图像处理技术领域的 ConvoWaste 的智能对象检测算法，将废物分成不同的部分。本文应用深度学习和图像处理技术对垃圾进行精确分类，并借助基于伺服电机的系统将检测到的垃圾放入相应的垃圾箱中。该机器能够通过使用放置在每个垃圾箱中的超声波传感器和基于双频 GSM 的通信技术，通知负责机构有关垃圾箱的废物水平以及清除装满垃圾的垃圾箱的时间。整个系统通过 Android 应用程序进行远程控制，凭借其自动化特性，将分离的废物倾倒在所需的位置。使用该系统可以帮助回收最初注定会成为废物的资源，利用自然资源，并将这些资源变回可用的产品。因此，该系统通过资源优化和开采有助于满足循环经济的标准。最后，该系统旨在以低成本提供服务，同时在人工智能（AI）领域的技术进步方面保持高精度。我们的 ConvoWaste 深度学习模型的准确率达到了 98%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的自动垃圾分类机器ConvoWaste，通过图像识别和机械系统实现垃圾精准分类与投放。
AI.motivation: 为解决城市垃圾管理难题，提升资源回收效率，推动循环经济和环境保护。
AI.method: 采用深度卷积神经网络（DCNN）与图像处理技术实现垃圾识别，结合伺服电机分拣系统、超声波传感器监测和GSM通信技术，通过Android应用实现远程控制。
AI.result: ConvoWaste深度学习模型达到98%的分类准确率，系统可低成本实现垃圾自动分拣与智能监控。
AI.conclusion: 该系统通过AI技术优化资源利用，有效支持循环经济，为智能垃圾管理提供了高精度、低成本的解决方案。

authors_text: Dmytro Pavlichenko,Grzegorz Ficht,Arash Amini,Mojtaba Hosseini,Raphael Memmesheimer,Angel Villar-Corrales,Stefan M. Schulz,Marcell Missura,Maren Bennewitz,Sven Behnke
title: RoboCup 2022 AdultSize Winner NimbRo: Upgraded Perception, Capture Steps Gait and Phase-based In-walk Kicks
title_zh: RoboCup 2022 AdultSize 获胜者 NimbRo：升级感知、捕捉步态和基于阶段的步行踢腿
comment: ef:In: RoboCup 2022: Robot World Cup XXV. LNCS 13561, Springer, May 2023
comments: ef:In: RoboCup 2022: Robot World Cup XXV. LNCS 13561, Springer, May 2023
abstract: Beating the human world champions by 2050 is an ambitious goal of the Humanoid League that provides a strong incentive for RoboCup teams to further improve and develop their systems. In this paper, we present upgrades of our system which enabled our team NimbRo to win the Soccer Tournament, the Drop-in Games, and the Technical Challenges in the Humanoid AdultSize League of RoboCup 2022. Strong performance in these competitions resulted in the Best Humanoid award in the Humanoid League. The mentioned upgrades include: hardware upgrade of the vision module, balanced walking with Capture Steps, and the introduction of phase-based in-walk kicks.
summary: Beating the human world champions by 2050 is an ambitious goal of the Humanoid League that provides a strong incentive for RoboCup teams to further improve and develop their systems. In this paper, we present upgrades of our system which enabled our team NimbRo to win the Soccer Tournament, the Drop-in Games, and the Technical Challenges in the Humanoid AdultSize League of RoboCup 2022. Strong performance in these competitions resulted in the Best Humanoid award in the Humanoid League. The mentioned upgrades include: hardware upgrade of the vision module, balanced walking with Capture Steps, and the introduction of phase-based in-walk kicks.
abstract_zh: 到 2050 年击败人类世界冠军是人形联盟的一个雄心勃勃的目标，这为 RoboCup 团队进一步改进和开发他们的系统提供了强大的动力。在本文中，我们介绍了我们的系统升级，使我们的 NimbRo 团队赢得了 2022 年 RoboCup 人形机器人成人联赛足球锦标赛、临时比赛和技术挑战赛的冠军。在这些比赛中的出色表现获得了人形联赛最佳人形奖。提到的升级包括：视觉模块的硬件升级、通过Capture Steps实现平衡行走，以及引入基于阶段的行走踢腿。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了NimbRo团队在RoboCup 2022成人组比赛中获胜所采用的系统升级方案，包括视觉模块硬件改进、基于捕捉步的平衡行走以及相位控制的行进中踢球技术。
AI.motivation: 为实现Humanoid League在2050年击败人类世界冠军的目标，需要持续提升机器人系统性能以应对复杂比赛场景。
AI.method: 通过升级视觉模块硬件提升感知能力，采用捕捉步算法实现稳定行走，并开发基于运动相位的行进中踢球技术以增强进攻效率。
AI.result: NimbRo团队在2022年RoboCup成人组比赛中赢得足球赛、Drop-in赛事及技术挑战赛，并获Humanoid League最佳奖。
AI.conclusion: 系统升级验证了感知优化、步态控制与动态踢球技术对提升人形机器人足球竞技能力的关键作用，为后续研究提供了有效技术路径。

authors_text: Savvas Papaioannou,Hongkai Wen,Andrew Markham,Niki Trigoni
title: Fusion of Radio and Camera Sensor Data for Accurate Indoor Positioning
title_zh: 融合无线电和摄像头传感器数据以实现精确的室内定位
comment: ef:2014 IEEE 11th International Conference on Mobile Ad Hoc and Sensor Systems (MASS)
comments: ef:2014 IEEE 11th International Conference on Mobile Ad Hoc and Sensor Systems (MASS)
abstract: Indoor positioning systems have received a lot of attention recently due to their importance for many location-based services, e.g. indoor navigation and smart buildings. Lightweight solutions based on WiFi and inertial sensing have gained popularity, but are not fit for demanding applications, such as expert museum guides and industrial settings, which typically require sub-meter location information. In this paper, we propose a novel positioning system, RAVEL (Radio And Vision Enhanced Localization), which fuses anonymous visual detections captured by widely available camera infrastructure, with radio readings (e.g. WiFi radio data). Although visual trackers can provide excellent positioning accuracy, they are plagued by issues such as occlusions and people entering/exiting the scene, preventing their use as a robust tracking solution. By incorporating radio measurements, visually ambiguous or missing data can be resolved through multi-hypothesis tracking. We evaluate our system in a complex museum environment with dim lighting and multiple people moving around in a space cluttered with exhibit stands. Our experiments show that although the WiFi measurements are not by themselves sufficiently accurate, when they are fused with camera data, they become a catalyst for pulling together ambiguous, fragmented, and anonymous visual tracklets into accurate and continuous paths, yielding typical errors below 1 meter.
summary: Indoor positioning systems have received a lot of attention recently due to their importance for many location-based services, e.g. indoor navigation and smart buildings. Although visual trackers can provide excellent positioning accuracy, they are plagued by issues such as occlusions and people entering/exiting the scene, preventing their use as a robust tracking solution. By incorporating radio measurements, visually ambiguous or missing data can be resolved through multi-hypothesis tracking. We evaluate our system in a complex museum environment with dim lighting and multiple people moving around in a space cluttered with exhibit stands. Our experiments show that although the WiFi measurements are not by themselves sufficiently accurate, when they are fused with camera data, they become a catalyst for pulling together ambiguous, fragmented, and anonymous visual tracklets into accurate and continuous paths, yielding typical errors below 1 meter.
abstract_zh: 由于室内定位系统对许多基于位置的服务的重要性，例如室内定位系统，最近受到了广泛关注。室内导航和智能建筑。基于 WiFi 和惯性传感的轻量级解决方案已广受欢迎，但不适合要求苛刻的应用，例如专家博物馆指南和工业环境，这些应用通常需要亚米级位置信息。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的定位系统 RAVEL（无线电和视觉增强定位），它将广泛使用的相机基础设施捕获的匿名视觉检测与无线电读数（例如 WiFi 无线电数据）融合在一起。尽管视觉跟踪器可以提供出色的定位精度，但它们受到遮挡和人员进入/离开场景等问题的困扰，阻碍了它们作为强大的跟踪解决方案的使用。通过结合无线电测量，可以通过多假设跟踪来解决视觉上模糊或丢失的数据。我们在复杂的博物馆环境中评估我们的系统，其中灯光昏暗，多人在布满展台的空间中走动。我们的实验表明，尽管 WiFi 测量本身不够准确，但当它们与摄像头数据融合时，它们就成为将模糊、碎片和匿名的视觉轨迹整合成准确和连续路径的催化剂，产生低于 1 米的典型误差。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种融合无线电和摄像头传感器数据的室内定位系统RAVEL，以提高定位精度。
AI.motivation: 现有基于WiFi和惯性传感器的室内定位方案无法满足博物馆导览等需要亚米级精度的应用需求，视觉追踪受遮挡和人员进出影响可靠性不足。
AI.method: 通过融合摄像头捕捉的匿名视觉检测数据与WiFi信号数据，采用多假设跟踪技术解决视觉数据模糊或缺失问题。
AI.result: 在复杂博物馆环境中实测显示，融合后的系统定位误差低于1米，显著优于单独使用WiFi数据的性能。
AI.conclusion: 无线电与视觉数据融合有效提升了室内定位鲁棒性，为高精度场景提供了可行解决方案。

search_text: Fusion of Radio and Camera Sensor Data for Accurate Indoor Positioning 融合无线电和摄像头传感器数据以实现精确的室内定位 Indoor positioning systems have received a lot of attention recently due to their importance for many location-based services, e.g. indoor navigation and smart buildings. Lightweight solutions based on WiFi and inertial sensing have gained popularity, but are not fit for demanding applications, such as expert museum guides and industrial settings, which typically require sub-meter location information. In this paper, we propose a novel positioning system, RAVEL (Radio And Vision Enhanced Localization), which fuses anonymous visual detections captured by widely available camera infrastructure, with radio readings (e.g. WiFi radio data). Although visual trackers can provide excellent positioning accuracy, they are plagued by issues such as occlusions and people entering/exiting the scene, preventing their use as a robust tracking solution. By incorporating radio measurements, visually ambiguous or missing data can be resolved through multi-hypothesis tracking. We evaluate our system in a complex museum environment with dim lighting and multiple people moving around in a space cluttered with exhibit stands. Our experiments show that although the WiFi measurements are not by themselves sufficiently accurate, when they are fused with camera data, they become a catalyst for pulling together ambiguous, fragmented, and anonymous visual tracklets into accurate and continuous paths, yielding typical errors below 1 meter. 由于室内定位系统对许多基于位置的服务的重要性，例如室内定位系统，最近受到了广泛关注。室内导航和智能建筑。基于 WiFi 和惯性传感的轻量级解决方案已广受欢迎，但不适合要求苛刻的应用，例如专家博物馆指南和工业环境，这些应用通常需要亚米级位置信息。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的定位系统 RAVEL（无线电和视觉增强定位），它将广泛使用的相机基础设施捕获的匿名视觉检测与无线电读数（例如 WiFi 无线电数据）融合在一起。尽管视觉跟踪器可以提供出色的定位精度，但它们受到遮挡和人员进入/离开场景等问题的困扰，阻碍了它们作为强大的跟踪解决方案的使用。通过结合无线电测量，可以通过多假设跟踪来解决视觉上模糊或丢失的数据。我们在复杂的博物馆环境中评估我们的系统，其中灯光昏暗，多人在布满展台的空间中走动。我们的实验表明，尽管 WiFi 测量本身不够准确，但当它们与摄像头数据融合时，它们就成为将模糊、碎片和匿名的视觉轨迹整合成准确和连续路径的催化剂，产生低于 1 米的典型误差。 本文提出一种融合无线电和摄像头传感器数据的室内定位系统RAVEL，以提高定位精度。 Savvas Papaioannou,Hongkai Wen,Andrew Markham,Niki Trigoni cs.CV,eess.SY

authors_text: Philip J. Ball,Laura Smith,Ilya Kostrikov,Sergey Levine
title: Efficient Online Reinforcement Learning with Offline Data
title_zh: 利用离线数据进行高效在线强化学习
comment: Short Presentation at ICML 2023; to reproduce our results and use our codebase, see https://github.com/ikostrikov/rlpd
comments: Short Presentation at ICML 2023; to reproduce our results and use our codebase, see https://github.com/ikostrikov/rlpd
abstract: Sample efficiency and exploration remain major challenges in online reinforcement learning (RL). A powerful approach that can be applied to address these issues is the inclusion of offline data, such as prior trajectories from a human expert or a sub-optimal exploration policy. Previous methods have relied on extensive modifications and additional complexity to ensure the effective use of this data. Instead, we ask: can we simply apply existing off-policy methods to leverage offline data when learning online? In this work, we demonstrate that the answer is yes; however, a set of minimal but important changes to existing off-policy RL algorithms are required to achieve reliable performance. We extensively ablate these design choices, demonstrating the key factors that most affect performance, and arrive at a set of recommendations that practitioners can readily apply, whether their data comprise a small number of expert demonstrations or large volumes of sub-optimal trajectories. We see that correct application of these simple recommendations can provide a $\mathbf{2.5\times}$ improvement over existing approaches across a diverse set of competitive benchmarks, with no additional computational overhead. We have released our code at https://github.com/ikostrikov/rlpd.
summary: Sample efficiency and exploration remain major challenges in online reinforcement learning (RL). A powerful approach that can be applied to address these issues is the inclusion of offline data, such as prior trajectories from a human expert or a sub-optimal exploration policy. Previous methods have relied on extensive modifications and additional complexity to ensure the effective use of this data. Instead, we ask: can we simply apply existing off-policy methods to leverage offline data when learning online? In this work, we demonstrate that the answer is yes; however, a set of minimal but important changes to existing off-policy RL algorithms are required to achieve reliable performance. We extensively ablate these design choices, demonstrating the key factors that most affect performance, and arrive at a set of recommendations that practitioners can readily apply, whether their data comprise a small number of expert demonstrations or large volumes of sub-optimal trajectories. We see that correct application of these simple recommendations can provide a $\mathbf{2.5\times}$ improvement over existing approaches across a diverse set of competitive benchmarks, with no additional computational overhead. We have released our code at https://github.com/ikostrikov/rlpd.
abstract_zh: 样本效率和探索仍然是在线强化学习（RL）的主要挑战。可用于解决这些问题的一种强大方法是包含离线数据，例如人类专家的先前轨迹或次优探索策略。以前的方法依赖于大量的修改和额外的复杂性来确保这些数据的有效使用。相反，我们要问：在线学习时，我们是否可以简单地应用现有的离策略方法来利用离线数据？在这项工作中，我们证明答案是肯定的；然而，为了实现可靠的性能，需要对现有的离策略 RL 算法进行一组最小但重要的更改。我们广泛地消除了这些设计选择，展示了最影响性能的关键因素，并得出了一组从业者可以轻松应用的建议，无论他们的数据包含少量专家演示还是大量次优轨迹。我们发现，正确应用这些简单的建议可以在各种竞争性基准测试中比现有方法提供 $\mathbf{2.5\times}$ 改进，而无需额外的计算开销。我们已在 https://github.com/ikostrikov/rlpd 发布了我们的代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过最小化修改现有离线强化学习算法以高效利用离线数据的方法，从而提升在线强化学习的样本效率和探索能力。
AI.motivation: 在线强化学习面临样本效率低和探索困难的问题，尽管离线数据（如专家轨迹或次优策略数据）可辅助解决，但现有方法依赖复杂修改且效果不佳。
AI.method: 直接应用现有离策略强化学习算法，并通过消融实验确定关键改进点，提出简单实用的调整方案以可靠利用离线数据。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，该方法相比现有方法性能提升2.5倍，且无额外计算开销，适用于少量专家数据或大量次优轨迹场景。
AI.conclusion: 正确应用这些简单调整可显著提升在线强化学习效率，为实践者提供高效利用离线数据的可行方案。

authors_text: João Serras,Anderson Maciel,Soraia Paulo,Andrew Duchowski,Regis Kopper,Catarina Moreira,Joaquim Jorge
title: Development of an Immersive Virtual Colonoscopy Viewer for Colon Growths Diagnosis
title_zh: 开发用于结肠生长诊断的沉浸式虚拟结肠镜检查查看器
comment: A version of this paper has been accepted for presentation at the 2nd XR Health workshop - XR Technologies for Healthcare and Wellbeing https://ieeevr.org/2023/contribute/workshoppapers/#XRHealth
comments: A version of this paper has been accepted for presentation at the 2nd XR Health workshop - XR Technologies for Healthcare and Wellbeing https://ieeevr.org/2023/contribute/workshoppapers/#XRHealth
abstract: Desktop-based virtual colonoscopy has been proven to be an asset in the identification of colon anomalies. The process is accurate, although time-consuming. The use of immersive interfaces for virtual colonoscopy is incipient and not yet understood. In this work, we present a new design exploring elements of the VR paradigm to make the immersive analysis more efficient while still effective. We also plan the conduction of experiments with experts to assess the multi-factor influences of coverage, duration, and diagnostic accuracy.
summary: Desktop-based virtual colonoscopy has been proven to be an asset in the identification of colon anomalies. The process is accurate, although time-consuming. The use of immersive interfaces for virtual colonoscopy is incipient and not yet understood. In this work, we present a new design exploring elements of the VR paradigm to make the immersive analysis more efficient while still effective. We also plan the conduction of experiments with experts to assess the multi-factor influences of coverage, duration, and diagnostic accuracy.
abstract_zh: 基于桌面的虚拟结肠镜检查已被证明是识别结肠异常的一种资产。该过程虽然耗时，但准确。虚拟结肠镜检查中沉浸式界面的使用刚刚起步，尚未被人们所理解。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新的设计，探索 VR 范式的元素，使沉浸式分析更加高效，同时仍然有效。我们还计划与专家一起进行实验，以评估覆盖范围、持续时间和诊断准确性的多因素影响。

AI.tldr: 开发一种沉浸式虚拟结肠镜检查查看器，用于提高结肠生长物诊断的效率和准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统桌面虚拟结肠镜检查耗时且沉浸式界面应用不足，需探索VR技术提升诊断效率并验证其有效性。
AI.method: 设计结合VR范式的沉浸式分析系统，优化交互流程，并计划通过专家实验评估覆盖范围、持续时间及诊断准确性的多因素影响。
AI.result: 系统设计完成，尚未公布实验结果，但为后续评估诊断效率与准确性提供了基础框架。
AI.conclusion: 沉浸式VR界面有望提升虚拟结肠镜检查效率，但需进一步实验验证其实际诊断效果与多因素关联性。

ai_content_json.method: 设计结合VR范式的沉浸式分析系统，优化交互流程，并计划通过专家实验评估覆盖范围、持续时间及诊断准确性的多因素影响。
ai_content_json.result: 系统设计完成，尚未公布实验结果，但为后续评估诊断效率与准确性提供了基础框架。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 沉浸式VR界面有望提升虚拟结肠镜检查效率，但需进一步实验验证其实际诊断效果与多因素关联性。

search_text: Development of an Immersive Virtual Colonoscopy Viewer for Colon Growths Diagnosis 开发用于结肠生长诊断的沉浸式虚拟结肠镜检查查看器 Desktop-based virtual colonoscopy has been proven to be an asset in the identification of colon anomalies. The process is accurate, although time-consuming. The use of immersive interfaces for virtual colonoscopy is incipient and not yet understood. In this work, we present a new design exploring elements of the VR paradigm to make the immersive analysis more efficient while still effective. We also plan the conduction of experiments with experts to assess the multi-factor influences of coverage, duration, and diagnostic accuracy. 基于桌面的虚拟结肠镜检查已被证明是识别结肠异常的一种资产。该过程虽然耗时，但准确。虚拟结肠镜检查中沉浸式界面的使用刚刚起步，尚未被人们所理解。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新的设计，探索 VR 范式的元素，使沉浸式分析更加高效，同时仍然有效。我们还计划与专家一起进行实验，以评估覆盖范围、持续时间和诊断准确性的多因素影响。 开发一种沉浸式虚拟结肠镜检查查看器，用于提高结肠生长物诊断的效率和准确性。 João Serras,Anderson Maciel,Soraia Paulo,Andrew Duchowski,Regis Kopper,Catarina Moreira,Joaquim Jorge cs.HC,cs.AI

authors_text: Mohd Ashhad,Umang Goenka,Aaryan Jagetia,Parwin Akhtari,Sooraj K. Ambat,Mary Samuel
title: Improved Vehicle Sub-type Classification for Acoustic Traffic Monitoring
title_zh: 改进了用于交通声学监测的车辆子类型分类
comment: Accepted at Twenty-Ninth National Conference on Communications(NCC) 23 - 26 February, Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati
comments: Accepted at Twenty-Ninth National Conference on Communications(NCC) 23 - 26 February, Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati
abstract: The detection and classification of vehicles on the road is a crucial task for traffic monitoring. Usually, Computer Vision (CV) algorithms dominate the task of vehicle classification on the road, but CV methodologies might suffer in poor lighting conditions and require greater amounts of computational power. Additionally, there is a privacy concern with installing cameras in sensitive and secure areas. In contrast, acoustic traffic monitoring is cost-effective, and can provide greater accuracy, particularly in low lighting conditions and in places where cameras cannot be installed. In this paper, we consider the task of acoustic vehicle sub-type classification, where we classify acoustic signals into 4 classes: car, truck, bike, and no vehicle. We experimented with Mel spectrograms, MFCC and GFCC as features and performed data pre-processing to train a simple, well optimized CNN that performs well at the task. When used with MFCC as features and careful data pre-processing, our proposed methodology improves upon the established state-of-the-art baseline on the IDMT Traffic dataset with an accuracy of 98.95%.
summary: The detection and classification of vehicles on the road is a crucial task for traffic monitoring. Usually, Computer Vision (CV) algorithms dominate the task of vehicle classification on the road, but CV methodologies might suffer in poor lighting conditions and require greater amounts of computational power. Additionally, there is a privacy concern with installing cameras in sensitive and secure areas. In contrast, acoustic traffic monitoring is cost-effective, and can provide greater accuracy, particularly in low lighting conditions and in places where cameras cannot be installed. In this paper, we consider the task of acoustic vehicle sub-type classification, where we classify acoustic signals into 4 classes: car, truck, bike, and no vehicle. We experimented with Mel spectrograms, MFCC and GFCC as features and performed data pre-processing to train a simple, well optimized CNN that performs well at the task. When used with MFCC as features and careful data pre-processing, our proposed methodology improves upon the established state-of-the-art baseline on the IDMT Traffic dataset with an accuracy of 98.95%.
abstract_zh: 道路上车辆的检测和分类是交通监控的关键任务。通常，计算机视觉 (CV) 算法在道路上的车辆分类任务中占主导地位，但 CV 方法可能会在光照条件较差的情况下受到影响，并且需要更强大的计算能力。此外，在敏感和安全区域安装摄像头还存在隐私问题。相比之下，声学交通监控具有成本效益，并且可以提供更高的准确性，特别是在照明条件较差和无法安装摄像头的地方。在本文中，我们考虑声学车辆子类型分类的任务，其中我们将声学信号分为 4 类：汽车、卡车、自行车和无车辆。我们尝试使用 Mel 谱图、MFCC 和 GFCC 作为特征，并进行数据预处理，以训练一个简单、优化良好的 CNN，该 CNN 在任务中表现良好。当与 MFCC 作为特征和仔细的数据预处理一起使用时，我们提出的方法在 IDMT 流量数据集上既定的最先进基线的基础上进行了改进，准确率达到 98.95%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于声学信号的车辆子类型分类方法，用于交通监控，可将声音信号分为汽车、卡车、自行车和无车辆四类。
AI.motivation: 传统计算机视觉方法在光照不足或隐私敏感区域存在局限性，而声学监控具有成本低、准确性高且适合恶劣环境的优势。
AI.method: 采用Mel频谱图、MFCC和GFCC作为特征，结合数据预处理技术，训练了一个优化的卷积神经网络（CNN）模型。
AI.result: 在IDMT交通数据集上，使用MFCC特征和数据预处理后，模型分类准确率达到98.95%，优于现有最佳方法。
AI.conclusion: 声学交通监控方法在准确率和适用性上优于传统视觉方法，尤其适合光照差或隐私敏感场景。

authors_text: Ruijiang Gao,Maytal Saar-Tsechansky,Maria De-Arteaga
title: Learning Complementary Policies for Human-AI Teams
title_zh: 学习人类-人工智能团队的补充策略
comment: Previous name: Robust Human-AI Collaboration with Bandit Feedback; Best student paper award at Conference on Information Systems and Technology (CIST), 2022
comments: Previous name: Robust Human-AI Collaboration with Bandit Feedback; Best student paper award at Conference on Information Systems and Technology (CIST), 2022
abstract: This paper tackles the critical challenge of human-AI complementarity in decision-making. Departing from the traditional focus on algorithmic performance in favor of performance of the human-AI team, and moving past the framing of collaboration as classification to focus on decision-making tasks, we introduce a novel approach to policy learning. Specifically, we develop a robust solution for human-AI collaboration when outcomes are only observed under assigned actions. We propose a deferral collaboration approach that maximizes decision rewards by exploiting the distinct strengths of humans and AI, strategically allocating instances among them. Critically, our method is robust to misspecifications in both the human behavior and reward models. Leveraging the insight that performance gains stem from divergent human and AI behavioral patterns, we demonstrate, using synthetic and real human responses, that our proposed method significantly outperforms independent human and algorithmic decision-making. Moreover, we show that substantial performance improvements are achievable by routing only a small fraction of instances to human decision-makers, highlighting the potential for efficient and effective human-AI collaboration in complex management settings.
summary: This paper tackles the critical challenge of human-AI complementarity in decision-making. Departing from the traditional focus on algorithmic performance in favor of performance of the human-AI team, and moving past the framing of collaboration as classification to focus on decision-making tasks, we introduce a novel approach to policy learning. Specifically, we develop a robust solution for human-AI collaboration when outcomes are only observed under assigned actions. We propose a deferral collaboration approach that maximizes decision rewards by exploiting the distinct strengths of humans and AI, strategically allocating instances among them. Critically, our method is robust to misspecifications in both the human behavior and reward models. Leveraging the insight that performance gains stem from divergent human and AI behavioral patterns, we demonstrate, using synthetic and real human responses, that our proposed method significantly outperforms independent human and algorithmic decision-making. Moreover, we show that substantial performance improvements are achievable by routing only a small fraction of instances to human decision-makers, highlighting the potential for efficient and effective human-AI collaboration in complex management settings.
abstract_zh: 本文解决了决策中人类与人工智能互补性的关键挑战。与传统上对算法性能的关注有利于人类人工智能团队的性能不同，并超越了将协作作为分类的框架，转而关注决策任务，我们引入了一种新的策略学习方法。具体来说，当结果仅在指定的操作下观察到时，我们为人类与人工智能协作开发了一个强大的解决方案。我们提出了一种延迟协作方法，通过利用人类和人工智能的独特优势，在它们之间战略性地分配实例来最大化决策奖励。至关重要的是，我们的方法对于人类行为和奖励模型中的错误指定都是稳健的。利用性能增益源于不同的人类和人工智能行为模式的洞察力，我们使用合成和真实的人类反应证明，我们提出的方法显着优于独立的人类和算法决策。此外，我们表明，通过仅将一小部分实例路由给人类决策者，就可以实现显着的性能改进，这突显了在复杂管理环境中高效且有效的人机协作的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种学习互补策略的方法，优化人类与AI团队在决策任务中的协作表现。
AI.motivation: 传统方法过度关注算法性能而忽视团队整体表现，且协作框架多用于分类任务而非决策任务，未能充分利用人类与AI的差异化优势。
AI.method: 提出延迟协作方法，在观察到动作结果时动态分配任务给人类或AI，通过最大化奖励函数利用两者互补性，并对行为模型和奖励模型的误设具有鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在合成数据和真实人类响应实验中，该方法显著优于独立人类或算法决策，且仅需少量人类参与即可实现性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 互补策略能有效提升人类-AI协作效率，为复杂管理场景提供高效决策框架，凸显差异化能力分配的重要性。

authors_text: Francesco Di Giovanni,Lorenzo Giusti,Federico Barbero,Giulia Luise,Pietro Lio',Michael Bronstein
title: On Over-Squashing in Message Passing Neural Networks: The Impact of Width, Depth, and Topology
title_zh: 关于消息传递神经网络中的过度挤压：宽度、深度和拓扑的影响
comment: Accepted at ICML 2023; 21 pages
comments: Accepted at ICML 2023; 21 pages
abstract: Message Passing Neural Networks (MPNNs) are instances of Graph Neural Networks that leverage the graph to send messages over the edges. This inductive bias leads to a phenomenon known as over-squashing, where a node feature is insensitive to information contained at distant nodes. Despite recent methods introduced to mitigate this issue, an understanding of the causes for over-squashing and of possible solutions are lacking. In this theoretical work, we prove that: (i) Neural network width can mitigate over-squashing, but at the cost of making the whole network more sensitive; (ii) Conversely, depth cannot help mitigate over-squashing: increasing the number of layers leads to over-squashing being dominated by vanishing gradients; (iii) The graph topology plays the greatest role, since over-squashing occurs between nodes at high commute (access) time. Our analysis provides a unified framework to study different recent methods introduced to cope with over-squashing and serves as a justification for a class of methods that fall under graph rewiring.
summary: Message Passing Neural Networks (MPNNs) are instances of Graph Neural Networks that leverage the graph to send messages over the edges. This inductive bias leads to a phenomenon known as over-squashing, where a node feature is insensitive to information contained at distant nodes. Despite recent methods introduced to mitigate this issue, an understanding of the causes for over-squashing and of possible solutions are lacking. In this theoretical work, we prove that: (i) Neural network width can mitigate over-squashing, but at the cost of making the whole network more sensitive; (ii) Conversely, depth cannot help mitigate over-squashing: increasing the number of layers leads to over-squashing being dominated by vanishing gradients; (iii) The graph topology plays the greatest role, since over-squashing occurs between nodes at high commute (access) time. Our analysis provides a unified framework to study different recent methods introduced to cope with over-squashing and serves as a justification for a class of methods that fall under graph rewiring.
abstract_zh: 消息传递神经网络 (MPNN) 是图神经网络的实例，它利用图在边缘上发送消息。这种归纳偏差会导致一种称为过度挤压的现象，其中节点特征对远程节点包含的信息不敏感。尽管最近引入了一些方法来缓解这个问题，但人们仍然缺乏对过度挤压的原因和可能的解决方案的了解。在这项理论工作中，我们证明：（i）神经网络宽度可以减轻过度挤压，但代价是使整个网络更加敏感； (ii) 相反，深度无助于减轻过度挤压：增加层数会导致过度挤压以梯度消失为主； (iii) 图拓扑发挥着最大的作用，因为在高通勤（访问）时间节点之间会发生过度挤压。我们的分析提供了一个统一的框架来研究最近为应对过度挤压而引入的不同方法，并为属于图重新布线的一类方法提供了理由。

AI.tldr: 本文研究消息传递神经网络（MPNNs）中的过压缩问题，分析网络宽度、深度及图拓扑对其的影响，并提出理论框架指导解决方案。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未能充分理解过压缩的成因及有效解决方案，需通过理论分析明确关键影响因素以改进模型设计。
AI.method: 通过理论证明与分析，探讨网络宽度、深度及图拓扑对过压缩的独立影响，并构建统一框架评估现有缓解方法。
AI.result: 证明网络宽度可缓解过压缩但增加全局敏感性，深度加剧梯度消失导致过压缩，图拓扑中高通勤时间节点间易发生过压缩。
AI.conclusion: 图拓扑是过压缩主因，支持图重 wiring 方法；理论框架为分析现有技术提供依据，指导未来模型优化方向。

search_text: On Over-Squashing in Message Passing Neural Networks: The Impact of Width, Depth, and Topology 关于消息传递神经网络中的过度挤压：宽度、深度和拓扑的影响 Message Passing Neural Networks (MPNNs) are instances of Graph Neural Networks that leverage the graph to send messages over the edges. This inductive bias leads to a phenomenon known as over-squashing, where a node feature is insensitive to information contained at distant nodes. authors_text: André Luís,Chihcheng Hsieh,Isabel Blanco Nobre,Sandra Costa Sousa,Anderson Maciel,Catarina Moreira,Joaquim Jorge
title: Integrating Eye-Gaze Data into CXR DL Approaches: A Preliminary study
title_zh: 将眼睛注视数据集成到 CXR DL 方法中：初步研究
comment: A version of this paper has been accepted for presentation at the 2nd XR Health workshop - XR Technologies for Healthcare and Wellbeing https://ieeevr.org/2023/contribute/workshoppapers/#XRHealth
comments: A version of this paper has been accepted for presentation at the 2nd XR Health workshop - XR Technologies for Healthcare and Wellbeing https://ieeevr.org/2023/contribute/workshoppapers/#XRHealth
abstract: This paper proposes a novel multimodal DL architecture incorporating medical images and eye-tracking data for abnormality detection in chest x-rays. Our results show that applying eye gaze data directly into DL architectures does not show superior predictive performance in abnormality detection chest X-rays. These results support other works in the literature and suggest that human-generated data, such as eye gaze, needs a more thorough investigation before being applied to DL architectures.
summary: This paper proposes a novel multimodal DL architecture incorporating medical images and eye-tracking data for abnormality detection in chest x-rays. Our results show that applying eye gaze data directly into DL architectures does not show superior predictive performance in abnormality detection chest X-rays. These results support other works in the literature and suggest that human-generated data, such as eye gaze, needs a more thorough investigation before being applied to DL architectures.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的多模态深度学习架构，结合了医学图像和眼动追踪数据，用于胸部 X 光检查的异常检测。我们的结果表明，将眼睛注视数据直接应用到深度学习架构中并没有在胸部 X 光异常检测中表现出卓越的预测性能。这些结果支持了文献中的其他工作，并表明人类生成的数据（例如眼睛注视）在应用于深度学习架构之前需要进行更彻底的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合医学影像与眼动追踪数据的多模态深度学习架构，用于胸部X光异常检测。
AI.motivation: 探索人类视觉注意力特征（眼动数据）是否能增强深度学习模型在胸部X光异常检测中的性能。
AI.method: 设计多模态深度学习框架，将胸部X光图像与医生眼动追踪数据作为联合输入进行训练与验证。
AI.result: 实验表明直接整合眼动数据未显著提升模型预测性能，与现有文献结论一致。
AI.conclusion: 人类生成数据（如眼动数据）在深度学习中的应用需更深入研究，当前直接整合方式效果有限。

authors_text: Gabriel Riva,Wellington Dores,Artur Damasio,Daniel Guimarães Cacione,Joaquim Jorge,Ezequiel Zorzal
title: Virtual Reality for medical education and training of Diabetic Foot
title_zh: 虚拟现实技术在糖尿病足医学教育和培训中的应用
comment: A version of this paper has been accepted for presentation at the 2nd XR Health workshop - XR Technologies for Healthcare and Wellbeing https://ieeevr.org/2023/contribute/workshoppapers/#XRHealth
comments: A version of this paper has been accepted for presentation at the 2nd XR Health workshop - XR Technologies for Healthcare and Wellbeing https://ieeevr.org/2023/contribute/workshoppapers/#XRHealth
abstract: Diabetic Foot is one of the most common complications of Diabetes Mellitus and the leading non-traumatic cause of lower-limb amputations worldwide. These complications are preventable with early diagnosis and timely care. However, even in the context of expanding primary health care, this problem continues to increase, which suggests a gap in the training of primary health care professionals regarding the diagnosis and treatment of Diabetic Foot. This project proposes the development of a Virtual Reality simulator for training students and professionals in primary health care, aiming to collaborate in filling this gap. The application features gamification elements to increase user engagement. The context of medical care in primary care will be simulated with various clinical cases, including several virtual patients with different stages related to the Diabetic Foot, seeking to provide credible and distinct experiences to potential users. In addition, we aim to verify usability, effectiveness, and any side effects (cybersickness). Finally, we plan to conduct field studies with qualified students and professionals to identify the main benefits and obstacles to applying the technology.
summary: Diabetic Foot is one of the most common complications of Diabetes Mellitus and the leading non-traumatic cause of lower-limb amputations worldwide. These complications are preventable with early diagnosis and timely care. However, even in the context of expanding primary health care, this problem continues to increase, which suggests a gap in the training of primary health care professionals regarding the diagnosis and treatment of Diabetic Foot. This project proposes the development of a Virtual Reality simulator for training students and professionals in primary health care, aiming to collaborate in filling this gap. The application features gamification elements to increase user engagement. The context of medical care in primary care will be simulated with various clinical cases, including several virtual patients with different stages related to the Diabetic Foot, seeking to provide credible and distinct experiences to potential users. In addition, we aim to verify usability, effectiveness, and any side effects (cybersickness). Finally, we plan to conduct field studies with qualified students and professionals to identify the main benefits and obstacles to applying the technology.
abstract_zh: 糖尿病足是糖尿病最常见的并发症之一，也是全世界下肢截肢的主要原因。通过早期诊断和及时护理，这些并发症是可以预防的。然而，即使在扩大初级卫生保健的背景下，这个问题仍在继续增加，这表明初级卫生保健专业人员在糖尿病足诊断和治疗方面的培训存在差距。该项目建议开发虚拟现实模拟器，用于培训初级卫生保健领域的学生和专业人员，旨在合作填补这一空白。该应用程序具有游戏化元素，以提高用户参与度。初级保健中的医疗保健环境将通过各种临床案例进行模拟，包括几个与糖尿病足相关的不同阶段的虚拟患者，力求为潜在用户提供可信且独特的体验。此外，我们的目标是验证可用性、有效性和任何副作用（网络病）。最后，我们计划与合格的学生和专业人士进行实地研究，以确定应用该技术的主要好处和障碍。

AI.tldr: 开发虚拟现实（VR）模拟器用于培训初级医疗保健专业人员诊断和治疗糖尿病足。
AI.motivation: 糖尿病足是糖尿病常见的并发症，导致全球非创伤性截肢的主要原因，但初级医疗保健专业人员在该领域的培训存在不足，需通过VR技术提升诊断和治疗能力。
AI.method: 设计包含游戏化元素的VR模拟器，模拟初级医疗场景中的多种糖尿病足临床案例，并通过可用性测试、效果评估及场研究验证其有效性及潜在副作用（如晕动症）。
AI.result: 开发了VR模拟器并初步验证其可用性，计划通过实地研究进一步评估其在实际培训中的效益与障碍。
AI.conclusion: VR技术有望成为糖尿病足培训的有效工具，但需进一步研究以优化用户体验并确认其实际应用价值。

method: 设计包含游戏化元素的VR模拟器，模拟初级医疗场景中的多种糖尿病足临床案例，并通过可用性测试、效果评估及场研究验证其有效性及潜在副作用（如晕动症）。
result: 开发了VR模拟器并初步验证其可用性，计划通过实地研究进一步评估其在实际培训中的效益与障碍。
conclusion: VR技术有望成为糖尿病足培训的有效工具，但需进一步研究以优化用户体验并确认其实际应用价值。
search_text: Virtual Reality for medical education and training of Diabetic Foot 虚拟现实技术在糖尿病足医学教育和培训中的应用 Diabetic Foot is one of the most common complications of Diabetes Mellitus and the leading non-traumatic cause of lower-limb amputations worldwide. These complications are preventable with early diagnosis and timely care. However, even in the context of expanding primary health care, this problem continues to increase, which suggests a gap in the training of primary health care professionals regarding the diagnosis and treatment of Diabetic Foot. This project proposes the development of a Virtual Reality simulator for training students and professionals in primary health care, aiming to collaborate in filling this gap. The application features gamification elements to increase user engagement. The context of medical care in primary care will be simulated with various clinical cases, including several virtual patients with different stages related to the Diabetic Foot, seeking to provide credible and distinct experiences to potential users. In addition, we aim to verify usability, effectiveness, and any side effects (cybersickness). Finally, we plan to conduct field studies with qualified students and professionals to identify the main benefits and obstacles to applying the technology. 糖尿病足是糖尿病最常见的并发症之一，也是全世界下肢截肢的主要原因。通过早期诊断和及时护理，这些并发症是可以预防的。然而，即使在扩大初级卫生保健的背景下，这个问题仍在继续增加，这表明初级卫生保健专业人员在糖尿病足诊断和治疗方面的培训存在差距。该项目建议开发虚拟现实模拟器，用于培训初级卫生保健领域的学生和专业人员，旨在合作填补这一空白。该应用程序具有游戏化元素，以提高用户参与度。初级保健中的医疗保健环境将通过各种临床案例进行模拟，包括几个与糖尿病足相关的不同阶段的虚拟患者，力求为潜在用户提供可信且独特的体验。此外，我们的目标是验证可用性、有效性和任何副作用（网络病）。最后，我们计划与合格的学生和专业人士进行实地研究，以确定应用该技术的主要好处和障碍。 开发虚拟现实（VR）模拟器用于培训初级医疗保健专业人员诊断和治疗糖尿病足。 Gabriel Riva,Wellington Dores,Artur Damasio,Daniel Guimarães Cacione,Joaquim Jorge,Ezequiel Zorzal cs.HC

authors_text: Alex Bie,Gautam Kamath,Guojun Zhang
title: Private GANs, Revisited
title_zh: 重新审视私有 GAN
comment: 28 pages; revisions and new experiments from TMLR camera-ready + code release at https://github.com/alexbie98/dpgan-revisit
comments: 28 pages; revisions and new experiments from TMLR camera-ready + code release at https://github.com/alexbie98/dpgan-revisit
abstract: We show that the canonical approach for training differentially private GANs -- updating the discriminator with differentially private stochastic gradient descent (DPSGD) -- can yield significantly improved results after modifications to training. Specifically, we propose that existing instantiations of this approach neglect to consider how adding noise only to discriminator updates inhibits discriminator training, disrupting the balance between the generator and discriminator necessary for successful GAN training. We show that a simple fix -- taking more discriminator steps between generator steps -- restores parity between the generator and discriminator and improves results. Additionally, with the goal of restoring parity, we experiment with other modifications -- namely, large batch sizes and adaptive discriminator update frequency -- to improve discriminator training and see further improvements in generation quality. Our results demonstrate that on standard image synthesis benchmarks, DPSGD outperforms all alternative GAN privatization schemes. Code: https://github.com/alexbie98/dpgan-revisit.
summary: We show that the canonical approach for training differentially private GANs -- updating the discriminator with differentially private stochastic gradient descent (DPSGD) -- can yield significantly improved results after modifications to training. Specifically, we propose that existing instantiations of this approach neglect to consider how adding noise only to discriminator updates inhibits discriminator training, disrupting the balance between the generator and discriminator necessary for successful GAN training. We show that a simple fix -- taking more discriminator steps between generator steps -- restores parity between the generator and discriminator and improves results. Additionally, with the goal of restoring parity, we experiment with other modifications -- namely, large batch sizes and adaptive discriminator update frequency -- to improve discriminator training and see further improvements in generation quality. Our results demonstrate that on standard image synthesis benchmarks, DPSGD outperforms all alternative GAN privatization schemes. Code: https://github.com/alexbie98/dpgan-revisit.
abstract_zh: 我们证明了训练差分隐私 GAN 的规范方法——用差分隐私随机梯度下降（DPSGD）更新判别器——在修改训练后可以产生显着改善的结果。具体来说，我们建议这种方法的现有实例忽略了仅在判别器更新中添加噪声会如何抑制判别器训练，从而破坏成功 GAN 训练所需的生成器和判别器之间的平衡。我们展示了一个简单的修复方法——在生成器步骤之间采取更多的鉴别器步骤——恢复生成器和鉴别器之间的奇偶性并改善结果。此外，为了恢复奇偶校验，我们尝试了其他修改，即大批量和自适应鉴别器更新频率，以改进鉴别器训练并看到生成质量的进一步提高。我们的结果表明，在标准图像合成基准上，DPSGD 优于所有替代的 GAN 私有化方案。代码：https://github.com/alexbie98/dpgan-revisit。

AI.tldr: 本文重新研究差分隐私GAN的训练方法，通过改进判别器更新策略提升生成效果。
AI.motivation: 现有差分隐私GAN方法在判别器更新时添加噪声，导致生成器与判别器训练不平衡，影响模型性能。
AI.method: 增加判别器更新步数、采用大批次训练及自适应更新频率，以恢复生成器与判别器的平衡。
AI.result: 在标准图像生成基准测试中，改进后的DPSGD方法优于其他隐私保护GAN方案。
AI.conclusion: 调整判别器训练策略可有效提升差分隐私GAN的生成质量，DPSGD是当前最优方案。

ai_content.conclusion: 调整判别器训练策略可有效提升差分隐私GAN的生成质量，DPSGD是当前最优方案。

authors_text: Yunshuang Yuan,Hao Cheng,Michael Ying Yang,Monika Sester
title: Generating Evidential BEV Maps in Continuous Driving Space
title_zh: 在连续驾驶空间中生成证据 BEV 地图
comment: ef:ISPRS Journal of Photogrammetry and Remote Sensing, 2023
comments: ef:ISPRS Journal of Photogrammetry and Remote Sensing, 2023
abstract: Safety is critical for autonomous driving, and one aspect of improving safety is to accurately capture the uncertainties of the perception system, especially knowing the unknown. Different from only providing deterministic or probabilistic results, e.g., probabilistic object detection, that only provide partial information for the perception scenario, we propose a complete probabilistic model named GevBEV. It interprets the 2D driving space as a probabilistic Bird's Eye View (BEV) map with point-based spatial Gaussian distributions, from which one can draw evidence as the parameters for the categorical Dirichlet distribution of any new sample point in the continuous driving space. The experimental results show that GevBEV not only provides more reliable uncertainty quantification but also outperforms the previous works on the benchmarks OPV2V and V2V4Real of BEV map interpretation for cooperative perception in simulated and real-world driving scenarios, respectively. A critical factor in cooperative perception is the data transmission size through the communication channels. GevBEV helps reduce communication overhead by selecting only the most important information to share from the learned uncertainty, reducing the average information communicated by 87% with only a slight performance drop. Our code is published at https://github.com/YuanYunshuang/GevBEV.
summary: Safety is critical for autonomous driving, and one aspect of improving safety is to accurately capture the uncertainties of the perception system, especially knowing the unknown. Different from only providing deterministic or probabilistic results, e.g., probabilistic object detection, that only provide partial information for the perception scenario, we propose a complete probabilistic model named GevBEV. It interprets the 2D driving space as a probabilistic Bird's Eye View (BEV) map with point-based spatial Gaussian distributions, from which one can draw evidence as the parameters for the categorical Dirichlet distribution of any new sample point in the continuous driving space. The experimental results show that GevBEV not only provides more reliable uncertainty quantification but also outperforms the previous works on the benchmarks OPV2V and V2V4Real of BEV map interpretation for cooperative perception in simulated and real-world driving scenarios, respectively. A critical factor in cooperative perception is the data transmission size through the communication channels. GevBEV helps reduce communication overhead by selecting only the most important information to share from the learned uncertainty, reducing the average information communicated by 87% with only a slight performance drop. Our code is published at https://github.com/YuanYunshuang/GevBEV.
abstract_zh: 安全对于自动驾驶至关重要，而提高安全性的一方面就是准确捕捉感知系统的不确定性，尤其是了解未知的事物。与仅提供确定性或概率性结果（例如概率性对象检测）不同，后者仅提供感知场景的部分信息，我们提出了一个名为 GevBEV 的完整概率模型。它将二维驾驶空间解释为具有基于点的空间高斯分布的概率鸟瞰图（BEV），从中可以得出证据作为连续驾驶空间中任何新样本点的分类狄利克雷分布的参数。实验结果表明，GevBEV 不仅提供了更可靠的不确定性量化，而且在模拟和现实驾驶场景中的协作感知的 BEV 地图解释基准 OPV2V 和 V2V4Real 上分别优于之前的工作。协作感知的一个关键因素是通过通信通道的数据传输大小。 GevBEV 通过仅从学习到的不确定性中选择要共享的最重要信息来帮助减少通信开销，从而将通信的平均信息减少 87%，而性能仅略有下降。我们的代码发布在https://github.com/YuanYunshuang/GevBEV。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为GevBEV的完整概率模型，用于在连续驾驶空间中生成包含不确定性信息的鸟瞰图（BEV）地图，以提升自动驾驶的安全性。
AI.motivation: 现有感知系统仅提供确定性或概率性结果，无法全面捕捉不确定性，尤其对未知情况的处理不足，影响自动驾驶安全性。
AI.method: 将2D驾驶空间建模为基于点的空间高斯分布的概率BEV地图，通过狄利克雷分布参数化新样本点的证据，实现不确定性量化。
AI.result: 在OPV2V和V2V4Real基准测试中，GevBEV在不确定性量化和BEV地图解释任务上优于现有方法，同时通过传输关键信息将通信开销降低87%。
AI.conclusion: GevBEV通过概率建模和信息选择机制，有效提升协同感知的安全性与通信效率，为自动驾驶提供更可靠的不确定性表示框架。

authors_text: Emanuele Ledda,Giorgio Fumera,Fabio Roli
title: Dropout Injection at Test Time for Post Hoc Uncertainty Quantification in Neural Networks
title_zh: 神经网络中事后不确定性量化测试时的 Dropout 注入
abstract: Among Bayesian methods, Monte-Carlo dropout provides principled tools for evaluating the epistemic uncertainty of neural networks. Its popularity recently led to seminal works that proposed activating the dropout layers only during inference for evaluating uncertainty. This approach, which we call dropout injection, provides clear benefits over its traditional counterpart (which we call embedded dropout) since it allows one to obtain a post hoc uncertainty measure for any existing network previously trained without dropout, avoiding an additional, time-consuming training process. Unfortunately, no previous work compared injected and embedded dropout; therefore, we provide the first thorough investigation, focusing on regression problems. The main contribution of our work is to provide guidelines on the effective use of injected dropout so that it can be a practical alternative to the current use of embedded dropout. In particular, we show that its effectiveness strongly relies on a suitable scaling of the corresponding uncertainty measure, and we discuss the trade-off between negative log-likelihood and calibration error as a function of the scale factor. Experimental results on UCI data sets and crowd counting benchmarks support our claim that dropout injection can effectively behave as a competitive post hoc uncertainty quantification technique.
summary: Among Bayesian methods, Monte-Carlo dropout provides principled tools for evaluating the epistemic uncertainty of neural networks. Its popularity recently led to seminal works that proposed activating the dropout layers only during inference for evaluating uncertainty. This approach, which we call dropout injection, provides clear benefits over its traditional counterpart (which we call embedded dropout) since it allows one to obtain a post hoc uncertainty measure for any existing network previously trained without dropout, avoiding an additional, time-consuming training process. Unfortunately, no previous work compared injected and embedded dropout; therefore, we provide the first thorough investigation, focusing on regression problems. The main contribution of our work is to provide guidelines on the effective use of injected dropout so that it can be a practical alternative to the current use of embedded dropout. In particular, we show that its effectiveness strongly relies on a suitable scaling of the corresponding uncertainty measure, and we discuss the trade-off between negative log-likelihood and calibration error as a function of the scale factor. Experimental results on UCI data sets and crowd counting benchmarks support our claim that dropout injection can effectively behave as a competitive post hoc uncertainty quantification technique.
abstract_zh: 在贝叶斯方法中，蒙特卡罗 dropout 为评估神经网络的认知不确定性提供了原则性工具。它的流行最近导致了一些开创性的工作，建议仅在评估不确定性的推理过程中激活丢失层。这种方法（我们称之为 dropout 注入）比传统的对应方法（我们称之为嵌入式 dropout）具有明显的优势，因为它允许人们为任何先前在没有 dropout 的情况下训练的现有网络获得事后不确定性度量，从而避免额外的、耗时的训练过程。不幸的是，之前没有任何工作比较注入和嵌入的 dropout。因此，我们提供了第一次彻底的调查，重点关注回归问题。我们工作的主要贡献是提供有关有效使用注入dropout的指南，使其成为当前使用嵌入式dropout的实用替代方案。特别是，我们表明其有效性在很大程度上依赖于相应不确定性度量的适当缩放，并且我们讨论了负对数似然和校准误差之间作为缩放因子的函数的权衡。 UCI 数据集和人群计数基准的实验结果支持了我们的主张，即 Dropout 注入可以有效地充当一种有竞争力的事后不确定性量化技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在测试时注入Dropout的方法，用于对已有神经网络进行事后不确定性量化，无需重新训练模型。
AI.motivation: 传统Monte-Carlo Dropout需在训练时嵌入Dropout层，而现有网络常未采用Dropout。注入式Dropout可避免额外训练，但缺乏系统性比较与指导原则。
AI.method: 在测试阶段向已有网络注入Dropout层，通过调整不确定性度量的缩放因子，分析负对数似然与校准误差的权衡关系，并在UCI和人群计数数据集上验证效果。
AI.result: 实验表明注入式Dropout在多个基准任务中能有效量化不确定性，且通过缩放因子优化可达到与嵌入式Dropout相当的性能。
AI.conclusion: 注入式Dropout是嵌入式方法的实用替代方案，但需注意缩放因子调整及误差指标的平衡，为不确定性量化提供新思路。

search_text: Dropout Injection at Test Time for Post Hoc Uncertainty Quantification in Neural Networks 神经网络中事后不确定性量化测试时的 Dropout 注入 Among Bayesian methods, Monte-Carlo dropout provides principled tools for evaluating the epistemic uncertainty of neural networks. Its popularity recently led to seminal works that proposed activating the dropout layers only during inference for evaluating uncertainty. This approach, which we call dropout injection, provides clear benefits over its traditional counterpart (which we call embedded dropout) since it allows one to obtain a post hoc uncertainty measure for any existing network previously trained without dropout, avoiding an additional, time-consuming training process. Unfortunately, no previous work compared injected and embedded dropout; therefore, we provide the first thorough investigation, focusing on regression problems. The main contribution of our work is to provide guidelines on the effective use of injected dropout so that it can be a practical alternative to the current use of embedded dropout. In particular, we show that its effectiveness strongly relies on a suitable scaling of the corresponding uncertainty measure, and we discuss the trade-off between negative log-likelihood and calibration error as a function of the scale factor.
