authors_text: Shuai Zhang,Meng Wang,Pin-Yu Chen,Sijia Liu,Songtao Lu,Miao Liu
title: Joint Edge-Model Sparse Learning is Provably Efficient for Graph Neural Networks
title_zh: 联合边缘模型稀疏学习对于图神经网络来说被证明是有效的
comment: ef:The Eleventh International Conference on Learning Representations, 2023
comments: ef:The Eleventh International Conference on Learning Representations, 2023
abstract: Due to the significant computational challenge of training large-scale graph neural networks (GNNs), various sparse learning techniques have been exploited to reduce memory and storage costs. Examples include \textit{graph sparsification} that samples a subgraph to reduce the amount of data aggregation and \textit{model sparsification} that prunes the neural network to reduce the number of trainable weights. Despite the empirical successes in reducing the training cost while maintaining the test accuracy, the theoretical generalization analysis of sparse learning for GNNs remains elusive. To the best of our knowledge, this paper provides the first theoretical characterization of joint edge-model sparse learning from the perspective of sample complexity and convergence rate in achieving zero generalization error. It proves analytically that both sampling important nodes and pruning neurons with the lowest-magnitude can reduce the sample complexity and improve convergence without compromising the test accuracy. Although the analysis is centered on two-layer GNNs with structural constraints on data, the insights are applicable to more general setups and justified by both synthetic and practical citation datasets.
summary: Due to the significant computational challenge of training large-scale graph neural networks (GNNs), various sparse learning techniques have been exploited to reduce memory and storage costs. Examples include \textit{graph sparsification} that samples a subgraph to reduce the amount of data aggregation and \textit{model sparsification} that prunes the neural network to reduce the number of trainable weights. Despite the empirical successes in reducing the training cost while maintaining the test accuracy, the theoretical generalization analysis of sparse learning for GNNs remains elusive. To the best of our knowledge, this paper provides the first theoretical characterization of joint edge-model sparse learning from the perspective of sample complexity and convergence rate in achieving zero generalization error. It proves analytically that both sampling important nodes and pruning neurons with the lowest-magnitude can reduce the sample complexity and improve convergence without compromising the test accuracy. Although the analysis is centered on two-layer GNNs with structural constraints on data, the insights are applicable to more general setups and justified by both synthetic and practical citation datasets.
abstract_zh: 由于训练大规模图神经网络（GNN）面临巨大的计算挑战，人们利用各种稀疏学习技术来降低内存和存储成本。示例包括对子图进行采样以减少数据聚合量的 \textit{graph sparsification} 和修剪神经网络以减少可训练权重数量的 \textit{model sparsification}。尽管在降低训练成本同时保持测试准确性方面取得了实证成功，但 GNN 稀疏学习的理论泛化分析仍然难以捉摸。据我们所知，本文从样本复杂性和实现零泛化误差的收敛速度的角度提供了联合边缘模型稀疏学习的第一个理论表征。分析证明，对重要节点进行采样和以最低幅度剪枝神经元都可以在不影响测试精度的情况下降低样本复杂度并提高收敛性。尽管分析以具有数据结构约束的两层 GNN 为中心，但这些见解适用于更一般的设置，并通过合成和实际引文数据集进行了验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种联合边-模型稀疏学习方法，旨在通过理论分析证明其在图神经网络（GNN）中的高效性，同时保持测试准确性。
AI.motivation: 大规模GNN训练面临计算挑战，现有稀疏学习方法（如图稀疏化和模型稀疏化）虽能降低训练成本，但缺乏理论上的泛化分析。
AI.method: 从样本复杂度和收敛率角度，理论分析联合边-模型稀疏学习，证明通过采样重要节点和剪枝低幅度神经元可降低样本复杂度并提升收敛性。
AI.result: 理论分析表明该方法在保持测试精度的同时减少样本复杂度，实验在合成数据和实际引文数据集上验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法的理论见解适用于更广泛场景，且实验结果支持其普适性。

authors_text: Linh Kästner,Marvin Meusel,Teham Bhuiyan,Jens Lambrecht
title: Holistic Deep-Reinforcement-Learning-based Training of Autonomous Navigation Systems
title_zh: 基于深度强化学习的自主导航系统整体训练
comment: 8 pages, 6 figures
comments: 8 pages, 6 figures
abstract: In recent years, Deep Reinforcement Learning emerged as a promising approach for autonomous navigation of ground vehicles and has been utilized in various areas of navigation such as cruise control, lane changing, or obstacle avoidance. However, most research works either focus on providing an end-to-end solution training the whole system using Deep Reinforcement Learning or focus on one specific aspect such as local motion planning. This however, comes along with a number of problems such as catastrophic forgetfulness, inefficient navigation behavior, and non-optimal synchronization between different entities of the navigation stack. In this paper, we propose a holistic Deep Reinforcement Learning training approach in which the training procedure is involving all entities of the navigation stack. This should enhance the synchronization between- and understanding of all entities of the navigation stack and as a result, improve navigational performance. We trained several agents with a number of different observation spaces to study the impact of different input on the navigation behavior of the agent. In profound evaluations against multiple learning-based and classic model-based navigation approaches, our proposed agent could outperform the baselines in terms of efficiency and safety attaining shorter path lengths, less roundabout paths, and less collisions.
summary: In recent years, Deep Reinforcement Learning emerged as a promising approach for autonomous navigation of ground vehicles and has been utilized in various areas of navigation such as cruise control, lane changing, or obstacle avoidance. However, most research works either focus on providing an end-to-end solution training the whole system using Deep Reinforcement Learning or focus on one specific aspect such as local motion planning. This however, comes along with a number of problems such as catastrophic forgetfulness, inefficient navigation behavior, and non-optimal synchronization between different entities of the navigation stack. In this paper, we propose a holistic Deep Reinforcement Learning training approach in which the training procedure is involving all entities of the navigation stack. This should enhance the synchronization between- and understanding of all entities of the navigation stack and as a result, improve navigational performance. We trained several agents with a number of different observation spaces to study the impact of different input on the navigation behavior of the agent. In profound evaluations against multiple learning-based and classic model-based navigation approaches, our proposed agent could outperform the baselines in terms of efficiency and safety attaining shorter path lengths, less roundabout paths, and less collisions.
abstract_zh: 近年来，深度强化学习成为地面车辆自主导航的一种有前途的方法，并已应用于巡航控制、变道或避障等导航领域。然而，大多数研究工作要么专注于提供使用深度强化学习训练整个系统的端到端解决方案，要么专注于一个特定方面，例如局部运动规划。然而，这伴随着许多问题，例如灾难性的遗忘、低效的导航行为以及导航堆栈的不同实体之间的非最佳同步。在本文中，我们提出了一种整体深度强化学习训练方法，其中训练过程涉及导航堆栈的所有实体。这应该增强导航堆栈的所有实体之间的同步和理解，从而提高导航性能。我们训练了多个具有多个不同观察空间的智能体，以研究不同输入对智能体导航行为的影响。在对多种基于学习和基于经典模型的导航方法的深入评估中，我们提出的代理可以在效率和安全性方面优于基线，实现更短的路径长度、更少的迂回路径和更少的碰撞。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度强化学习的自主导航系统整体训练方法，通过整合导航堆栈所有实体提升同步性与导航性能。
AI.motivation: 现有研究或采用端到端DRL训练导致同步性差，或仅优化局部模块，存在效率低、路径非最优及碰撞风险高等问题。
AI.method: 设计覆盖导航堆栈全模块的DRL训练框架，训练多智能体验证不同观测空间对导航行为的影响，并与经典方法进行对比实验。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在路径长度、绕行次数和碰撞率等指标上优于多种基线方法，展现更优效率与安全性。
AI.conclusion: 整体DRL训练能增强导航模块间协同，未来可探索更复杂场景下的泛化能力与实时性优化。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度强化学习的自主导航系统整体训练方法，通过整合导航堆栈所有实体提升同步性与导航性能。

search_text: Holistic Deep-Reinforcement-Learning-based Training of Autonomous Navigation Systems 基于深度强化学习的自主导航系统整体训练 In recent years, Deep Reinforcement Learning emerged as a promising approach for autonomous navigation of ground vehicles and has been utilized in various areas of navigation such as cruise control, lane changing, or obstacle avoidance. However, most research works either focus on providing an end-to-end solution training the whole system using Deep Reinforcement Learning or focus on one specific aspect such as local motion planning. This however, comes along with a number of problems such as catastrophic forgetfulness, inefficient navigation behavior, and non-optimal synchronization between different entities of the navigation stack. In this paper, we propose a holistic Deep Reinforcement Learning training approach in which the training procedure is involving all entities of the navigation stack. This should enhance the synchronization between- and understanding of all entities of the navigation stack and as a result, improve navigational performance. We trained several agents with a number of different observation spaces to study the impact of different input on the navigation behavior of the agent. In profound evaluations against multiple learning-based and classic model-based navigation approaches, our proposed agent could outperform the baselines in terms of efficiency and safety attaining shorter path lengths, less roundabout paths, and less collisions. 近年来，深度强化学习成为地面车辆自主导航的一种有前途的方法，并已应用于巡航控制、变道或避障等导航领域。然而，大多数研究工作要么专注于提供使用深度强化学习训练整个系统的端到端解决方案，要么专注于一个特定方面，例如局部运动规划。然而，这伴随着许多问题，例如灾难性的遗忘、低效的导航行为以及导航堆栈的不同实体之间的非最佳同步。在本文中，我们提出了一种整体深度强化学习训练方法，其中训练过程涉及导航堆栈的所有实体。这应该增强导航堆栈的所有实体之间的同步和理解，从而提高导航性能。我们训练了多个具有多个不同观察空间的智能体，以研究不同输入对智能体导航行为的影响。在对多种基于学习和基于经典模型的导航方法的深入评估中，我们提出的代理可以在效率和安全性方面优于基线，实现更短的路径长度、更少的迂回路径和更少的碰撞。 本文提出一种基于深度强化学习的自主导航系统整体训练方法，通过整合导航堆栈所有实体提升同步性与导航性能。 Linh Kästner,Marvin Meusel,Teham Bhuiyan,Jens Lambrecht cs.RO,cs.LG

authors_text: Qitian Wu,Yiting Chen,Chenxiao Yang,Junchi Yan
title: Energy-based Out-of-Distribution Detection for Graph Neural Networks
title_zh: 图神经网络基于能量的分布外检测
comment: Published at ICLR 2023, the implementation code is available at https://github.com/qitianwu/GraphOOD-GNNSafe
comments: Published at ICLR 2023, the implementation code is available at https://github.com/qitianwu/GraphOOD-GNNSafe
abstract: Learning on graphs, where instance nodes are inter-connected, has become one of the central problems for deep learning, as relational structures are pervasive and induce data inter-dependence which hinders trivial adaptation of existing approaches that assume inputs to be i.i.d.~sampled. However, current models mostly focus on improving testing performance of in-distribution data and largely ignore the potential risk w.r.t. out-of-distribution (OOD) testing samples that may cause negative outcome if the prediction is overconfident on them. In this paper, we investigate the under-explored problem, OOD detection on graph-structured data, and identify a provably effective OOD discriminator based on an energy function directly extracted from graph neural networks trained with standard classification loss. This paves a way for a simple, powerful and efficient OOD detection model for GNN-based learning on graphs, which we call GNNSafe. It also has nice theoretical properties that guarantee an overall distinguishable margin between the detection scores for in-distribution and OOD samples, which, more critically, can be further strengthened by a learning-free energy belief propagation scheme. For comprehensive evaluation, we introduce new benchmark settings that evaluate the model for detecting OOD data from both synthetic and real distribution shifts (cross-domain graph shifts and temporal graph shifts). The results show that GNNSafe achieves up to $17.0\%$ AUROC improvement over state-of-the-arts and it could serve as simple yet strong baselines in such an under-developed area.
summary: Learning on graphs, where instance nodes are inter-connected, has become one of the central problems for deep learning, as relational structures are pervasive and induce data inter-dependence which hinders trivial adaptation of existing approaches that assume inputs to be i.i.d.~sampled. However, current models mostly focus on improving testing performance of in-distribution data and largely ignore the potential risk w.r.t. out-of-distribution (OOD) testing samples that may cause negative outcome if the prediction is overconfident on them. In this paper, we investigate the under-explored problem, OOD detection on graph-structured data, and identify a provably effective OOD discriminator based on an energy function directly extracted from graph neural networks trained with standard classification loss. This paves a way for a simple, powerful and efficient OOD detection model for GNN-based learning on graphs, which we call GNNSafe. It also has nice theoretical properties that guarantee an overall distinguishable margin between the detection scores for in-distribution and OOD samples, which, more critically, can be further strengthened by a learning-free energy belief propagation scheme. For comprehensive evaluation, we introduce new benchmark settings that evaluate the model for detecting OOD data from both synthetic and real distribution shifts (cross-domain graph shifts and temporal graph shifts). The results show that GNNSafe achieves up to $17.0\%$ AUROC improvement over state-of-the-arts and it could serve as simple yet strong baselines in such an under-developed area.
abstract_zh: 图上的学习（其中实例节点是相互连接的）已成为深度学习的核心问题之一，因为关系结构普遍存在并引起数据相互依赖性，这阻碍了假设输入是独立同分布采样的现有方法的简单适应。然而，当前的模型主要关注于提高分布数据的测试性能，而很大程度上忽略了潜在的风险。分布外（OOD）测试样本，如果预测对它们过于自信，则可能会导致负面结果。在本文中，我们研究了尚未探索的问题，即图结构数据上的 OOD 检测，并基于直接从使用标准分类损失训练的图神经网络中提取的能量函数，确定了一种可证明有效的 OOD 判别器。这为基于 GNN 的图学习的简单、强大且高效的 OOD 检测模型铺平了道路，我们称之为 GNNSafe。它还具有很好的理论特性，可以保证分布内样本和 OOD 样本的检测分数之间的整体可区分裕度，更重要的是，可以通过无学习的能量置信传播方案进一步加强这一特性。为了进行全面评估，我们引入了新的基准设置，用于评估从合成和真实分布偏移（跨域图偏移和时间图偏移）检测 OOD 数据的模型。结果表明，GNNSafe 比最先进的技术实现了高达 $17.0\%$ AUROC 的改进，并且它可以在这样一个欠发达地区作为简单而强大的基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于能量函数的分布外检测方法GNNSafe，用于图神经网络中的图结构数据检测。
AI.motivation: 图数据中节点的相互依赖性导致现有假设独立同分布的方法难以适用，而现有模型过度关注分布内数据性能，忽视了对分布外样本可能产生负面影响的检测需求。
AI.method: 通过从标准分类损失训练的图神经网络中直接提取能量函数构建可证明有效的OOD辨别器，并引入无学习的能量信念传播方案增强检测效果。
AI.result: 在合成与真实分布偏移数据集上，GNNSafe实现最高17.0%的AUROC提升，成为该领域简单且强大的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: GNNSafe通过理论保证的区分度和无需额外训练的增强方案，为图神经网络的分布外检测提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Amur Ghose,Yingxue Zhang,Jianye Hao,Mark Coates
title: Spectral Augmentations for Graph Contrastive Learning
title_zh: 图对比学习的谱增强
comment: To appear in AISTATS 2023
comments: To appear in AISTATS 2023
abstract: Contrastive learning has emerged as a premier method for learning representations with or without supervision. Recent studies have shown its utility in graph representation learning for pre-training. Despite successes, the understanding of how to design effective graph augmentations that can capture structural properties common to many different types of downstream graphs remains incomplete. We propose a set of well-motivated graph transformation operations derived via graph spectral analysis to provide a bank of candidates when constructing augmentations for a graph contrastive objective, enabling contrastive learning to capture useful structural representation from pre-training graph datasets. We first present a spectral graph cropping augmentation that involves filtering nodes by applying thresholds to the eigenvalues of the leading Laplacian eigenvectors. Our second novel augmentation reorders the graph frequency components in a structural Laplacian-derived position graph embedding. Further, we introduce a method that leads to improved views of local subgraphs by performing alignment via global random walk embeddings. Our experimental results indicate consistent improvements in out-of-domain graph data transfer compared to state-of-the-art graph contrastive learning methods, shedding light on how to design a graph learner that is able to learn structural properties common to diverse graph types.
summary: Contrastive learning has emerged as a premier method for learning representations with or without supervision. Recent studies have shown its utility in graph representation learning for pre-training. Despite successes, the understanding of how to design effective graph augmentations that can capture structural properties common to many different types of downstream graphs remains incomplete. We propose a set of well-motivated graph transformation operations derived via graph spectral analysis to provide a bank of candidates when constructing augmentations for a graph contrastive objective, enabling contrastive learning to capture useful structural representation from pre-training graph datasets. We first present a spectral graph cropping augmentation that involves filtering nodes by applying thresholds to the eigenvalues of the leading Laplacian eigenvectors. Our second novel augmentation reorders the graph frequency components in a structural Laplacian-derived position graph embedding. Further, we introduce a method that leads to improved views of local subgraphs by performing alignment via global random walk embeddings. Our experimental results indicate consistent improvements in out-of-domain graph data transfer compared to state-of-the-art graph contrastive learning methods, shedding light on how to design a graph learner that is able to learn structural properties common to diverse graph types.
abstract_zh: 对比学习已成为在有或没有监督的情况下学习表征的主要方法。最近的研究表明它在预训练的图表示学习中的实用性。尽管取得了成功，但对如何设计有效的图增强来捕获许多不同类型的下游图所共有的结构属性的理解仍然不完整。我们提出了一组通过图谱分析导出的动机良好的图转换操作，以在构建图对比目标的增强时提供一组候选者，使对比学习能够从预训练图数据集中捕获有用的结构表示。我们首先提出一种谱图裁剪增强，其中涉及通过对主要拉普拉斯特征向量的特征值应用阈值来过滤节点。我们的第二个新颖的增强对结构拉普拉斯导出的位置图嵌入中的图频率分量进行了重新排序。此外，我们引入了一种方法，该方法通过全局随机游走嵌入执行对齐来改进局部子图的视图。我们的实验结果表明，与最先进的图对比学习方法相比，域外图数据传输取得了一致的改进，揭示了如何设计能够学习不同图类型常见的结构属性的图学习器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于图谱分析的增强方法，改进图对比学习中的预训练表示，以捕捉多种下游图的结构特性。
AI.motivation: 现有图对比学习方法在设计有效捕捉通用结构特性的图增强策略方面存在不足，需探索更稳健的增强方式。
AI.method: 提出三种谱增强方法：1) 基于拉普拉斯特征向量特征值阈值的图谱裁剪；2) 结构拉普拉斯位置嵌入的频率成分重排序；3) 全局随机游走嵌入对齐的子图增强。
AI.result: 实验表明，在跨领域图数据迁移任务中，相比现有最先进方法取得持续性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 谱增强策略为设计学习通用结构属性的图学习器提供了有效途径，揭示了图对比学习中结构表示的可迁移性规律。

ai_content_json.result: 实验表明，在跨领域图数据迁移任务中，相比现有最先进方法取得持续性能提升。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 谱增强策略为设计学习通用结构属性的图学习器提供了有效途径，揭示了图对比学习中结构表示的可迁移性规律。

tldr: 本文提出基于图谱分析的增强方法，改进图对比学习中的预训练表示，以捕捉多种下游图的结构特性。
motivation: 现有图对比学习方法在设计有效捕捉通用结构特性的图增强策略方面存在不足，需探索更稳健的增强方式。
method: 提出三种谱增强方法：1) 基于拉普拉斯特征向量特征值阈值的图谱裁剪；2) 结构拉普拉斯位置嵌入的频率成分重排序；3) 全局随机游走嵌入对齐的子图增强。

search_text: Spectral Augmentations for Graph Contrastive Learning 图对比学习的谱增强 Contrastive learning has emerged as a premier method for learning representations with or without supervision. Recent studies have shown its utility in graph representation learning for pre-training. Despite successes, the understanding of how to design effective graph augmentations that can capture structural properties common to many different types of downstream graphs remains incomplete. We propose a set of well-motivated graph transformation operations derived via graph spectral analysis to provide a bank of candidates when constructing augmentations for a graph contrastive objective, enabling contrastive learning to capture useful structural representation from pre-training graph datasets. We first present a spectral graph cropping augmentation that involves filtering nodes by applying thresholds to the eigenvalues of the leading Laplacian eigenvectors. Our second novel augmentation reorders the graph frequency components in a structural Laplacian-derived position graph embedding. Further, we introduce a method that leads to improved views of local subgraphs by performing alignment via global random walk embeddings. Our experimental results indicate consistent improvements in out-of-domain graph data transfer compared to state-of-the-art graph contrastive learning methods, shedding light on how to design a graph learner that is able to learn structural properties common to diverse graph types. 对比学习已成为在有或没有监督的情况下学习表征的主要方法。最近的研究表明它在预训练的图表示学习中的实用性。尽管取得了成功，但对如何设计有效的图增强来捕获许多不同类型的下游图所共有的结构属性的理解仍然不完整。我们提出了一组通过图谱分析导出的动机良好的图转换操作，以在构建图对比目标的增强时提供一组候选者，使对比学习能够从预训练图数据集中捕获有用的结构表示。我们首先提出一种谱图裁剪增强，其中涉及通过对主要拉普拉斯特征向量的特征值应用阈值来过滤节点。我们的第二个新颖的增强对结构拉普拉斯导出的位置图嵌入中的图频率分量进行了重新排序。此外，我们引入了一种方法，该方法通过全局随机游走嵌入执行对齐来改进局部子图的视图。我们的实验结果表明，与最先进的图对比学习方法相比，域外图数据传输取得了一致的改进，揭示了如何设计能够学习不同图类型常见的结构属性的图学习器。 本文提出基于图谱分析的增强方法，改进图对比学习中的预训练表示，以捕捉多种下游图的结构特性。 Amur Ghose,Yingxue Zhang,Jianye Hao,Mark Coates cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Ziyang luo,Pu Zhao,Can Xu,Xiubo Geng,Tao Shen,Chongyang Tao,Jing Ma,Qingwen lin,Daxin Jiang
title: LexLIP: Lexicon-Bottlenecked Language-Image Pre-Training for Large-Scale Image-Text Retrieval
title_zh: LexLIP：用于大规模图像文本检索的词典瓶颈语言图像预训练
abstract: Image-text retrieval (ITR) is a task to retrieve the relevant images/texts, given the query from another modality. The conventional dense retrieval paradigm relies on encoding images and texts into dense representations using dual-stream encoders, however, it faces challenges with low retrieval speed in large-scale retrieval scenarios. In this work, we propose the lexicon-weighting paradigm, where sparse representations in vocabulary space are learned for images and texts to take advantage of the bag-of-words models and efficient inverted indexes, resulting in significantly reduced retrieval latency. A crucial gap arises from the continuous nature of image data, and the requirement for a sparse vocabulary space representation. To bridge this gap, we introduce a novel pre-training framework, Lexicon-Bottlenecked Language-Image Pre-Training (LexLIP), that learns importance-aware lexicon representations. This framework features lexicon-bottlenecked modules between the dual-stream encoders and weakened text decoders, allowing for constructing continuous bag-of-words bottlenecks to learn lexicon-importance distributions. Upon pre-training with same-scale data, our LexLIP achieves state-of-the-art performance on two benchmark ITR datasets, MSCOCO and Flickr30k. Furthermore, in large-scale retrieval scenarios, LexLIP outperforms CLIP with a 5.5 ~ 221.3X faster retrieval speed and 13.2 ~ 48.8X less index storage memory.
summary: Image-text retrieval (ITR) is a task to retrieve the relevant images/texts, given the query from another modality. The conventional dense retrieval paradigm relies on encoding images and texts into dense representations using dual-stream encoders, however, it faces challenges with low retrieval speed in large-scale retrieval scenarios. In this work, we propose the lexicon-weighting paradigm, where sparse representations in vocabulary space are learned for images and texts to take advantage of the bag-of-words models and efficient inverted indexes, resulting in significantly reduced retrieval latency. A crucial gap arises from the continuous nature of image data, and the requirement for a sparse vocabulary space representation. To bridge this gap, we introduce a novel pre-training framework, Lexicon-Bottlenecked Language-Image Pre-Training (LexLIP), that learns importance-aware lexicon representations. This framework features lexicon-bottlenecked modules between the dual-stream encoders and weakened text decoders, allowing for constructing continuous bag-of-words bottlenecks to learn lexicon-importance distributions. Upon pre-training with same-scale data, our LexLIP achieves state-of-the-art performance on two benchmark ITR datasets, MSCOCO and Flickr30k. Furthermore, in large-scale retrieval scenarios, LexLIP outperforms CLIP with a 5.5 ~ 221.3X faster retrieval speed and 13.2 ~ 48.8X less index storage memory.
abstract_zh: 图像文本检索（ITR）是根据另一种模态的查询来检索相关图像/文本的任务。传统的密集检索范式依赖于使用双流编码器将图像和文本编码为密集表示，然而，它在大规模检索场景中面临检索速度低的挑战。在这项工作中，我们提出了词典加权范例，其中学习图像和文本词汇空间中的稀疏表示，以利用词袋模型和高效的倒排索引，从而显着减少检索延迟。图像数据的连续性以及稀疏词汇空间表示的要求产生了一个关键的差距。为了弥补这一差距，我们引入了一种新颖的预训练框架，即词典瓶颈语言图像预训练（LexLIP），它可以学习重要性感知的词典表示。该框架在双流编码器和弱化文本解码器之间具有词典瓶颈模块，允许构建连续的词袋瓶颈来学习词典重要性分布。在使用相同规模的数据进行预训练后，我们的 LexLIP 在两个基准 ITR 数据集 MSCOCO 和 Flickr30k 上实现了最先进的性能。此外，在大规模检索场景中，LexLIP 的检索速度比 CLIP 快 5.5 ~ 221.3 倍，索引存储内存减少 13.2 ~ 48.8 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LexLIP框架，通过词典瓶颈预训练方法解决大规模图像-文本检索中的速度与存储效率问题。
AI.motivation: 传统密集表示方法在大规模检索场景下存在速度慢、存储开销大的缺陷，需利用稀疏表示与高效索引结构提升性能。
AI.method: 设计LexLIP预训练框架，在双流编码器与弱化文本解码器间引入词典瓶颈模块，学习连续词袋瓶颈以获取词典重要性分布。
AI.result: 在MSCOCO和Flickr30k数据集上达到SOTA性能，检索速度较CLIP提升5.5~221.3倍，索引存储减少13.2~48.8倍。
AI.conclusion: LexLIP通过稀疏表示与高效索引结构，在保持检索效果的同时显著提升大规模图像-文本检索的效率与存储经济性。

authors_text: Salah Ghamizi,Jingfeng Zhang,Maxime Cordy,Mike Papadakis,Masashi Sugiyama,Yves Le Traon
title: GAT: Guided Adversarial Training with Pareto-optimal Auxiliary Tasks
title_zh: GAT：带有帕累托最优辅助任务的引导对抗训练
abstract: While leveraging additional training data is well established to improve adversarial robustness, it incurs the unavoidable cost of data collection and the heavy computation to train models. To mitigate the costs, we propose Guided Adversarial Training (GAT), a novel adversarial training technique that exploits auxiliary tasks under a limited set of training data. Our approach extends single-task models into multi-task models during the min-max optimization of adversarial training, and drives the loss optimization with a regularization of the gradient curvature across multiple tasks. GAT leverages two types of auxiliary tasks: self-supervised tasks, where the labels are generated automatically, and domain-knowledge tasks, where human experts provide additional labels. Experimentally, GAT increases the robust AUC of CheXpert medical imaging dataset from 50% to 83% and On CIFAR-10, GAT outperforms eight state-of-the-art adversarial training and achieves 56.21% robust accuracy with Resnet-50. Overall, we demonstrate that guided multi-task learning is an actionable and promising avenue to push further the boundaries of model robustness.
summary: While leveraging additional training data is well established to improve adversarial robustness, it incurs the unavoidable cost of data collection and the heavy computation to train models. To mitigate the costs, we propose Guided Adversarial Training (GAT), a novel adversarial training technique that exploits auxiliary tasks under a limited set of training data. Our approach extends single-task models into multi-task models during the min-max optimization of adversarial training, and drives the loss optimization with a regularization of the gradient curvature across multiple tasks. GAT leverages two types of auxiliary tasks: self-supervised tasks, where the labels are generated automatically, and domain-knowledge tasks, where human experts provide additional labels. Experimentally, GAT increases the robust AUC of CheXpert medical imaging dataset from 50% to 83% and On CIFAR-10, GAT outperforms eight state-of-the-art adversarial training and achieves 56.21% robust accuracy with Resnet-50. Overall, we demonstrate that guided multi-task learning is an actionable and promising avenue to push further the boundaries of model robustness.
abstract_zh: 虽然利用额外的训练数据来提高对抗鲁棒性已经很成熟，但它会带来不可避免的数据收集成本和训练模型的繁重计算成本。为了降低成本，我们提出了引导对抗训练（GAT），这是一种新颖的对抗训练技术，它在有限的训练数据集下利用辅助任务。我们的方法在对抗训练的最小-最大优化期间将单任务模型扩展到多任务模型，并通过跨多个任务的梯度曲率正则化来驱动损失优化。 GAT 利用两种类型的辅助任务：自我监督任务（自动生成标签）和领域知识任务（人类专家提供额外标签）。实验上，GAT 将 CheXpert 医学成像数据集的鲁棒 AUC 从 50% 提高到 83%，并且在 CIFAR-10 上，GAT 优于 8 个最先进的对抗训练，并通过 Resnet-50 实现 56.21% 的鲁棒精度。总的来说，我们证明引导式多任务学习是进一步突破模型鲁棒性界限的可行且有前途的途径。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为GAT的引导对抗训练方法，通过利用辅助任务在有限训练数据下提升模型的对抗鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统对抗训练依赖大量额外数据，导致数据收集和计算成本高昂。为降低成本，需探索无需新增数据的替代方案。
AI.method: GAT在对抗训练的min-max优化中引入多任务学习，结合自监督任务（自动标注）和领域知识任务（专家标注），通过梯度曲率正则化驱动多任务损失优化。
AI.result: 在CheXpert数据集上，GAT将鲁棒AUC从50%提升至83%；在CIFAR-10上，使用ResNet-50达到56.21%的鲁棒准确率，优于八种先进对抗训练方法。
AI.conclusion: 引导式多任务学习为提升模型鲁棒性提供了可行且有效的技术路径，未来可进一步探索其在更多场景的应用。

search_text: GAT: Guided Adversarial Training with Pareto-optimal Auxiliary Tasks GAT：带有帕累托最优辅助任务的引导对抗训练 While leveraging additional training data is well established to improve adversarial robustness, it incurs the unavoidable cost of data collection and the heavy computation to train models. To mitigate the costs, we propose Guided Adversarial Training (GAT), a novel adversarial training technique that exploits auxiliary tasks under a limited set of training data. Our approach extends single-task models into multi-task models during the min-max optimization of adversarial training, and drives the loss optimization with a regularization of the gradient curvature across multiple tasks. GAT leverages two types of auxiliary tasks: self-supervised tasks, where the labels are generated automatically, and domain-knowledge tasks, where human experts provide additional labels. Experimentally, GAT increases the robust AUC of CheXpert medical imaging dataset from 50% to 83% and On CIFAR-10, GAT outperforms eight state-of-the-art adversarial training and achieves 56.21% robust accuracy with Resnet-50. Overall, we demonstrate that guided multi-task learning is an actionable and promising avenue to push further the boundaries of model robustness. 虽然利用额外的训练数据来提高对抗鲁棒性已经很成熟，但它会带来不可避免的数据收集成本和训练模型的繁重计算成本。为了降低成本，我们提出了引导对抗训练（GAT），这是一种新颖的对抗训练技术，它在有限的训练数据集下利用辅助任务。我们的方法在对抗训练的最小-最大优化期间将单任务模型扩展到多任务模型，并通过跨多个任务的梯度曲率正则化来驱动损失优化。 GAT 利用两种类型的辅助任务：自我监督任务（自动生成标签）和领域知识任务（人类专家提供额外标签）。实验上，GAT 将 CheXpert 医学成像数据集的鲁棒 AUC 从 50% 提高到 83%，并且在 CIFAR-10 上，GAT 优于 8 个最先进的对抗训练，并通过 Resnet-50 实现 56.21% 的鲁棒精度。总的来说，我们证明引导式多任务学习是进一步突破模型鲁棒性界限的可行且有前途的途径。 本文提出了一种名为GAT的引导对抗训练方法，通过利用辅助任务在有限训练数据下提升模型的对抗鲁棒性。 Salah Ghamizi,Jingfeng Zhang,Maxime Cordy,Mike Papadakis,Masashi Sugiyama,Yves Le Traon cs.CV,cs.CR,cs.LG

authors_text: Linh Kästner,Reyk Carstens,Christopher Liebig,Volodymyr Shcherbyna,Lena Nahrworld,Subhin Lee,Jens Lambrecht
title: Arena-Web -- A Web-based Development and Benchmarking Platform for Autonomous Navigation Approaches
title_zh: Arena-Web——基于网络的自主导航方法开发和基准测试平台
comment: 10 pages, 9 figures
comments: 10 pages, 9 figures
abstract: In recent years, mobile robot navigation approaches have become increasingly important due to various application areas ranging from healthcare to warehouse logistics. In particular, Deep Reinforcement Learning approaches have gained popularity for robot navigation but are not easily accessible to non-experts and complex to develop. In recent years, efforts have been made to make these sophisticated approaches accessible to a wider audience. In this paper, we present Arena-Web, a web-based development and evaluation suite for developing, training, and testing DRL-based navigation planners for various robotic platforms and scenarios. The interface is designed to be intuitive and engaging to appeal to non-experts and make the technology accessible to a wider audience. With Arena-Web and its interface, training and developing Deep Reinforcement Learning agents is simplified and made easy without a single line of code. The web-app is free to use and openly available under the link stated in the supplementary materials.
summary: In recent years, mobile robot navigation approaches have become increasingly important due to various application areas ranging from healthcare to warehouse logistics. In particular, Deep Reinforcement Learning approaches have gained popularity for robot navigation but are not easily accessible to non-experts and complex to develop. In recent years, efforts have been made to make these sophisticated approaches accessible to a wider audience. In this paper, we present Arena-Web, a web-based development and evaluation suite for developing, training, and testing DRL-based navigation planners for various robotic platforms and scenarios. The interface is designed to be intuitive and engaging to appeal to non-experts and make the technology accessible to a wider audience. With Arena-Web and its interface, training and developing Deep Reinforcement Learning agents is simplified and made easy without a single line of code. The web-app is free to use and openly available under the link stated in the supplementary materials.
abstract_zh: 近年来，由于从医疗保健到仓库物流等各种应用领域，移动机器人导航方法变得越来越重要。特别是，深度强化学习方法在机器人导航领域越来越受欢迎，但对于非专家来说不容易使用，而且开发起来很复杂。近年来，人们努力使这些复杂的方法能够被更广泛的受众所接受。在本文中，我们介绍了 Arena-Web，这是一个基于网络的开发和评估套件，用于为各种机器人平台和场景开发、训练和测试基于 DRL 的导航规划器。该界面设计直观且引人入胜，以吸引非专家，并使更广泛的受众能够使用该技术。借助 Arena-Web 及其界面，深度强化学习代理的训练和开发变得简单易行，无需任何代码。该网络应用程序可免费使用，并可通过补充材料中所述的链接公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Arena-Web，一个基于网络的开发与评估平台，用于简化深度强化学习（DRL）导航规划器的开发与测试。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度强化学习在机器人导航中广泛应用，但其开发复杂且难以被非专家使用，亟需直观易用的工具降低使用门槛。
AI.method: 开发了Arena-Web平台，提供直观的网页界面，允许用户无需编写代码即可训练和测试DRL导航算法，并支持多种机器人平台和场景。
AI.result: Arena-Web平台成功实现并开放使用，显著简化了DRL代理的开发流程，验证了其在非专家群体中的可用性。
AI.conclusion: Arena-Web通过直观界面和无需编码的设计，使DRL导航技术更易被广泛采用，推动了自主导航技术的普及与应用。

authors_text: Marcellin Atemkeng,Victor Osanyindoro,Rockefeller Rockefeller,Sisipho Hamlomo,Jecinta Mulongo,Theophilus Ansah-Narh,Franklin Tchakounte,Arnaud Nguembang Fadja
title: Label Assisted Autoencoder for Anomaly Detection in Power Generation Plants
title_zh: 用于发电厂异常检测的标签辅助自动编码器
comment: Submitted to Journal
comments: Submitted to Journal
abstract: One of the critical factors that drive the economic development of a country and guarantee the sustainability of its industries is the constant availability of electricity. This is usually provided by the national electric grid. However, in developing countries where companies are emerging on a constant basis including telecommunication industries, those are still experiencing a non-stable electricity supply. Therefore, they have to rely on generators to guarantee their full functionality. Those generators depend on fuel to function and the rate of consumption gets usually high, if not monitored properly. Monitoring operation is usually carried out by a (non-expert) human. In some cases, this could be a tedious process, as some companies have reported an exaggerated high consumption rate. This work proposes a label assisted autoencoder for anomaly detection in the fuel consumed by power generating plants. In addition to the autoencoder model, we added a labelling assistance module that checks if an observation is labelled, the label is used to check the veracity of the corresponding anomaly classification given a threshold. A consensus is then reached on whether training should stop or whether the threshold should be updated or the training should continue with the search for hyper-parameters. Results show that the proposed model is highly efficient for reading anomalies with a detection accuracy of $97.20\%$ which outperforms the existing model of $96.1\%$ accuracy trained on the same dataset. In addition, the proposed model is able to classify the anomalies according to their degree of severity.
summary: One of the critical factors that drive the economic development of a country and guarantee the sustainability of its industries is the constant availability of electricity. This is usually provided by the national electric grid. However, in developing countries where companies are emerging on a constant basis including telecommunication industries, those are still experiencing a non-stable electricity supply. Therefore, they have to rely on generators to guarantee their full functionality. Those generators depend on fuel to function and the rate of consumption gets usually high, if not monitored properly. Monitoring operation is usually carried out by a (non-expert) human. In some cases, this could be a tedious process, as some companies have reported an exaggerated high consumption rate. This work proposes a label assisted autoencoder for anomaly detection in the fuel consumed by power generating plants. In addition to the autoencoder model, we added a labelling assistance module that checks if an observation is labelled, the label is used to check the veracity of the corresponding anomaly classification given a threshold. A consensus is then reached on whether training should stop or whether the threshold should be updated or the training should continue with the search for hyper-parameters. Results show that the proposed model is highly efficient for reading anomalies with a detection accuracy of $97.20\%$ which outperforms the existing model of $96.1\%$ accuracy trained on the same dataset. In addition, the proposed model is able to classify the anomalies according to their degree of severity.
abstract_zh: 电力的持续供应是推动一个国家经济发展并保证其工业可持续发展的关键因素之一。这通常由国家电网提供。然而，在发展中国家，包括电信行业在内的企业不断涌现，但电力供应仍然不稳定。因此，他们必须依靠发电机来保证其全部功能。这些发电机依靠燃料来运行，如果没有适当监控，消耗率通常会很高。监控操作通常由（非专家）人员执行。在某些情况下，这可能是一个乏味的过程，因为一些公司报告了夸大的高消费率。这项工作提出了一种标签辅助自动编码器，用于发电厂消耗的燃料的异常检测。除了自动编码器模型之外，我们还添加了一个标记辅助模块，用于检查观察是否被标记，该标签用于在给定阈值的情况下检查相应异常分类的准确性。然后就是否应停止训练或是否应更新阈值或训练应继续搜索超参数达成共识。结果表明，所提出的模型对于读取异常非常有效，检测精度为 $97.20\%$，优于在同一数据集上训练的现有模型 $96.1\%$ 的精度。此外，所提出的模型能够根据异常的严重程度对异常进行分类。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种标签辅助自编码器模型，用于检测发电厂燃料消耗的异常情况。
AI.motivation: 发展中国家电力供应不稳定，依赖发电机但人工监控效率低，导致燃料消耗异常难以及时发现。
AI.method: 设计标签辅助自编码器，结合标签验证模块与阈值共识机制，动态调整训练过程以提高异常检测准确性。
AI.result: 模型在相同数据集上达到97.20%的检测准确率，优于现有模型96.1%，并能按严重程度分类异常。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升异常检测性能，适用于电力行业燃料消耗监控的实际场景。

authors_text: Floor Verhoeven,Tanguy Magne,Olga Sorkine-Hornung
title: UVDoc: Neural Grid-based Document Unwarping
title_zh: UVDoc：基于神经网格的文档反扭曲
comment: 14 pages, published in SIGGRAPH Asia 2023 Conference Papers
comments: 14 pages, published in SIGGRAPH Asia 2023 Conference Papers
abstract: Restoring the original, flat appearance of a printed document from casual photographs of bent and wrinkled pages is a common everyday problem. In this paper we propose a novel method for grid-based single-image document unwarping. Our method performs geometric distortion correction via a fully convolutional deep neural network that learns to predict the 3D grid mesh of the document and the corresponding 2D unwarping grid in a dual-task fashion, implicitly encoding the coupling between the shape of a 3D piece of paper and its 2D image. In order to allow unwarping models to train on data that is more realistic in appearance than the commonly used synthetic Doc3D dataset, we create and publish our own dataset, called UVDoc, which combines pseudo-photorealistic document images with physically accurate 3D shape and unwarping function annotations. Our dataset is labeled with all the information necessary to train our unwarping network, without having to engineer separate loss functions that can deal with the lack of ground-truth typically found in document in the wild datasets. We perform an in-depth evaluation that demonstrates that with the inclusion of our novel pseudo-photorealistic dataset, our relatively small network architecture achieves state-of-the-art results on the DocUNet benchmark. We show that the pseudo-photorealistic nature of our UVDoc dataset allows for new and better evaluation methods, such as lighting-corrected MS-SSIM. We provide a novel benchmark dataset that facilitates such evaluations, and propose a metric that quantifies line straightness after unwarping. Our code, results and UVDoc dataset are available at https://github.com/tanguymagne/UVDoc.
summary: Restoring the original, flat appearance of a printed document from casual photographs of bent and wrinkled pages is a common everyday problem. In this paper we propose a novel method for grid-based single-image document unwarping. Our method performs geometric distortion correction via a fully convolutional deep neural network that learns to predict the 3D grid mesh of the document and the corresponding 2D unwarping grid in a dual-task fashion, implicitly encoding the coupling between the shape of a 3D piece of paper and its 2D image. In order to allow unwarping models to train on data that is more realistic in appearance than the commonly used synthetic Doc3D dataset, we create and publish our own dataset, called UVDoc, which combines pseudo-photorealistic document images with physically accurate 3D shape and unwarping function annotations. Our dataset is labeled with all the information necessary to train our unwarping network, without having to engineer separate loss functions that can deal with the lack of ground-truth typically found in document in the wild datasets. We perform an in-depth evaluation that demonstrates that with the inclusion of our novel pseudo-photorealistic dataset, our relatively small network architecture achieves state-of-the-art results on the DocUNet benchmark. We show that the pseudo-photorealistic nature of our UVDoc dataset allows for new and better evaluation methods, such as lighting-corrected MS-SSIM. We provide a novel benchmark dataset that facilitates such evaluations, and propose a metric that quantifies line straightness after unwarping. Our code, results and UVDoc dataset are available at https://github.com/tanguymagne/UVDoc.
abstract_zh: 从弯曲和起皱的页面的随意照片中恢复打印文档的原始、平坦外观是一个常见的日常问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于网格的单图像文档反扭曲的新方法。我们的方法通过全卷积深度神经网络执行几何畸变校正，该网络学习以双任务方式预测文档的 3D 网格和相应的 2D 反扭曲网格，隐式编码 3D 纸张形状与其 2D 图像之间的耦合。为了允许反扭曲模型在比常用的合成 Doc3D 数据集更真实的数据上进行训练，我们创建并发布了自己的数据集，称为 UVDoc，它将伪真实感文档图像与物理上精确的 3D 形状和反扭曲函数注释相结合。我们的数据集标有训练我们的反扭曲网络所需的所有信息，而无需设计单独的损失函数来处理野生数据集中文档中通常发现的地面实况的缺乏。我们进行了深入的评估，结果表明，通过包含新颖的伪真实感数据集，我们相对较小的网络架构在 DocUNet 基准测试上实现了最先进的结果。我们表明，UVDoc 数据集的伪真实感特性允许采用新的、更好的评估方法，例如光照校正的 MS-SSIM。我们提供了一个新颖的基准数据集来促进此类评估，并提出了一种量化反扭曲后线直线度的指标。我们的代码、结果和 UVDoc 数据集可在 https://github.com/tanguymagne/UVDoc 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经网格的单图像文档去扭曲方法，通过深度神经网络预测文档的3D网格和2D去扭曲网格，解决弯曲皱褶文档的复原问题。
AI.motivation: 现有合成数据集（如Doc3D）无法真实反映实际拍摄的文档图像特征，导致去扭曲模型训练效果受限，需构建更贴近现实的高质量数据集。
AI.method: 设计全卷积网络同时预测文档3D网格与2D去扭曲网格，构建包含物理精确3D形状和标注的伪写实数据集UVDoc，并引入光照校正MS-SSIM和线条直度量化指标。
AI.result: 在DocUNet基准测试中，使用UVDoc数据集的轻量网络达到SOTA效果，新评估方法有效验证模型性能。
AI.conclusion: UVDoc数据集和双任务网络框架显著提升文档去扭曲效果，为真实场景下的文档复原提供新方法和评估基准。

authors_text: Tommaso Giannantonio,Anna Alperovich,Piercosimo Semeraro,Manfredo Atzori,Xiaohan Zhang,Christoph Hauger,Alexander Freytag,Siri Luthman,Roeland Vandebriel,Murali Jayapala,Lien Solie,Steven de Vleeschouwer
title: Intra-operative Brain Tumor Detection with Deep Learning-Optimized Hyperspectral Imaging
title_zh: 使用深度学习优化的高光谱成像进行术中脑肿瘤检测
comment: SPIE Photonics West 2023 conference Optical Biopsy XXI: Toward Real-Time Spectroscopic Imaging and Diagnosis. 18 pages, 11 figures
comments: SPIE Photonics West 2023 conference Optical Biopsy XXI: Toward Real-Time Spectroscopic Imaging and Diagnosis. 18 pages, 11 figures
abstract: Surgery for gliomas (intrinsic brain tumors), especially when low-grade, is challenging due to the infiltrative nature of the lesion. Currently, no real-time, intra-operative, label-free and wide-field tool is available to assist and guide the surgeon to find the relevant demarcations for these tumors. While marker-based methods exist for the high-grade glioma case, there is no convenient solution available for the low-grade case; thus, marker-free optical techniques represent an attractive option. Although RGB imaging is a standard tool in surgical microscopes, it does not contain sufficient information for tissue differentiation. We leverage the richer information from hyperspectral imaging (HSI), acquired with a snapscan camera in the 468-787 nm range, coupled to a surgical microscope, to build a deep-learning-based diagnostic tool for cancer resection with potential for intra-operative guidance. However, the main limitation of the HSI snapscan camera is the image acquisition time, limiting its widespread deployment in the operation theater. Here, we investigate the effect of HSI channel reduction and pre-selection to scope the design space for the development of cheaper and faster sensors. Neural networks are used to identify the most important spectral channels for tumor tissue differentiation, optimizing the trade-off between the number of channels and precision to enable real-time intra-surgical application. We evaluate the performance of our method on a clinical dataset that was acquired during surgery on five patients. By demonstrating the possibility to efficiently detect low-grade glioma, these results can lead to better cancer resection demarcations, potentially improving treatment effectiveness and patient outcome.
summary: Surgery for gliomas (intrinsic brain tumors), especially when low-grade, is challenging due to the infiltrative nature of the lesion. Currently, no real-time, intra-operative, label-free and wide-field tool is available to assist and guide the surgeon to find the relevant demarcations for these tumors. While marker-based methods exist for the high-grade glioma case, there is no convenient solution available for the low-grade case; thus, marker-free optical techniques represent an attractive option. Although RGB imaging is a standard tool in surgical microscopes, it does not contain sufficient information for tissue differentiation. We leverage the richer information from hyperspectral imaging (HSI), acquired with a snapscan camera in the 468-787 nm range, coupled to a surgical microscope, to build a deep-learning-based diagnostic tool for cancer resection with potential for intra-operative guidance. However, the main limitation of the HSI snapscan camera is the image acquisition time, limiting its widespread deployment in the operation theater. Here, we investigate the effect of HSI channel reduction and pre-selection to scope the design space for the development of cheaper and faster sensors. Neural networks are used to identify the most important spectral channels for tumor tissue differentiation, optimizing the trade-off between the number of channels and precision to enable real-time intra-surgical application. We evaluate the performance of our method on a clinical dataset that was acquired during surgery on five patients. By demonstrating the possibility to efficiently detect low-grade glioma, these results can lead to better cancer resection demarcations, potentially improving treatment effectiveness and patient outcome.
abstract_zh: 由于病变的浸润性，神经胶质瘤（内在性脑肿瘤）的手术，尤其是低级别的手术，具有挑战性。目前，还没有实时的、术中的、无标签的宽视野工具来协助和指导外科医生找到这些肿瘤的相关分界。虽然对于高级别神经胶质瘤病例存在基于标记的方法，但对于低级别胶质瘤病例没有方便的解决方案；因此，无标记光学技术是一种有吸引力的选择。尽管 RGB 成像是手术显微镜的标准工具，但它不包含足够的组织分化信息。我们利用高光谱成像 (HSI) 中更丰富的信息（通过 468-787 nm 范围内的 snapscan 相机获取）与手术显微镜相结合，构建基于深度学习的癌症切除诊断工具，并具有术中指导的潜力。然而，HSI Snapscan 相机的主要限制是图像采集时间，限制了其在手术室的广泛部署。在这里，我们研究了 HSI 通道减少和预选的影响，以扩大设计空间，以开发更便宜和更快的传感器。神经网络用于识别肿瘤组织分化最重要的光谱通道，优化通道数量和精度之间的权衡，以实现实时手术内应用。我们在五名患者手术期间获得的临床数据集上评估了我们的方法的性能。通过证明有效检测低级别神经胶质瘤的可能性，这些结果可以导致更好的癌症切除界限，从而有可能提高治疗效果和患者预后。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习优化的高光谱成像技术，用于术中低级别胶质瘤的实时检测与切除指导。
AI.motivation: 当前缺乏实时、无标记且适用于低级别胶质瘤的术中成像工具，传统RGB成像无法有效区分肿瘤组织，需开发更高效的光学检测方法。
AI.method: 利用468-787 nm波段的高光谱成像数据，结合深度学习模型筛选关键光谱通道，减少数据量以提升采集速度，同时保持肿瘤组织分类精度。
AI.result: 在5例患者术中数据集上验证，该方法可有效检测低级别胶质瘤，为手术切除提供实时指导，有望提升治疗效果。
AI.conclusion: 通过光谱通道优化与深度学习结合，该技术为术中肿瘤精准切除提供了可行的低成本、快速解决方案。

authors_text: Doganay Sirintuna,Idil Ozdamar,Juan M. Gandarias,Arash Ajoudani
title: Enhancing Human-Robot Collaboration Transportation through Obstacle-Aware Vibrotactile Feedback
title_zh: 通过障碍感知振动触觉反馈增强人机协作运输
comment: 6 pages, 5 figures, for associated video, see this https://youtu.be/UABeGPIIrHc
comments: 6 pages, 5 figures, for associated video, see this https://youtu.be/UABeGPIIrHc
abstract: Transporting large and heavy objects can benefit from Human-Robot Collaboration (HRC), increasing the contribution of robots to our daily tasks and reducing the risk of injuries to the human operator. This approach usually posits the human collaborator as the leader, while the robot has the follower role. Hence, it is essential for the leader to be aware of the environmental situation. However, when transporting a large object, the operator's situational awareness can be compromised as the object may occlude different parts of the environment. This paper proposes a novel haptic-based environmental awareness module for a collaborative transportation framework that informs the human operator about surrounding obstacles. The robot uses two LIDARs to detect the obstacles in the surroundings. The warning module alerts the operator through a haptic belt with four vibrotactile devices that provide feedback about the location and proximity of the obstacles. By enhancing the operator's awareness of the surroundings, the proposed module improves the safety of the human-robot team in co-carrying scenarios by preventing collisions. Experiments with two non-expert subjects in two different situations are conducted. The results show that the human partner can successfully lead the co-transportation system in an unknown environment with hidden obstacles thanks to the haptic feedback.
summary: Transporting large and heavy objects can benefit from Human-Robot Collaboration (HRC), increasing the contribution of robots to our daily tasks and reducing the risk of injuries to the human operator. This approach usually posits the human collaborator as the leader, while the robot has the follower role. Hence, it is essential for the leader to be aware of the environmental situation. However, when transporting a large object, the operator's situational awareness can be compromised as the object may occlude different parts of the environment. This paper proposes a novel haptic-based environmental awareness module for a collaborative transportation framework that informs the human operator about surrounding obstacles. The robot uses two LIDARs to detect the obstacles in the surroundings. The warning module alerts the operator through a haptic belt with four vibrotactile devices that provide feedback about the location and proximity of the obstacles. By enhancing the operator's awareness of the surroundings, the proposed module improves the safety of the human-robot team in co-carrying scenarios by preventing collisions. Experiments with two non-expert subjects in two different situations are conducted. The results show that the human partner can successfully lead the co-transportation system in an unknown environment with hidden obstacles thanks to the haptic feedback.
abstract_zh: 运输大型和重型物体可以受益于人机协作（HRC），增加机器人对我们日常任务的贡献，并降低人类操作员受伤的风险。这种方法通常将人类协作者视为领导者，而机器人则充当跟随者角色。因此，领导者必须了解环境状况。然而，在运输大型物体时，操作员的态势感知可能会受​​到影响，因为该物体可能会遮挡环境的不同部分。本文提出了一种新型的基于触觉的环境感知模块，用于协作运输框架，告知操作人员周围的障碍物。该机器人使用两个激光雷达来检测周围的障碍物。警告模块通过带有四个振动触觉设备的触觉带向操作员发出警报，这些振动触觉设备提供有关障碍物位置和接近程度的反馈。通过增强操作员对周围环境的感知，该模块通过防止碰撞来提高人机团队在共同携带场景中的安全性。在两种不同情况下对两名非专家受试者进行了实验。结果表明，由于触觉反馈，人类伙伴可以在具有隐藏障碍的未知环境中成功引导协同运输系统。

AI.tldr: 本论文提出一种基于触觉反馈的环境感知模块，通过振动腰带提升人机协作运输中的避障安全性。
AI.motivation: 在运输大型物体时，操作者因物体遮挡易丧失环境感知能力，导致碰撞风险增加，需通过辅助系统提升操作者对障碍物的感知。
AI.method: 使用双激光雷达检测环境障碍物，通过配备四个振动装置的触觉腰带向操作者反馈障碍物位置与距离信息。
AI.result: 实验表明，两名非专业操作者在未知环境中依靠触觉反馈成功完成避障协作运输任务。
AI.conclusion: 该触觉反馈模块有效增强了人机协作场景下的环境感知能力，显著提升了运输安全性。

authors_text: Aditya Chattopadhyay,Kwan Ho Ryan Chan,Benjamin D. Haeffele,Donald Geman,René Vidal
title: Variational Information Pursuit for Interpretable Predictions
title_zh: 可解释预测的变分信息追踪
comment: Code is available at https://github.com/ryanchankh/VariationalInformationPursuit
comments: Code is available at https://github.com/ryanchankh/VariationalInformationPursuit
abstract: There is a growing interest in the machine learning community in developing predictive algorithms that are "interpretable by design". Towards this end, recent work proposes to make interpretable decisions by sequentially asking interpretable queries about data until a prediction can be made with high confidence based on the answers obtained (the history). To promote short query-answer chains, a greedy procedure called Information Pursuit (IP) is used, which adaptively chooses queries in order of information gain. Generative models are employed to learn the distribution of query-answers and labels, which is in turn used to estimate the most informative query. However, learning and inference with a full generative model of the data is often intractable for complex tasks. In this work, we propose Variational Information Pursuit (V-IP), a variational characterization of IP which bypasses the need for learning generative models. V-IP is based on finding a query selection strategy and a classifier that minimizes the expected cross-entropy between true and predicted labels. We then demonstrate that the IP strategy is the optimal solution to this problem. Therefore, instead of learning generative models, we can use our optimal strategy to directly pick the most informative query given any history. We then develop a practical algorithm by defining a finite-dimensional parameterization of our strategy and classifier using deep networks and train them end-to-end using our objective. Empirically, V-IP is 10-100x faster than IP on different Vision and NLP tasks with competitive performance. Moreover, V-IP finds much shorter query chains when compared to reinforcement learning which is typically used in sequential-decision-making problems. Finally, we demonstrate the utility of V-IP on challenging tasks like medical diagnosis where the performance is far superior to the generative modelling approach.

Towards this end, recent work proposes to make interpretable decisions by sequentially asking interpretable queries about data until a prediction can be made with high confidence based on the answers obtained (the history). To promote short query-answer chains, a greedy procedure called Information Pursuit (IP) is used, which adaptively chooses queries in order of information gain. Generative models are employed to learn the distribution of query-answers and labels, which is in turn used to estimate the most informative query. However, learning and inference with a full generative model of the data is often intractable for complex tasks. In this work, we propose Variational Information Pursuit (V-IP), a variational characterization of IP which bypasses the need for learning generative models. V-IP is based on finding a query selection strategy and a classifier that minimizes the expected cross-entropy between true and predicted labels. We then demonstrate that the IP strategy is the optimal solution to this problem. Therefore, instead of learning generative models, we can use our optimal strategy to directly pick the most informative query given any history. We then develop a practical algorithm by defining a finite-dimensional parameterization of our strategy and classifier using deep networks and train them end-to-end using our objective. Empirically, V-IP is 10-100x faster than IP on different Vision and NLP tasks with competitive performance. Moreover, V-IP finds much shorter query chains when compared to reinforcement learning which is typically used in sequential-decision-making problems. Finally, we demonstrate the utility of V-IP on challenging tasks like medical diagnosis where the performance is far superior to the generative modelling approach.
abstract_zh: 机器学习社区对开发“可通过设计解释”的预测算法越来越感兴趣。为此，最近的工作提出通过顺序询问有关数据的可解释查询来做出可解释的决策，直到可以根据获得的答案（历史）以高置信度做出预测。为了促进短的查询-答案链，使用了一种称为信息追踪（IP）的贪婪过程，它按照信息增益的顺序自适应地选择查询。生成模型用于学习查询答案和标签的分布，进而用于估计信息最丰富的查询。然而，对于复杂的任务来说，使用完整的数据生成模型进行学习和推理通常很棘手。在这项工作中，我们提出了变分信息追踪（V-IP），这是 IP 的变分表征，它绕过了学习生成模型的需要。 V-IP 基于寻找查询选择策略和分类器，以最小化真实标签和预测标签之间的预期交叉熵。然后我们证明知识产权策略是该问题的最佳解决方案。因此，我们可以使用最优策略直接选择给定任何历史记录的信息最丰富的查询，而不是学习生成模型。然后，我们通过使用深度网络定义策略和分类器的有限维参数化来开发实用算法，并使用我们的目标对它们进行端到端训练。根据经验，V-IP 在不同的 Vision 和 NLP 任务上比 IP 快 10-100 倍，并且性能具有竞争力。此外，与通常用于顺序决策问题的强化学习相比，V-IP 发现查询链要短得多。最后，我们展示了 V-IP 在医学诊断等具有挑战性的任务中的实用性，其性能远远优于生成建模方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为变分信息追寻（V-IP）的方法，用于生成可解释的预测，通过优化查询策略避免使用生成模型。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖生成模型进行可解释决策，但生成模型在复杂任务中难以学习和推理，导致效率低下。
AI.method: V-IP通过变分方法直接优化查询选择策略和分类器，以最小化真实标签与预测标签的交叉熵，无需学习生成模型。
AI.result: V-IP在视觉和NLP任务中比传统方法快10-100倍，且在医疗诊断等任务中性能优于生成模型方法。
AI.conclusion: V-IP为复杂任务提供了高效、可解释的预测框架，克服了生成模型的局限性。

Finally, we demonstrate the utility of V-IP on challenging tasks like medical diagnosis where the performance is far superior to the generative modelling approach. 机器学习社区对开发“可通过设计解释”的预测算法越来越感兴趣。为此，最近的工作提出通过顺序询问有关数据的可解释查询来做出可解释的决策，直到可以根据获得的答案（历史）以高置信度做出预测。为了促进短的查询-答案链，使用了一种称为信息追踪（IP）的贪婪过程，它按照信息增益的顺序自适应地选择查询。生成模型用于学习查询答案和标签的分布，进而用于估计信息最丰富的查询。然而，对于复杂的任务来说，使用完整的数据生成模型进行学习和推理通常很棘手。在这项工作中，我们提出了变分信息追踪（V-IP），这是 IP 的变分表征，它绕过了学习生成模型的需要。 V-IP 基于寻找查询选择策略和分类器，以最小化真实标签和预测标签之间的预期交叉熵。然后我们证明知识产权策略是该问题的最佳解决方案。因此，我们可以使用最优策略直接选择给定任何历史记录的信息最丰富的查询，而不是学习生成模型。然后，我们通过使用深度网络定义策略和分类器的有限维参数化来开发实用算法，并使用我们的目标对它们进行端到端训练。根据经验，V-IP 在不同的 Vision 和 NLP 任务上比 IP 快 10-100 倍，并且性能具有竞争力。此外，与通常用于顺序决策问题的强化学习相比，V-IP 发现查询链要短得多。最后，我们展示了 V-IP 在医学诊断等具有挑战性的任务中的实用性，其性能远远优于生成建模方法。 本文提出了一种名为变分信息追寻（V-IP）的方法，用于生成可解释的预测，通过优化查询策略避免使用生成模型。 Aditya Chattopadhyay,Kwan Ho Ryan Chan,Benjamin D. Haeffele,Donald Geman,René Vidal cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Maksim Kolodiazhnyi,Anna Vorontsova,Anton Konushin,Danila Rukhovich
title: Top-Down Beats Bottom-Up in 3D Instance Segmentation
title_zh: 在 3D 实例分割中，自上而下胜过自下而上
abstract: Most 3D instance segmentation methods exploit a bottom-up strategy, typically including resource-exhaustive post-processing. For point grouping, bottom-up methods rely on prior assumptions about the objects in the form of hyperparameters, which are domain-specific and need to be carefully tuned. On the contrary, we address 3D instance segmentation with a TD3D: the pioneering cluster-free, fully-convolutional and entirely data-driven approach trained in an end-to-end manner. This is the first top-down method outperforming bottom-up approaches in 3D domain. With its straightforward pipeline, it demonstrates outstanding accuracy and generalization ability on the standard indoor benchmarks: ScanNet v2, its extension ScanNet200, and S3DIS, as well as on the aerial STPLS3D dataset. Besides, our method is much faster on inference than the current state-of-the-art grouping-based approaches: our flagship modification is 1.9x faster than the most accurate bottom-up method, while being more accurate, and our faster modification shows state-of-the-art accuracy running at 2.6x speed. Code is available at https://github.com/SamsungLabs/td3d .
summary: Most 3D instance segmentation methods exploit a bottom-up strategy, typically including resource-exhaustive post-processing. For point grouping, bottom-up methods rely on prior assumptions about the objects in the form of hyperparameters, which are domain-specific and need to be carefully tuned. On the contrary, we address 3D instance segmentation with a TD3D: the pioneering cluster-free, fully-convolutional and entirely data-driven approach trained in an end-to-end manner. This is the first top-down method outperforming bottom-up approaches in 3D domain. With its straightforward pipeline, it demonstrates outstanding accuracy and generalization ability on the standard indoor benchmarks: ScanNet v2, its extension ScanNet200, and S3DIS, as well as on the aerial STPLS3D dataset. Besides, our method is much faster on inference than the current state-of-the-art grouping-based approaches: our flagship modification is 1.9x faster than the most accurate bottom-up method, while being more accurate, and our faster modification shows state-of-the-art accuracy running at 2.6x speed. Code is available at https://github.com/SamsungLabs/td3d .
abstract_zh: 大多数 3D 实例分割方法都采用自下而上的策略，通常包括资源耗尽的后处理。对于点分组，自下而上的方法依赖于对超参数形式的对象的先验假设，这些假设是特定于领域的，需要仔细调整。相反，我们使用 TD3D 来解决 3D 实例分割：以端到端方式训练的开创性的无集群、完全卷积和完全数据驱动的方法。这是第一个在 3D 领域优于自下而上方法的自上而下方法。凭借其简单的管道，它在标准室内基准测试（ScanNet v2、其扩展 ScanNet200 和 S3DIS）以及航空 STPLS3D 数据集上展示了出色的准确性和泛化能力。此外，我们的方法在推理上比当前最先进的基于分组的方法要快得多：我们的旗舰修改比最准确的自下而上方法快 1.9 倍，同时更准确，并且我们更快的修改显示以 2.6 倍的速度运行的最先进的准确性。代码可在 https://github.com/SamsungLabs/td3d 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种全新的自上而下的3D实例分割方法TD3D，突破了传统自下而上方法的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有3D实例分割方法多采用自下而上策略，依赖领域特定的超参数且需耗时后处理，存在泛化能力差和效率低的问题。
AI.method: 开发了首个端到端训练的无聚类、全卷积且完全数据驱动的TD3D框架，通过自上而下架构直接生成实例分割结果。
AI.result: 在ScanNetv2/ScanNet200/S3DIS/STPLS3D等基准测试中精度超越现有方法，推理速度较最优自下而上方法提升1.9倍且保持更高精度。
AI.conclusion: 自上而下方法在3D实例分割任务中可同时实现更优精度与效率，为该领域提供新研究范式。

authors_text: Michael Kirchhof,Enkelejda Kasneci,Seong Joon Oh
title: Probabilistic Contrastive Learning Recovers the Correct Aleatoric Uncertainty of Ambiguous Inputs
title_zh: 概率对比学习恢复模糊输入的正确任意不确定性
comment: Accepted at ICML 2023
comments: Accepted at ICML 2023
abstract: Contrastively trained encoders have recently been proven to invert the data-generating process: they encode each input, e.g., an image, into the true latent vector that generated the image (Zimmermann et al., 2021). However, real-world observations often have inherent ambiguities. For instance, images may be blurred or only show a 2D view of a 3D object, so multiple latents could have generated them. This makes the true posterior for the latent vector probabilistic with heteroscedastic uncertainty. In this setup, we extend the common InfoNCE objective and encoders to predict latent distributions instead of points. We prove that these distributions recover the correct posteriors of the data-generating process, including its level of aleatoric uncertainty, up to a rotation of the latent space. In addition to providing calibrated uncertainty estimates, these posteriors allow the computation of credible intervals in image retrieval. They comprise images with the same latent as a given query, subject to its uncertainty. Code is available at https://github.com/mkirchhof/Probabilistic_Contrastive_Learning
summary: Contrastively trained encoders have recently been proven to invert the data-generating process: they encode each input, e.g., an image, into the true latent vector that generated the image (Zimmermann et al., 2021). However, real-world observations often have inherent ambiguities. For instance, images may be blurred or only show a 2D view of a 3D object, so multiple latents could have generated them. This makes the true posterior for the latent vector probabilistic with heteroscedastic uncertainty. In this setup, we extend the common InfoNCE objective and encoders to predict latent distributions instead of points. We prove that these distributions recover the correct posteriors of the data-generating process, including its level of aleatoric uncertainty, up to a rotation of the latent space. In addition to providing calibrated uncertainty estimates, these posteriors allow the computation of credible intervals in image retrieval. They comprise images with the same latent as a given query, subject to its uncertainty. Code is available at https://github.com/mkirchhof/Probabilistic_Contrastive_Learning
abstract_zh: 最近证明，经过对比训练的编码器可以反转数据生成过程：它们将每个输入（例如图像）编码为生成图像的真实潜在向量（Zimmermann 等人，2021）。然而，现实世界的观察往往存在固有的模糊性。例如，图像可能会模糊或仅显示 3D 对象的 2D 视图，因此可能有多个潜在变量生成它们。这使得潜在向量的真实后验概率具有异方差不确定性。在此设置中，我们扩展了常见的 InfoNCE 目标和编码器来预测潜在分布而不是点。我们证明这些分布可以恢复数据生成过程的正确后验，包括其任意不确定性水平，直至潜在空间的旋转。除了提供校准的不确定性估计之外，这些后验还允许计算图像检索中的可信区间。它们包含与给定查询具有相同潜伏的图像，但受其不确定性的影响。代码可在 https://github.com/mkirchhof/Probabilistic_Contrastive_Learning 获取

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种概率对比学习方法，用于从模糊或具有歧义性的输入中恢复正确的先验不确定性。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中的观测数据常存在固有歧义性（如模糊图像或2D视角的3D物体），导致潜在变量的真实后验分布具有异方差不确定性，传统对比学习无法有效建模这种不确定性。
AI.method: 扩展InfoNCE目标函数与编码器，使其预测潜在变量的分布而非单一值，并证明该分布可恢复数据生成过程的真实后验分布（包括似然不确定性），且对潜在空间旋转具有鲁棒性。
AI.result: 方法实现了校准的不确定性估计，并支持基于可信区间的图像检索（返回与查询具有相同潜在变量且符合其不确定性的图像）。
AI.conclusion: 概率对比学习能有效建模模糊输入的先验不确定性，为图像检索等任务提供更可靠的不确定性感知框架。

authors_text: Danila Rukhovich,Anna Vorontsova,Anton Konushin
title: TR3D: Towards Real-Time Indoor 3D Object Detection
title_zh: TR3D：迈向实时室内 3D 物体检测
abstract: Recently, sparse 3D convolutions have changed 3D object detection. Performing on par with the voting-based approaches, 3D CNNs are memory-efficient and scale to large scenes better. However, there is still room for improvement. With a conscious, practice-oriented approach to problem-solving, we analyze the performance of such methods and localize the weaknesses. Applying modifications that resolve the found issues one by one, we end up with TR3D: a fast fully-convolutional 3D object detection model trained end-to-end, that achieves state-of-the-art results on the standard benchmarks, ScanNet v2, SUN RGB-D, and S3DIS. Moreover, to take advantage of both point cloud and RGB inputs, we introduce an early fusion of 2D and 3D features. We employ our fusion module to make conventional 3D object detection methods multimodal and demonstrate an impressive boost in performance. Our model with early feature fusion, which we refer to as TR3D+FF, outperforms existing 3D object detection approaches on the SUN RGB-D dataset. Overall, besides being accurate, both TR3D and TR3D+FF models are lightweight, memory-efficient, and fast, thereby marking another milestone on the way toward real-time 3D object detection. Code is available at https://github.com/SamsungLabs/tr3d .
summary: Recently, sparse 3D convolutions have changed 3D object detection. Performing on par with the voting-based approaches, 3D CNNs are memory-efficient and scale to large scenes better. However, there is still room for improvement. With a conscious, practice-oriented approach to problem-solving, we analyze the performance of such methods and localize the weaknesses. Applying modifications that resolve the found issues one by one, we end up with TR3D: a fast fully-convolutional 3D object detection model trained end-to-end, that achieves state-of-the-art results on the standard benchmarks, ScanNet v2, SUN RGB-D, and S3DIS. Moreover, to take advantage of both point cloud and RGB inputs, we introduce an early fusion of 2D and 3D features. We employ our fusion module to make conventional 3D object detection methods multimodal and demonstrate an impressive boost in performance. Our model with early feature fusion, which we refer to as TR3D+FF, outperforms existing 3D object detection approaches on the SUN RGB-D dataset. Overall, besides being accurate, both TR3D and TR3D+FF models are lightweight, memory-efficient, and fast, thereby marking another milestone on the way toward real-time 3D object detection. Code is available at https://github.com/SamsungLabs/tr3d .
abstract_zh: 最近，稀疏 3D 卷积改变了 3D 对象检测。 3D CNN 的性能与基于投票的方法相当，内存效率高，并且可以更好地扩展到大型场景。然而，仍有改进的空间。通过有意识的、以实践为导向的解决问题的方法，我们分析这些方法的性能并找出弱点。通过应用修改一一解决所发现的问题，我们最终得到了 TR3D：一种经过端到端训练的快速全卷积 3D 对象检测模型，它在标准基准、ScanNet v2、SUN RGB-D 和 S3DIS 上取得了最先进的结果。此外，为了同时利用点云和 RGB 输入，我们引入了 2D 和 3D 特征的早期融合。我们采用融合模块使传统的 3D 物体检测方法成为多模态，并展示了令人印象深刻的性能提升。我们的具有早期特征融合的模型（我们称之为 TR3D+FF）优于 SUN RGB-D 数据集上现有的 3D 对象检测方法。总体而言，TR3D 和 TR3D+FF 模型除了准确之外，还具有轻量级、内存高效且快速的特点，从而标志着实时 3D 物体检测之路上的另一个里程碑。代码可在 https://github.com/SamsungLabs/tr3d 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TR3D，一种高效的室内3D目标检测模型，并通过多模态特征融合进一步提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有3D卷积方法在内存效率和大场景扩展性上仍有不足，需针对性优化以实现实时检测。
AI.method: 分析3D检测方法弱点并逐项改进，设计轻量级全卷积模型TR3D；引入2D/3D早期特征融合模块（TR3D+FF）实现多模态输入。
AI.result: 在ScanNet v2、SUN RGB-D和S3DIS数据集上达到SOTA，TR3D+FF在SUN RGB-D提升显著，模型兼具轻量、高效特性。
AI.conclusion: TR3D系列模型在精度与效率间取得平衡，为实时3D目标检测提供新方案并开源代码。

authors_text: Carles Cantero,Olivier Absil,Carl-Henrik Dahlqvist,Marc Van Droogenbroeck
title: NA-SODINN: a deep learning algorithm for exoplanet image detection based on residual noise regimes
title_zh: NA-SODINN：一种基于残余噪声机制的系外行星图像检测深度学习算法
comment: A&A in press
comments: A&A in press
abstract: Supervised deep learning was recently introduced in high-contrast imaging (HCI) through the SODINN algorithm, a convolutional neural network designed for exoplanet detection in angular differential imaging (ADI) datasets. The benchmarking of HCI algorithms within the Exoplanet Imaging Data Challenge (EIDC) showed that (i) SODINN can produce a high number of false positives in the final detection maps, and (ii) algorithms processing images in a more local manner perform better. This work aims to improve the SODINN detection performance by introducing new local processing approaches and adapting its learning process accordingly. We propose NA-SODINN, a new deep learning binary classifier based on a convolutional neural network (CNN) that better captures image noise correlations in ADI-processed frames by identifying noise regimes. Our new approach was tested against its predecessor, as well as two SODINN-based hybrid models and a more standard annular-PCA approach, through local receiving operating characteristics (ROC) analysis of ADI sequences from the VLT/SPHERE and Keck/NIRC-2 instruments. Results show that NA-SODINN enhances SODINN in both sensitivity and specificity, especially in the speckle-dominated noise regime. NA-SODINN is also benchmarked against the complete set of submitted detection algorithms in EIDC, in which we show that its final detection score matches or outperforms the most powerful detection algorithms.Throughout the supervised machine learning case, this study illustrates and reinforces the importance of adapting the task of detection to the local content of processed images.
summary: Supervised deep learning was recently introduced in high-contrast imaging (HCI) through the SODINN algorithm, a convolutional neural network designed for exoplanet detection in angular differential imaging (ADI) datasets. The benchmarking of HCI algorithms within the Exoplanet Imaging Data Challenge (EIDC) showed that (i) SODINN can produce a high number of false positives in the final detection maps, and (ii) algorithms processing images in a more local manner perform better. This work aims to improve the SODINN detection performance by introducing new local processing approaches and adapting its learning process accordingly. We propose NA-SODINN, a new deep learning binary classifier based on a convolutional neural network (CNN) that better captures image noise correlations in ADI-processed frames by identifying noise regimes. Our new approach was tested against its predecessor, as well as two SODINN-based hybrid models and a more standard annular-PCA approach, through local receiving operating characteristics (ROC) analysis of ADI sequences from the VLT/SPHERE and Keck/NIRC-2 instruments. Results show that NA-SODINN enhances SODINN in both sensitivity and specificity, especially in the speckle-dominated noise regime. NA-SODINN is also benchmarked against the complete set of submitted detection algorithms in EIDC, in which we show that its final detection score matches or outperforms the most powerful detection algorithms.Throughout the supervised machine learning case, this study illustrates and reinforces the importance of adapting the task of detection to the local content of processed images.
abstract_zh: 最近通过 SODINN 算法在高对比度成像 (HCI) 中引入了监督式深度学习，SODINN 算法是一种卷积神经网络，专为角度差分成像 (ADI) 数据集中的系外行星检测而设计。系外行星成像数据挑战赛 (EIDC) 中的 HCI 算法基准测试表明，(i) SODINN 可以在最终检测图中产生大量误报，(ii) 以更本地化的方式处理图像的算法表现更好。这项工作旨在通过引入新的本地处理方法并相应地调整其学习过程来提高 SODINN 检测性能。我们提出了 NA-SODINN，这是一种基于卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的新型深度学习二元分类器，可通过识别噪声状况更好地捕获 ADI 处理帧中的图像噪声相关性。通过对来自 VLT/SPHERE 和 Keck/NIRC-2 仪器的 ADI 序列进行本地接收操作特性 (ROC) 分析，我们的新方法针对其前身以及两个基于 SODINN 的混合模型和更标准的环形 PCA 方法进行了测试。结果表明，NA-SODINN 增强了 SODINN 的灵敏度和特异性，特别是在散斑主导的噪声区域。 NA-SODINN 还针对 EIDC 中提交的完整检测算法集进行了基准测试，其中我们表明其最终检测分数匹配或优于最强大的检测算法。通过监督机器学习案例，本研究说明并强调了使检测任务适应处理图像的局部内容的重要性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出NA-SODINN算法，通过改进残差噪声 regime 的局部处理方法，提升基于高对比度成像的系外行星图像检测性能。
AI.motivation: 原有SODINN算法存在误报率高、局部处理效果差的问题，且实验表明局部处理方法在高对比度成像中表现更优。
AI.method: 设计基于卷积神经网络的二分类器NA-SODINN，通过识别ADI图像的噪声 regime 并采用局部ROC分析进行模型评估，与SODINN变体及annular-PCA方法对比验证。
AI.result: NA-SODINN在灵敏度和特异性上优于SODINN，尤其在speckle噪声主导区域表现突出，并在EIDC挑战赛中达到或超越现有最佳算法水平。
AI.conclusion: 检测任务需适配图像局部内容，噪声 regime 分析对提升高对比度成像中的系外行星检测效果具有关键作用。

authors_text: Yikang Liu,Eric Z. Chen,Xiao Chen,Terrence Chen,Shanhui Sun
title: An Unsupervised Framework for Joint MRI Super Resolution and Gibbs Artifact Removal
title_zh: 联合 MRI 超分辨率和吉布斯伪影去除的无监督框架
comment: Accepted by the 28th biennial international conference on Information Processing in Medical Imaging (IPMI 2023)
comments: Accepted by the 28th biennial international conference on Information Processing in Medical Imaging (IPMI 2023)
abstract: The k-space data generated from magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) is only a finite sampling of underlying signals. Therefore, MRI images often suffer from low spatial resolution and Gibbs ringing artifacts. Previous studies tackled these two problems separately, where super resolution methods tend to enhance Gibbs artifacts, whereas Gibbs ringing removal methods tend to blur the images. It is also a challenge that high resolution ground truth is hard to obtain in clinical MRI. In this paper, we propose an unsupervised learning framework for both MRI super resolution and Gibbs artifacts removal without using high resolution ground truth. Furthermore, we propose regularization methods to improve the model's generalizability across out-of-distribution MRI images. We evaluated our proposed methods with other state-of-the-art methods on eight MRI datasets with various contrasts and anatomical structures. Our method not only achieves the best SR performance but also significantly reduces the Gibbs artifacts. Our method also demonstrates good generalizability across different datasets, which is beneficial to clinical applications where training data are usually scarce and biased.
summary: The k-space data generated from magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) is only a finite sampling of underlying signals. Therefore, MRI images often suffer from low spatial resolution and Gibbs ringing artifacts. Previous studies tackled these two problems separately, where super resolution methods tend to enhance Gibbs artifacts, whereas Gibbs ringing removal methods tend to blur the images. It is also a challenge that high resolution ground truth is hard to obtain in clinical MRI. In this paper, we propose an unsupervised learning framework for both MRI super resolution and Gibbs artifacts removal without using high resolution ground truth. Furthermore, we propose regularization methods to improve the model's generalizability across out-of-distribution MRI images. We evaluated our proposed methods with other state-of-the-art methods on eight MRI datasets with various contrasts and anatomical structures. Our method not only achieves the best SR performance but also significantly reduces the Gibbs artifacts. Our method also demonstrates good generalizability across different datasets, which is beneficial to clinical applications where training data are usually scarce and biased.
abstract_zh: 磁共振成像 (MRI) 生成的 k 空间数据只是基础信号的有限采样。因此，MRI 图像经常出现空间分辨率低和吉布斯振铃伪影的问题。先前的研究分别解决了这两个问题，其中超分辨率方法往往会增强吉布斯伪影，而吉布斯振铃去除方法往往会模糊图像。临床MRI中很难获得高分辨率的真实情况也是一个挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种无监督学习框架，用于 MRI 超分辨率和吉布斯伪影去除，而不使用高分辨率地面事实。此外，我们提出了正则化方法来提高模型在分布外 MRI 图像中的泛化能力。我们在具有不同对比度和解剖结构的八个 MRI 数据集上使用其他最先进的方法评估了我们提出的方法。我们的方法不仅实现了最佳的 SR 性能，而且还显着减少了吉布斯伪影。我们的方法还表现出跨不同数据集的良好通用性，这有利于训练数据通常稀缺且存在偏差的临床应用。

AI.tldr: 提出一种无需高分辨率真实数据的无监督框架，同时解决MRI超分辨率和吉布斯伪影去除问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法分别处理MRI超分辨率和吉布斯伪影去除，但存在相互矛盾（如超分辨率增强伪影，去伪影导致模糊），且临床中缺乏高分辨率真实数据，需更通用的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计无监督学习框架联合优化超分辨率与伪影去除，并引入正则化方法提升模型在不同数据集上的泛化能力。
AI.result: 在八个不同MRI数据集上，方法在超分辨率和伪影去除效果均优于现有方法，且具有良好的跨数据集泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了MRI超分辨率与伪影去除的联合问题，具有良好的泛化性，适用于临床数据稀缺的场景。
