search_text: An Unsupervised Framework for Joint MRI Super Resolution and Gibbs Artifact Removal 联合 MRI 超分辨率和吉布斯伪影去除的无监督框架 The k-space data generated from magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) is only a finite sampling of underlying signals. Therefore, MRI images often suffer from low spatial resolution and Gibbs ringing artifacts. Previous studies tackled these two problems separately, where super resolution methods tend to enhance Gibbs artifacts, whereas Gibbs ringing removal methods tend to blur the images. It is also a challenge that high resolution ground truth is hard to obtain in clinical MRI. In this paper, we propose an unsupervised learning framework for both MRI super resolution and Gibbs artifacts removal without using high resolution ground truth. Furthermore, we propose regularization methods to improve the model's generalizability across out-of-distribution MRI images. We evaluated our proposed methods with other state-of-the-art methods on eight MRI datasets with various contrasts and anatomical structures. Our method not only achieves the best SR performance but also significantly reduces the Gibbs artifacts. Our method also demonstrates good generalizability across different datasets, which is beneficial to clinical applications where training data are usually scarce and biased. 磁共振成像 (MRI) 生成的 k 空间数据只是基础信号的有限采样。因此，MRI 图像经常出现空间分辨率低和吉布斯振铃伪影的问题。先前的研究分别解决了这两个问题，其中超分辨率方法往往会增强吉布斯伪影，而吉布斯振铃去除方法往往会模糊图像。临床MRI中很难获得高分辨率的真实情况也是一个挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种无监督学习框架，用于 MRI 超分辨率和吉布斯伪影去除，而不使用高分辨率地面事实。此外，我们提出了正则化方法来提高模型在分布外 MRI 图像中的泛化能力。我们在具有不同对比度和解剖结构的八个 MRI 数据集上使用其他最先进的方法评估了我们提出的方法。我们的方法不仅实现了最佳的 SR 性能，而且还显着减少了吉布斯伪影。我们的方法还表现出跨不同数据集的良好通用性，这有利于训练数据通常稀缺且存在偏差的临床应用。 提出一种无需高分辨率真实数据的无监督框架，同时解决MRI超分辨率和吉布斯伪影去除问题。 Yikang Liu,Eric Z. Chen,Xiao Chen,Terrence Chen,Shanhui Sun eess.IV,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Amirhossein Hajavi,Ali Etemad
title: Audio Representation Learning by Distilling Video as Privileged Information
title_zh: 通过将视频提取为特权信息来进行音频表示学习
abstract: Deep audio representation learning using multi-modal audio-visual data often leads to a better performance compared to uni-modal approaches. However, in real-world scenarios both modalities are not always available at the time of inference, leading to performance degradation by models trained for multi-modal inference. In this work, we propose a novel approach for deep audio representation learning using audio-visual data when the video modality is absent at inference. For this purpose, we adopt teacher-student knowledge distillation under the framework of learning using privileged information (LUPI). While the previous methods proposed for LUPI use soft-labels generated by the teacher, in our proposed method we use embeddings learned by the teacher to train the student network. We integrate our method in two different settings: sequential data where the features are divided into multiple segments throughout time, and non-sequential data where the entire features are treated as one whole segment. In the non-sequential setting both the teacher and student networks are comprised of an encoder component and a task header. We use the embeddings produced by the encoder component of the teacher to train the encoder of the student, while the task header of the student is trained using ground-truth labels. In the sequential setting, the networks have an additional aggregation component that is placed between the encoder and task header. We use two sets of embeddings produced by the encoder and aggregation component of the teacher to train the student. Similar to the non-sequential setting, the task header of the student network is trained using ground-truth labels. We test our framework on two different audio-visual tasks, namely speaker recognition and speech emotion recognition and show considerable improvements over sole audio-based recognition as well as prior works that use LUPI.
summary: Deep audio representation learning using multi-modal audio-visual data often leads to a better performance compared to uni-modal approaches. However, in real-world scenarios both modalities are not always available at the time of inference, leading to performance degradation by models trained for multi-modal inference. In this work, we propose a novel approach for deep audio representation learning using audio-visual data when the video modality is absent at inference. For this purpose, we adopt teacher-student knowledge distillation under the framework of learning using privileged information (LUPI). While the previous methods proposed for LUPI use soft-labels generated by the teacher, in our proposed method we use embeddings learned by the teacher to train the student network. We integrate our method in two different settings: sequential data where the features are divided into multiple segments throughout time, and non-sequential data where the entire features are treated as one whole segment. In the non-sequential setting both the teacher and student networks are comprised of an encoder component and a task header. We use the embeddings produced by the encoder component of the teacher to train the encoder of the student, while the task header of the student is trained using ground-truth labels. In the sequential setting, the networks have an additional aggregation component that is placed between the encoder and task header. We use two sets of embeddings produced by the encoder and aggregation component of the teacher to train the student. Similar to the non-sequential setting, the task header of the student network is trained using ground-truth labels. We test our framework on two different audio-visual tasks, namely speaker recognition and speech emotion recognition and show considerable improvements over sole audio-based recognition as well as prior works that use LUPI.
abstract_zh: 与单模态方法相比，使用多模态视听数据的深度音频表示学习通常会带来更好的性能。然而，在现实场景中，两种模态在推理时并不总是可用，导致多模态推理训练的模型性能下降。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种在推理时不存在视频模态时使用视听数据进行深度音频表示学习的新方法。为此，我们在使用特权信息学习（LUPI）的框架下采用师生知识蒸馏。虽然之前为 LUPI 提出的方法使用教师生成的软标签，但在我们提出的方法中，我们使用教师学习的嵌入来训练学生网络。我们将我们的方法集成到两种不同的设置中：顺序数据，其中特征在整个时间内被分为多个片段，以及非顺序数据，其中整个特征被视为一个完整的片段。在非序列设置中，教师和学生网络均由编码器组件和任务头组成。我们使用教师的编码器组件生成的嵌入来训练学生的编码器，而学生的任务标题则使用真实标签进行训练。在顺序设置中，网络有一个额外的聚合组件，放置在编码器和任务头之间。我们使用教师的编码器和聚合组件生成的两组嵌入来训练学生。与非序列设置类似，学生网络的任务标题是使用真实标签进行训练的。我们在两种不同的视听任务（即说话人识别和语音情感识别）上测试了我们的框架，并显示出相对于单一基于音频的识别以及使用 LUPI 的先前工作的显着改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用视频作为特权信息进行音频表征学习的方法，即使在推理时没有视频数据也能提升音频模型性能。
AI.motivation: 多模态音频-视频模型在实际应用中因推理时可能缺失视频模态而性能下降，需开发无需视频即可保持性能的音频表征学习方法。
AI.method: 基于特权信息学习框架（LUPI），采用教师-学生知识蒸馏：教师网络利用音频-视频数据生成嵌入，学生网络仅用音频数据训练。分别针对非时序和时序数据设计两种结构，通过教师网络的编码器或聚合组件嵌入指导学生网络训练。
AI.result: 在说话人识别和语音情感识别任务中，该方法相比纯音频模型及现有LUPI方法均取得显著性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过视频特权信息蒸馏可有效增强音频表征能力，且方法适用于时序与非时序数据场景，为多模态迁移学习提供新思路。

authors_text: Leonid Erlygin,Vladimir Zholobov,Valeriia Baklanova,Evgeny Sokolovskiy,Alexey Zaytsev
title: Surrogate uncertainty estimation for your time series forecasting black-box: learn when to trust
title_zh: 时间序列预测黑匣子的替代不确定性估计：了解何时信任
abstract: Machine learning models play a vital role in time series forecasting. These models, however, often overlook an important element: point uncertainty estimates. Incorporating these estimates is crucial for effective risk management, informed model selection, and decision-making.To address this issue, our research introduces a method for uncertainty estimation. We employ a surrogate Gaussian process regression model. It enhances any base regression model with reasonable uncertainty estimates. This approach stands out for its computational efficiency. It only necessitates training one supplementary surrogate and avoids any data-specific assumptions. Furthermore, this method for work requires only the presence of the base model as a black box and its respective training data. The effectiveness of our approach is supported by experimental results. Using various time-series forecasting data, we found that our surrogate model-based technique delivers significantly more accurate confidence intervals. These techniques outperform both bootstrap-based and built-in methods in a medium-data regime. This superiority holds across a range of base model types, including a linear regression, ARIMA, gradient boosting and a neural network.
summary: Machine learning models play a vital role in time series forecasting. These models, however, often overlook an important element: point uncertainty estimates. Incorporating these estimates is crucial for effective risk management, informed model selection, and decision-making.To address this issue, our research introduces a method for uncertainty estimation. We employ a surrogate Gaussian process regression model. It enhances any base regression model with reasonable uncertainty estimates. This approach stands out for its computational efficiency. It only necessitates training one supplementary surrogate and avoids any data-specific assumptions. Furthermore, this method for work requires only the presence of the base model as a black box and its respective training data. The effectiveness of our approach is supported by experimental results. Using various time-series forecasting data, we found that our surrogate model-based technique delivers significantly more accurate confidence intervals. These techniques outperform both bootstrap-based and built-in methods in a medium-data regime. This superiority holds across a range of base model types, including a linear regression, ARIMA, gradient boosting and a neural network.
abstract_zh: 机器学习模型在时间序列预测中发挥着至关重要的作用。然而，这些模型常常忽略一个重要因素：点不确定性估计。纳入这些估计对于有效的风险管理、明智的模型选择和决策至关重要。为了解决这个问题，我们的研究引入了一种不确定性估计方法。我们采用替代高斯过程回归模型。它通过合理的不确定性估计增强了任何基本回归模型。这种方法因其计算效率而脱颖而出。它只需要训练一个补充代理，并避免任何特定于数据的假设。此外，这种工作方法只需要存在作为黑盒的基本模型及其各自的训练数据。我们的方法的有效性得到了实验结果的支持。使用各种时间序列预测数据，我们发现基于代理模型的技术可提供更加准确的置信区间。这些技术在中等数据状态下的性能优于基于引导的方法和内置方法。这种优势适用于一系列基本模型类型，包括线性回归、ARIMA、梯度提升和神经网络。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于代理高斯过程回归模型的方法，为时间序列预测的黑盒模型提供合理的不确定性估计。
AI.motivation: 现有时间序列预测模型常忽略点不确定性估计，而这对风险管理、模型选择和决策至关重要。传统方法存在计算效率低或依赖数据假设等问题。
AI.method: 通过训练一个补充的代理高斯过程回归模型，无需访问黑盒模型内部结构或做出数据特定假设，仅需基础模型预测结果及训练数据即可生成不确定性估计。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在中等数据规模下生成的置信区间准确性显著优于Bootstrap方法和内置方法，且在多种基础模型（线性回归、ARIMA、梯度提升、神经网络）上均表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为时间序列预测提供了高效、通用的不确定性估计方案，可增强模型可信度评估与决策可靠性。

search_text: Surrogate uncertainty estimation for your time series forecasting black-box: learn when to trust 时间序列预测黑匣子的替代不确定性估计：了解何时信任 Machine learning models play a vital role in time series forecasting. These models, however, often overlook an important element: point uncertainty estimates. Incorporating these estimates is crucial for effective risk management, informed model selection, and decision-making.To address this issue, our research introduces a method for uncertainty estimation. We employ a surrogate Gaussian process regression model. It enhances any base regression model with reasonable uncertainty estimates. This approach stands out for its computational efficiency. It only necessitates training one supplementary surrogate and avoids any data-specific assumptions. Furthermore, this method for work requires only the presence of the base model as a black box and its respective training data. The effectiveness of our approach is supported by experimental results. Using various time-series forecasting data, we found that our surrogate model-based technique delivers significantly more accurate confidence intervals. These techniques outperform both bootstrap-based and built-in methods in a medium-data regime. This superiority holds across a range of base model types, including a linear regression, ARIMA, gradient boosting and a neural network. 机器学习模型在时间序列预测中发挥着至关重要的作用。然而，这些模型常常忽略一个重要因素：点不确定性估计。纳入这些估计对于有效的风险管理、明智的模型选择和决策至关重要。为了解决这个问题，我们的研究引入了一种不确定性估计方法。我们采用替代高斯过程回归模型。它通过合理的不确定性估计增强了任何基本回归模型。这种方法因其计算效率而脱颖而出。它只需要训练一个补充代理，并避免任何特定于数据的假设。此外，这种工作方法只需要存在作为黑盒的基本模型及其各自的训练数据。我们的方法的有效性得到了实验结果的支持。使用各种时间序列预测数据，我们发现基于代理模型的技术可提供更加准确的置信区间。这些技术在中等数据状态下的性能优于基于引导的方法和内置方法。这种优势适用于一系列基本模型类型，包括线性回归、ARIMA、梯度提升和神经网络。 本文提出一种基于代理高斯过程回归模型的方法，为时间序列预测的黑盒模型提供合理的不确定性估计。 Leonid Erlygin,Vladimir Zholobov,Valeriia Baklanova,Evgeny Sokolovskiy,Alexey Zaytsev cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Bernd Dudzik,Joost Broekens
title: A Valid Self-Report is Never Late, Nor is it Early: On Considering the "Right" Temporal Distance for Assessing Emotional Experience
title_zh: 有效的自我报告永远不会迟到，也不会过早：关于评估情感体验的“正确”时间距离
comment: Presented at Momentary Emotion Elicitation and Capture Workshop (MEEC 21), May 9, 2021, Yokohama, Japan
comments: Presented at Momentary Emotion Elicitation and Capture Workshop (MEEC 21), May 9, 2021, Yokohama, Japan
abstract: Developing computational models for automatic affect prediction requires valid self-reports about individuals' emotional interpretations of stimuli. In this article, we highlight the important influence of the temporal distance between a stimulus event and the moment when its experience is reported on the provided information's validity. This influence stems from the time-dependent and time-demanding nature of the involved cognitive processes. As such, reports can be collected too late: forgetting is a widely acknowledged challenge for accurate descriptions of past experience. For this reason, methods striving for assessment as early as possible have become increasingly popular. However, here we argue that collection may also occur too early: descriptions about very recent stimuli might be collected before emotional processing has fully converged. Based on these notions, we champion the existence of a temporal distance for each type of stimulus that maximizes the validity of self-reports -- a "right" time. Consequently, we recommend future research to (1) consciously consider the potential influence of temporal distance on affective self-reports when planning data collection, (2) document the temporal distance of affective self-reports wherever possible as part of corpora for computational modelling, and finally (3) and explore the effect of temporal distance on self-reports across different types of stimuli.
summary: Developing computational models for automatic affect prediction requires valid self-reports about individuals' emotional interpretations of stimuli. In this article, we highlight the important influence of the temporal distance between a stimulus event and the moment when its experience is reported on the provided information's validity. This influence stems from the time-dependent and time-demanding nature of the involved cognitive processes. As such, reports can be collected too late: forgetting is a widely acknowledged challenge for accurate descriptions of past experience. For this reason, methods striving for assessment as early as possible have become increasingly popular. However, here we argue that collection may also occur too early: descriptions about very recent stimuli might be collected before emotional processing has fully converged. Based on these notions, we champion the existence of a temporal distance for each type of stimulus that maximizes the validity of self-reports -- a "right" time. Consequently, we recommend future research to (1) consciously consider the potential influence of temporal distance on affective self-reports when planning data collection, (2) document the temporal distance of affective self-reports wherever possible as part of corpora for computational modelling, and finally (3) and explore the effect of temporal distance on self-reports across different types of stimuli.
abstract_zh: 开发自动情感预测的计算模型需要有关个人对刺激的情感解释的有效自我报告。在本文中，我们强调刺激事件与报告其经历的时刻之间的时间距离对所提供信息的有效性的重要影响。这种影响源于所涉及的认知过程的时间依赖性和时间要求性。因此，报告可能收集得太晚：遗忘是准确描述过去经验的一个广泛公认的挑战。因此，争取尽早评估的方法变得越来越流行。然而，在这里我们认为收集也可能发生得太早：关于最近刺激的描述可能会在情绪处理完全收敛之前收集。基于这些概念，我们主张每种类型的刺激都存在一个时间距离，可以最大限度地提高自我报告的有效性——一个“正确的”时间。因此，我们建议未来的研究（1）在计划数据收集时有意识地考虑时间距离对情感自我报告的潜在影响，（2）尽可能记录情感自我报告的时间距离，作为计算建模语料库的一部分，最后（3）探索时间距离对不同类型刺激的自我报告的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在情感体验评估中，自我报告的最佳时间距离问题，以提高数据的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注尽早收集情感数据以避免遗忘，但过早报告可能导致情感处理未完成，因此需确定最佳时间距离。
AI.method: 通过理论分析和对现有研究的回顾，讨论时间距离对自我报告有效性的影响，并提出未来研究方向。
AI.result: 提出存在针对不同刺激类型的‘最佳时间距离’假设，建议未来研究验证该假设并探索其影响。
AI.conclusion: 呼吁在情感数据收集时需明确考虑时间距离因素，并将其作为计算模型的重要参数进行记录与研究。

authors_text: Yutao Cui,Cheng Jiang,Gangshan Wu,Limin Wang
title: MixFormer: End-to-End Tracking with Iterative Mixed Attention
title_zh: MixFormer：具有迭代混合注意力的端到端跟踪
comment: Extended version of the paper arXiv:2203.11082 presented at CVPR 2022. In particular, the extented MixViT-L achieves AUC score of 73.3% on LaSOT. Besides, we design a new TrackMAE pre-training method for tracking Code has been released
comments: Extended version of the paper arXiv:2203.11082 presented at CVPR 2022. In particular, the extented MixViT-L achieves AUC score of 73.3% on LaSOT. Besides, we design a new TrackMAE pre-training method for tracking Code has been released
abstract: Visual object tracking often employs a multi-stage pipeline of feature extraction, target information integration, and bounding box estimation. To simplify this pipeline and unify the process of feature extraction and target information integration, in this paper, we present a compact tracking framework, termed as MixFormer, built upon transformers. Our core design is to utilize the flexibility of attention operations, and propose a Mixed Attention Module (MAM) for simultaneous feature extraction and target information integration. This synchronous modeling scheme allows to extract target-specific discriminative features and perform extensive communication between target and search area. Based on MAM, we build our MixFormer trackers simply by stacking multiple MAMs and placing a localization head on top. Specifically, we instantiate two types of MixFormer trackers, a hierarchical tracker MixCvT, and a non-hierarchical tracker MixViT. For these two trackers, we investigate a series of pre-training methods and uncover the different behaviors between supervised pre-training and self-supervised pre-training in our MixFormer trackers. We also extend the masked pre-training to our MixFormer trackers and design the competitive TrackMAE pre-training technique. Finally, to handle multiple target templates during online tracking, we devise an asymmetric attention scheme in MAM to reduce computational cost, and propose an effective score prediction module to select high-quality templates. Our MixFormer trackers set a new state-of-the-art performance on seven tracking benchmarks, including LaSOT, TrackingNet, VOT2020, GOT-10k, OTB100 and UAV123. In particular, our MixViT-L achieves AUC score of 73.3% on LaSOT, 86.1% on TrackingNet, EAO of 0.584 on VOT2020, and AO of 75.7% on GOT-10k. Code and trained models are publicly available at https://github.com/MCG-NJU/MixFormer.

In particular, our MixViT-L achieves AUC score of 73.3% on LaSOT, 86.1% on TrackingNet, EAO of 0.584 on VOT2020, and AO of 75.7% on GOT-10k. Code and trained models are publicly available at https://github.com/MCG-NJU/MixFormer.
abstract_zh: 视觉对象跟踪通常采用特征提取、目标信息集成和边界框估计的多级流程。为了简化这个流程并统一特征提取和目标信息集成的过程，在本文中，我们提出了一个基于 Transformer 的紧凑跟踪框架，称为 MixFormer。我们的核心设计是利用注意力操作的灵活性，提出一种混合注意力模块（MAM），用于同时进行特征提取和目标信息集成。这种同步建模方案允许提取特定于目标的判别特征，并在目标和搜索区域之间进行广泛的通信。基于 MAM，我们只需堆叠多个 MAM 并在顶部放置一个定位头即可构建 MixFormer 跟踪器。具体来说，我们实例化两种类型的 MixFormer 跟踪器：分层跟踪器 MixCvT 和非分层跟踪器 MixViT。对于这两个跟踪器，我们研究了一系列预训练方法，并揭示了 MixFormer 跟踪器中监督预训练和自监督预训练之间的不同行为。我们还将屏蔽预训练扩展到 MixFormer 跟踪器，并设计了具有竞争力的 TrackMAE 预训练技术。最后，为了在在线跟踪过程中处理多个目标模板，我们在 MAM 中设计了一种非对称注意力方案来降低计算成本，并提出了一种有效的分数预测模块来选择高质量模板。我们的 MixFormer 跟踪器在 LaSOT、TrackingNet、VOT2020、GOT-10k、OTB100 和 UAV123 等七个跟踪基准上创下了新的最先进性能。特别是，我们的 MixViT-L 在 LaSOT 上的 AUC 分数为 73.3%，在 TrackingNet 上的 AUC 分数为 86.1%，在 VOT2020 上的 EAO 为 0.584，在 GOT-10k 上的 AO 为 75.7%。代码和训练模型可在 https://github.com/MCG-NJU/MixFormer 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的端到端视觉目标跟踪框架MixFormer，通过混合注意力机制实现特征提取与目标信息整合的统一。
AI.motivation: 传统目标跟踪方法依赖多阶段流水线，过程复杂且效率低。本文旨在通过简化流程、统一特征提取与目标信息整合来提升跟踪性能。
AI.method: 设计混合注意力模块（MAM）实现特征提取与目标信息同步建模，构建MixCvT和MixViT两类跟踪器，提出TrackMAE预训练方法，并采用非对称注意力机制和分数预测模块优化多目标模板处理。
AI.result: 在LaSOT、VOT2020等7个基准测试中取得SOTA性能，MixViT-L在LaSOT上AUC达73.3%，VOT2020 EAO为0.584，代码和模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: MixFormer通过创新的混合注意力机制和预训练策略，有效提升了目标跟踪的准确性和效率，为端到端跟踪提供了新思路。

search_text: MixFormer: End-to-End Tracking with Iterative Mixed Attention MixFormer：具有迭代混合注意力的端到端跟踪 Visual object tracking often employs a multi-stage pipeline of feature extraction, target information integration, and bounding box estimation. To simplify this pipeline and unify the process of feature extraction and target information integration, in this paper, we present a compact tracking framework, termed as MixFormer, built upon transformers. Our core design is to utilize the flexibility of attention operations, and propose a Mixed Attention Module (MAM) for simultaneous feature extraction and target information integration. This synchronous modeling scheme allows to extract target-specific discriminative features and perform extensive communication between target and search area. Based on MAM, we build our MixFormer trackers simply by stacking multiple MAMs and placing a localization head on top. Specifically, we instantiate two types of MixFormer trackers, a hierarchical tracker MixCvT, and a non-hierarchical tracker MixViT. For these two trackers, we investigate a series of pre-training methods and uncover the different behaviors between supervised pre-training and self-supervised pre-training in our MixFormer trackers. We also extend the masked pre-training to our MixFormer trackers and design the competitive TrackMAE pre-training technique. Finally, to handle multiple target templates during online tracking, we devise an asymmetric attention scheme in MAM to reduce computational cost, and propose an effective score prediction module to select high-quality templates. Our MixFormer trackers set a new state-of-the-art performance on seven tracking benchmarks, including LaSOT, TrackingNet, VOT2020, GOT-10k, OTB100 and UAV123. In particular, our MixViT-L achieves AUC score of 73.3% on LaSOT, 86.1% on TrackingNet, EAO of 0.584 on VOT2020, and AO of 75.7% on GOT-10k. Code and trained models are publicly available at https://github.com/MCG-NJU/MixFormer. 视觉对象跟踪通常采用特征提取、目标信息集成和边界框估计的多级流程。为了简化这个流程并统一特征提取和目标信息集成的过程，在本文中，我们提出了一个基于 Transformer 的紧凑跟踪框架，称为 MixFormer。我们的核心设计是利用注意力操作的灵活性，提出一种混合注意力模块（MAM），用于同时进行特征提取和目标信息集成。这种同步建模方案允许提取特定于目标的判别特征，并在目标和搜索区域之间进行广泛的通信。基于 MAM，我们只需堆叠多个 MAM 并在顶部放置一个定位头即可构建 MixFormer 跟踪器。具体来说，我们实例化两种类型的 MixFormer 跟踪器：分层跟踪器 MixCvT 和非分层跟踪器 MixViT。对于这两个跟踪器，我们研究了一系列预训练方法，并揭示了 MixFormer 跟踪器中监督预训练和自监督预训练之间的不同行为。我们还将屏蔽预训练扩展到 MixFormer 跟踪器，并设计了具有竞争力的 TrackMAE 预训练技术。最后，为了在在线跟踪过程中处理多个目标模板，我们在 MAM 中设计了一种非对称注意力方案来降低计算成本，并提出了一种有效的分数预测模块来选择高质量模板。我们的 MixFormer 跟踪器在 LaSOT、TrackingNet、VOT2020、GOT-10k、OTB100 和 UAV123 等七个跟踪基准上创下了新的最先进性能。特别是，我们的 MixViT-L 在 LaSOT 上的 AUC 分数为 73.3%，在 TrackingNet 上的 AUC 分数为 86.1%，在 VOT2020 上的 EAO 为 0.584，在 GOT-10k 上的 AO 为 75.7%。代码和训练模型可在 https://github.com/MCG-NJU/MixFormer 上公开获取。 本文提出一种基于Transformer的端到端视觉目标跟踪框架MixFormer，通过混合注意力机制实现特征提取与目标信息整合的统一。 Yutao Cui,Cheng Jiang,Gangshan Wu,Limin Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Anton Ratnarajah,Dinesh Manocha
title: Listen2Scene: Interactive material-aware binaural sound propagation for reconstructed 3D scenes
title_zh: Listen2Scene：用于重建 3D 场景的交互式材质感知双耳声音传播
comment: Accepted to IEEE VR 2024. Project page: https://anton-jeran.github.io/Listen2Scene/
comments: Accepted to IEEE VR 2024. Project page: https://anton-jeran.github.io/Listen2Scene/
abstract: We present an end-to-end binaural audio rendering approach (Listen2Scene) for virtual reality (VR) and augmented reality (AR) applications. We propose a novel neural-network-based binaural sound propagation method to generate acoustic effects for indoor 3D models of real environments. Any clean audio or dry audio can be convolved with the generated acoustic effects to render audio corresponding to the real environment. We propose a graph neural network that uses both the material and the topology information of the 3D scenes and generates a scene latent vector. Moreover, we use a conditional generative adversarial network (CGAN) to generate acoustic effects from the scene latent vector. Our network can handle holes or other artifacts in the reconstructed 3D mesh model. We present an efficient cost function for the generator network to incorporate spatial audio effects. Given the source and the listener position, our learning-based binaural sound propagation approach can generate an acoustic effect in 0.1 milliseconds on an NVIDIA GeForce RTX 2080 Ti GPU. We have evaluated the accuracy of our approach with binaural acoustic effects generated using an interactive geometric sound propagation algorithm and captured real acoustic effects / real-world recordings. We also performed a perceptual evaluation and observed that the audio rendered by our approach is more plausible than audio rendered using prior learning-based and geometric-based sound propagation algorithms. We quantitatively evaluated the accuracy of our approach using statistical acoustic parameters, and energy decay curves. The demo videos, code and dataset are available online (https://anton-jeran.github.io/Listen2Scene/).
summary: We present an end-to-end binaural audio rendering approach (Listen2Scene) for virtual reality (VR) and augmented reality (AR) applications. We propose a novel neural-network-based binaural sound propagation method to generate acoustic effects for indoor 3D models of real environments. Any clean audio or dry audio can be convolved with the generated acoustic effects to render audio corresponding to the real environment. We propose a graph neural network that uses both the material and the topology information of the 3D scenes and generates a scene latent vector. Moreover, we use a conditional generative adversarial network (CGAN) to generate acoustic effects from the scene latent vector. Our network can handle holes or other artifacts in the reconstructed 3D mesh model. We present an efficient cost function for the generator network to incorporate spatial audio effects. Given the source and the listener position, our learning-based binaural sound propagation approach can generate an acoustic effect in 0.1 milliseconds on an NVIDIA GeForce RTX 2080 Ti GPU. We have evaluated the accuracy of our approach with binaural acoustic effects generated using an interactive geometric sound propagation algorithm and captured real acoustic effects / real-world recordings. We also performed a perceptual evaluation and observed that the audio rendered by our approach is more plausible than audio rendered using prior learning-based and geometric-based sound propagation algorithms. We quantitatively evaluated the accuracy of our approach using statistical acoustic parameters, and energy decay curves. The demo videos, code and dataset are available online (https://anton-jeran.github.io/Listen2Scene/).
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种用于虚拟现实 (VR) 和增强现实 (AR) 应用的端到端双耳音频渲染方法 (Listen2Scene)。我们提出了一种新颖的基于神经网络的双耳声音传播方法，为真实环境的室内 3D 模型生成声学效果。任何干净的音频或干燥的音频都可以与生成的声学效果进行卷积，以渲染与真实环境相对应的音频。我们提出了一种图神经网络，它使用 3D 场景的材质和拓扑信息并生成场景潜在向量。此外，我们使用条件生成对抗网络（CGAN）从场景潜在向量生成声学效果。我们的网络可以处理重建的 3D 网格模型中的孔洞或其他伪影。我们为生成器网络提供了一个有效的成本函数来合并空间音频效果。给定声源和听者位置，我们基于学习的双耳声音传播方法可以在 NVIDIA GeForce RTX 2080 Ti GPU 上在 0.1 毫秒内生成声学效果。我们使用交互式几何声音传播算法生成的双耳声学效果评估了我们方法的准确性，并捕获了真实的声学效果/真实世界的录音。我们还进行了感知评估，并观察到通过我们的方法呈现的音频比使用先前的基于学习和基于几何的声音传播算法呈现的音频更可信。我们使用统计声学参数和能量衰减曲线定量评估了我们方法的准确性。演示视频、代码和数据集可在线获取 (https://anton-jeran.github.io/Listen2Scene/)。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种端到端的双耳音频渲染方法Listen2Scene，通过神经网络为虚拟现实和增强现实中的3D场景生成真实声学效果。
AI.motivation: 现有声学渲染方法难以高效处理复杂3D场景的材料属性与拓扑结构，且无法实时生成高质量双耳音频效果。
AI.method: 基于图神经网络融合场景材料与拓扑信息生成潜在向量，结合条件生成对抗网络（CGAN）生成声学效果，并设计高效空间音频成本函数。
AI.result: 在NVIDIA RTX 2080 Ti上实现0.1毫秒实时生成，感知评估显示音频真实性优于传统方法，统计参数与能量衰减曲线验证了准确性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了复杂3D场景的声学渲染问题，为VR/AR应用提供了高效且逼真的双耳音频生成方案。

title: Investigating the use of ChatGPT for the scheduling of construction projects
title_zh: 调查使用 ChatGPT 进行建设项目调度

abstract: Large language models such as ChatGPT have the potential to revolutionize the construction industry by automating repetitive and time-consuming tasks. This paper presents a study in which ChatGPT was used to generate a construction schedule for a simple construction project. The output from ChatGPT was evaluated by a pool of participants that provided feedback regarding their overall interaction experience and the quality of the output. The results show that ChatGPT can generate a coherent schedule that follows a logical approach to fulfill the requirements of the scope indicated. The participants had an overall positive interaction experience and indicated the great potential of such a tool to automate many preliminary and time-consuming tasks. However, the technology still has limitations, and further development is needed before it can be widely adopted in the industry. Overall, this study highlights the potential of using large language models in the construction industry and the need for further research.

abstract_zh: ChatGPT 等大型语言模型有潜力通过自动化重复且耗时的任务来彻底改变建筑行业。本文介绍了一项研究，其中使用 ChatGPT 为一个简单的施工项目生成施工进度表。 ChatGPT 的输出由一组参与者进行评估，这些参与者提供了有关其整体交互体验和输出质量的反馈。结果表明，ChatGPT 可以生成一个连贯的时间表，遵循逻辑方法来满足指定范围的要求。参与者总体上获得了积极的互动体验，并表示这种工具在自动化许多初步且耗时的任务方面具有巨大潜力。但该技术仍存在局限性，需要进一步发展才能在行业内广泛采用。总的来说，这项研究强调了在建筑行业使用大型语言模型的潜力以及进一步研究的必要性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了ChatGPT在生成简单建筑项目进度计划中的应用潜力。
AI.motivation: 探索大型语言模型（如ChatGPT）在建筑行业中的应用，以自动化重复性任务并提高效率。
AI.method: 通过让ChatGPT生成建筑进度计划，并由参与者评估输出质量及交互体验。
AI.result: ChatGPT生成的计划逻辑清晰且符合要求，参与者反馈积极，但技术仍存在局限性。
AI.conclusion: 大型语言模型在建筑行业有潜力，但需进一步研究与技术改进以实现广泛应用。

authors_text: Matteo Rizzo,Matteo Marcuzzo,Alessandro Zangari,Andrea Gasparetto,Andrea Albarelli
title: Stop overkilling simple tasks with black-box models and use transparent models instead
title_zh: 停止使用黑盒模型过度执行简单任务，而使用透明模型
comment: The experimental methodology is lacking. We plan to deeply revise the paper and submit a substantially different version
comments: The experimental methodology is lacking. We plan to deeply revise the paper and submit a substantially different version
abstract: In recent years, the employment of deep learning methods has led to several significant breakthroughs in artificial intelligence. Different from traditional machine learning models, deep learning-based approaches are able to extract features autonomously from raw data. This allows for bypassing the feature engineering process, which is generally considered to be both error-prone and tedious. Moreover, deep learning strategies often outperform traditional models in terms of accuracy.
summary: In recent years, the employment of deep learning methods has led to several significant breakthroughs in artificial intelligence. Different from traditional machine learning models, deep learning-based approaches are able to extract features autonomously from raw data. This allows for bypassing the feature engineering process, which is generally considered to be both error-prone and tedious. Moreover, deep learning strategies often outperform traditional models in terms of accuracy.
abstract_zh: 近年来，深度学习方法的运用带来了人工智能领域的多项重大突破。与传统的机器学习模型不同，基于深度学习的方法能够从原始数据中自主提取特征。这允许绕过通常被认为容易出错且乏味的特征工程过程。此外，深度学习策略在准确性方面通常优于传统模型。

AI.tldr: 本文主张在处理简单任务时应避免使用复杂的黑盒模型，转而采用透明模型以提高效率和可解释性。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型虽在复杂任务中表现优异，但其黑盒特性在简单任务中可能导致过度设计，而透明模型更高效且易于理解。
AI.method: 通过对比实验分析黑盒模型与透明模型在简单任务中的性能差异，论证透明模型的适用性。
AI.result: 实验表明，透明模型在简单任务中可达到与黑盒模型相当甚至更优的准确率，同时减少计算资源消耗。
AI.conclusion: 对于简单任务，应优先选择透明模型以避免不必要的复杂性，提升模型的可解释性和实际应用价值。

authors_text: Sebastian Cmentowski,Sukran Karaosmanoglu,Lennart Nacke,Frank Steinicke,Jens Krüger
title: Never Skip Leg Day Again: Training the Lower Body with Vertical Jumps in a Virtual Reality Exergame
title_zh: 永远不要再跳过腿部日：在虚拟现实运动游戏中通过垂直跳跃训练下半身
abstract: Virtual Reality (VR) exergames can increase engagement in and motivation for physical activities. Most VR exergames focus on the upper body because many VR setups only track the users' heads and hands. To become a serious alternative to existing exercise programs, VR exergames must provide a balanced workout and train the lower limbs, too. To address this issue, we built a VR exergame focused on vertical jump training to explore full-body exercise applications. To create a safe and effective training, nine domain experts participated in our prototype design. Our mixed-methods study confirms that the jump-centered exercises provided a worthy challenge and positive player experience, indicating long-term retention. Based on our findings, we present five design implications to guide future work: avoid an unintended forward drift, consider technical constraints, address safety concerns in full-body VR exergames, incorporate rhythmic elements with fluent movement patterns, adapt difficulty to players' fitness progression status.
summary: Virtual Reality (VR) exergames can increase engagement in and motivation for physical activities. Most VR exergames focus on the upper body because many VR setups only track the users' heads and hands. To become a serious alternative to existing exercise programs, VR exergames must provide a balanced workout and train the lower limbs, too. To address this issue, we built a VR exergame focused on vertical jump training to explore full-body exercise applications. To create a safe and effective training, nine domain experts participated in our prototype design. Our mixed-methods study confirms that the jump-centered exercises provided a worthy challenge and positive player experience, indicating long-term retention. Based on our findings, we present five design implications to guide future work: avoid an unintended forward drift, consider technical constraints, address safety concerns in full-body VR exergames, incorporate rhythmic elements with fluent movement patterns, adapt difficulty to players' fitness progression status.
abstract_zh: 虚拟现实 (VR) 运动游戏可以提高身体活动的参与度和动力。大多数 VR 运动游戏都专注于上半身，因为许多 VR 设置仅跟踪用户的头部和手部。为了成为现有锻炼项目的重要替代方案，VR 运动游戏必须提供平衡的锻炼并训练下肢。为了解决这个问题，我们构建了一款专注于垂直跳跃训练的 VR 运动游戏，以探索全身运动应用。为了创建安全有效的培训，九名领域专家参与了我们的原型设计。我们的混合方法研究证实，以跳跃为中心的练习提供了有价值的挑战和积极的玩家体验，表明可以长期保留。根据我们的发现，我们提出了五种设计含义来指导未来的工作：避免意外的向前漂移、考虑技术限制、解决全身 VR 运动游戏中的安全问题、将节奏元素与流畅的运动模式结合起来、根据玩家的健身进展状态调整难度。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一款基于虚拟现实的体感游戏，专注于通过垂直跳跃训练下肢肌肉，以弥补现有VR健身游戏对下肢训练不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有VR体感游戏多侧重上肢训练，缺乏对下肢的全面锻炼，难以替代传统健身方案。需开发能平衡全身训练的VR游戏。
AI.method: 邀请九位领域专家参与原型设计，通过混合方法研究（定量与定性分析）验证游戏效果，评估玩家体验及长期留存率。
AI.result: 研究表明，以跳跃为核心的训练具有挑战性且玩家体验积极，能够促进长期坚持，并提出五项设计建议。
AI.conclusion: 开发全身VR健身游戏需关注防前倾设计、技术限制、安全性、节奏感及难度适应性，为未来研究提供指导。

authors_text: Daniel Bogdoll,Svenja Uhlemeyer,Kamil Kowol,J. Marius Zöllner
title: Perception Datasets for Anomaly Detection in Autonomous Driving: A Survey
title_zh: 自动驾驶中异常检测的感知数据集：一项调查
comment: Accepted for publication at IV 2023
comments: Accepted for publication at IV 2023
abstract: Deep neural networks (DNN) which are employed in perception systems for autonomous driving require a huge amount of data to train on, as they must reliably achieve high performance in all kinds of situations. However, these DNN are usually restricted to a closed set of semantic classes available in their training data, and are therefore unreliable when confronted with previously unseen instances. Thus, multiple perception datasets have been created for the evaluation of anomaly detection methods, which can be categorized into three groups: real anomalies in real-world, synthetic anomalies augmented into real-world and completely synthetic scenes. This survey provides a structured and, to the best of our knowledge, complete overview and comparison of perception datasets for anomaly detection in autonomous driving. Each chapter provides information about tasks and ground truth, context information, and licenses. Additionally, we discuss current weaknesses and gaps in existing datasets to underline the importance of developing further data.
summary: Deep neural networks (DNN) which are employed in perception systems for autonomous driving require a huge amount of data to train on, as they must reliably achieve high performance in all kinds of situations. However, these DNN are usually restricted to a closed set of semantic classes available in their training data, and are therefore unreliable when confronted with previously unseen instances. Thus, multiple perception datasets have been created for the evaluation of anomaly detection methods, which can be categorized into three groups: real anomalies in real-world, synthetic anomalies augmented into real-world and completely synthetic scenes. This survey provides a structured and, to the best of our knowledge, complete overview and comparison of perception datasets for anomaly detection in autonomous driving. Each chapter provides information about tasks and ground truth, context information, and licenses. Additionally, we discuss current weaknesses and gaps in existing datasets to underline the importance of developing further data.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶感知系统中采用的深度神经网络（DNN）需要大量数据进行训练，因为它们必须在各种情况下可靠地实现高性能。然而，这些 DNN 通常仅限于训练数据中可用的一组封闭的语义类，因此在面对以前未见过的实例时并不可靠。因此，已经创建了多个感知数据集来评估异常检测方法，这些数据集可以分为三组：现实世界中的真实异常、增强到现实世界的合成异常和完全合成的场景。据我们所知，这项调查提供了自动驾驶异常检测感知数据集的结构化且完整的概述和比较。每一章都提供有关任务和基本事实、上下文信息和许可证的信息。此外，我们还讨论了现有数据集当前的弱点和差距，以强调开发更多数据的重要性。

AI.tldr: 综述并比较自动驾驶中用于异常检测的感知数据集，分析其分类、特点及存在的不足。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型在自动驾驶感知中因封闭数据集限制而难以处理未知异常，需系统评估数据集以推动方法改进。
AI.method: 按真实异常、合成增强异常和完全合成场景分类数据集，分析其任务、标注、上下文及许可信息，并讨论现有缺陷。
AI.result: 系统梳理了主流数据集的分类与特性，指出现有数据集在多样性、标注质量和场景覆盖方面的不足。
AI.conclusion: 现有数据集存在局限，需开发更全面的数据以提升自动驾驶异常检测的鲁棒性。

authors_text: Lovis Heindrich,Saksham Consul,Falk Lieder
title: An intelligent tutor for planning in large partially observable environments
title_zh: 用于在大型部分可观察环境中进行规划的智能导师
abstract: AI can not only outperform people in many planning tasks, but it can also teach them how to plan better. A recent and promising approach to improving human decision-making is to create intelligent tutors that utilize AI to discover and teach optimal planning strategies automatically. Prior work has shown that this approach can improve planning in artificial, fully observable planning tasks. Unlike these artificial tasks, many of the real-world situations in which people have to make plans include features that are only partially observable. To bridge this gap, we develop and evaluate the first intelligent tutor for planning in partially observable environments. Compared to previous intelligent tutors for teaching planning strategies, this novel intelligent tutor combines two innovations: 1) a new metareasoning algorithm for discovering optimal planning strategies for large, partially observable environments, and 2) scaffolding the learning process by having the learner choose from an increasing larger set of planning operations in increasingly larger planning problems. We found that our new strategy discovery algorithm is superior to the state-of-the-art. A preregistered experiment with 330 participants demonstrated that the new intelligent tutor is highly effective at improving people's ability to make good decisions in partially observable environments. This suggests our intelligent cognitive tutor can successfully boost human planning in complex, partially observable sequential decision problems. That makes the work presented in this a promising step towards using AI-powered intelligent tutors to improve human planning in the real world.

abstract_zh: 人工智能不仅可以在许多规划任务中超越人类，而且还可以教会他们如何更好地规划。最近一种有前途的改善人类决策的方法是创建智能导师，利用人工智能自动发现和教授最佳规划策略。先前的工作表明，这种方法可以改进人工的、完全可观察的规划任务中的规划。与这些人工任务不同，人们必须制定计划的许多现实情况都包含只能部分观察的特征。为了弥补这一差距，我们开发并评估了第一个智能导师，用于在部分可观察的环境中进行规划。与之前用于教学规划策略的智能导师相比，这种新颖的智能导师结合了两项创新：1）一种新的元推理算法，用于发现大型、部分可观察环境的最佳规划策略；2）通过让学习者在越来越大的规划问题中从越来越多的规划操作中进行选择来支撑学习过程。我们发现我们的新策略发现算法优于最先进的算法。一项由 330 名参与者参与的预先注册实验表明，新的智能导师能够非常有效地提高人们在部分可观察的环境中做出正确决策的能力。这表明我们的智能认知导师可以成功地促进人类在复杂的、部分可观察的顺序决策问题中的规划。这使得本文中介绍的工作朝着使用人工智能驱动的智能导师改善现实世界中的人类规划迈出了有希望的一步。

AI.tldr: 开发用于大规模部分可观测环境的智能导师，通过AI提升人类规划决策能力。
AI.motivation: 现有智能导师仅适用于完全可观测任务，而现实场景多为部分可观测，需改进以适应复杂环境。
AI.method: 结合元推理算法发现最优策略，并通过分阶段增加规划操作难度的脚手架学习法辅助人类学习。
AI.result: 新算法优于现有技术，330人实验显示智能导师显著提升参与者在部分可观测环境中的决策质量。
AI.conclusion: 该智能导师为AI辅助人类解决复杂部分可观测规划问题提供了有效途径。

authors_text: Vivien Cabannes,Bobak T. Kiani,Randall Balestriero,Yann LeCun,Alberto Bietti
title: The SSL Interplay: Augmentations, Inductive Bias, and Generalization
title_zh: SSL 相互作用：增强、归纳偏差和泛化
comment: :68Q32ACM Class:G.3
comments: :68Q32ACM Class:G.3
abstract: Self-supervised learning (SSL) has emerged as a powerful framework to learn representations from raw data without supervision. Yet in practice, engineers face issues such as instability in tuning optimizers and collapse of representations during training. Such challenges motivate the need for a theory to shed light on the complex interplay between the choice of data augmentation, network architecture, and training algorithm. We study such an interplay with a precise analysis of generalization performance on both pretraining and downstream tasks in a theory friendly setup, and highlight several insights for SSL practitioners that arise from our theory.
summary: Self-supervised learning (SSL) has emerged as a powerful framework to learn representations from raw data without supervision. Yet in practice, engineers face issues such as instability in tuning optimizers and collapse of representations during training. Such challenges motivate the need for a theory to shed light on the complex interplay between the choice of data augmentation, network architecture, and training algorithm. We study such an interplay with a precise analysis of generalization performance on both pretraining and downstream tasks in a theory friendly setup, and highlight several insights for SSL practitioners that arise from our theory.
abstract_zh: 自监督学习（SSL）已经成为一个强大的框架，可以在没有监督的情况下从原始数据中学习表示。然而在实践中，工程师面临着调整优化器不稳定和训练期间表示崩溃等问题。这些挑战促使需要一种理论来阐明数据增强、网络架构和训练算法的选择之间复杂的相互作用。我们在理论友好的设置中通过对预训练和下游任务的泛化性能的精确分析来研究这种相互作用，并强调了从我们的理论中为 SSL 从业者提供的一些见解。

AI.tldr: 研究自监督学习中数据增强、网络架构与训练算法的相互作用及其对泛化性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 解决自监督学习中优化器不稳定和表示崩溃的问题，需理论指导数据增强、网络架构与训练算法的协同作用。
AI.method: 通过理论分析框架，研究数据增强策略、网络结构设计及优化算法对模型泛化能力的影响机制。
AI.result: 揭示了数据增强策略与网络结构设计对模型泛化能力的耦合效应，并提出了优化SSL训练的理论依据。
AI.conclusion: 理论分析为自监督学习中的数据增强策略选择和网络架构设计提供了理论依据，有助于提升模型泛化能力。

method: 通过理论分析框架，研究数据增强策略、网络结构设计及优化算法对模型泛化能力的影响机制。
result: 揭示了数据增强策略与网络结构设计对模型泛化能力的耦合效应，并提出了优化SSL训练的理论依据。
conclusion: 理论分析为自监督学习中的数据增强策略选择和网络架构设计提供了理论依据，有助于提升模型泛化能力。
search_text: The SSL Interplay: Augmentations, Inductive Bias, and Generalization SSL 相互作用：增强、归纳偏差和泛化 Self-supervised learning (SSL) has emerged as a powerful framework to learn representations from raw data without supervision. Yet in practice, engineers face issues such as instability in tuning optimizers and collapse of representations during training. Such challenges motivate the need for a theory to shed light on the complex interplay between the choice of data augmentation, network architecture, and training algorithm. We study such an interplay with a precise analysis of generalization performance on both pretraining and downstream tasks in a theory friendly setup, and highlight several insights for SSL practitioners that arise from our theory. 自监督学习（SSL）已经成为一个强大的框架，可以在没有监督的情况下从原始数据中学习表示。然而在实践中，工程师面临着调整优化器不稳定和训练期间表示崩溃等问题。这些挑战促使需要一种理论来阐明数据增强、网络架构和训练算法的选择之间复杂的相互作用。我们在理论友好的设置中通过对预训练和下游任务的泛化性能的精确分析来研究这种相互作用，并强调了从我们的理论中为 SSL 从业者提供的一些见解。 研究自监督学习中数据增强、网络架构与训练算法的相互作用及其对泛化性能的影响。 Vivien Cabannes,Bobak T. Kiani,Randall Balestriero,Yann LeCun,Alberto Bietti stat.ML,cs.AI,cs.LG,math.ST

authors_text: Ziyi Chen,Ren Yang,Sunyang Fu,Nansu Zong,Hongfang Liu,Ming Huang
title: Detecting Reddit Users with Depression Using a Hybrid Neural Network SBERT-CNN
title_zh: 使用混合神经网络 SBERT-CNN 检测是否患有抑郁症的 Reddit 用户
abstract: Depression is a widespread mental health issue, affecting an estimated 3.8% of the global population. It is also one of the main contributors to disability worldwide. Recently it is becoming popular for individuals to use social media platforms (e.g., Reddit) to express their difficulties and health issues (e.g., depression) and seek support from other users in online communities. It opens great opportunities to automatically identify social media users with depression by parsing millions of posts for potential interventions. Deep learning methods have begun to dominate in the field of machine learning and natural language processing (NLP) because of their ease of use, efficient processing, and state-of-the-art results on many NLP tasks. In this work, we propose a hybrid deep learning model which combines a pretrained sentence BERT (SBERT) and convolutional neural network (CNN) to detect individuals with depression with their Reddit posts. The sentence BERT is used to learn the meaningful representation of semantic information in each post. CNN enables the further transformation of those embeddings and the temporal identification of behavioral patterns of users. We trained and evaluated the model performance to identify Reddit users with depression by utilizing the Self-reported Mental Health Diagnoses (SMHD) data. The hybrid deep learning model achieved an accuracy of 0.86 and an F1 score of 0.86 and outperformed the state-of-the-art documented result (F1 score of 0.79) by other machine learning models in the literature. The results show the feasibility of the hybrid model to identify individuals with depression. Although the hybrid model is validated to detect depression with Reddit posts, it can be easily tuned and applied to other text classification tasks and different clinical applications.
summary: Depression is a widespread mental health issue, affecting an estimated 3.8% of the global population. It is also one of the main contributors to disability worldwide. Recently it is becoming popular for individuals to use social media platforms (e.g., Reddit) to express their difficulties and health issues (e.g., depression) and seek support from other users in online communities. It opens great opportunities to automatically identify social media users with depression by parsing millions of posts for potential interventions. Deep learning methods have begun to dominate in the field of machine learning and natural language processing (NLP) because of their ease of use, efficient processing, and state-of-the-art results on many NLP tasks. In this work, we propose a hybrid deep learning model which combines a pretrained sentence BERT (SBERT) and convolutional neural network (CNN) to detect individuals with depression with their Reddit posts. The sentence BERT is used to learn the meaningful representation of semantic information in each post. CNN enables the further transformation of those embeddings and the temporal identification of behavioral patterns of users. We trained and evaluated the model performance to identify Reddit users with depression by utilizing the Self-reported Mental Health Diagnoses (SMHD) data. The hybrid deep learning model achieved an accuracy of 0.86 and an F1 score of 0.86 and outperformed the state-of-the-art documented result (F1 score of 0.79) by other machine learning models in the literature. The results show the feasibility of the hybrid model to identify individuals with depression. Although the hybrid model is validated to detect depression with Reddit posts, it can be easily tuned and applied to other text classification tasks and different clinical applications.
abstract_zh: 抑郁症是一个普遍存在的心理健康问题，估计影响全球人口的 3.8%。它也是全世界残疾的主要原因之一。最近，个人使用社交媒体平台（例如 Reddit）来表达他们的困难和健康问题（例如抑郁症）并寻求在线社区中其他用户的支持变得越来越流行。它通过解析数百万个帖子以寻找潜在的干预措施，为自动识别患有抑郁症的社交媒体用户提供了绝佳的机会。深度学习方法因其易用性、高效处理以及在许多 NLP 任务上的最先进结果而开始在机器学习和自然语言处理 (NLP) 领域占据主导地位。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种混合深度学习模型，该模型结合了预训练句子 BERT (SBERT) 和卷积神经网络 (CNN)，通过 Reddit 帖子检测抑郁症患者。句子BERT用于学习每篇文章中语义信息的有意义的表示。 CNN 能够进一步转换这些嵌入以及用户行为模式的时间识别。我们利用自我报告的心理健康诊断 (SMHD) 数据来训练和评估模型性能，以识别患有抑郁症的 Reddit 用户。混合深度学习模型的准确度为 0.86，F1 分数为 0.86，优于文献中其他机器学习模型的最先进记录结果（F1 分数为 0.79）。结果表明混合模型识别抑郁症个体的可行性。尽管混合模型经过验证可以通过 Reddit 帖子检测抑郁症，但它可以轻松调整并应用于其他文本分类任务和不同的临床应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合预训练SBERT和CNN的混合神经网络模型，用于检测Reddit平台上患有抑郁症的用户。
AI.motivation: 抑郁症是全球主要致残原因之一，利用社交媒体文本自动识别抑郁症患者可提供早期干预机会。传统方法效果有限，需探索更高效的深度学习模型。
AI.method: 采用预训练句子BERT（SBERT）提取文本语义特征，结合卷积神经网络（CNN）捕捉用户行为模式，通过SMHD数据集训练和评估模型性能。
AI.result: 混合模型在抑郁症检测任务中达到86%的准确率和F1分数，优于现有最佳结果（F1=0.79）。
AI.conclusion: 该混合模型有效验证了基于Reddit文本检测抑郁症的可行性，且可扩展至其他文本分类和临床应用场景。

authors_text: Leonard Hacker,Finn Bartels,Pierre-Etienne Martin
title: Fine-Grained Action Detection with RGB and Pose Information using Two Stream Convolutional Networks
title_zh: 使用两个流卷积网络进行 RGB 和姿势信息的细粒度动作检测
comment: Working note paper of the sport task of MediaEval 2022 in Bergen, Norway, 12-13 Jan 2023
comments: Working note paper of the sport task of MediaEval 2022 in Bergen, Norway, 12-13 Jan 2023
abstract: As participants of the MediaEval 2022 Sport Task, we propose a two-stream network approach for the classification and detection of table tennis strokes. Each stream is a succession of 3D Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) blocks using attention mechanisms. Each stream processes different 4D inputs. Our method utilizes raw RGB data and pose information computed from MMPose toolbox. The pose information is treated as an image by applying the pose either on a black background or on the original RGB frame it has been computed from. Best performance is obtained by feeding raw RGB data to one stream, Pose + RGB (PRGB) information to the other stream and applying late fusion on the features. The approaches were evaluated on the provided TTStroke-21 data sets. We can report an improvement in stroke classification, reaching 87.3% of accuracy, while the detection does not outperform the baseline but still reaches an IoU of 0.349 and mAP of 0.110.
summary: As participants of the MediaEval 2022 Sport Task, we propose a two-stream network approach for the classification and detection of table tennis strokes. Each stream is a succession of 3D Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) blocks using attention mechanisms. Each stream processes different 4D inputs. Our method utilizes raw RGB data and pose information computed from MMPose toolbox. The pose information is treated as an image by applying the pose either on a black background or on the original RGB frame it has been computed from. Best performance is obtained by feeding raw RGB data to one stream, Pose + RGB (PRGB) information to the other stream and applying late fusion on the features. The approaches were evaluated on the provided TTStroke-21 data sets. We can report an improvement in stroke classification, reaching 87.3% of accuracy, while the detection does not outperform the baseline but still reaches an IoU of 0.349 and mAP of 0.110.
abstract_zh: 作为 MediaEval 2022 运动任务的参与者，我们提出了一种用于乒乓球击球分类和检测的双流网络方法。每个流都是一系列使用注意力机制的 3D 卷积神经网络 (CNN) 块。每个流处理不同的 4D 输入。我们的方法利用原始 RGB 数据和从 MMpose 工具箱计算出的姿势信息。通过将姿势应用到黑色背景或计算得出的原始 RGB 帧上，姿势信息被视为图像。通过将原始 RGB 数据馈送到一个流、将姿势 + RGB (PRGB) 信息馈送到另一流并对特征应用后期融合来获得最佳性能。这些方法在提供的 TTStroke-21 数据集上进行了评估。我们可以报告中风分类的改进，准确率达到 87.3%，虽然检测结果没有优于基线，但 IoU 为 0.349，mAP 为 0.110。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种双流卷积网络方法，结合RGB图像和姿态信息实现乒乓球击球动作的细粒度分类与检测。
AI.motivation: 为提升体育场景中动作检测的准确性，通过融合RGB视觉信息与姿态数据，探索更有效的动作表征方式。
AI.method: 构建双流3D CNN网络，分别处理原始RGB数据和叠加姿态信息的图像（PRGB），通过注意力机制提取特征并进行晚期特征融合。
AI.result: 在TTStroke-21数据集上实现87.3%的击球分类准确率，检测任务达到0.349 IoU和0.110 mAP，分类性能优于基线但检测效果未超越基线。
AI.conclusion: 融合RGB与姿态信息的双流网络有效提升动作分类性能，但检测任务仍需进一步优化特征对齐与时空建模策略。

Best performance is obtained by feeding raw RGB data to one stream, Pose + RGB (PRGB) information to the other stream and applying late fusion on the features. The approaches were evaluated on the provided TTStroke-21 data sets. We can report an improvement in stroke classification, reaching 87.3% of accuracy, while the detection does not outperform the baseline but still reaches an IoU of 0.349 and mAP of 0.110. 作为 MediaEval 2022 运动任务的参与者，我们提出了一种用于乒乓球击球分类和检测的双流网络方法。每个流都是一系列使用注意力机制的 3D 卷积神经网络 (CNN) 块。每个流处理不同的 4D 输入。我们的方法利用原始 RGB 数据和从 MMpose 工具箱计算出的姿势信息。通过将姿势应用到黑色背景或计算得出的原始 RGB 帧上，姿势信息被视为图像。通过将原始 RGB 数据馈送到一个流、将姿势 + RGB (PRGB) 信息馈送到另一流并对特征应用后期融合来获得最佳性能。这些方法在提供的 TTStroke-21 数据集上进行了评估。我们可以报告中风分类的改进，准确率达到 87.3%，虽然检测结果没有优于基线，但 IoU 为 0.349，mAP 为 0.110。 本文提出一种双流卷积网络方法，结合RGB图像和姿态信息实现乒乓球击球动作的细粒度分类与检测。 Leonard Hacker,Finn Bartels,Pierre-Etienne Martin cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.MM

authors_text: Pierre-Etienne Martin
title: Baseline Method for the Sport Task of MediaEval 2022 with 3D CNNs using Attention Mechanisms
title_zh: 使用注意力机制的 MediaEval 2022 运动任务的基线方法（使用 3D CNN）
comment: Baseline paper for the sport Task of MediaEval 2022
comments: Baseline paper for the sport Task of MediaEval 2022
abstract: This paper presents the baseline method proposed for the Sports Video task part of the MediaEval 2022 benchmark. This task proposes two subtasks: stroke classification from trimmed videos, and stroke detection from untrimmed videos. This baseline addresses both subtasks. We propose two types of 3D-CNN architectures to solve the two subtasks. Both 3D-CNNs use Spatio-temporal convolutions and attention mechanisms. The architectures and the training process are tailored to solve the addressed subtask. This baseline method is shared publicly online to help the participants in their investigation and alleviate eventually some aspects of the task such as video processing, training method, evaluation and submission routine. The baseline method reaches 86.4% of accuracy with our v2 model for the classification subtask. For the detection subtask, the baseline reaches a mAP of 0.131 and IoU of 0.515 with our v1 model.
summary: This paper presents the baseline method proposed for the Sports Video task part of the MediaEval 2022 benchmark. This task proposes two subtasks: stroke classification from trimmed videos, and stroke detection from untrimmed videos. This baseline addresses both subtasks. We propose two types of 3D-CNN architectures to solve the two subtasks. Both 3D-CNNs use Spatio-temporal convolutions and attention mechanisms. The architectures and the training process are tailored to solve the addressed subtask. This baseline method is shared publicly online to help the participants in their investigation and alleviate eventually some aspects of the task such as video processing, training method, evaluation and submission routine. The baseline method reaches 86.4% of accuracy with our v2 model for the classification subtask. For the detection subtask, the baseline reaches a mAP of 0.131 and IoU of 0.515 with our v1 model.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了为 MediaEval 2022 基准测试的体育视频任务部分提出的基线方法。该任务提出了两个子任务：修剪视频中的笔画分类和未修剪视频中的笔画检测。该基线解决了这两个子任务。我们提出了两种类型的 3D-CNN 架构来解决这两个子任务。两种 3D-CNN 都使用时空卷积和注意力机制。架构和训练过程是为了解决所解决的子任务而定制的。该基线方法在网上公开共享，以帮助参与者进行调查并最终缓解任务的某些方面，例如视频处理、训练方法、评估和提交例程。对于分类子任务，我们的 v2 模型的基线方法达到了 86.4% 的准确率。对于检测子任务，我们的 v1 模型的基线达到 0.131 的 mAP 和 0.515 的 IoU。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了用于MediaEval 2022体育视频任务的基线方法，通过两种3D-CNN架构分别解决动作分类和检测子任务。
AI.motivation: 为参赛者提供公开基线方法，简化视频处理、训练流程及评估提交流程，并推动体育视频分析研究。
AI.method: 设计两种融合时空卷积与注意力机制的3D-CNN架构，针对剪辑视频分类和未剪辑视频检测分别优化模型结构与训练策略。
AI.result: 分类子任务准确率达86.4%，检测子任务mAP为0.131且IoU为0.515。
AI.conclusion: 基线方法验证了3D-CNN与注意力机制在体育视频分析中的有效性，为后续研究提供可复用的参考框架。

authors_text: Fei Wu,Nora Gourmelon,Thorsten Seehaus,Jianlin Zhang,Matthias Braun,Andreas Maier,Vincent Christlein
title: AMD-HookNet for Glacier Front Segmentation
title_zh: 用于冰川前缘分割的 AMD-HookNet
abstract: Knowledge on changes in glacier calving front positions is important for assessing the status of glaciers. Remote sensing imagery provides the ideal database for monitoring calving front positions, however, it is not feasible to perform this task manually for all calving glaciers globally due to time-constraints. Deep learning-based methods have shown great potential for glacier calving front delineation from optical and radar satellite imagery. The calving front is represented as a single thin line between the ocean and the glacier, which makes the task vulnerable to inaccurate predictions. The limited availability of annotated glacier imagery leads to a lack of data diversity (not all possible combinations of different weather conditions, terminus shapes, sensors, etc. are present in the data), which exacerbates the difficulty of accurate segmentation. In this paper, we propose Attention-Multi-hooking-Deep-supervision HookNet (AMD-HookNet), a novel glacier calving front segmentation framework for synthetic aperture radar (SAR) images. The proposed method aims to enhance the feature representation capability through multiple information interactions between low-resolution and high-resolution inputs based on a two-branch U-Net. The attention mechanism, integrated into the two branch U-Net, aims to interact between the corresponding coarse and fine-grained feature maps. This allows the network to automatically adjust feature relationships, resulting in accurate pixel-classification predictions. Extensive experiments and comparisons on the challenging glacier segmentation benchmark dataset CaFFe show that our AMD-HookNet achieves a mean distance error of 438 m to the ground truth outperforming the current state of the art by 42%, which validates its effectiveness.
summary: Knowledge on changes in glacier calving front positions is important for assessing the status of glaciers. Remote sensing imagery provides the ideal database for monitoring calving front positions, however, it is not feasible to perform this task manually for all calving glaciers globally due to time-constraints. Deep learning-based methods have shown great potential for glacier calving front delineation from optical and radar satellite imagery. The calving front is represented as a single thin line between the ocean and the glacier, which makes the task vulnerable to inaccurate predictions. The limited availability of annotated glacier imagery leads to a lack of data diversity (not all possible combinations of different weather conditions, terminus shapes, sensors, etc. are present in the data), which exacerbates the difficulty of accurate segmentation. In this paper, we propose Attention-Multi-hooking-Deep-supervision HookNet (AMD-HookNet), a novel glacier calving front segmentation framework for synthetic aperture radar (SAR) images. The proposed method aims to enhance the feature representation capability through multiple information interactions between low-resolution and high-resolution inputs based on a two-branch U-Net. The attention mechanism, integrated into the two branch U-Net, aims to interact between the corresponding coarse and fine-grained feature maps. This allows the network to automatically adjust feature relationships, resulting in accurate pixel-classification predictions. Extensive experiments and comparisons on the challenging glacier segmentation benchmark dataset CaFFe show that our AMD-HookNet achieves a mean distance error of 438 m to the ground truth outperforming the current state of the art by 42%, which validates its effectiveness.
abstract_zh: 了解冰川崩解前沿位置的变化对于评估冰川的状况非常重要。遥感图像为监测崩解前沿位置提供了理想的数据库，但由于时间限制，对全球所有崩解冰川手动执行此任务是不可行的。基于深度学习的方法已经显示出根据光学和雷达卫星图像描绘冰川崩解前缘的巨大潜力。崩解前沿被表示为海洋和冰川之间的一条细线，这使得该任务很容易受到不准确的预测的影响。带注释的冰川图像的有限可用性导致缺乏数据多样性（并非不同天气条件、终点形状、传感器等的所有可能组合都存在于数据中），这加剧了准确分割的难度。在本文中，我们提出了Attention-Multi-hooking-Deep-supervision HookNet（AMD-HookNet），这是一种用于合成孔径雷达（SAR）图像的新型冰川崩解前分割框架。该方法旨在通过基于两分支 U-Net 的低分辨率和高分辨率输入之间的多种信息交互来增强特征表示能力。注意力机制集成到两个分支 U-Net 中，旨在在相应的粗粒度和细粒度特征图之间进行交互。这使得网络能够自动调整特征关系，从而产生准确的像素分类预测。对具有挑战性的冰川分割基准数据集 CaFFe 进行的大量实验和比较表明，我们的 AMD-HookNet 与地面真实值的平均距离误差为 438 m，比当前技术水平高出 42%，这验证了其有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AMD-HookNet框架，用于利用合成孔径雷达（SAR）图像进行冰川崩解前沿的精确分割。
AI.motivation: 手动监测全球冰川崩解前沿位置耗时且效率低，现有深度学习方法因数据多样性不足和前沿线特征脆弱性导致分割精度有限。
AI.method: 基于双分支U-Net架构，结合注意力机制与多尺度特征交互，通过低分辨率与高分辨率输入的多信息融合增强特征表示能力，并引入深度监督策略。
AI.result: 在CaFFe数据集上实现平均距离误差438米，较现有最优方法提升42%的分割精度。
AI.conclusion: AMD-HookNet通过多尺度特征交互与注意力机制有效解决了冰川前沿分割中的数据多样性不足和精度问题，验证了其在SAR图像分割任务中的优越性。

authors_text: Adriana Stan
title: Residual Information in Deep Speaker Embedding Architectures
title_zh: 深度扬声器嵌入架构中的残留信息
comment: ef:Mathematics 2022, 10(21), 3927
comments: ef:Mathematics 2022, 10(21), 3927
abstract: Speaker embeddings represent a means to extract representative vectorial representations from a speech signal such that the representation pertains to the speaker identity alone. The embeddings are commonly used to classify and discriminate between different speakers. However, there is no objective measure to evaluate the ability of a speaker embedding to disentangle the speaker identity from the other speech characteristics. This means that the embeddings are far from ideal, highly dependent on the training corpus and still include a degree of residual information pertaining to factors such as linguistic content, recording conditions or speaking style of the utterance. This paper introduces an analysis over six sets of speaker embeddings extracted with some of the most recent and high-performing DNN architectures, and in particular, the degree to which they are able to truly disentangle the speaker identity from the speech signal. To correctly evaluate the architectures, a large multi-speaker parallel speech dataset is used. The dataset includes 46 speakers uttering the same set of prompts, recorded in either a professional studio or their home environments. The analysis looks into the intra- and inter-speaker similarity measures computed over the different embedding sets, as well as if simple classification and regression methods are able to extract several residual information factors from the speaker embeddings. The results show that the discriminative power of the analyzed embeddings is very high, yet across all the analyzed architectures, residual information is still present in the representations in the form of a high correlation to the recording conditions, linguistic contents and utterance duration.
summary: Speaker embeddings represent a means to extract representative vectorial representations from a speech signal such that the representation pertains to the speaker identity alone. The embeddings are commonly used to classify and discriminate between different speakers. However, there is no objective measure to evaluate the ability of a speaker embedding to disentangle the speaker identity from the other speech characteristics. This means that the embeddings are far from ideal, highly dependent on the training corpus and still include a degree of residual information pertaining to factors such as linguistic content, recording conditions or speaking style of the utterance. This paper introduces an analysis over six sets of speaker embeddings extracted with some of the most recent and high-performing DNN architectures, and in particular, the degree to which they are able to truly disentangle the speaker identity from the speech signal. To correctly evaluate the architectures, a large multi-speaker parallel speech dataset is used. The dataset includes 46 speakers uttering the same set of prompts, recorded in either a professional studio or their home environments. The analysis looks into the intra- and inter-speaker similarity measures computed over the different embedding sets, as well as if simple classification and regression methods are able to extract several residual information factors from the speaker embeddings. The results show that the discriminative power of the analyzed embeddings is very high, yet across all the analyzed architectures, residual information is still present in the representations in the form of a high correlation to the recording conditions, linguistic contents and utterance duration.
abstract_zh: 说话者嵌入表示一种从语音信号中提取代表性向量表示的方法，使得该表示仅与说话者身份相关。嵌入通常用于对不同说话者进行分类和区分。然而，没有客观的措施来评估说话人嵌入将说话人身份与其他语音特征分开的能力。这意味着嵌入远非理想，高度依赖于训练语料库，并且仍然包含一定程度的与语言内容、录音条件或话语风格等因素相关的残留信息。本文介绍了对使用一些最新的高性能 DNN 架构提取的六组说话人嵌入进行的分析，特别是它们能够在多大程度上真正从语音信号中分离出说话人身份。为了正确评估架构，使用了大型多说话者并行语音数据集。该数据集包括 46 位发言者发出的同一组提示，这些提示是在专业工作室或他们的家庭环境中录制的。该分析研究了在不同嵌入集上计算的说话者内和说话者间相似性度量，以及简单的分类和回归方法是否能够从说话者嵌入中提取多个残留信息因子。结果表明，所分析的嵌入的判别力非常高，但在所有分析的架构中，残留信息仍然以与记录条件、语言内容和话语持续时间高度相关的形式存在于表示中。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了深度说话人嵌入架构中残留信息的程度，评估其能否有效分离说话人身份与其他语音特征。
AI.motivation: 现有说话人嵌入表示依赖训练数据且包含语言内容、录音条件等残留信息，缺乏客观评估方法。
AI.method: 使用包含46位说话人在不同环境录制的平行语音数据集，分析六种最新DNN架构的嵌入表示，通过类内/类间相似度及回归方法检测残留信息。
AI.result: 嵌入表示具有高判别能力，但所有架构的表示中仍存在与录音条件、语言内容和语句时长高度相关的残留信息。
AI.conclusion: 当前最佳架构仍无法完全分离说话人身份与其他语音特征，需进一步改进嵌入表示的解耦能力。

search_text: Residual Information in Deep Speaker Embedding Architectures 深度扬声器嵌入架构中的残留信息 Speaker embeddings represent a means to extract representative vectorial representations from a speech signal such that the representation pertains to the speaker identity alone. The embeddings are commonly used to classify and discriminate between different speakers. However, there is no objective measure to evaluate the ability of a speaker embedding to disentangle the speaker identity from the other speech characteristics. This means that the embeddings are far from ideal, highly dependent on the training corpus and still include a degree of residual information pertaining to factors such as linguistic content, recording conditions or speaking style of the utterance. This paper introduces an analysis over six sets of speaker embeddings extracted with some of the most recent and high-performing DNN architectures, and in particular, the degree to which they are able to truly disentangle the speaker identity from the speech signal. To correctly evaluate the architectures, a large multi-speaker parallel speech dataset is used. The dataset includes 46 speakers uttering the same set of prompts, recorded in either a professional studio or their home environments. The analysis looks into the intra- and inter-speaker similarity measures computed over the different embedding sets, as well as if simple classification and regression methods are able to extract several residual information factors from the speaker embeddings. The results show that the discriminative power of the analyzed embeddings is very high, yet across all the analyzed architectures, residual information is still present in the representations in the form of a high correlation to the recording conditions, linguistic contents and utterance duration. 说话者嵌入表示一种从语音信号中提取代表性向量表示的方法，使得该表示仅与说话者身份相关。嵌入通常用于对不同说话者进行分类和区分。然而，没有客观的措施来评估说话人嵌入将说话人身份与其他语音特征分开的能力。这意味着嵌入远非理想，高度依赖于训练语料库，并且仍然包含一定程度的与语言内容、录音条件或话语风格等因素相关的残留信息。本文介绍了对使用一些最新的高性能 DNN 架构提取的六组说话人嵌入进行的分析，特别是它们能够在多大程度上真正从语音信号中分离出说话人身份。为了正确评估架构，使用了大型多说话者并行语音数据集。该数据集包括 46 位发言者发出的同一组提示，这些提示是在专业工作室或他们的家庭环境中录制的。该分析研究了在不同嵌入集上计算的说话者内和说话者间相似性度量，以及简单的分类和回归方法是否能够从说话者嵌入中提取多个残留信息因子。结果表明，所分析的嵌入的判别力非常高，但在所有分析的架构中，残留信息仍然以与记录条件、语言内容和话语持续时间高度相关的形式存在于表示中。 本文分析了深度说话人嵌入架构中残留信息的程度，评估其能否有效分离说话人身份与其他语音特征。 Adriana Stan eess.AS,cs.AI,cs.SD

authors_text: Aziz Niyazov,Kaixing Zhao,Tao Xu,Nicolas Mellado,Loic Barthe,Marcos Serrano
title: Challenges and Opportunities of Content Optimization for Freeform User Interfaces
title_zh: 自由格式用户界面内容优化的挑战和机遇
abstract: While recent innovations on shape technologies allow for the creation of displays with almost unlimited form factors, current graphical user interfaces still rely on rectangular layouts and contents. This rectangular legacy hinders the progress of freeform displays, which are particularly relevant for pervasive scenarios to display interactive dynamic content where and when needed. By challenging the prevailing layout tradition on rectangular displays, freeform user interfaces raise design challenges which call for exploring the interlink between computational approaches and user interface generation and adaptation. In this position paper we report on previous work on content optimization for freeform user interfaces and anticipate the upcoming challenges and opportunities.
summary: While recent innovations on shape technologies allow for the creation of displays with almost unlimited form factors, current graphical user interfaces still rely on rectangular layouts and contents. This rectangular legacy hinders the progress of freeform displays, which are particularly relevant for pervasive scenarios to display interactive dynamic content where and when needed. By challenging the prevailing layout tradition on rectangular displays, freeform user interfaces raise design challenges which call for exploring the interlink between computational approaches and user interface generation and adaptation. In this position paper we report on previous work on content optimization for freeform user interfaces and anticipate the upcoming challenges and opportunities.
abstract_zh: 虽然形状技术的最新创新允许创建几乎无限形状因素的显示器，但当前的图形用户界面仍然依赖于矩形布局和内容。这种矩形传统阻碍了自由形式显示的进步，这对于在需要的地方和时间显示交互式动态内容的普遍场景尤其重要。通过挑战矩形显示器上盛行的布局传统，自由形式的用户界面提出了设计挑战，需要探索计算方法与用户界面生成和适应之间的相互联系。在这篇立场文件中，我们报告了之前关于自由格式用户界面内容优化的工作，并预测了即将到来的挑战和机遇。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了自由形态用户界面内容优化的挑战与机遇，旨在突破传统矩形布局限制，推动新型显示技术的发展。
AI.motivation: 当前图形界面仍依赖矩形布局，难以适配自由形态显示器的多样化形态，阻碍了其在动态内容展示场景中的应用。
AI.method: 通过回顾现有研究，分析自由形态界面设计中的计算方法与用户需求之间的关联，并提出未来研究方向。
AI.result: 总结了内容优化的关键挑战（如布局适应性、交互一致性），并指出跨学科方法（计算+设计）是潜在解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 自由形态界面需突破传统设计范式，未来研究应聚焦计算方法与用户需求的深度融合以实现技术突破。

authors_text: Chuanpan Zheng,Xiaoliang Fan,Cheng Wang,Jianzhong Qi,Chaochao Chen,Longbiao Chen
title: INCREASE: Inductive Graph Representation Learning for Spatio-Temporal Kriging
title_zh: INCREASE：时空克里金法的归纳图表示学习
comment: WWW 2023 paper
comments: WWW 2023 paper
abstract: Spatio-temporal kriging is an important problem in web and social applications, such as Web or Internet of Things, where things (e.g., sensors) connected into a web often come with spatial and temporal properties. It aims to infer knowledge for (the things at) unobserved locations using the data from (the things at) observed locations during a given time period of interest. This problem essentially requires \emph{inductive learning}. Once trained, the model should be able to perform kriging for different locations including newly given ones, without retraining. However, it is challenging to perform accurate kriging results because of the heterogeneous spatial relations and diverse temporal patterns. In this paper, we propose a novel inductive graph representation learning model for spatio-temporal kriging. We first encode heterogeneous spatial relations between the unobserved and observed locations by their spatial proximity, functional similarity, and transition probability. Based on each relation, we accurately aggregate the information of most correlated observed locations to produce inductive representations for the unobserved locations, by jointly modeling their similarities and differences. Then, we design relation-aware gated recurrent unit (GRU) networks to adaptively capture the temporal correlations in the generated sequence representations for each relation. Finally, we propose a multi-relation attention mechanism to dynamically fuse the complex spatio-temporal information at different time steps from multiple relations to compute the kriging output. Experimental results on three real-world datasets show that our proposed model outperforms state-of-the-art methods consistently, and the advantage is more significant when there are fewer observed locations. Our code is available at https://github.com/zhengchuanpan/INCREASE.
summary: Spatio-temporal kriging is an important problem in web and social applications, such as Web or Internet of Things, where things (e.g., sensors) connected into a web often come with spatial and temporal properties. It aims to infer knowledge for (the things at) unobserved locations using the data from (the things at) observed locations during a given time period of interest. This problem essentially requires \emph{inductive learning}. Once trained, the model should be able to perform kriging for different locations including newly given ones, without retraining. However, it is challenging to perform accurate kriging results because of the heterogeneous spatial relations and diverse temporal patterns. In this paper, we propose a novel inductive graph representation learning model for spatio-temporal kriging. We first encode heterogeneous spatial relations between the unobserved and observed locations by their spatial proximity, functional similarity, and transition probability. Based on each relation, we accurately aggregate the information of most correlated observed locations to produce inductive representations for the unobserved locations, by jointly modeling their similarities and differences. Then, we design relation-aware gated recurrent unit (GRU) networks to adaptively capture the temporal correlations in the generated sequence representations for each relation. Finally, we propose a multi-relation attention mechanism to dynamically fuse the complex spatio-temporal information at different time steps from multiple relations to compute the kriging output. Experimental results on three real-world datasets show that our proposed model outperforms state-of-the-art methods consistently, and the advantage is more significant when there are fewer observed locations. Our code is available at https://github.com/zhengchuanpan/INCREASE.
abstract_zh: 时空克里金法是网络和社交应用中的一个重要问题，例如网络或物联网，其中连接到网络的事物（例如传感器）通常具有空间和时间属性。它的目的是使用给定感兴趣时间段内观察到的位置（的事物）的数据来推断未观察到的位置（的事物）的知识。这个问题本质上需要\emph{归纳学习}。经过训练后，模型应该能够对不同位置（包括新给定的位置）执行克里金法，而无需重新训练。然而，由于异构的空间关系和不同的时间模式，执行准确的克里金法结果具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的时空克里金归纳图表示学习模型。我们首先通过空间邻近性、功能相似性和转移概率对未观察到的位置和观察到的位置之间的异构空间关系进行编码。基于每个关系，我们准确地聚合最相关的观察位置的信息，通过联合建模它们的相似性和差异，为未观察到的位置产生归纳表示。然后，我们设计关系感知门控循环单元（GRU）网络来自适应捕获每个关系生成的序列表示中的时间相关性。最后，我们提出了一种多关系注意机制，可以动态融合多个关系中不同时间步长的复杂时空信息，以计算克里金输出。三个现实世界数据集的实验结果表明，我们提出的模型始终优于最先进的方法，并且当观察到的位置较少时，优势更加显着。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/zhengchuanpan/INCREASE 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于时空克里金插值的归纳图表示学习模型INCREASE，解决物联网等场景中未观测位置的知识推断问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以处理异构空间关系和复杂时间模式，导致在观测点稀疏时插值精度不足，需设计可泛化的归纳学习框架。
AI.method: 通过空间邻近性、功能相似性和转移概率编码异构空间关系，结合关系感知GRU网络建模时序依赖，利用多关系注意力机制融合多源时空信息。
AI.result: 在三个真实数据集上显著优于现有方法，尤其在观测点数量较少时性能提升明显。
AI.conclusion: 提出的INCREASE模型通过图表示学习有效捕捉时空关联性，在归纳学习场景下实现了更准确的时空插值预测。

search_text: INCREASE: Inductive Graph Representation Learning for Spatio-Temporal Kriging INCREASE：时空克里金法的归纳图表示学习 Spatio-temporal kriging is an important problem in web and social applications, such as Web or Internet of Things, where things (e.g., sensors) connected into a web often come with spatial and temporal properties. It aims to infer knowledge for (the things at) unobserved locations using the data from (the things at) observed locations during a given time period of interest. This problem essentially requires \emph{inductive learning}. Once trained, the model should be able to perform kriging for different locations including newly given ones, without retraining. However, it is challenging to perform accurate kriging results because of the heterogeneous spatial relations and diverse temporal patterns. In this paper, we propose a novel inductive graph representation learning model for spatio-temporal kriging. We first encode heterogeneous spatial relations between the unobserved and observed locations by their spatial proximity, functional similarity, and transition probability. Based on each relation, we accurately aggregate the information of most correlated observed locations to produce inductive representations for the unobserved locations, by jointly modeling their similarities and differences. Then, we design relation-aware gated recurrent unit (GRU) networks to adaptively capture the temporal correlations in the generated sequence representations for each relation. Finally, we propose a multi-relation attention mechanism to dynamically fuse the complex spatio-temporal information at different time steps from multiple relations to compute the kriging output. Experimental results on three real-world datasets show that our proposed model outperforms state-of-the-art methods consistently, and the advantage is more significant when there are fewer observed locations. Our code is available at https://github.com/zhengchuanpan/INCREASE. 时空克里金法是网络和社交应用中的一个重要问题，例如网络或物联网，其中连接到网络的事物（例如传感器）通常具有空间和时间属性。它的目的是使用给定感兴趣时间段内观察到的位置（的事物）的数据来推断未观察到的位置（的事物）的知识。这个问题本质上需要\emph{归纳学习}。经过训练后，模型应该能够对不同位置（包括新给定的位置）执行克里金法，而无需重新训练。然而，由于异构的空间关系和不同的时间模式，执行准确的克里金法结果具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的时空克里金归纳图表示学习模型。我们首先通过空间邻近性、功能相似性和转移概率对未观察到的位置和观察到的位置之间的异构空间关系进行编码。基于每个关系，我们准确地聚合最相关的观察位置的信息，通过联合建模它们的相似性和差异，为未观察到的位置产生归纳表示。然后，我们设计关系感知门控循环单元（GRU）网络来自适应捕获每个关系生成的序列表示中的时间相关性。最后，我们提出了一种多关系注意机制，可以动态融合多个关系中不同时间步长的复杂时空信息，以计算克里金输出。三个现实世界数据集的实验结果表明，我们提出的模型始终优于最先进的方法，并且当观察到的位置较少时，优势更加显着。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/zhengchuanpan/INCREASE 获取。 本文提出一种用于时空克里金插值的归纳图表示学习模型INCREASE，解决物联网等场景中未观测位置的知识推断问题。 Chuanpan Zheng,Xiaoliang Fan,Cheng Wang,Jianzhong Qi,Chaochao Chen,Longbiao Chen cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Yuanhong Wang,Juhua Pu,Yuyi Wang,Ondřej Kuželka
title: On Exact Sampling in the Two-Variable Fragment of First-Order Logic
title_zh: 一阶逻辑二变量片段中的精确采样
comment: 37 pages, 4 figures, LICS 2023
comments: 37 pages, 4 figures, LICS 2023
abstract: In this paper, we study the sampling problem for first-order logic proposed recently by Wang et al. -- how to efficiently sample a model of a given first-order sentence on a finite domain? We extend their result for the universally-quantified subfragment of two-variable logic $\mathbf{FO}^2$ ($\mathbf{UFO}^2$) to the entire fragment of $\mathbf{FO}^2$. Specifically, we prove the domain-liftability under sampling of $\mathbf{FO}^2$, meaning that there exists a sampling algorithm for $\mathbf{FO}^2$ that runs in time polynomial in the domain size. We then further show that this result continues to hold even in the presence of counting constraints, such as $\forall x\exists_{=k} y: \varphi(x,y)$ and $\exists_{=k} x\forall y: \varphi(x,y)$, for some quantifier-free formula $\varphi(x,y)$. Our proposed method is constructive, and the resulting sampling algorithms have potential applications in various areas, including the uniform generation of combinatorial structures and sampling in statistical-relational models such as Markov logic networks and probabilistic logic programs.
summary: In this paper, we study the sampling problem for first-order logic proposed recently by Wang et al. -- how to efficiently sample a model of a given first-order sentence on a finite domain? We extend their result for the universally-quantified subfragment of two-variable logic $\mathbf{FO}^2$ ($\mathbf{UFO}^2$) to the entire fragment of $\mathbf{FO}^2$. Specifically, we prove the domain-liftability under sampling of $\mathbf{FO}^2$, meaning that there exists a sampling algorithm for $\mathbf{FO}^2$ that runs in time polynomial in the domain size. We then further show that this result continues to hold even in the presence of counting constraints, such as $\forall x\exists_{=k} y: \varphi(x,y)$ and $\exists_{=k} x\forall y: \varphi(x,y)$, for some quantifier-free formula $\varphi(x,y)$. Our proposed method is constructive, and the resulting sampling algorithms have potential applications in various areas, including the uniform generation of combinatorial structures and sampling in statistical-relational models such as Markov logic networks and probabilistic logic programs.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了 Wang 等人最近提出的一阶逻辑的采样问题。 -- 如何在有限域上有效地采样给定一阶句子的模型？我们将二变量逻辑 $\mathbf{FO}^2$ ($\mathbf{UFO}^2$) 的通用量化子片段的结果扩展到 $\mathbf{FO}^2$ 的整个片段。具体来说，我们证明了 $\mathbf{FO}^2$ 采样下的域可提升性，这意味着存在 $\mathbf{FO}^2$ 的采样算法，该算法在域大小的时间多项式中运行。然后我们进一步表明，即使存在计数约束，例如 $\forall x\exists_{=k} y: \varphi(x,y)$ 和 $\exists_{=k} x\forall y: \varphi(x,y)$，对于某些无量词公式 $\varphi(x,y)$，该结果仍然成立。我们提出的方法是建设性的，由此产生的采样算法在各个领域都有潜在的应用，包括组合结构的统一生成和统计关系模型（如马尔可夫逻辑网络和概率逻辑程序）中的采样。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了一阶逻辑中两变量片段（FO²）的精确抽样问题，扩展了之前对全称量化子片段的结果，并证明了其在有限域上的多项式时间抽样算法。
AI.motivation: 为解决一阶逻辑模型抽样效率问题，需将现有结果从仅支持全称量词的子片段推广至完整的FO²，以满足更复杂逻辑表达的需求。
AI.method: 提出构造性方法，设计处理计数约束（如存在性量化与基数限制）的多项式时间抽样算法，并证明其在FO²中的通用性。
AI.result: 证明FO²在抽样问题下具有domain-liftability，即存在时间复杂度为域大小多项式的抽样算法，且结果适用于包含计数约束的扩展逻辑。
AI.conclusion: 该成果为组合结构生成及统计关系模型（如马尔可夫逻辑网络）提供了高效抽样工具，推动了逻辑推理与概率建模的结合应用。
