authors_text: Andrea Gesmundo
title: Multipath agents for modular multitask ML systems
title_zh: 用于模块化多任务机器学习系统的多路径代理
abstract: A standard ML model is commonly generated by a single method that specifies aspects such as architecture, initialization, training data and hyperparameters configuration. The presented work introduces a novel methodology allowing to define multiple methods as distinct agents. Agents can collaborate and compete to generate and improve ML models for a given tasks. The proposed methodology is demonstrated with the generation and extension of a dynamic modular multitask ML system solving more than one hundred image classification tasks. Diverse agents can compete to produce the best performing model for a task by reusing the modules introduced to the system by competing agents. The presented work focuses on the study of agents capable of: 1) reusing the modules generated by concurrent agents, 2) activating in parallel multiple modules in a frozen state by connecting them with trainable modules, 3) condition the activation mixture on each data sample by using a trainable router module. We demonstrate that this simple per-sample parallel routing method can boost the quality of the combined solutions by training a fraction of the activated parameters.
summary: A standard ML model is commonly generated by a single method that specifies aspects such as architecture, initialization, training data and hyperparameters configuration. The presented work introduces a novel methodology allowing to define multiple methods as distinct agents. Agents can collaborate and compete to generate and improve ML models for a given tasks. The proposed methodology is demonstrated with the generation and extension of a dynamic modular multitask ML system solving more than one hundred image classification tasks. Diverse agents can compete to produce the best performing model for a task by reusing the modules introduced to the system by competing agents. The presented work focuses on the study of agents capable of: 1) reusing the modules generated by concurrent agents, 2) activating in parallel multiple modules in a frozen state by connecting them with trainable modules, 3) condition the activation mixture on each data sample by using a trainable router module. We demonstrate that this simple per-sample parallel routing method can boost the quality of the combined solutions by training a fraction of the activated parameters.
abstract_zh: 标准机器学习模型通常由指定架构、初始化、训练数据和超参数配置等方面的单一方法生成。所提出的工作引入了一种新颖的方法，允许将多种方法定义为不同的代理。代理可以协作和竞争，为给定任务生成和改进 ML 模型。通过生成和扩展动态模块化多任务机器学习系统来演示所提出的方法，该系统解决了一百多个图像分类任务。不同的代理可以通过重用竞争代理引入系统的模块来竞争为任务生成性能最佳的模型。所提出的工作重点是研究具有以下能力的代理：1）重用并发代理生成的模块，2）通过将多个模块与可训练模块连接来并行激活处于冻结状态的多个模块，3）使用可训练路由器模块调节每个数据样本上的激活混合物。我们证明了这种简单的按样本并行路由方法可以通过训练一小部分激活参数来提高组合解决方案的质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多路径智能体的模块化多任务机器学习系统，通过智能体协作与竞争生成和优化模型，解决多个图像分类任务。
AI.motivation: 传统单一方法难以高效处理多任务学习，需通过模块复用和动态组合提升模型性能与灵活性。
AI.method: 设计多智能体系统，允许模块复用、并行激活冻结模块，并引入可训练路由器实现样本级动态路由，仅训练部分激活参数。
AI.result: 构建动态模块化系统，成功解决超100个图像分类任务，验证了模块复用与参数高效训练的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 多路径智能体方法通过协作竞争机制和模块复用显著提升多任务学习效率，为复杂任务系统设计提供新思路。

Diverse agents can compete to produce the best performing model for a task by reusing the modules introduced to the system by competing agents. We demonstrate that this simple per-sample parallel routing method can boost the quality of the combined solutions by training a fraction of the activated parameters. 标准机器学习模型通常由指定架构、初始化、训练数据和超参数配置等方面的单一方法生成。所提出的工作引入了一种新颖的方法，允许将多种方法定义为不同的代理。代理可以协作和竞争，为给定任务生成和改进 ML 模型。通过生成和扩展动态模块化多任务机器学习系统来演示所提出的方法，该系统解决了一百多个图像分类任务。不同的代理可以通过重用竞争代理引入系统的模块来竞争为任务生成性能最佳的模型。所提出的工作重点是研究具有以下能力的代理：1）重用并发代理生成的模块，2）通过将多个模块与可训练模块连接来并行激活处于冻结状态的多个模块，3）使用可训练路由器模块调节每个数据样本上的激活混合物。我们证明了这种简单的按样本并行路由方法可以通过训练一小部分激活参数来提高组合解决方案的质量。 本文提出一种基于多路径智能体的模块化多任务机器学习系统，通过智能体协作与竞争生成和优化模型，解决多个图像分类任务。 Andrea Gesmundo cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Taku Yamagata,Emma L. Tonkin,Benjamin Arana Sanchez,Ian Craddock,Miquel Perello Nieto,Raul Santos-Rodriguez,Weisong Yang,Peter Flach
title: When the Ground Truth is not True: Modelling Human Biases in Temporal Annotations
title_zh: 当基本事实不正确时：在时间注释中对人类偏见进行建模
abstract: In supervised learning, low quality annotations lead to poorly performing classification and detection models, while also rendering evaluation unreliable. This is particularly apparent on temporal data, where annotation quality is affected by multiple factors. For example, in the post-hoc self-reporting of daily activities, cognitive biases are one of the most common ingredients. In particular, reporting the start and duration of an activity after its finalisation may incorporate biases introduced by personal time perceptions, as well as the imprecision and lack of granularity due to time rounding. Here we propose a method to model human biases on temporal annotations and argue for the use of soft labels. Experimental results in synthetic data show that soft labels provide a better approximation of the ground truth for several metrics. We showcase the method on a real dataset of daily activities.
summary: In supervised learning, low quality annotations lead to poorly performing classification and detection models, while also rendering evaluation unreliable. This is particularly apparent on temporal data, where annotation quality is affected by multiple factors. For example, in the post-hoc self-reporting of daily activities, cognitive biases are one of the most common ingredients. In particular, reporting the start and duration of an activity after its finalisation may incorporate biases introduced by personal time perceptions, as well as the imprecision and lack of granularity due to time rounding. Here we propose a method to model human biases on temporal annotations and argue for the use of soft labels. Experimental results in synthetic data show that soft labels provide a better approximation of the ground truth for several metrics. We showcase the method on a real dataset of daily activities.
abstract_zh: 在监督学习中，低质量的注释会导致分类和检测模型表现不佳，同时也会导致评估不可靠。这在时态数据上尤其明显，其中注释质量受到多种因素的影响。例如，在日常活动的事后自我报告中，认知偏差是最常见的因素之一。特别是，在活动最终确定后报告活动的开始和持续时间可能会包含个人时间感知带来的偏差，以及由于时间舍入而导致的不精确和缺乏粒度。在这里，我们提出了一种方法来模拟人类对时间注释的偏见，并主张使用软标签。合成数据的实验结果表明，软标签可以更好地逼近多个指标的真实情况。我们在日常活动的真实数据集上展示了该方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种建模人类在时间标注中认知偏差的方法，并主张使用软标签以提高监督学习的准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统时间标注数据存在质量缺陷，人类认知偏差（如时间感知误差和四舍五入）导致标注不准确，影响模型性能和评估可靠性。
AI.method: 通过建模人类时间感知偏差，提出使用软标签（概率分布）替代传统硬标签，以更真实地反映活动起始时间和持续时间。
AI.result: 在合成数据和真实日常活动数据集上验证，软标签在多个指标上优于硬标签，更贴近真实标注分布。
AI.conclusion: 软标签能有效缓解人类标注偏差问题，建议在涉及时间感知的任务中采用该方法提升模型鲁棒性。

authors_text: Qinrou Wen,Jirui Yang,Xue Yang,Kewei Liang
title: PatchDCT: Patch Refinement for High Quality Instance Segmentation
title_zh: PatchDCT：高质量实例分割的补丁细化
comment: 15 pages, 7 figures, 13 tables, accepted by ICLR 2023, the source code is available at https://github.com/olivia-w12/PatchDCT
comments: 15 pages, 7 figures, 13 tables, accepted by ICLR 2023, the source code is available at https://github.com/olivia-w12/PatchDCT
abstract: High-quality instance segmentation has shown emerging importance in computer vision. Without any refinement, DCT-Mask directly generates high-resolution masks by compressed vectors. To further refine masks obtained by compressed vectors, we propose for the first time a compressed vector based multi-stage refinement framework. However, the vanilla combination does not bring significant gains, because changes in some elements of the DCT vector will affect the prediction of the entire mask. Thus, we propose a simple and novel method named PatchDCT, which separates the mask decoded from a DCT vector into several patches and refines each patch by the designed classifier and regressor. Specifically, the classifier is used to distinguish mixed patches from all patches, and to correct previously mispredicted foreground and background patches. In contrast, the regressor is used for DCT vector prediction of mixed patches, further refining the segmentation quality at boundary locations. Experiments on COCO show that our method achieves 2.0%, 3.2%, 4.5% AP and 3.4%, 5.3%, 7.0% Boundary AP improvements over Mask-RCNN on COCO, LVIS, and Cityscapes, respectively. It also surpasses DCT-Mask by 0.7%, 1.1%, 1.3% AP and 0.9%, 1.7%, 4.2% Boundary AP on COCO, LVIS and Cityscapes. Besides, the performance of PatchDCT is also competitive with other state-of-the-art methods.
summary: High-quality instance segmentation has shown emerging importance in computer vision. Without any refinement, DCT-Mask directly generates high-resolution masks by compressed vectors. To further refine masks obtained by compressed vectors, we propose for the first time a compressed vector based multi-stage refinement framework. However, the vanilla combination does not bring significant gains, because changes in some elements of the DCT vector will affect the prediction of the entire mask. Thus, we propose a simple and novel method named PatchDCT, which separates the mask decoded from a DCT vector into several patches and refines each patch by the designed classifier and regressor. Specifically, the classifier is used to distinguish mixed patches from all patches, and to correct previously mispredicted foreground and background patches. In contrast, the regressor is used for DCT vector prediction of mixed patches, further refining the segmentation quality at boundary locations. Experiments on COCO show that our method achieves 2.0%, 3.2%, 4.5% AP and 3.4%, 5.3%, 7.0% Boundary AP improvements over Mask-RCNN on COCO, LVIS, and Cityscapes, respectively. It also surpasses DCT-Mask by 0.7%, 1.1%, 1.3% AP and 0.9%, 1.7%, 4.2% Boundary AP on COCO, LVIS and Cityscapes. Besides, the performance of PatchDCT is also competitive with other state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 高质量的实例分割在计算机视觉中显示出越来越重要的作用。 DCT-Mask无需任何细化，直接通过压缩向量生成高分辨率掩模。为了进一步细化通过压缩向量获得的掩模，我们首次提出了基于压缩向量的多级细化框架。然而，普通组合并没有带来显着的增益，因为DCT向量的某些元素的变化会影响整个掩模的预测。因此，我们提出了一种简单而新颖的方法，名为 PatchDCT，它将从 DCT 向量解码的掩码分成几个补丁，并通过设计的分类器和回归器细化每个补丁。具体来说，分类器用于区分混合补丁和所有补丁，并纠正先前错误预测的前景和背景补丁。相比之下，回归器用于混合补丁的 DCT 矢量预测，进一步细化边界位置的分割质量。 COCO 上的实验表明，我们的方法在 COCO、LVIS 和 Cityscapes 上分别比 Mask-RCNN 实现了 2.0%、3.2%、4.5% AP 和 3.4%、5.3%、7.0% 边界 AP 改进。它还在 COCO、LVIS 和 Cityscapes 上超过 DCT-Mask 0.7%、1.1%、1.3% AP 和 0.9%、1.7%、4.2% Boundary AP。此外，PatchDCT 的性能也与其他最先进的方法相比具有竞争力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于压缩向量的多阶段细化框架PatchDCT，用于提升实例分割的精度，特别是在边界区域。
AI.motivation: 现有方法如DCT-Mask直接生成高分辨率掩码但缺乏细化，导致DCT向量微小变化可能影响整个掩码预测，需解决局部优化与全局一致性矛盾。
AI.method: 将DCT解码的掩码分割为多个块，通过分类器区分混合块并修正误预测区域，同时用回归器优化混合块的DCT向量，实现边界精细化。
AI.result: 在COCO、LVIS和Cityscapes数据集上，相比Mask-RCNN分别提升2.0%/3.2%/4.5% AP及3.4%/5.3%/7.0%边界AP；优于DCT-Mask 0.7%-1.3% AP及0.9%-4.2%边界AP。
AI.conclusion: PatchDCT通过分块细化策略有效提升分割质量，以简单方法达到SOTA性能，验证了局部优化与全局修正结合的有效性。

authors_text: Olivier Jaubert,Javier Montalt-Tordera,Daniel Knight,Pr. Simon Arridge,Jennifer Steeden,Pr. Vivek Muthurangu
title: HyperSLICE: HyperBand optimized Spiral for Low-latency Interactive Cardiac Examination
title_zh: HyperSLICE：用于低延迟交互式心脏检查的 HyperBand 优化 Spiral
comment: ef:Magn Reson Med. 2024; 91: 266-279
comments: ef:Magn Reson Med. 2024; 91: 266-279
abstract: PURPOSE: Interactive cardiac magnetic resonance imaging is used for fast scan planning and MR guided interventions. However, the requirement for real-time acquisition and near real-time visualization constrains the achievable spatio-temporal resolution. This study aims to improve interactive imaging resolution through optimization of undersampled spiral sampling and leveraging of deep learning for low-latency reconstruction (deep artifact suppression). METHODS: A variable density spiral trajectory was parametrized and optimized via HyperBand to provide the best candidate trajectory for rapid deep artifact suppression. Training data consisted of 692 breath-held CINEs. The developed interactive sequence was tested in simulations and prospectively in 13 subjects (10 for image evaluation, 2 during catheterization, 1 during exercise). In the prospective study, the optimized framework -HyperSLICE- was compared to conventional Cartesian real-time, and breath-hold CINE imaging in terms quantitative and qualitative image metrics. Statistical differences were tested using Friedman chi-squared tests with post-hoc Nemenyi test (p<0.05). RESULTS: In simulations the NRMSE, pSNR, SSIM and LAPE were all statistically significantly higher using optimized spiral compared to radial and uniform spiral sampling, particularly after scan plan changes (SSIM: 0.71 vs 0.45 and 0.43). Prospectively, HyperSLICE enabled a higher spatial and temporal resolution than conventional Cartesian real-time imaging. The pipeline was demonstrated in patients during catheter pull back showing sufficiently fast reconstruction for interactive imaging. CONCLUSION: HyperSLICE enables high spatial and temporal resolution interactive imaging. Optimizing the spiral sampling enabled better overall image quality and superior handling of image transitions compared to radial and uniform spiral trajectories.
summary: PURPOSE: Interactive cardiac magnetic resonance imaging is used for fast scan planning and MR guided interventions. However, the requirement for real-time acquisition and near real-time visualization constrains the achievable spatio-temporal resolution. This study aims to improve interactive imaging resolution through optimization of undersampled spiral sampling and leveraging of deep learning for low-latency reconstruction (deep artifact suppression). METHODS: A variable density spiral trajectory was parametrized and optimized via HyperBand to provide the best candidate trajectory for rapid deep artifact suppression. Training data consisted of 692 breath-held CINEs. The developed interactive sequence was tested in simulations and prospectively in 13 subjects (10 for image evaluation, 2 during catheterization, 1 during exercise). In the prospective study, the optimized framework -HyperSLICE- was compared to conventional Cartesian real-time, and breath-hold CINE imaging in terms quantitative and qualitative image metrics. Statistical differences were tested using Friedman chi-squared tests with post-hoc Nemenyi test (p<0.05). RESULTS: In simulations the NRMSE, pSNR, SSIM and LAPE were all statistically significantly higher using optimized spiral compared to radial and uniform spiral sampling, particularly after scan plan changes (SSIM: 0.71 vs 0.45 and 0.43). Prospectively, HyperSLICE enabled a higher spatial and temporal resolution than conventional Cartesian real-time imaging. The pipeline was demonstrated in patients during catheter pull back showing sufficiently fast reconstruction for interactive imaging. CONCLUSION: HyperSLICE enables high spatial and temporal resolution interactive imaging. Optimizing the spiral sampling enabled better overall image quality and superior handling of image transitions compared to radial and uniform spiral trajectories.
abstract_zh: 目的：交互式心脏磁共振成像用于快速扫描计划和 MR 引导干预。然而，实时采集和近实时可视化的要求限制了可实现的时空分辨率。本研究旨在通过优化欠采样螺旋采样并利用深度学习进行低延迟重建（深度伪影抑制）来提高交互式成像分辨率。方法：通过 HyperBand 对可变密度螺旋轨迹进行参数化和优化，为快速深度伪影抑制提供最佳候选轨迹。训练数据包括 692 个屏住呼吸的 CINE。所开发的交互式序列在 13 名受试者中进行了模拟和前瞻性测试（10 名用于图像评估，2 名在导管插入期间，1 名在运动期间）。在前瞻性研究中，优化的框架 -HyperSLICE- 在定量和定性图像指标方面与传统笛卡尔实时和屏气 CINE 成像进行了比较。使用弗里德曼卡方检验和事后 Nemenyi 检验检验统计差异（p<0.05）。结果：在模拟中，与径向和均匀螺旋采样相比，使用优化螺旋采样时，NRMSE、pSNR、SSIM 和 LAPE 均在统计上显着更高，特别是在扫描计划更改后（SSIM：0.71 vs 0.45 和 0.43）。预计，HyperSLICE 能够实现比传统笛卡尔实时成像更高的空间和时间分辨率。该管道在导管拉回期间在患者身上进行了演示，显示出足够快的重建速度以进行交互式成像。结论：HyperSLICE 可实现高空间和时间分辨率的交互式成像。与径向和均匀螺旋轨迹相比，优化螺旋采样可实现更好的整体图像质量和卓越的图像过渡处理。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HyperSLICE方法，通过优化欠采样螺旋轨迹和深度学习重建，提升交互式心脏磁共振成像的时空分辨率。
AI.motivation: 实时心脏MRI受制于时空分辨率限制，需通过优化采样策略与深度学习重建技术实现更高分辨率的交互式成像。
AI.method: 采用HyperBand算法优化可变密度螺旋轨迹参数，结合深度学习进行低延迟重建，基于692例呼吸保持CINE数据训练模型，并在13名受试者中验证。
AI.result: 模拟显示优化螺旋在NRMSE、SSIM等指标显著优于径向与均匀螺旋采样；临床验证表明HyperSLICE在时空分辨率上优于传统笛卡尔实时成像。
AI.conclusion: HyperSLICE通过优化螺旋采样与深度学习重建，实现了更高分辨率的交互式心脏成像，优于传统采样方式。

search_text: HyperSLICE: HyperBand optimized Spiral for Low-latency Interactive Cardiac Examination HyperSLICE：用于低延迟交互式心脏检查的 HyperBand 优化 Spiral PURPOSE: Interactive cardiac magnetic resonance imaging is used for fast scan planning and MR guided interventions. However, the requirement for real-time acquisition and near real-time visualization constrains the achievable spatio-temporal resolution. This study aims to improve interactive imaging resolution through optimization of undersampled spiral sampling and leveraging of deep learning for low-latency reconstruction (deep artifact suppression). METHODS: A variable density spiral trajectory was parametrized and optimized via HyperBand to provide the best candidate trajectory for rapid deep artifact suppression. Training data consisted of 692 breath-held CINEs. The developed interactive sequence was tested in simulations and prospectively in 13 subjects (10 for image evaluation, 2 during catheterization, 1 during exercise). In the prospective study, the optimized framework -HyperSLICE- was compared to conventional Cartesian real-time, and breath-hold CINE imaging in terms quantitative and qualitative image metrics. Statistical differences were tested using Friedman chi-squared tests with post-hoc Nemenyi test (p<0.05). RESULTS: In simulations the NRMSE, pSNR, SSIM and LAPE were all statistically significantly higher using optimized spiral compared to radial and uniform spiral sampling, particularly after scan plan changes (SSIM: 0.71 vs 0.45 and 0.43). Prospectively, HyperSLICE enabled a higher spatial and temporal resolution than conventional Cartesian real-time imaging. The pipeline was demonstrated in patients during catheter pull back showing sufficiently fast reconstruction for interactive imaging. CONCLUSION: HyperSLICE enables high spatial and temporal resolution interactive imaging. Optimizing the spiral sampling enabled better overall image quality and superior handling of image transitions compared to radial and uniform spiral trajectories. 目的：交互式心脏磁共振成像用于快速扫描计划和 MR 引导干预。然而，实时采集和近实时可视化的要求限制了可实现的时空分辨率。本研究旨在通过优化欠采样螺旋采样并利用深度学习进行低延迟重建（深度伪影抑制）来提高交互式成像分辨率。方法：通过 HyperBand 对可变密度螺旋轨迹进行参数化和优化，为快速深度伪影抑制提供最佳候选轨迹。训练数据包括 692 个屏住呼吸的 CINE。所开发的交互式序列在 13 名受试者中进行了模拟和前瞻性测试（10 名用于图像评估，2 名在导管插入期间，1 名在运动期间）。在前瞻性研究中，优化的框架 -HyperSLICE- 在定量和定性图像指标方面与传统笛卡尔实时和屏气 CINE 成像进行了比较。使用弗里德曼卡方检验和事后 Nemenyi 检验检验统计差异（p<0.05）。结果：在模拟中，与径向和均匀螺旋采样相比，使用优化螺旋采样时，NRMSE、pSNR、SSIM 和 LAPE 均在统计上显着更高，特别是在扫描计划更改后（SSIM：0.71 vs 0.45 和 0.43）。预计，HyperSLICE 能够实现比传统笛卡尔实时成像更高的空间和时间分辨率。该管道在导管拉回期间在患者身上进行了演示，显示出足够快的重建速度以进行交互式成像。结论：HyperSLICE 可实现高空间和时间分辨率的交互式成像。与径向和均匀螺旋轨迹相比，优化螺旋采样可实现更好的整体图像质量和卓越的图像过渡处理。 本文提出HyperSLICE方法，通过优化欠采样螺旋轨迹和深度学习重建，提升交互式心脏磁共振成像的时空分辨率。 Olivier Jaubert,Javier Montalt-Tordera,Daniel Knight,Pr. authors_text: Qixun Wang,Xiaofeng Guo,Haofan Wang
title: 1st Place Solution for PSG competition with ECCV'22 SenseHuman Workshop
title_zh: ECCV'22 SenseHuman 研讨会 PSG 竞赛第一名解决方案
comment: Tech Report
comments: Tech Report
abstract: Panoptic Scene Graph (PSG) generation aims to generate scene graph representations based on panoptic segmentation instead of rigid bounding boxes. Existing PSG methods utilize one-stage paradigm which simultaneously generates scene graphs and predicts semantic segmentation masks or two-stage paradigm that first adopt an off-the-shelf panoptic segmentor, then pairwise relationship prediction between these predicted objects. One-stage approach despite having a simplified training paradigm, its segmentation results are usually under-satisfactory, while two-stage approach lacks global context and leads to low performance on relation prediction. To bridge this gap, in this paper, we propose GRNet, a Global Relation Network in two-stage paradigm, where the pre-extracted local object features and their corresponding masks are fed into a transformer with class embeddings. To handle relation ambiguity and predicate classification bias caused by long-tailed distribution, we formulate relation prediction in the second stage as a multi-class classification task with soft label. We conduct comprehensive experiments on OpenPSG dataset and achieve the state-of-art performance on the leadboard. We also show the effectiveness of our soft label strategy for long-tailed classes in ablation studies. Our code has been released in https://github.com/wangqixun/mfpsg.
summary: Panoptic Scene Graph (PSG) generation aims to generate scene graph representations based on panoptic segmentation instead of rigid bounding boxes. Existing PSG methods utilize one-stage paradigm which simultaneously generates scene graphs and predicts semantic segmentation masks or two-stage paradigm that first adopt an off-the-shelf panoptic segmentor, then pairwise relationship prediction between these predicted objects. One-stage approach despite having a simplified training paradigm, its segmentation results are usually under-satisfactory, while two-stage approach lacks global context and leads to low performance on relation prediction. To bridge this gap, in this paper, we propose GRNet, a Global Relation Network in two-stage paradigm, where the pre-extracted local object features and their corresponding masks are fed into a transformer with class embeddings. To handle relation ambiguity and predicate classification bias caused by long-tailed distribution, we formulate relation prediction in the second stage as a multi-class classification task with soft label. We conduct comprehensive experiments on OpenPSG dataset and achieve the state-of-art performance on the leadboard. We also show the effectiveness of our soft label strategy for long-tailed classes in ablation studies. Our code has been released in https://github.com/wangqixun/mfpsg.
abstract_zh: 全景场景图（PSG）生成旨在基于全景分割而不是刚性边界框生成场景图表示。现有的 PSG 方法利用单阶段范例，同时生成场景图并预测语义分割掩模，或者使用两阶段范例，首先采用现成的全景分割器，然后对这些预测对象之间的成对关系进行预测。一阶段方法尽管具有简化的训练范式，但其分割结果通常不能令人满意，而两阶段方法缺乏全局上下文，导致关系预测性能较低。为了弥补这一差距，在本文中，我们提出了 GRNet，一种两阶段范式的全局关系网络，其中预先提取的局部对象特征及其相应的掩码被输入到具有类嵌入的变压器中。为了处理长尾分布引起的关系歧义和谓词分类偏差，我们将第二阶段的关系预测制定为具有软标签的多类分类任务。我们在 OpenPSG 数据集上进行了全面的实验，并在排行榜上取得了最先进的性能。我们还展示了我们的软标签策略在消融研究中对长尾类的有效性。我们的代码已发布在https://github.com/wangqixun/mfpsg。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于全局关系网络（GRNet）的两阶段方法，解决全景场景图（PSG）生成任务中的分割质量与关系预测性能问题。
AI.motivation: 现有单阶段方法分割效果欠佳，两阶段方法因缺乏全局上下文导致关系预测性能不足，需平衡分割质量与关系预测的全局感知能力。
AI.method: 设计两阶段GRNet框架，利用预提取的局部物体特征与掩码输入Transformer编码器，并引入类别嵌入；通过软标签多分类策略处理长尾分布导致的关系歧义与预测偏差。
AI.result: 在OpenPSG数据集上取得SOTA性能，软标签策略在长尾类别消融实验中验证有效，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: GRNet通过融合分割掩码与全局关系建模，有效提升了PSG生成性能，软标签策略为长尾关系预测提供了新思路。

authors_text: Grégoire Cattan,Alexandre Quemy,Anton Andreev
title: First steps towards quantum machine learning applied to the classification of event-related potentials
title_zh: 量子机器学习应用于事件相关电位分类的第一步
comment: in French language
comments: in French language
abstract: Low information transfer rate is a major bottleneck for brain-computer interfaces based on non-invasive electroencephalography (EEG) for clinical applications. This led to the development of more robust and accurate classifiers. In this study, we investigate the performance of quantum-enhanced support vector classifier (QSVC). Training (predicting) balanced accuracy of QSVC was 83.17 (50.25) %. This result shows that the classifier was able to learn from EEG data, but that more research is required to obtain higher predicting accuracy. This could be achieved by a better configuration of the classifier, such as increasing the number of shots.
summary: Low information transfer rate is a major bottleneck for brain-computer interfaces based on non-invasive electroencephalography (EEG) for clinical applications. This led to the development of more robust and accurate classifiers. In this study, we investigate the performance of quantum-enhanced support vector classifier (QSVC). Training (predicting) balanced accuracy of QSVC was 83.17 (50.25) %. This result shows that the classifier was able to learn from EEG data, but that more research is required to obtain higher predicting accuracy. This could be achieved by a better configuration of the classifier, such as increasing the number of shots.
abstract_zh: 信息传输速率低是临床应用中基于无创脑电图（EEG）的脑机接口的主要瓶颈。这导致了更强大和更准确的分类器的开发。在本研究中，我们研究了量子增强支持向量分类器（QSVC）的性能。 QSVC 的训练（预测）平衡准确率为 83.17 (50.25) %。该结果表明分类器能够从脑电图数据中学习，但需要更多的研究才能获得更高的预测精度。这可以通过更好的分类器配置来实现，例如增加镜头数量。

AI.tldr: 本文探索量子机器学习在事件相关电位分类中的应用，以提高脑机接口的分类准确率。
AI.motivation: 非侵入式脑电图（EEG）脑机接口存在信息传输率低的问题，需开发更稳健的分类算法。
AI.method: 采用量子增强支持向量分类器（QSVC），通过调整参数（如shots数量）优化分类性能。
AI.result: QSVC训练准确率达83.17%，但预测准确率仅50.25%，表明需进一步优化模型配置。
AI.conclusion: 量子分类器可从EEG数据中学习，但需更多研究提升预测精度，例如增加shots数量。

search_text: First steps towards quantum machine learning applied to the classification of event-related potentials 量子机器学习应用于事件相关电位分类的第一步 Low information transfer rate is a major bottleneck for brain-computer interfaces based on non-invasive electroencephalography (EEG) for clinical applications. This led to the development of more robust and accurate classifiers. In this study, we investigate the performance of quantum-enhanced support vector classifier (QSVC). Training (predicting) balanced accuracy of QSVC was 83.17 (50.25) %. This result shows that the classifier was able to learn from EEG data, but that more research is required to obtain higher predicting accuracy. This could be achieved by a better configuration of the classifier, such as increasing the number of shots. 信息传输速率低是临床应用中基于无创脑电图（EEG）的脑机接口的主要瓶颈。这导致了更强大和更准确的分类器的开发。在本研究中，我们研究了量子增强支持向量分类器（QSVC）的性能。 QSVC 的训练（预测）平衡准确率为 83.17 (50.25) %。该结果表明分类器能够从脑电图数据中学习，但需要更多的研究才能获得更高的预测精度。这可以通过更好的分类器配置来实现，例如增加镜头数量。 本文探索量子机器学习在事件相关电位分类中的应用，以提高脑机接口的分类准确率。 Grégoire Cattan,Alexandre Quemy,Anton Andreev cs.HC,stat.ML

authors_text: Carlo S. Sartori,Pieter Smet,Greet Vanden Berghe
title: Models and algorithms for simple disjunctive temporal problems
title_zh: 简单析取时间问题的模型和算法
comment: 29 pages, under review
comments: 29 pages, under review
abstract: Simple temporal problems represent a powerful class of models capable of describing the temporal relations between events that arise in many real-world applications such as logistics, robot planning and management systems. The classic simple temporal problem permits each event to have only a single release and due date. In this paper, we focus on the case where events may have an arbitrarily large number of release and due dates. This type of problem, however, has been referred to by various names. In order to simplify and standardize nomenclatures, we introduce the name Simple Disjunctive Temporal Problem. We provide three mathematical models to describe this problem using constraint programming and linear programming. To efficiently solve simple disjunctive temporal problems, we design two new algorithms inspired by previous research, both of which exploit the problem's structure to significantly reduce their space complexity. Additionally, we implement algorithms from the literature and provide the first in-depth empirical study comparing methods to solve simple disjunctive temporal problems across a wide range of experiments. Our analysis and conclusions offer guidance for future researchers and practitioners when tackling similar temporal constraint problems in new applications. All results, source code and instances are made publicly available to further assist future research.
summary: Simple temporal problems represent a powerful class of models capable of describing the temporal relations between events that arise in many real-world applications such as logistics, robot planning and management systems. The classic simple temporal problem permits each event to have only a single release and due date. In this paper, we focus on the case where events may have an arbitrarily large number of release and due dates. This type of problem, however, has been referred to by various names. In order to simplify and standardize nomenclatures, we introduce the name Simple Disjunctive Temporal Problem. We provide three mathematical models to describe this problem using constraint programming and linear programming. To efficiently solve simple disjunctive temporal problems, we design two new algorithms inspired by previous research, both of which exploit the problem's structure to significantly reduce their space complexity. Additionally, we implement algorithms from the literature and provide the first in-depth empirical study comparing methods to solve simple disjunctive temporal problems across a wide range of experiments. Our analysis and conclusions offer guidance for future researchers and practitioners when tackling similar temporal constraint problems in new applications. All results, source code and instances are made publicly available to further assist future research.
abstract_zh: 简单的时间问题代表了一类强大的模型，能够描述许多现实应用（例如物流、机器人规划和管理系统）中出现的事件之间的时间关系。经典的简单时间问题允许每个事件只有一个发布和截止日期。在本文中，我们重点关注事件可能具有任意大量发布日期和截止日期的情况。然而，这类问题有不同的名称。为了简化和标准化术语，我们引入简单析取时间问题这个名称。我们提供了三个数学模型来使用约束规划和线性规划来描述这个问题。为了有效地解决简单的析取时间问题，我们受先前研究的启发设计了两种新算法，这两种算法都利用问题的结构来显着降低其空间复杂度。此外，我们还实现了文献中的算法，并提供了第一个深入的实证研究，比较了在广泛的实验中解决简单的析取时间问题的方法。我们的分析和结论为未来的研究人员和实践者在新应用中解决类似的时间约束问题时提供指导。所有结果、源代码和实例均公开提供，以进一步协助未来的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出用于解决简单析取时序问题（SDTP）的数学模型和算法，扩展传统时序问题以支持事件的多个释放和截止日期。
AI.motivation: 传统简单时序问题仅支持事件的单一时间约束，难以应对实际应用中事件可能具有多个释放和截止日期的需求。
AI.method: 引入三种数学模型（约束编程和线性规划），设计两种基于问题结构优化空间复杂度的算法，并实施文献中的算法进行大规模实验对比。
AI.result: 提出SDTP标准化命名，公开所有实验结果、源代码和实例，验证新算法在解决复杂时序约束问题上的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 新模型和算法为处理多时间约束的时序问题提供有效方法，研究结果为未来相关领域研究提供实践指导。

authors_text: Frédéric Schmidt
title: Approximation of radiative transfer for surface spectral features
title_zh: 表面光谱特征的辐射传输近似
comment: 4 pages, 3 figures, submitted 21st october 2022 to IEEE Geoscience and Remote Sensing Letters
comments: 4 pages, 3 figures, submitted 21st october 2022 to IEEE Geoscience and Remote Sensing Letters
abstract: Remote sensing hyperspectral and more generally spectral instruments are common tools to decipher surface features in Earth and Planetary science. While linear mixture is the most common approximation for compounds detection (mineral, water, ice, etc...), the transfer of light in surface and atmospheric medium are highly non-linear. The exact simulation of non-linearities can be estimated at very high numerical cost. Here I propose a very simple non-linear form (that includes the regular linear area mixture) of radiative transfer to approximate surface spectral feature. I demonstrate that this analytical form is able to approximate the grain size and intimate mixture dependence of surface features. In addition, the same analytical form can approximate the effect of Martian mineral aerosols. Unfortunately, Earth aerosols are more complex (water droplet, water ice, soot,...) and are not expected to follow the same trend.
summary: Remote sensing hyperspectral and more generally spectral instruments are common tools to decipher surface features in Earth and Planetary science. While linear mixture is the most common approximation for compounds detection (mineral, water, ice, etc...), the transfer of light in surface and atmospheric medium are highly non-linear. The exact simulation of non-linearities can be estimated at very high numerical cost. Here I propose a very simple non-linear form (that includes the regular linear area mixture) of radiative transfer to approximate surface spectral feature. I demonstrate that this analytical form is able to approximate the grain size and intimate mixture dependence of surface features. In addition, the same analytical form can approximate the effect of Martian mineral aerosols. Unfortunately, Earth aerosols are more complex (water droplet, water ice, soot,...) and are not expected to follow the same trend.
abstract_zh: 遥感高光谱和更普遍的光谱仪器是地球和行星科学中破译表面特征的常用工具。虽然线性混合物是化合物检测（矿物质、水、冰等）最常见的近似，但光在表面和大气介质中的传输是高度非线性的。非线性的精确模拟可以以非常高的数值成本来估计。在这里，我提出了一种非常简单的非线性形式（包括规则的线性区域混合）的辐射传输来近似表面光谱特征。我证明这种分析形式能够近似表面特征的晶粒尺寸和密切的混合物依赖性。此外，相同的分析形式可以近似模拟火星矿物气溶胶的影响。不幸的是，地球气溶胶更为复杂（水滴、水冰、烟灰……），预计不会遵循相同的趋势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种包含线性混合的非线性辐射传输模型，用于近似地表光谱特征，并验证其在火星矿物气溶胶中的适用性。
AI.motivation: 传统线性混合模型难以准确描述光在地表和大气中的非线性传输过程，而精确模拟非线性过程计算成本过高，需寻找更高效的近似方法。
AI.method: 构建一种解析非线性辐射传输形式，结合线性混合模型，通过实验验证其对颗粒尺寸、紧密混合效应及火星矿物气溶胶的模拟能力。
AI.result: 该模型成功近似了地表特征的颗粒尺寸依赖性和紧密混合效应，并可模拟火星矿物气溶胶的影响，但对地球复杂气溶胶（如水滴、烟尘）的适用性存疑。
AI.conclusion: 提出的非线性模型在火星环境中有良好表现，但需进一步研究以适配地球更复杂的气溶胶特性。

Unfortunately, Earth aerosols are more complex (water droplet, water ice, soot,...) and are not expected to follow the same trend. 遥感高光谱和更普遍的光谱仪器是地球和行星科学中破译表面特征的常用工具。虽然线性混合物是化合物检测（矿物质、水、冰等）最常见的近似，但光在表面和大气介质中的传输是高度非线性的。非线性的精确模拟可以以非常高的数值成本来估计。在这里，我提出了一种非常简单的非线性形式（包括规则的线性区域混合）的辐射传输来近似表面光谱特征。我证明这种分析形式能够近似表面特征的晶粒尺寸和密切的混合物依赖性。此外，相同的分析形式可以近似模拟火星矿物气溶胶的影响。不幸的是，地球气溶胶更为复杂（水滴、水冰、烟灰……），预计不会遵循相同的趋势。 本文提出一种包含线性混合的非线性辐射传输模型，用于近似地表光谱特征，并验证其在火星矿物气溶胶中的适用性。 Frédéric Schmidt astro-ph.EP,cs.CV,physics.ao-ph,physics.ins-det

authors_text: Nishad Singhi,Florian Mohnert,Ben Prystawski,Falk Lieder
title: Toward a normative theory of (self-)management by goal-setting
title_zh: 走向通过目标设定进行（自我）管理的规范理论
abstract: People are often confronted with problems whose complexity exceeds their cognitive capacities. To deal with this complexity, individuals and managers can break complex problems down into a series of subgoals. Which subgoals are most effective depends on people's cognitive constraints and the cognitive mechanisms of goal pursuit. This creates an untapped opportunity to derive practical recommendations for which subgoals managers and individuals should set from cognitive models of bounded rationality. To seize this opportunity, we apply the principle of resource-rationality to formulate a mathematically precise normative theory of (self-)management by goal-setting. We leverage this theory to computationally derive optimal subgoals from a resource-rational model of human goal pursuit. Finally, we show that the resulting subgoals improve the problem-solving performance of bounded agents and human participants. This constitutes a first step towards grounding prescriptive theories of management and practical recommendations for goal-setting in computational models of the relevant psychological processes and cognitive limitations.
summary: People are often confronted with problems whose complexity exceeds their cognitive capacities. To deal with this complexity, individuals and managers can break complex problems down into a series of subgoals. Which subgoals are most effective depends on people's cognitive constraints and the cognitive mechanisms of goal pursuit. This creates an untapped opportunity to derive practical recommendations for which subgoals managers and individuals should set from cognitive models of bounded rationality. To seize this opportunity, we apply the principle of resource-rationality to formulate a mathematically precise normative theory of (self-)management by goal-setting. We leverage this theory to computationally derive optimal subgoals from a resource-rational model of human goal pursuit. Finally, we show that the resulting subgoals improve the problem-solving performance of bounded agents and human participants. This constitutes a first step towards grounding prescriptive theories of management and practical recommendations for goal-setting in computational models of the relevant psychological processes and cognitive limitations.
abstract_zh: 人们经常面临复杂程度超出其认知能力的问题。为了处理这种复杂性，个人和管理者可以将复杂的问题分解为一系列子目标。哪些子目标最有效取决于人们的认知约束和目标追求的认知机制。这创造了一个尚未开发的机会，可以得出管理者和个人应从有限理性的认知模型中设定子目标的实用建议。为了抓住这个机会，我们运用资源理性原理，通过目标设定制定了数学上精确的（自我）管理规范理论。我们利用这一理论从人类目标追求的资源理性模型中计算得出最佳子目标。最后，我们表明由此产生的子目标提高了有界代理和人类参与者解决问题的性能。这是在相关心理过程和认知限制的计算模型中奠定管理规范理论和目标设定实用建议的第一步。

AI.tldr: 提出基于资源理性的规范理论，指导通过设定子目标来管理复杂问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未能有效利用认知模型，需从有限理性模型中推导实际建议。
AI.method: 应用资源理性原则，构建数学规范理论，并通过计算模型推导最优子目标。
AI.result: 实验显示，这些子目标提升了有限代理人的问题解决能力和人类参与者的绩效。
AI.conclusion: 为管理理论和实践建议基于心理过程和认知限制的计算模型奠定基础。

authors_text: Ailin Deng,Shen Li,Miao Xiong,Zhirui Chen,Bryan Hooi
title: Trust, but Verify: Using Self-Supervised Probing to Improve Trustworthiness
title_zh: 信任，但要验证：使用自我监督的探测来提高可信度
comment: European Conference on Computer Vision 2022
comments: European Conference on Computer Vision 2022
abstract: Trustworthy machine learning is of primary importance to the practical deployment of deep learning models. While state-of-the-art models achieve astonishingly good performance in terms of accuracy, recent literature reveals that their predictive confidence scores unfortunately cannot be trusted: e.g., they are often overconfident when wrong predictions are made, or so even for obvious outliers. In this paper, we introduce a new approach of self-supervised probing, which enables us to check and mitigate the overconfidence issue for a trained model, thereby improving its trustworthiness. We provide a simple yet effective framework, which can be flexibly applied to existing trustworthiness-related methods in a plug-and-play manner. Extensive experiments on three trustworthiness-related tasks (misclassification detection, calibration and out-of-distribution detection) across various benchmarks verify the effectiveness of our proposed probing framework.
summary: Trustworthy machine learning is of primary importance to the practical deployment of deep learning models. While state-of-the-art models achieve astonishingly good performance in terms of accuracy, recent literature reveals that their predictive confidence scores unfortunately cannot be trusted: e.g., they are often overconfident when wrong predictions are made, or so even for obvious outliers. In this paper, we introduce a new approach of self-supervised probing, which enables us to check and mitigate the overconfidence issue for a trained model, thereby improving its trustworthiness. We provide a simple yet effective framework, which can be flexibly applied to existing trustworthiness-related methods in a plug-and-play manner. Extensive experiments on three trustworthiness-related tasks (misclassification detection, calibration and out-of-distribution detection) across various benchmarks verify the effectiveness of our proposed probing framework.
abstract_zh: 值得信赖的机器学习对于深度学习模型的实际部署至关重要。虽然最先进的模型在准确性方面取得了令人惊讶的良好性能，但最近的文献表明，不幸的是，它们的预测置信度分数不可信：例如，当做出错误的预测时，甚至对于明显的异常值，它们常常过于自信。在本文中，我们引入了一种新的自监督探测方法，它使我们能够检查和减轻训练模型的过度自信问题，从而提高其可信度。我们提供了一个简单而有效的框架，可以以即插即用的方式灵活地应用于现有的可信度相关方法。在各种基准上对三个与可信度相关的任务（错误分类检测、校准和分布外检测）进行的广泛实验验证了我们提出的探测框架的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督探测方法，用于提升深度学习模型的可信度。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型虽准确率高，但预测置信度不可靠，存在过自信问题，影响实际部署中的可信度。
AI.method: 设计自监督探测框架，通过插件式方式与现有可信度方法结合，缓解模型过自信问题。
AI.result: 在三个可信度相关任务（错误检测、校准、分布外检测）的多基准测试中验证了框架有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效提升模型可信度，为实际应用提供可行解决方案。

authors_text: Fabian Küppers
title: Uncertainty Calibration and its Application to Object Detection
title_zh: 不确定性校准及其在物体检测中的应用
comment: PhD thesis at University of Wuppertal, cite by: 'Fabian Küppers. "Uncertainty Calibration and its Application to Object Detection." PhD Thesis, University of Wuppertal, January 2023'
comments: PhD thesis at University of Wuppertal, cite by: 'Fabian Küppers. "Uncertainty Calibration and its Application to Object Detection." PhD Thesis, University of Wuppertal, January 2023'
abstract: Image-based environment perception is an important component especially for driver assistance systems or autonomous driving. In this scope, modern neuronal networks are used to identify multiple objects as well as the according position and size information within a single frame. The performance of such an object detection model is important for the overall performance of the whole system. However, a detection model might also predict these objects under a certain degree of uncertainty. [...] In this work, we examine the semantic uncertainty (which object type?) as well as the spatial uncertainty (where is the object and how large is it?). We evaluate if the predicted uncertainties of an object detection model match with the observed error that is achieved on real-world data. In the first part of this work, we introduce the definition for confidence calibration of the semantic uncertainty in the context of object detection, instance segmentation, and semantic segmentation. We integrate additional position information in our examinations to evaluate the effect of the object's position on the semantic calibration properties. Besides measuring calibration, it is also possible to perform a post-hoc recalibration of semantic uncertainty that might have turned out to be miscalibrated. [...] The second part of this work deals with the spatial uncertainty obtained by a probabilistic detection model. [...] We review and extend common calibration methods so that it is possible to obtain parametric uncertainty distributions for the position information in a more flexible way. In the last part, we demonstrate a possible use-case for our derived calibration methods in the context of object tracking. [...] We integrate our previously proposed calibration techniques and demonstrate the usefulness of semantic and spatial uncertainty calibration in a subsequent process. [...]
summary: Image-based environment perception is an important component especially for driver assistance systems or autonomous driving. In this scope, modern neuronal networks are used to identify multiple objects as well as the according position and size information within a single frame. The performance of such an object detection model is important for the overall performance of the whole system. However, a detection model might also predict these objects under a certain degree of uncertainty. [...] In this work, we examine the semantic uncertainty (which object type?) as well as the spatial uncertainty (where is the object and how large is it?). We evaluate if the predicted uncertainties of an object detection model match with the observed error that is achieved on real-world data. In the first part of this work, we introduce the definition for confidence calibration of the semantic uncertainty in the context of object detection, instance segmentation, and semantic segmentation. We integrate additional position information in our examinations to evaluate the effect of the object's position on the semantic calibration properties. Besides measuring calibration, it is also possible to perform a post-hoc recalibration of semantic uncertainty that might have turned out to be miscalibrated. [...] The second part of this work deals with the spatial uncertainty obtained by a probabilistic detection model. [...] We review and extend common calibration methods so that it is possible to obtain parametric uncertainty distributions for the position information in a more flexible way. In the last part, we demonstrate a possible use-case for our derived calibration methods in the context of object tracking. [...] We integrate our previously proposed calibration techniques and demonstrate the usefulness of semantic and spatial uncertainty calibration in a subsequent process. [...]
abstract_zh: 基于图像的环境感知是一个重要组成部分，尤其是对于驾驶员辅助系统或自动驾驶而言。在此范围内，现代神经网络用于识别多个对象以及单个帧内的相应位置和大小信息。这种目标检测模型的性能对于整个系统的整体性能非常重要。然而，检测模型也可能在一定程度的不确定性下预测这些物体。 [...] 在这项工作中，我们检查了语义不确定性（哪种对象类型？）以及空间不确定性（对象在哪里以及有多大？）。我们评估对象检测模型的预测不确定性是否与在现实世界数据上实现的观察到的误差相匹配。在这项工作的第一部分中，我们介绍了对象检测、实例分割和语义分割背景下语义不确定性的置信度校准的定义。我们在检查中集成了额外的位置信息，以评估对象位置对语义校准属性的影响。除了测量校准之外，还可以对可能被错误校准的语义不确定性进行事后重新校准。 [...]这项工作的第二部分涉及概率检测模型获得的空间不确定性。 [...]我们回顾并扩展了常见的校准方法，以便能够以更灵活的方式获得位置信息的参数不确定性分布。在最后一部分中，我们演示了在对象跟踪背景下派生的校准方法的可能用例。 [...]我们整合了之前提出的校准技术，并在后续过程中证明了语义和空间不确定性校准的有用性。 [...]

AI.tldr: 本文研究了目标检测模型中语义不确定性和空间不确定性的校准方法，并探讨其在实际应用中的效果。
AI.motivation: 目标检测模型在自动驾驶等关键系统中需具备可靠性，但现有模型的预测不确定性可能与实际误差不匹配，需通过校准提升其可信度。
AI.method: 提出语义不确定性校准定义，结合位置信息评估校准特性；扩展空间不确定性校准方法，生成灵活的位置概率分布，并在目标跟踪中验证校准技术的有效性。
AI.result: 验证了语义不确定性校准与实际误差的一致性，展示了空间不确定性校准的灵活性，并通过跟踪案例证明了校准方法的实用性。
AI.conclusion: 语义与空间不确定性校准可提升目标检测模型在实际场景中的可靠性，为自动驾驶等安全关键系统提供理论支持。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 语义与空间不确定性校准可提升目标检测模型在实际场景中的可靠性，为自动驾驶等安全关键系统提供理论支持。

search_text: Uncertainty Calibration and its Application to Object Detection 不确定性校准及其在物体检测中的应用 Image-based environment perception is an important component especially for driver assistance systems or autonomous driving. In this scope, modern neuronal networks are used to identify multiple objects as well as the according position and size information within a single frame. The performance of such an object detection model is important for the overall performance of the whole system. However, a detection model might also predict these objects under a certain degree of uncertainty. [...] In this work, we examine the semantic uncertainty (which object type?) as well as the spatial uncertainty (where is the object and how large is it?). We evaluate if the predicted uncertainties of an object detection model match with the observed error that is achieved on real-world data. In the first part of this work, we introduce the definition for confidence calibration of the semantic uncertainty in the context of object detection, instance segmentation, and semantic segmentation. We integrate additional position information in our examinations to evaluate the effect of the object's position on the semantic calibration properties. Besides measuring calibration, it is also possible to perform a post-hoc recalibration of semantic uncertainty that might have turned out to be miscalibrated. [...] The second part of this work deals with the spatial uncertainty obtained by a probabilistic detection model. [...] We review and extend common calibration methods so that it is possible to obtain parametric uncertainty distributions for the position information in a more flexible way. In the last part, we demonstrate a possible use-case for our derived calibration methods in the context of object tracking. [...] We integrate our previously proposed calibration techniques and demonstrate the usefulness of semantic and spatial uncertainty calibration in a subsequent process. [...] 基于图像的环境感知是一个重要组成部分，尤其是对于驾驶员辅助系统或自动驾驶而言。在此范围内，现代神经网络用于识别多个对象以及单个帧内的相应位置和大小信息。这种目标检测模型的性能对于整个系统的整体性能非常重要。然而，检测模型也可能在一定程度的不确定性下预测这些物体。 [...] 在这项工作中，我们检查了语义不确定性（哪种对象类型？）以及空间不确定性（对象在哪里以及有多大？）。我们评估对象检测模型的预测不确定性是否与在现实世界数据上实现的观察到的误差相匹配。在这项工作的第一部分中，我们介绍了对象检测、实例分割和语义分割背景下语义不确定性的置信度校准的定义。我们在检查中集成了额外的位置信息，以评估对象位置对语义校准属性的影响。除了测量校准之外，还可以对可能被错误校准的语义不确定性进行事后重新校准。 [...]这项工作的第二部分涉及概率检测模型获得的空间不确定性。 [...]我们回顾并扩展了常见的校准方法，以便能够以更灵活的方式获得位置信息的参数不确定性分布。在最后一部分中，我们演示了在对象跟踪背景下派生的校准方法的可能用例。 [...]我们整合了之前提出的校准技术，并在后续过程中证明了语义和空间不确定性校准的有用性。 [...] 本文研究了目标检测模型中语义不确定性和空间不确定性的校准方法，并探讨其在实际应用中的效果。 Fabian Küppers cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG,stat.ML

authors_text: Saddam Hussain Khan
title: COVID-19 Infection Analysis Framework using Novel Boosted CNNs and Radiological Images
title_zh: 使用新型增强型 CNN 和放射图像的 COVID-19 感染分析框架
comment: 26 Pages, 11 Figures, 6 Tables. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2209.10963
comments: 26 Pages, 11 Figures, 6 Tables. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2209.10963
abstract: COVID-19 is a new pathogen that first appeared in the human population at the end of 2019, and it can lead to novel variants of pneumonia after infection. COVID-19 is a rapidly spreading infectious disease that infects humans faster. Therefore, efficient diagnostic systems may accurately identify infected patients and thus help control their spread. In this regard, a new two-stage analysis framework is developed to analyze minute irregularities of COVID-19 infection. A novel detection Convolutional Neural Network (CNN), STM-BRNet, is developed that incorporates the Split-Transform-Merge (STM) block and channel boosting (CB) to identify COVID-19 infected CT slices in the first stage. Each STM block extracts boundary and region-smoothing-specific features for COVID-19 infection detection. Moreover, the various boosted channels are obtained by introducing the new CB and Transfer Learning (TL) concept in STM blocks to capture small illumination and texture variations of COVID-19-specific images. The COVID-19 CTs are provided with new SA-CB-BRSeg segmentation CNN for delineating infection in images in the second stage. SA-CB-BRSeg methodically utilized smoothening and heterogeneous operations in the encoder and decoder to capture simultaneously COVID-19 specific patterns that are region homogeneity, texture variation, and boundaries. Additionally, the new CB concept is introduced in the decoder of SA-CB-BRSeg by combining additional channels using TL to learn the low contrast region. The proposed STM-BRNet and SA-CB-BRSeg yield considerable achievement in accuracy: 98.01 %, Recall: 98.12%, F-score: 98.11%, and Dice Similarity: 96.396%, IOU: 98.845 % for the COVID-19 infectious region, respectively. The proposed two-stage framework significantly increased performance compared to single-phase and other reported systems and reduced the burden on the radiologists.

Moreover, the various boosted channels are obtained by introducing the new CB and Transfer Learning (TL) concept in STM blocks to capture small illumination and texture variations of COVID-19-specific images. The COVID-19 CTs are provided with new SA-CB-BRSeg segmentation CNN for delineating infection in images in the second stage. SA-CB-BRSeg methodically utilized smoothening and heterogeneous operations in the encoder and decoder to capture simultaneously COVID-19 specific patterns that are region homogeneity, texture variation, and boundaries. Additionally, the new CB concept is introduced in the decoder of SA-CB-BRSeg by combining additional channels using TL to learn the low contrast region. The proposed STM-BRNet and SA-CB-BRSeg yield considerable achievement in accuracy: 98.01 %, Recall: 98.12%, F-score: 98.11%, and Dice Similarity: 96.396%, IOU: 98.845 % for the COVID-19 infectious region, respectively. abstract_zh: COVID-19是一种新病原体，于2019年底首次出现在人群中，感染后可导致肺炎的新变种。 COVID-19 是一种快速传播的传染病，可以更快地感染人类。因此，高效的诊断系统可以准确识别受感染的患者，从而有助于控制其传播。在这方面，开发了一个新的两阶段分析框架来分析 COVID-19 感染的微小异常情况。开发了一种新颖的检测卷积神经网络 (CNN) STM-BRNet，它结合了分割-变换-合并 (STM) 块和通道增强 (CB)，以在第一阶段识别受 COVID-19 感染的 CT 切片。每个 STM 块都会提取特定于边界和区域平滑的特征以进行 COVID-19 感染检测。此外，通过在 STM 模块中引入新的 CB 和迁移学习 (TL) 概念来捕获 COVID-19 特定图像的微小照明和纹理变化，从而获得各种增强通道。 COVID-19 CT 配备了新的 SA-CB-BRSeg 分割 CNN，用于在第二阶段描绘图像中的感染。 SA-CB-BRSeg 有条不紊地利用编码器和解码器中的平滑和异构操作来同时捕获 COVID-19 特定模式，即区域同质性、纹理变化和边界。此外，通过使用 TL 组合附加通道来学习低对比度区域，SA-CB-BRSeg 的解码器中引入了新的 CB 概念。所提出的 STM-BRNet 和 SA-CB-BRSeg 在 COVID-19 感染区域的准确率：98.01%、召回率：98.12%、F 分数：98.11%、骰子相似度：96.396%、IOU：98.845% 方面分别取得了相当大的成就。与单相和其他报道的系统相比，所提出的两阶段框架显着提高了性能，并减轻了放射科医生的负担。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于改进卷积神经网络（CNN）和放射影像的两阶段框架，用于分析COVID-19感染。
AI.motivation: 为提高COVID-19感染的诊断效率和准确性，减少放射科医生的工作负担，需开发更高效的检测与分割方法。
AI.method: 设计了两阶段框架：第一阶段采用STM-BRNet网络（含STM模块和通道增强技术）检测CT切片中的感染区域；第二阶段通过SA-CB-BRSeg网络结合平滑与异构操作实现感染区域分割，并引入迁移学习优化低对比度区域识别。
AI.result: 在COVID-19感染区域检测中达到98.01%准确率、98.12%召回率、98.11% F1分数、96.396% Dice相似度及98.845% IOU，显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该两阶段框架通过创新的网络结构和通道增强技术，有效提升了诊断性能，为临床提供了更精准的辅助工具。

authors_text: Jingyao Li,Pengguang Chen,Shaozuo Yu,Zexin He,Shu Liu,Jiaya Jia
title: Rethinking Out-of-distribution (OOD) Detection: Masked Image Modeling is All You Need
title_zh: 重新思考分布外 (OOD) 检测：掩模图像建模就是您所需要的
comment: This paper is accepted by CVPR2023 and our codes are released here: https://github.com/JulietLJY/MOOD
comments: This paper is accepted by CVPR2023 and our codes are released here: https://github.com/JulietLJY/MOOD
abstract: The core of out-of-distribution (OOD) detection is to learn the in-distribution (ID) representation, which is distinguishable from OOD samples. Previous work applied recognition-based methods to learn the ID features, which tend to learn shortcuts instead of comprehensive representations. In this work, we find surprisingly that simply using reconstruction-based methods could boost the performance of OOD detection significantly. We deeply explore the main contributors of OOD detection and find that reconstruction-based pretext tasks have the potential to provide a generally applicable and efficacious prior, which benefits the model in learning intrinsic data distributions of the ID dataset. Specifically, we take Masked Image Modeling as a pretext task for our OOD detection framework (MOOD). Without bells and whistles, MOOD outperforms previous SOTA of one-class OOD detection by 5.7%, multi-class OOD detection by 3.0%, and near-distribution OOD detection by 2.1%. It even defeats the 10-shot-per-class outlier exposure OOD detection, although we do not include any OOD samples for our detection
summary: The core of out-of-distribution (OOD) detection is to learn the in-distribution (ID) representation, which is distinguishable from OOD samples. Previous work applied recognition-based methods to learn the ID features, which tend to learn shortcuts instead of comprehensive representations. In this work, we find surprisingly that simply using reconstruction-based methods could boost the performance of OOD detection significantly. We deeply explore the main contributors of OOD detection and find that reconstruction-based pretext tasks have the potential to provide a generally applicable and efficacious prior, which benefits the model in learning intrinsic data distributions of the ID dataset. Specifically, we take Masked Image Modeling as a pretext task for our OOD detection framework (MOOD). Without bells and whistles, MOOD outperforms previous SOTA of one-class OOD detection by 5.7%, multi-class OOD detection by 3.0%, and near-distribution OOD detection by 2.1%. It even defeats the 10-shot-per-class outlier exposure OOD detection, although we do not include any OOD samples for our detection
abstract_zh: 分布外（OOD）检测的核心是学习分布内（ID）表示，它与OOD样本有区别。以前的工作应用基于识别的方法来学习 ID 特征，这些特征倾向于学习快捷方式而不是综合表示。在这项工作中，我们令人惊讶地发现，简单地使用基于重建的方法可以显着提高 OOD 检测的性能。我们深入探讨了 OOD 检测的主要贡献者，发现基于重建的借口任务有可能提供普遍适用且有效的先验，这有利于模型学习 ID 数据集的内在数据分布。具体来说，我们将蒙版图像建模作为 OOD 检测框架 (MOOD) 的借口任务。没有花里胡哨的东西，MOOD 比之前的 SOTA 的一类 OOD 检测提高了 5.7%，多类 OOD 检测提高了 3.0%，近分布 OOD 检测提高了 2.1%。它甚至击败了每类 10 次异常曝光 OOD 检测，尽管我们没有在检测中包含任何 OOD 样本

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于掩码图像建模（MIM）的新型分布外（OOD）检测框架MOOD，通过重建学习提升OOD检测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统基于识别的方法易产生捷径学习，无法全面表征数据分布，而重建任务能更有效地学习数据内在分布特性。
AI.method: 以掩码图像建模作为预训练任务，构建MOOD框架，在无需显式使用OOD样本的情况下学习ID数据的内在分布表示。
AI.result: 在单类、多类和近分布OOD检测任务中分别超越现有最优方法5.7%、3.0%和2.1%，甚至优于包含OOD样本的10-shot异常暴露方法。
AI.conclusion: 重建-based预训练任务能为OOD检测提供通用且有效的先验，无需依赖OOD样本即可实现优越的检测性能。

search_text: Rethinking Out-of-distribution (OOD) Detection: Masked Image Modeling is All You Need 重新思考分布外 (OOD) 检测：掩模图像建模就是您所需要的 The core of out-of-distribution (OOD) detection is to learn the in-distribution (ID) representation, which is distinguishable from OOD samples. Previous work applied recognition-based methods to learn the ID features, which tend to learn shortcuts instead of comprehensive representations. In this work, we find surprisingly that simply using reconstruction-based methods could boost the performance of OOD detection significantly. We deeply explore the main contributors of OOD detection and find that reconstruction-based pretext tasks have the potential to provide a generally applicable and efficacious prior, which benefits the model in learning intrinsic data distributions of the ID dataset. Specifically, we take Masked Image Modeling as a pretext task for our OOD detection framework (MOOD). Without bells and whistles, MOOD outperforms previous SOTA of one-class OOD detection by 5.7%, multi-class OOD detection by 3.0%, and near-distribution OOD detection by 2.1%. It even defeats the 10-shot-per-class outlier exposure OOD detection, although we do not include any OOD samples for our detection 分布外（OOD）检测的核心是学习分布内（ID）表示，它与OOD样本有区别。以前的工作应用基于识别的方法来学习 ID 特征，这些特征倾向于学习快捷方式而不是综合表示。在这项工作中，我们令人惊讶地发现，简单地使用基于重建的方法可以显着提高 OOD 检测的性能。我们深入探讨了 OOD 检测的主要贡献者，发现基于重建的借口任务有可能提供普遍适用且有效的先验，这有利于模型学习 ID 数据集的内在数据分布。具体来说，我们将蒙版图像建模作为 OOD 检测框架 (MOOD) 的借口任务。没有花里胡哨的东西，MOOD 比之前的 SOTA 的一类 OOD 检测提高了 5.7%，多类 OOD 检测提高了 3.0%，近分布 OOD 检测提高了 2.1%。它甚至击败了每类 10 次异常曝光 OOD 检测，尽管我们没有在检测中包含任何 OOD 样本 本文提出了一种基于掩码图像建模（MIM）的新型分布外（OOD）检测框架MOOD，通过重建学习提升OOD检测性能。 Jingyao Li,Pengguang Chen,Shaozuo Yu,Zexin He,Shu Liu,Jiaya Jia cs.CV

authors_text: Kuan Xu,Kuo Yang,Hanyang Dong,Xinyan Wang,Jian Yu,Xuezhong Zhou
title: A Pre-training Framework for Knowledge Graph Completion
title_zh: 知识图补全的预训练框架
abstract: Knowledge graph completion (KGC) is one of the effective methods to identify new facts in knowledge graph. Except for a few methods based on graph network, most of KGC methods trend to be trained based on independent triples, while are difficult to take a full account of the information of global network connection contained in knowledge network. To address these issues, in this study, we propose a simple and effective Network-based Pre-training framework for knowledge graph completion (termed NetPeace), which takes into account the information of global network connection and local triple relationships in knowledge graph. Experiments show that in NetPeace framework, multiple KGC models yields consistent and significant improvements on benchmarks (e.g., 36.45% Hits@1 and 27.40% MRR improvements for TuckER on FB15k-237), especially dense knowledge graph. On the challenging low-resource task, NetPeace that benefits from the global features of KG achieves higher performance (104.03% MRR and 143.89% Hit@1 improvements at most) than original models.
summary: Knowledge graph completion (KGC) is one of the effective methods to identify new facts in knowledge graph. Except for a few methods based on graph network, most of KGC methods trend to be trained based on independent triples, while are difficult to take a full account of the information of global network connection contained in knowledge network. To address these issues, in this study, we propose a simple and effective Network-based Pre-training framework for knowledge graph completion (termed NetPeace), which takes into account the information of global network connection and local triple relationships in knowledge graph. Experiments show that in NetPeace framework, multiple KGC models yields consistent and significant improvements on benchmarks (e.g., 36.45% Hits@1 and 27.40% MRR improvements for TuckER on FB15k-237), especially dense knowledge graph. On the challenging low-resource task, NetPeace that benefits from the global features of KG achieves higher performance (104.03% MRR and 143.89% Hit@1 improvements at most) than original models.
abstract_zh: 知识图补全（KGC）是识别知识图中新事实的有效方法之一。除了少数基于图网络的方法外，大多数KGC方法都倾向于基于独立三元组进行训练，而难以充分考虑知识网络中包含的全局网络连接信息。为了解决这些问题，在本研究中，我们提出了一种简单有效的基于网络的知识图补全预训练框架（称为NetPeace），该框架考虑了知识图中的全局网络连接和局部三元关系的信息。实验表明，在 NetPeace 框架中，多个 KGC 模型在基准测试上产生了一致且显着的改进（例如，FB15k-237 上的 TuckER 提高了 36.45% Hits@1 和 27.40% MRR），尤其是密集知识图。在具有挑战性的低资源任务上，得益于 KG 的全局特性，NetPeace 实现了比原始模型更高的性能（最多 104.03% MRR 和 143.89% Hit@1 改进）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于网络的预训练框架NetPeace，用于知识图谱补全（KGC），通过结合全局网络连接信息和局部三元组关系提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有KGC方法多基于独立三元组训练，难以充分利用知识图谱中的全局网络连接信息，导致在密集图谱和低资源任务中表现不足。
AI.method: 设计NetPeace框架，通过预训练阶段整合知识图谱的全局网络特征与局部三元组关系，增强模型对全局结构的感知能力。
AI.result: 在FB15k-237等基准测试中，TuckER等模型在NetPeace下Hits@1提升36.45%、MRR提升27.40%；低资源任务中MRR最高提升104.03%、Hit@1提升143.89%。
AI.conclusion: NetPeace通过引入全局网络特征有效提升了KGC模型性能，尤其在密集知识图谱和低资源场景中表现显著。

search_text: A Pre-training Framework for Knowledge Graph Completion 知识图补全的预训练框架 Knowledge graph completion (KGC) is one of the effective methods to identify new facts in knowledge graph. Except for a few methods based on graph network, most of KGC methods trend to be trained based on independent triples, while are difficult to take a full account of the information of global network connection contained in knowledge network. To address these issues, in this study, we propose a simple and effective Network-based Pre-training framework for knowledge graph completion (termed NetPeace), which takes into account the information of global network connection and local triple relationships in knowledge graph. Experiments show that in NetPeace framework, multiple KGC models yields consistent and significant improvements on benchmarks (e.g., 36.45% Hits@1 and 27.40% MRR improvements for TuckER on FB15k-237), especially dense knowledge graph. On the challenging low-resource task, NetPeace that benefits from the global features of KG achieves higher performance (104.03% MRR and 143.89% Hit@1 improvements at most) than original models. 知识图补全（KGC）是识别知识图中新事实的有效方法之一。除了少数基于图网络的方法外，大多数KGC方法都倾向于基于独立三元组进行训练，而难以充分考虑知识网络中包含的全局网络连接信息。为了解决这些问题，在本研究中，我们提出了一种简单有效的基于网络的知识图补全预训练框架（称为NetPeace），该框架考虑了知识图中的全局网络连接和局部三元关系的信息。实验表明，在 NetPeace 框架中，多个 KGC 模型在基准测试上产生了一致且显着的改进（例如，FB15k-237 上的 TuckER 提高了 36.45% Hits@1 和 27.40% MRR），尤其是密集知识图。在具有挑战性的低资源任务上，得益于 KG 的全局特性，NetPeace 实现了比原始模型更高的性能（最多 104.03% MRR 和 143.89% Hit@1 改进）。 本文提出一种基于网络的预训练框架NetPeace，用于知识图谱补全（KGC），通过结合全局网络连接信息和局部三元组关系提升模型性能。 Kuan Xu,Kuo Yang,Hanyang Dong,Xinyan Wang,Jian Yu,Xuezhong Zhou cs.AI

authors_text: Chanyoung Chung,Joyce Jiyoung Whang
title: Learning Representations of Bi-level Knowledge Graphs for Reasoning beyond Link Prediction
title_zh: 用于超越链接预测的推理的双层知识图的学习表示
comment: 14 pages, 3 figures, 15 tables. 37th AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence (AAAI 2023)
comments: 14 pages, 3 figures, 15 tables. 37th AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence (AAAI 2023)
abstract: Knowledge graphs represent known facts using triplets. While existing knowledge graph embedding methods only consider the connections between entities, we propose considering the relationships between triplets. For example, let us consider two triplets $T_1$ and $T_2$ where $T_1$ is (Academy_Awards, Nominates, Avatar) and $T_2$ is (Avatar, Wins, Academy_Awards). Given these two base-level triplets, we see that $T_1$ is a prerequisite for $T_2$. In this paper, we define a higher-level triplet to represent a relationship between triplets, e.g., $\langle T_1$, PrerequisiteFor, $T_2\rangle$ where PrerequisiteFor is a higher-level relation. We define a bi-level knowledge graph that consists of the base-level and the higher-level triplets. We also propose a data augmentation strategy based on the random walks on the bi-level knowledge graph to augment plausible triplets. Our model called BiVE learns embeddings by taking into account the structures of the base-level and the higher-level triplets, with additional consideration of the augmented triplets. We propose two new tasks: triplet prediction and conditional link prediction. Given a triplet $T_1$ and a higher-level relation, the triplet prediction predicts a triplet that is likely to be connected to $T_1$ by the higher-level relation, e.g., $\langle T_1$, PrerequisiteFor, ?$\rangle$. The conditional link prediction predicts a missing entity in a triplet conditioned on another triplet, e.g., $\langle T_1$, PrerequisiteFor, (Avatar, Wins, ?)$\rangle$. Experimental results show that BiVE significantly outperforms all other methods in the two new tasks and the typical base-level link prediction in real-world bi-level knowledge graphs.
summary: Knowledge graphs represent known facts using triplets. While existing knowledge graph embedding methods only consider the connections between entities, we propose considering the relationships between triplets. For example, let us consider two triplets $T_1$ and $T_2$ where $T_1$ is (Academy_Awards, Nominates, Avatar) and $T_2$ is (Avatar, Wins, Academy_Awards). Given these two base-level triplets, we see that $T_1$ is a prerequisite for $T_2$. In this paper, we define a higher-level triplet to represent a relationship between triplets, e.g., $\langle T_1$, PrerequisiteFor, $T_2\rangle$ where PrerequisiteFor is a higher-level relation. We define a bi-level knowledge graph that consists of the base-level and the higher-level triplets. We also propose a data augmentation strategy based on the random walks on the bi-level knowledge graph to augment plausible triplets. Our model called BiVE learns embeddings by taking into account the structures of the base-level and the higher-level triplets, with additional consideration of the augmented triplets. We propose two new tasks: triplet prediction and conditional link prediction. Given a triplet $T_1$ and a higher-level relation, the triplet prediction predicts a triplet that is likely to be connected to $T_1$ by the higher-level relation, e.g., $\langle T_1$, PrerequisiteFor, ?$\rangle$. The conditional link prediction predicts a missing entity in a triplet conditioned on another triplet, e.g., $\langle T_1$, PrerequisiteFor, (Avatar, Wins, ?)$\rangle$. Experimental results show that BiVE significantly outperforms all other methods in the two new tasks and the typical base-level link prediction in real-world bi-level knowledge graphs.
abstract_zh: 知识图使用三元组表示已知事实。虽然现有的知识图嵌入方法仅考虑实体之间的连接，但我们建议考虑三元组之间的关系。例如，让我们考虑两个三元组 $T_1$ 和 $T_2$，其中 $T_1$ 是（Academy_Awards、提名、Avatar），$T_2$ 是（Avatar、Wins、Academy_Awards）。给定这两个基本级别的三元组，我们看到 $T_1$ 是 $T_2$ 的先决条件。在本文中，我们定义了一个更高级别的三元组来表示三元组之间的关系，例如$\langle T_1$，PrecessionFor，$T_2\rangle$，其中PrecessionFor是一个更高级别的关系。我们定义了一个由基础层和高层三元组组成的双层知识图。我们还提出了一种基于双层知识图上的随机游走的数据增强策略，以增强合理的三元组。我们称为 BiVE 的模型通过考虑基础层和更高层三元组的结构来学习嵌入，并额外考虑增强三元组。我们提出了两个新任务：三元组预测和条件链接预测。给定一个三元组 $T_1$ 和一个更高级别的关系，三元组预测会预测一个可能通过高级关系连接到 $T_1$ 的三元组，例如 $\langle T_1$、PrecessionFor、?$\rangle$。条件链接预测预测一个三元组中以另一个三元组为条件的缺失实体，例如 $\langle T_1$、PrecessionFor、(Avatar, Wins, ?)$\rangle$。实验结果表明，BiVE 在这两个新任务以及现实世界双层知识图谱中的典型基础层链接预测中显着优于所有其他方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BiVE模型，通过构建包含基础三元组和高阶三元组的双层知识图谱，解决超越传统链接预测的推理任务。
AI.motivation: 现有知识图谱嵌入方法仅关注实体间关系，无法捕捉三元组间的高阶关系，限制了复杂推理能力。
AI.method: 构建双层知识图谱（基础层与高阶层），通过随机游走生成增强三元组，设计BiVE模型联合学习双层结构，并提出三元组预测和条件链接预测新任务。
AI.result: BiVE在两个新任务及传统链接预测中均显著优于现有方法，验证了双层结构的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 双层知识图谱表示能有效建模三元组间关系，为复杂推理提供新思路。

motivation: 现有知识图谱嵌入方法仅关注实体间关系，无法捕捉三元组间的高阶关系，限制了复杂推理能力。
method: 构建双层知识图谱（基础层与高阶层），通过随机游走生成增强三元组，设计BiVE模型联合学习双层结构，并提出三元组预测和条件链接预测新任务。
result: BiVE在两个新任务及传统链接预测中均显著优于现有方法，验证了双层结构的有效性。
conclusion: 双层知识图谱表示能有效建模三元组间关系，为复杂推理提供新思路。
search_text: Learning Representations of Bi-level Knowledge Graphs for Reasoning beyond Link Prediction 用于超越链接预测的推理的双层知识图的学习表示 Knowledge graphs represent known facts using triplets. While existing knowledge graph embedding methods only consider the connections between entities, we propose considering the relationships between triplets. For example, let us consider two triplets $T_1$ and $T_2$ where $T_1$ is (Academy_Awards, Nominates, Avatar) and $T_2$ is (Avatar, Wins, Academy_Awards). Given these two base-level triplets, we see that $T_1$ is a prerequisite for $T_2$. In this paper, we define a higher-level triplet to represent a relationship between triplets, e.g., $\langle T_1$, PrerequisiteFor, $T_2\rangle$ where PrerequisiteFor is a higher-level relation. We define a bi-level knowledge graph that consists of the base-level and the higher-level triplets. We also propose a data augmentation strategy based on the random walks on the bi-level knowledge graph to augment plausible triplets. Our model called BiVE learns embeddings by taking into account the structures of the base-level and the higher-level triplets, with additional consideration of the augmented triplets. We propose two new tasks: triplet prediction and conditional link prediction. Given a triplet $T_1$ and a higher-level relation, the triplet prediction predicts a triplet that is likely to be connected to $T_1$ by the higher-level relation, e.g., $\langle T_1$, PrerequisiteFor, ?$\rangle$. The conditional link prediction predicts a missing entity in a triplet conditioned on another triplet, e.g., $\langle T_1$, PrerequisiteFor, (Avatar, Wins, ?)$\rangle$. Experimental results show that BiVE significantly outperforms all other methods in the two new tasks and the typical base-level link prediction in real-world bi-level knowledge graphs. 知识图使用三元组表示已知事实。虽然现有的知识图嵌入方法仅考虑实体之间的连接，但我们建议考虑三元组之间的关系。例如，让我们考虑两个三元组 $T_1$ 和 $T_2$，其中 $T_1$ 是（Academy_Awards、提名、Avatar），$T_2$ 是（Avatar、Wins、Academy_Awards）。给定这两个基本级别的三元组，我们看到 $T_1$ 是 $T_2$ 的先决条件。在本文中，我们定义了一个更高级别的三元组来表示三元组之间的关系，例如$\langle T_1$，PrecessionFor，$T_2\rangle$，其中PrecessionFor是一个更高级别的关系。我们定义了一个由基础层和高层三元组组成的双层知识图。我们还提出了一种基于双层知识图上的随机游走的数据增强策略，以增强合理的三元组。我们称为 BiVE 的模型通过考虑基础层和更高层三元组的结构来学习嵌入，并额外考虑增强三元组。我们提出了两个新任务：三元组预测和条件链接预测。给定一个三元组 $T_1$ 和一个更高级别的关系，三元组预测会预测一个可能通过高级关系连接到 $T_1$ 的三元组，例如 $\langle T_1$、PrecessionFor、?$\rangle$。条件链接预测预测一个三元组中以另一个三元组为条件的缺失实体，例如 $\langle T_1$、PrecessionFor、(Avatar, Wins, ?)$\rangle$。实验结果表明，BiVE 在这两个新任务以及现实世界双层知识图谱中的典型基础层链接预测中显着优于所有其他方法。 本文提出BiVE模型，通过构建包含基础三元组和高阶三元组的双层知识图谱，解决超越传统链接预测的推理任务。 Chanyoung Chung,Joyce Jiyoung Whang cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Yuliang Liu,Shenggui Li,Jiarui Fang,Yanjun Shao,Boyuan Yao,Yang You
title: Colossal-Auto: Unified Automation of Parallelization and Activation Checkpoint for Large-scale Models
title_zh: Colossal-Auto：大规模模型并行化和激活检查点的统一自动化
abstract: In recent years, large-scale models have demonstrated state-of-the-art performance across various domains. However, training such models requires various techniques to address the problem of limited computing power and memory on devices such as GPUs. Some commonly used techniques include pipeline parallelism, tensor parallelism, and activation checkpointing. While existing works have focused on finding efficient distributed execution plans (Zheng et al. 2022) and activation checkpoint scheduling (Herrmann et al. 2019, Beaumont et al. 2021}, there has been no method proposed to optimize these two plans jointly. Moreover, ahead-of-time compilation relies heavily on accurate memory and computing overhead estimation, which is often time-consuming and misleading. Existing training systems and machine learning pipelines either physically execute each operand or estimate memory usage with a scaled input tensor. To address these challenges, we introduce a system that can jointly optimize distributed execution and gradient checkpointing plans. Additionally, we provide an easy-to-use symbolic profiler that generates memory and computing statistics for any PyTorch model with a minimal time cost. Our approach allows users to parallelize their model training on the given hardware with minimum code change based. The source code is publicly available at Colossal-AI GitHub or https://github.com/hpcaitech/ColossalAI
summary: In recent years, large-scale models have demonstrated state-of-the-art performance across various domains. However, training such models requires various techniques to address the problem of limited computing power and memory on devices such as GPUs. Some commonly used techniques include pipeline parallelism, tensor parallelism, and activation checkpointing. While existing works have focused on finding efficient distributed execution plans (Zheng et al. 2022) and activation checkpoint scheduling (Herrmann et al. 2019, Beaumont et al. 2021}, there has been no method proposed to optimize these two plans jointly. Moreover, ahead-of-time compilation relies heavily on accurate memory and computing overhead estimation, which is often time-consuming and misleading. Existing training systems and machine learning pipelines either physically execute each operand or estimate memory usage with a scaled input tensor. To address these challenges, we introduce a system that can jointly optimize distributed execution and gradient checkpointing plans. Additionally, we provide an easy-to-use symbolic profiler that generates memory and computing statistics for any PyTorch model with a minimal time cost. Our approach allows users to parallelize their model training on the given hardware with minimum code change based. The source code is publicly available at Colossal-AI GitHub or https://github.com/hpcaitech/ColossalAI
abstract_zh: 近年来，大型模型在各个领域都展现出了最先进的性能。然而，训练此类模型需要各种技术来解决 GPU 等设备上计算能力和内存有限的问题。一些常用的技术包括管道并行、张量并行和激活检查点。虽然现有的工作重点是寻找高效的分布式执行计划（Zheng et al. 2022）和激活检查点调度（Herrmann et al. 2019，Beaumont et al. 2021}，但还没有提出联合优化这两个计划的方法。此外，提前编译严重依赖于准确的内存和计算开销估计，这通常非常耗时且具有误导性。现有的训练系统和机器学习管道要么物理执行每个操作数，要么通过为了解决这些挑战，我们引入了一个可以联合优化分布式执行和梯度检查点计划的系统。此外，我们还提供了一个易于使用的符号分析器，可以以最小的时间成本为任何 PyTorch 模型生成内存和计算统计数据。我们的方法允许用户在给定的硬件上以最少的代码更改来并行化其模型训练。源代码可在 Colossal-AI GitHub 或 https://github.com/hpcaitech/ColossalAI 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Colossal-Auto系统，统一优化大规模模型的并行化与激活检查点计划，并提供高效的符号化性能分析工具。
AI.motivation: 现有研究分别优化分布式执行计划和激活检查点，缺乏联合优化方法，且内存和计算开销估计耗时且不准确，影响大规模模型训练效率。
AI.method: 设计联合优化框架，同步优化分布式执行与梯度检查点计划；开发符号化性能分析工具，快速生成PyTorch模型的内存与计算统计信息。
AI.result: 实现基于硬件的模型训练并行化，代码改动最小化；开源代码库Colossal-AI支持实际应用验证。
AI.conclusion: 通过统一优化并行化与检查点策略，结合高效分析工具，显著提升大规模模型训练效率，为实际部署提供可行方案。

authors_text: Menglong Chen,Xingtai Gui,Shicai Fan
title: Cluster-aware Contrastive Learning for Unsupervised Out-of-distribution Detection
title_zh: 用于无监督分布外检测的集群感知对比学习
abstract: Unsupervised out-of-distribution (OOD) Detection aims to separate the samples falling outside the distribution of training data without label information. Among numerous branches, contrastive learning has shown its excellent capability of learning discriminative representation in OOD detection. However, for its limited vision, merely focusing on instance-level relationship between augmented samples, it lacks attention to the relationship between samples with same semantics. Based on the classic contrastive learning, we propose Cluster-aware Contrastive Learning (CCL) framework for unsupervised OOD detection, which considers both instance-level and semantic-level information. Specifically, we study a cooperation strategy of clustering and contrastive learning to effectively extract the latent semantics and design a cluster-aware contrastive loss function to enhance OOD discriminative ability. The loss function can simultaneously pay attention to the global and local relationships by treating both the cluster centers and the samples belonging to the same cluster as positive samples. We conducted sufficient experiments to verify the effectiveness of our framework and the model achieves significant improvement on various image benchmarks.
summary: Unsupervised out-of-distribution (OOD) Detection aims to separate the samples falling outside the distribution of training data without label information. Among numerous branches, contrastive learning has shown its excellent capability of learning discriminative representation in OOD detection. However, for its limited vision, merely focusing on instance-level relationship between augmented samples, it lacks attention to the relationship between samples with same semantics. Based on the classic contrastive learning, we propose Cluster-aware Contrastive Learning (CCL) framework for unsupervised OOD detection, which considers both instance-level and semantic-level information. Specifically, we study a cooperation strategy of clustering and contrastive learning to effectively extract the latent semantics and design a cluster-aware contrastive loss function to enhance OOD discriminative ability. The loss function can simultaneously pay attention to the global and local relationships by treating both the cluster centers and the samples belonging to the same cluster as positive samples. We conducted sufficient experiments to verify the effectiveness of our framework and the model achieves significant improvement on various image benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 无监督分布外（OOD）检测的目的是在没有标签信息的情况下分离出训练数据分布之外的样本。在众多分支中，对比学习在 OOD 检测中展示了其学习判别表示的出色能力。然而，由于其视野有限，仅关注增强样本之间的实例级关系，缺乏对具有相同语义的样本之间的关系的关注。基于经典的对比学习，我们提出了用于无监督 OOD 检测的集群感知对比学习（CCL）框架，该框架同时考虑实例级和语义级信息。具体来说，我们研究了聚类和对比学习的合作策略，以有效地提取潜在语义，并设计一个聚类感知的对比损失函数来增强 OOD 判别能力。通过将聚类中心和属于同一聚类的样本都视为正样本，损失函数可以同时关注全局和局部关系。我们进行了足够的实验来验证我们的框架的有效性，并且该模型在各种图像基准上取得了显着的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Cluster-aware Contrastive Learning (CCL)的框架，用于无监督的分布外检测（OOD Detection），通过结合实例级和语义级信息提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统对比学习在OOD检测中仅关注实例级关系，忽视了语义级信息，导致对分布外样本的判别能力不足。本文旨在通过引入聚类信息增强模型对语义关系的捕捉能力。
AI.method: 设计了一种聚类感知的对比损失函数，将聚类中心与同簇样本同时视为正样本，结合聚类与对比学习策略，同时建模全局与局部关系。
AI.result: 在多个图像基准数据集上进行了充分实验，验证了CCL框架的有效性，模型性能显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合聚类与对比学习，CCL框架有效提升了无监督OOD检测的判别能力，为分布外检测提供了新思路。

Specifically, we study a cooperation strategy of clustering and contrastive learning to effectively extract the latent semantics and design a cluster-aware contrastive loss function to enhance OOD discriminative ability. The loss function can simultaneously pay attention to the global and local relationships by treating both the cluster centers and the samples belonging to the same cluster as positive samples. We conducted sufficient experiments to verify the effectiveness of our framework and the model achieves significant improvement on various image benchmarks. 无监督分布外（OOD）检测的目的是在没有标签信息的情况下分离出训练数据分布之外的样本。在众多分支中，对比学习在 OOD 检测中展示了其学习判别表示的出色能力。然而，由于其视野有限，仅关注增强样本之间的实例级关系，缺乏对具有相同语义的样本之间的关系的关注。基于经典的对比学习，我们提出了用于无监督 OOD 检测的集群感知对比学习（CCL）框架，该框架同时考虑实例级和语义级信息。具体来说，我们研究了聚类和对比学习的合作策略，以有效地提取潜在语义，并设计一个聚类感知的对比损失函数来增强 OOD 判别能力。通过将聚类中心和属于同一聚类的样本都视为正样本，损失函数可以同时关注全局和局部关系。我们进行了足够的实验来验证我们的框架的有效性，并且该模型在各种图像基准上取得了显着的改进。 本文提出了一种名为Cluster-aware Contrastive Learning (CCL)的框架，用于无监督的分布外检测（OOD Detection），通过结合实例级和语义级信息提升检测性能。 Menglong Chen,Xingtai Gui,Shicai Fan cs.CV

authors_text: Benedikt Heidrich,Kaleb Phipps,Oliver Neumann,Marian Turowski,Ralf Mikut,Veit Hagenmeyer
title: ProbPNN: Enhancing Deep Probabilistic Forecasting with Statistical Information
title_zh: ProbPNN：利用统计信息增强深度概率预测
abstract: Probabilistic forecasts are essential for various downstream applications such as business development, traffic planning, and electrical grid balancing. Many of these probabilistic forecasts are performed on time series data that contain calendar-driven periodicities. However, existing probabilistic forecasting methods do not explicitly take these periodicities into account. Therefore, in the present paper, we introduce a deep learning-based method that considers these calendar-driven periodicities explicitly. The present paper, thus, has a twofold contribution: First, we apply statistical methods that use calendar-driven prior knowledge to create rolling statistics and combine them with neural networks to provide better probabilistic forecasts. Second, we benchmark ProbPNN with state-of-the-art benchmarks by comparing the achieved normalised continuous ranked probability score (nCRPS) and normalised Pinball Loss (nPL) on two data sets containing in total more than 1000 time series. The results of the benchmarks show that using statistical forecasting components improves the probabilistic forecast performance and that ProbPNN outperforms other deep learning forecasting methods whilst requiring less computation costs.
summary: Probabilistic forecasts are essential for various downstream applications such as business development, traffic planning, and electrical grid balancing. Many of these probabilistic forecasts are performed on time series data that contain calendar-driven periodicities. However, existing probabilistic forecasting methods do not explicitly take these periodicities into account. Therefore, in the present paper, we introduce a deep learning-based method that considers these calendar-driven periodicities explicitly. The present paper, thus, has a twofold contribution: First, we apply statistical methods that use calendar-driven prior knowledge to create rolling statistics and combine them with neural networks to provide better probabilistic forecasts. Second, we benchmark ProbPNN with state-of-the-art benchmarks by comparing the achieved normalised continuous ranked probability score (nCRPS) and normalised Pinball Loss (nPL) on two data sets containing in total more than 1000 time series. The results of the benchmarks show that using statistical forecasting components improves the probabilistic forecast performance and that ProbPNN outperforms other deep learning forecasting methods whilst requiring less computation costs.
abstract_zh: 概率预测对于业务开发、交通规划和电网平衡等各种下游应用至关重要。其中许多概率预测是对包含日历驱动的周期性的时间序列数据执行的。然而，现有的概率预测方法没有明确考虑这些周期性。因此，在本文中，我们引入了一种基于深度学习的方法，该方法明确考虑了这些日历驱动的周期性。因此，本文有双重贡献：首先，我们应用统计方法，利用日历驱动的先验知识来创建滚动统计数据，并将其与神经网络相结合，以提供更好的概率预测。其次，我们通过比较总共包含 1000 多个时间序列的两个数据集所获得的归一化连续排序概率得分 (nCRPS) 和归一化 Pinball 损失 (nPL)，以最先进的基准对 ProbPNN 进行基准测试。基准测试的结果表明，使用统计预测组件可以提高概率预测性能，并且 ProbPNN 优于其他深度学习预测方法，同时需要更少的计算成本。

AI.tldr: 提出ProbPNN方法，结合统计信息和日历周期性提升深度概率预测性能
AI.motivation: 现有概率预测方法未充分考虑时间序列中的日历驱动周期性，影响预测准确性
AI.method: 融合统计方法生成的滚动统计量与神经网络，显式建模日历周期性，并通过nCRPS和nPL指标进行评估
AI.result: 在包含1000+时间序列的两个数据集上，ProbPNN在nCRPS和nPL指标上优于现有方法，且计算成本更低
AI.conclusion: 结合统计先验信息能有效提升概率预测性能，ProbPNN在保持高精度的同时降低计算成本
