authors_text: Chengyi Liu,Wenqi Fan,Yunqing Liu,Jiatong Li,Hang Li,Hui Liu,Jiliang Tang,Qing Li
title: Generative Diffusion Models on Graphs: Methods and Applications
title_zh: 图上的生成扩散模型：方法与应用
comment: This survey paper is accepted by IJCAI 2023
comments: This survey paper is accepted by IJCAI 2023
abstract: Diffusion models, as a novel generative paradigm, have achieved remarkable success in various image generation tasks such as image inpainting, image-to-text translation, and video generation. Graph generation is a crucial computational task on graphs with numerous real-world applications. It aims to learn the distribution of given graphs and then generate new graphs. Given the great success of diffusion models in image generation, increasing efforts have been made to leverage these techniques to advance graph generation in recent years. In this paper, we first provide a comprehensive overview of generative diffusion models on graphs, In particular, we review representative algorithms for three variants of graph diffusion models, i.e., Score Matching with Langevin Dynamics (SMLD), Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Model (DDPM), and Score-based Generative Model (SGM). Then, we summarize the major applications of generative diffusion models on graphs with a specific focus on molecule and protein modeling. Finally, we discuss promising directions in generative diffusion models on graph-structured data. For this survey, we also created a GitHub project website by collecting the supporting resources for generative diffusion models on graphs, at the link: https://github.com/ChengyiLIU-cs/Generative-Diffusion-Models-on-Graphs
summary: Diffusion models, as a novel generative paradigm, have achieved remarkable success in various image generation tasks such as image inpainting, image-to-text translation, and video generation. Graph generation is a crucial computational task on graphs with numerous real-world applications. It aims to learn the distribution of given graphs and then generate new graphs. Given the great success of diffusion models in image generation, increasing efforts have been made to leverage these techniques to advance graph generation in recent years. In this paper, we first provide a comprehensive overview of generative diffusion models on graphs, In particular, we review representative algorithms for three variants of graph diffusion models, i.e., Score Matching with Langevin Dynamics (SMLD), Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Model (DDPM), and Score-based Generative Model (SGM). Then, we summarize the major applications of generative diffusion models on graphs with a specific focus on molecule and protein modeling. Finally, we discuss promising directions in generative diffusion models on graph-structured data. For this survey, we also created a GitHub project website by collecting the supporting resources for generative diffusion models on graphs, at the link: https://github.com/ChengyiLIU-cs/Generative-Diffusion-Models-on-Graphs
abstract_zh: 扩散模型作为一种新颖的生成范式，在图像修复、图像到文本翻译和视频生成等各种图像生成任务中取得了显着的成功。图生成是图上的一项重要计算任务，具有众多实际应用。它的目的是学习给定图的分布，然后生成新图。鉴于扩散模型在图像生成方面取得的巨大成功，近年来人们越来越多地努力利用这些技术来推进图形生成。在本文中，我们首先对图上的生成扩散模型进行了全面的概述，特别是，我们回顾了图扩散模型的三种变体的代表性算法，即朗之万动力学分数匹配（SMLD）、去噪扩散概率模型（DDPM）和基于分数的生成模型（SGM）。然后，我们总结了生成扩散模型在图上的主要应用，特别关注分子和蛋白质建模。最后，我们讨论了图结构数据生成扩散模型的有希望的方向。对于本次调查，我们还通过收集图生成扩散模型的支持资源创建了一个 GitHub 项目网站，链接为：https://github.com/ChengyiLIU-cs/Generative-Diffusion-Models-on-Graphs

AI.tldr: 本文综述了图结构上生成扩散模型的方法与应用，重点回顾了三种模型变体并总结其在分子和蛋白质建模中的应用。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型在图像生成领域取得成功，但图生成作为重要任务仍需探索，亟需系统梳理相关方法与应用。
AI.method: 通过回顾Score Matching with Langevin Dynamics (SMLD)、Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Model (DDPM)和Score-based Generative Model (SGM)三种图扩散模型，总结其在分子与蛋白质建模中的应用案例。
AI.result: 构建了图生成扩散模型的系统性综述，整理了典型算法、应用场景及资源库（GitHub项目）。
AI.conclusion: 生成扩散模型为图结构数据提供了新范式，未来需在模型效率与生物医学应用上进一步探索。

authors_text: Hideo Bannai,Mitsuru Funakoshi,Kazuhiro Kurita,Yuto Nakashima,Kazuhisa Seto,Takeaki Uno
title: Optimal LZ-End Parsing is Hard
title_zh: 最佳 LZ 端解析很困难
abstract: LZ-End is a variant of the well-known Lempel-Ziv parsing family such that each phrase of the parsing has a previous occurrence, with the additional constraint that the previous occurrence must end at the end of a previous phrase. LZ-End was initially proposed as a greedy parsing, where each phrase is determined greedily from left to right, as the longest factor that satisfies the above constraint~[Kreft & Navarro, 2010]. In this work, we consider an optimal LZ-End parsing that has the minimum number of phrases in such parsings. We show that a decision version of computing the optimal LZ-End parsing is NP-complete by showing a reduction from the vertex cover problem. Moreover, we give a MAX-SAT formulation for the optimal LZ-End parsing adapting an approach for computing various NP-hard repetitiveness measures recently presented by [Bannai et al., 2022]. We also consider the approximation ratio of the size of greedy LZ-End parsing to the size of the optimal LZ-End parsing, and give a lower bound of the ratio which asymptotically approaches $2$.
summary: LZ-End is a variant of the well-known Lempel-Ziv parsing family such that each phrase of the parsing has a previous occurrence, with the additional constraint that the previous occurrence must end at the end of a previous phrase. LZ-End was initially proposed as a greedy parsing, where each phrase is determined greedily from left to right, as the longest factor that satisfies the above constraint~[Kreft & Navarro, 2010]. In this work, we consider an optimal LZ-End parsing that has the minimum number of phrases in such parsings. We show that a decision version of computing the optimal LZ-End parsing is NP-complete by showing a reduction from the vertex cover problem. Moreover, we give a MAX-SAT formulation for the optimal LZ-End parsing adapting an approach for computing various NP-hard repetitiveness measures recently presented by [Bannai et al., 2022]. We also consider the approximation ratio of the size of greedy LZ-End parsing to the size of the optimal LZ-End parsing, and give a lower bound of the ratio which asymptotically approaches $2$.
abstract_zh: LZ-End 是著名的 Lempel-Ziv 解析系列的变体，因此解析的每个短语都有一个先前出现的情况，并且附加约束是先前出现的情况必须在前一个短语的末尾结束。 LZ-End 最初被提出作为贪婪解析，其中每个短语从左到右贪婪地确定为满足上述约束的最长因子~[Kreft & Navarro, 2010]。在这项工作中，我们考虑一种最佳的 LZ-End 解析，该解析中的短语数量最少。我们通过展示顶点覆盖问题的减少来证明计算最佳 LZ-End 解析的决策版本是 NP 完全的。此外，我们给出了最佳 LZ-End 解析的 MAX-SAT 公式，采用了 [Bannai 等人，2022] 最近提出的计算各种 NP 难重复性度量的方法。我们还考虑贪婪 LZ-End 解析的大小与最优 LZ-End 解析的大小的近似比率，并给出渐近接近 $2$ 的比率下界。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了LZ-End最优解析的计算复杂性，证明其NP完全性并提出近似分析。
AI.motivation: LZ-End作为Lempel-Ziv解析的变体，在数据压缩中具有应用价值，但其最优解析的计算复杂性尚未明确。
AI.method: 通过将顶点覆盖问题归约到LZ-End最优解析的判定版本，证明其NP完全性；并基于MAX-SAT框架构建优化模型，分析贪心算法的近似比。
AI.result: 证明LZ-End最优解析的判定问题为NP完全，给出MAX-SAT求解方法，并证明贪心算法的近似比下界趋近于2。
AI.conclusion: LZ-End最优解析具有理论计算难度，实际应用中需依赖近似算法，贪心方法的性能存在理论限制。

search_text: Optimal LZ-End Parsing is Hard 最佳 LZ 端解析很困难 LZ-End is a variant of the well-known Lempel-Ziv parsing family such that each phrase of the parsing has a previous occurrence, with the additional constraint that the previous occurrence must end at the end of a previous phrase. LZ-End was initially proposed as a greedy parsing, where each phrase is determined greedily from left to right, as the longest factor that satisfies the above constraint~[Kreft & Navarro, 2010]. In this work, we consider an optimal LZ-End parsing that has the minimum number of phrases in such parsings. We show that a decision version of computing the optimal LZ-End parsing is NP-complete by showing a reduction from the vertex cover problem. Moreover, we give a MAX-SAT formulation for the optimal LZ-End parsing adapting an approach for computing various NP-hard repetitiveness measures recently presented by [Bannai et al., 2022]. We also consider the approximation ratio of the size of greedy LZ-End parsing to the size of the optimal LZ-End parsing, and give a lower bound of the ratio which asymptotically approaches $2$. LZ-End 是著名的 Lempel-Ziv 解析系列的变体，因此解析的每个短语都有一个先前出现的情况，并且附加约束是先前出现的情况必须在前一个短语的末尾结束。 LZ-End 最初被提出作为贪婪解析，其中每个短语从左到右贪婪地确定为满足上述约束的最长因子~[Kreft & Navarro, 2010]。在这项工作中，我们考虑一种最佳的 LZ-End 解析，该解析中的短语数量最少。我们通过展示顶点覆盖问题的减少来证明计算最佳 LZ-End 解析的决策版本是 NP 完全的。此外，我们给出了最佳 LZ-End 解析的 MAX-SAT 公式，采用了 [Bannai 等人，2022] 最近提出的计算各种 NP 难重复性度量的方法。我们还考虑贪婪 LZ-End 解析的大小与最优 LZ-End 解析的大小的近似比率，并给出渐近接近 $2$ 的比率下界。 本文研究了LZ-End最优解析的计算复杂性，证明其NP完全性并提出近似分析。 Hideo Bannai,Mitsuru Funakoshi,Kazuhiro Kurita,Yuto Nakashima,Kazuhisa Seto,Takeaki Uno cs.DS

authors_text: Pablo Castells,Dietmar Jannach
title: Recommender Systems: A Primer
title_zh: 推荐系统：入门
abstract: Personalized recommendations have become a common feature of modern online services, including most major e-commerce sites, media platforms and social networks. Today, due to their high practical relevance, research in the area of recommender systems is flourishing more than ever. However, with the new application scenarios of recommender systems that we observe today, constantly new challenges arise as well, both in terms of algorithmic requirements and with respect to the evaluation of such systems. In this paper, we first provide an overview of the traditional formulation of the recommendation problem. We then review the classical algorithmic paradigms for item retrieval and ranking and elaborate how such systems can be evaluated. Afterwards, we discuss a number of recent developments in recommender systems research, including research on session-based recommendation, biases in recommender systems, and questions regarding the impact and value of recommender systems in practice.
summary: Personalized recommendations have become a common feature of modern online services, including most major e-commerce sites, media platforms and social networks. Today, due to their high practical relevance, research in the area of recommender systems is flourishing more than ever. However, with the new application scenarios of recommender systems that we observe today, constantly new challenges arise as well, both in terms of algorithmic requirements and with respect to the evaluation of such systems. In this paper, we first provide an overview of the traditional formulation of the recommendation problem. We then review the classical algorithmic paradigms for item retrieval and ranking and elaborate how such systems can be evaluated. Afterwards, we discuss a number of recent developments in recommender systems research, including research on session-based recommendation, biases in recommender systems, and questions regarding the impact and value of recommender systems in practice.
abstract_zh: 个性化推荐已成为现代在线服务的共同特征，包括大多数主要电子商务网站、媒体平台和社交网络。如今，由于其高度的实际相关性，推荐系统领域的研究比以往任何时候都更加蓬勃发展。然而，随着我们今天观察到的推荐系统的新应用场景，无论是在算法要求方面还是在此类系统的评估方面，也不断出现新的挑战。在本文中，我们首先概述推荐问题的传统表述。然后，我们回顾了项目检索和排序的经典算法范例，并详细说明了如何评估此类系统。随后，我们讨论了推荐系统研究的一些最新进展，包括基于会话的推荐的研究、推荐系统的偏差以及有关推荐系统在实践中的影响和价值的问题。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了推荐系统的基本框架、经典算法及评估方法，并探讨了当前研究的最新进展与挑战。
AI.motivation: 随着推荐系统应用场景的扩展，传统方法面临新挑战，需系统梳理现有技术并分析前沿问题。
AI.method: 通过文献综述与系统分析，分模块阐述传统推荐问题设定、经典算法范式、评估方法及近期研究方向。
AI.result: 总结了传统推荐系统的核心方法与评估指标，分析了会话推荐、算法偏差及实际影响等新兴研究主题。
AI.conclusion: 推荐系统研究需兼顾算法创新与实际应用价值，未来应重点关注偏差控制、长期影响评估及动态场景适应性。

authors_text: Yuheng Zhang,Yu Bai,Nan Jiang
title: Offline Learning in Markov Games with General Function Approximation
title_zh: 具有一般函数逼近的马尔可夫博弈中的离线学习
abstract: We study offline multi-agent reinforcement learning (RL) in Markov games, where the goal is to learn an approximate equilibrium -- such as Nash equilibrium and (Coarse) Correlated Equilibrium -- from an offline dataset pre-collected from the game. Existing works consider relatively restricted tabular or linear models and handle each equilibria separately. In this work, we provide the first framework for sample-efficient offline learning in Markov games under general function approximation, handling all 3 equilibria in a unified manner. By using Bellman-consistent pessimism, we obtain interval estimation for policies' returns, and use both the upper and the lower bounds to obtain a relaxation on the gap of a candidate policy, which becomes our optimization objective. Our results generalize prior works and provide several additional insights. Importantly, we require a data coverage condition that improves over the recently proposed "unilateral concentrability". Our condition allows selective coverage of deviation policies that optimally trade-off between their greediness (as approximate best responses) and coverage, and we show scenarios where this leads to significantly better guarantees. As a new connection, we also show how our algorithmic framework can subsume seemingly different solution concepts designed for the special case of two-player zero-sum games.
summary: We study offline multi-agent reinforcement learning (RL) in Markov games, where the goal is to learn an approximate equilibrium -- such as Nash equilibrium and (Coarse) Correlated Equilibrium -- from an offline dataset pre-collected from the game. Existing works consider relatively restricted tabular or linear models and handle each equilibria separately. In this work, we provide the first framework for sample-efficient offline learning in Markov games under general function approximation, handling all 3 equilibria in a unified manner. By using Bellman-consistent pessimism, we obtain interval estimation for policies' returns, and use both the upper and the lower bounds to obtain a relaxation on the gap of a candidate policy, which becomes our optimization objective. Our results generalize prior works and provide several additional insights. Importantly, we require a data coverage condition that improves over the recently proposed "unilateral concentrability". Our condition allows selective coverage of deviation policies that optimally trade-off between their greediness (as approximate best responses) and coverage, and we show scenarios where this leads to significantly better guarantees. As a new connection, we also show how our algorithmic framework can subsume seemingly different solution concepts designed for the special case of two-player zero-sum games.
abstract_zh: 我们研究马尔可夫游戏中的离线多智能体强化学习（RL），其目标是从游戏中预先收集的离线数据集学习近似均衡，例如纳什均衡和（粗略）相关均衡。现有的工作考虑相对受限的表格或线性模型，并分别处理每个平衡。在这项工作中，我们提供了第一个在一般函数逼近下马尔可夫游戏中样本高效离线学习的框架，以统一的方式处理所有 3 个均衡。通过使用贝尔曼一致的悲观主义，我们获得了政策回报的区间估计，并使用上限和下限来获得候选政策差距的松弛，这成为我们的优化目标。我们的结果概括了之前的工作并提供了一些额外的见解。重要的是，我们需要一个比最近提出的“单边集中性”有所改进的数据覆盖条件。我们的条件允许选择性地覆盖偏差策略，在贪婪（近似最佳响应）和覆盖范围之间进行最佳权衡，并且我们展示了这会带来更好保证的场景。作为一种新的联系，我们还展示了我们的算法框架如何包含专为两人零和游戏的特殊情况设计的看似不同的解决方案概念。

AI.tldr: 本文研究马尔可夫博弈中的离线多智能体强化学习，提出首个统一框架处理纳什均衡、粗相关均衡等三种均衡，利用贝尔曼一致悲观主义实现样本高效的离线学习。
AI.motivation: 现有工作局限于表格或线性模型，且分别处理不同均衡，缺乏通用性。需设计适用于广义函数逼近的统一框架，提升离线学习效率与均衡覆盖范围。
AI.method: 通过贝尔曼一致悲观主义构建策略回报区间估计，结合上下界松弛候选策略差距作为优化目标，提出改进的数据覆盖条件以平衡贪婪性与覆盖性。
AI.result: 框架推广了先前结果，改进的覆盖条件在特定场景下显著提升性能，并揭示了算法与零和博弈解概念的关联性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为马尔可夫博弈离线学习提供了理论支持，改进的数据覆盖条件与统一优化目标为后续研究提供了新方向。

search_text: Offline Learning in Markov Games with General Function Approximation 具有一般函数逼近的马尔可夫博弈中的离线学习 We study offline multi-agent reinforcement learning (RL) in Markov games, where the goal is to learn an approximate equilibrium -- such as Nash equilibrium and (Coarse) Correlated Equilibrium -- from an offline dataset pre-collected from the game. Existing works consider relatively restricted tabular or linear models and handle each equilibria separately. In this work, we provide the first framework for sample-efficient offline learning in Markov games under general function approximation, handling all 3 equilibria in a unified manner. By using Bellman-consistent pessimism, we obtain interval estimation for policies' returns, and use both the upper and the lower bounds to obtain a relaxation on the gap of a candidate policy, which becomes our optimization objective. Our results generalize prior works and provide several additional insights. Importantly, we require a data coverage condition that improves over the recently proposed "unilateral concentrability". Our condition allows selective coverage of deviation policies that optimally trade-off between their greediness (as approximate best responses) and coverage, and we show scenarios where this leads to significantly better guarantees. As a new connection, we also show how our algorithmic framework can subsume seemingly different solution concepts designed for the special case of two-player zero-sum games. 我们研究马尔可夫游戏中的离线多智能体强化学习（RL），其目标是从游戏中预先收集的离线数据集学习近似均衡，例如纳什均衡和（粗略）相关均衡。现有的工作考虑相对受限的表格或线性模型，并分别处理每个平衡。在这项工作中，我们提供了第一个在一般函数逼近下马尔可夫游戏中样本高效离线学习的框架，以统一的方式处理所有 3 个均衡。通过使用贝尔曼一致的悲观主义，我们获得了政策回报的区间估计，并使用上限和下限来获得候选政策差距的松弛，这成为我们的优化目标。我们的结果概括了之前的工作并提供了一些额外的见解。重要的是，我们需要一个比最近提出的“单边集中性”有所改进的数据覆盖条件。我们的条件允许选择性地覆盖偏差策略，在贪婪（近似最佳响应）和覆盖范围之间进行最佳权衡，并且我们展示了这会带来更好保证的场景。作为一种新的联系，我们还展示了我们的算法框架如何包含专为两人零和游戏的特殊情况设计的看似不同的解决方案概念。 本文研究马尔可夫博弈中的离线多智能体强化学习，提出首个统一框架处理纳什均衡、粗相关均衡等三种均衡，利用贝尔曼一致悲观主义实现样本高效的离线学习。 Yuheng Zhang,Yu Bai,Nan Jiang cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.MA,stat.ML

authors_text: Aditya Mate,Bryan Wilder,Aparna Taneja,Milind Tambe
title: Improved Policy Evaluation for Randomized Trials of Algorithmic Resource Allocation
title_zh: 改进算法资源分配随机试验的政策评估
abstract: We consider the task of evaluating policies of algorithmic resource allocation through randomized controlled trials (RCTs). Such policies are tasked with optimizing the utilization of limited intervention resources, with the goal of maximizing the benefits derived. Evaluation of such allocation policies through RCTs proves difficult, notwithstanding the scale of the trial, because the individuals' outcomes are inextricably interlinked through resource constraints controlling the policy decisions. Our key contribution is to present a new estimator leveraging our proposed novel concept, that involves retrospective reshuffling of participants across experimental arms at the end of an RCT. We identify conditions under which such reassignments are permissible and can be leveraged to construct counterfactual trials, whose outcomes can be accurately ascertained, for free. We prove theoretically that such an estimator is more accurate than common estimators based on sample means -- we show that it returns an unbiased estimate and simultaneously reduces variance. We demonstrate the value of our approach through empirical experiments on synthetic, semi-synthetic as well as real case study data and show improved estimation accuracy across the board.
summary: We consider the task of evaluating policies of algorithmic resource allocation through randomized controlled trials (RCTs). Such policies are tasked with optimizing the utilization of limited intervention resources, with the goal of maximizing the benefits derived. Evaluation of such allocation policies through RCTs proves difficult, notwithstanding the scale of the trial, because the individuals' outcomes are inextricably interlinked through resource constraints controlling the policy decisions. Our key contribution is to present a new estimator leveraging our proposed novel concept, that involves retrospective reshuffling of participants across experimental arms at the end of an RCT. We identify conditions under which such reassignments are permissible and can be leveraged to construct counterfactual trials, whose outcomes can be accurately ascertained, for free. We prove theoretically that such an estimator is more accurate than common estimators based on sample means -- we show that it returns an unbiased estimate and simultaneously reduces variance. We demonstrate the value of our approach through empirical experiments on synthetic, semi-synthetic as well as real case study data and show improved estimation accuracy across the board.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑通过随机对照试验（RCT）评估算法资源分配政策的任务。此类政策的任务是优化有限干预资源的利用，以实现利益最大化。尽管试验规模很大，但通过随机对照试验评估此类分配政策却很困难，因为控制政策决策的资源限制使个人的结果密不可分。我们的主要贡献是利用我们提出的新概念提出一种新的估计器，其中涉及在随机对照试验结束时对实验组中的参与者进行回顾性重新洗牌。我们确定了允许此类重新分配的条件，并可用于构建反事实试验，其结果可以免费准确确定。我们从理论上证明，这样的估计量比基于样本均值的常见估计量更准确——我们证明它返回无偏估计，同时减少方差。我们通过对合成、半合成以及真实案例研究数据的实证实验证明了我们的方法的价值，并显示了全面提高的估计准确性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种改进的策略评估方法，用于算法资源分配的随机对照试验，解决因资源约束导致的个体结果相互关联的评估难题。
AI.motivation: 现有评估方法难以处理资源分配中的个体结果关联，导致评估不准确，需改进方法提高准确性。
AI.method: 提出基于试验后参与者重新分配的新型估计器，构造反事实试验，理论上证明其无偏性并降低方差。
AI.result: 在多种数据集上验证，证明方法在估计准确性上有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法在理论和实证上均优于传统方法，为资源分配策略评估提供有效工具。

authors_text: Ning Lu,Shengcai Liu,Zhirui Zhang,Qi Wang,Haifeng Liu,Ke Tang
title: Less is More: Understanding Word-level Textual Adversarial Attack via n-gram Frequency Descend
title_zh: 少即是多：通过 n-gram 频率下降理解单词级文本对抗性攻击
comment: To be published in: 2024 IEEE Conference on Artificial Intelligence (CAI 2024)
comments: To be published in: 2024 IEEE Conference on Artificial Intelligence (CAI 2024)
abstract: Word-level textual adversarial attacks have demonstrated notable efficacy in misleading Natural Language Processing (NLP) models. Despite their success, the underlying reasons for their effectiveness and the fundamental characteristics of adversarial examples (AEs) remain obscure. This work aims to interpret word-level attacks by examining their $n$-gram frequency patterns. Our comprehensive experiments reveal that in approximately 90\% of cases, word-level attacks lead to the generation of examples where the frequency of $n$-grams decreases, a tendency we term as the $n$-gram Frequency Descend ($n$-FD). This finding suggests a straightforward strategy to enhance model robustness: training models using examples with $n$-FD. To examine the feasibility of this strategy, we employed the $n$-gram frequency information, as an alternative to conventional loss gradients, to generate perturbed examples in adversarial training. The experiment results indicate that the frequency-based approach performs comparably with the gradient-based approach in improving model robustness. Our research offers a novel and more intuitive perspective for understanding word-level textual adversarial attacks and proposes a new direction to improve model robustness.
summary: Word-level textual adversarial attacks have demonstrated notable efficacy in misleading Natural Language Processing (NLP) models. Despite their success, the underlying reasons for their effectiveness and the fundamental characteristics of adversarial examples (AEs) remain obscure. This work aims to interpret word-level attacks by examining their $n$-gram frequency patterns. Our comprehensive experiments reveal that in approximately 90\% of cases, word-level attacks lead to the generation of examples where the frequency of $n$-grams decreases, a tendency we term as the $n$-gram Frequency Descend ($n$-FD). This finding suggests a straightforward strategy to enhance model robustness: training models using examples with $n$-FD. To examine the feasibility of this strategy, we employed the $n$-gram frequency information, as an alternative to conventional loss gradients, to generate perturbed examples in adversarial training. The experiment results indicate that the frequency-based approach performs comparably with the gradient-based approach in improving model robustness. Our research offers a novel and more intuitive perspective for understanding word-level textual adversarial attacks and proposes a new direction to improve model robustness.
abstract_zh: 单词级文本对抗攻击在误导自然语言处理（NLP）模型方面表现出了显着的功效。尽管它们取得了成功，但其有效性的根本原因以及对抗性示例（AE）的基本特征仍然不清楚。这项工作旨在通过检查 $n$-gram 频率模式来解释单词级攻击。我们的综合实验表明，在大约 90% 的情况下，词级攻击会导致生成 $n$-gram 频率下降的示例，我们将这种趋势称为 $n$-gram 频率下降 ($n$-FD)。这一发现提出了一种增强模型鲁棒性的简单策略：使用带有 $n$-FD 的示例来训练模型。为了检验该策略的可行性，我们采用 $n$-gram 频率信息作为传统损失梯度的替代方案，在对抗训练中生成扰动示例。实验结果表明，基于频率的方法在提高模型鲁棒性方面与基于梯度的方法相当。我们的研究为理解词级文本对抗攻击提供了一种新颖且更直观的视角，并提出了提高模型鲁棒性的新方向。

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析词级文本对抗攻击的n-gram频率模式，提出基于n-gram频率下降（n-FD）现象的模型鲁棒性提升方法。
AI.motivation: 词级对抗攻击效果显著但其机制不明确，现有防御方法依赖梯度信息缺乏直观解释，需探索更本质的攻击特征与防御策略。
AI.method: 统计分析对抗样本n-gram频率变化，发现n-FD规律；在对抗训练中以n-gram频率替代梯度生成扰动样本。
AI.result: 90%对抗样本呈现n-FD特性，基于频率的对抗训练方法在鲁棒性提升效果上与梯度方法相当。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了词级对抗攻击的频率特征规律，为模型防御提供了新的直观视角和可行方案。

ai_content.conclusion: 揭示了词级对抗攻击的频率特征规律，为模型防御提供了新的直观视角和可行方案。

authors_text: Mahsa Derakhshan,Naveen Durvasula,Nika Haghtalab
title: Stochastic Minimum Vertex Cover in General Graphs: a $3/2$-Approximation
title_zh: 一般图中的随机最小顶点覆盖：$3/2$ 近似值
abstract: Our main result is designing an algorithm that returns a vertex cover of $\mathcal{G}^\star$ with size at most $(3/2+ε)$ times the expected size of the minimum vertex cover, using only $O(n/εp)$ non-adaptive queries. This improves over the best-known 2-approximation algorithm by Behnezhad, Blum, and Derakhshan [SODA'22], who also show that $Ω(n/p)$ queries are necessary to achieve any constant approximation. Our guarantees also extend to instances where edge realizations are not fully independent. We complement this upper bound with a tight $3/2$-approximation lower bound for stochastic graphs whose edges realizations demonstrate mild correlations.
summary: Our main result is designing an algorithm that returns a vertex cover of $\mathcal{G}^\star$ with size at most $(3/2+ε)$ times the expected size of the minimum vertex cover, using only $O(n/εp)$ non-adaptive queries. This improves over the best-known 2-approximation algorithm by Behnezhad, Blum, and Derakhshan [SODA'22], who also show that $Ω(n/p)$ queries are necessary to achieve any constant approximation. Our guarantees also extend to instances where edge realizations are not fully independent. We complement this upper bound with a tight $3/2$-approximation lower bound for stochastic graphs whose edges realizations demonstrate mild correlations.
abstract_zh: 我们的主要结果是设计一种算法，仅使用 $O(n/εp)$ 非自适应查询，返回 $\mathcal{G}^\star$ 的顶点覆盖，其大小最多为 $(3/2+ε)$ 乘以最小顶点覆盖的预期大小。这比 Behnezhad、Blum 和 Derakhshan [SODA'22] 提出的最著名的 2 近似算法有所改进，他们还表明 $Ω(n/p)$ 查询对于实现任何常数近似是必要的。我们的保证还扩展到边缘实现不完全独立的情况。我们用随机图的严格 $3/2$ 近似下界来补充这个上限，随机图的边实现表现出轻微的相关性。

search_text: Stochastic Minimum Vertex Cover in General Graphs: a $3/2$-Approximation 一般图中的随机最小顶点覆盖：$3/2$ 近似值 Our main result is designing an algorithm that returns a vertex cover of $\mathcal{G}^\star$ with size at most $(3/2+ε)$ times the expected size of the minimum vertex cover, using only $O(n/εp)$ non-adaptive queries. This improves over the best-known 2-approximation algorithm by Behnezhad, Blum, and Derakhshan [SODA'22], who also show that $Ω(n/p)$ queries are necessary to achieve any constant approximation. Our guarantees also extend to instances where edge realizations are not fully independent. We complement this upper bound with a tight $3/2$-approximation lower bound for stochastic graphs whose edges realizations demonstrate mild correlations. 我们的主要结果是设计一种算法，仅使用 $O(n/εp)$ 非自适应查询，返回 $\mathcal{G}^\star$ 的顶点覆盖，其大小最多为 $(3/2+ε)$ 乘以最小顶点覆盖的预期大小。这比 Behnezhad、Blum 和 Derakhshan [SODA'22] 提出的最著名的 2 近似算法有所改进，他们还表明 $Ω(n/p)$ 查询对于实现任何常数近似是必要的。我们的保证还扩展到边缘实现不完全独立的情况。我们用随机图的严格 $3/2$ 近似下界来补充这个上限，随机图的边实现表现出轻微的相关性。 本文设计了一种在一般图中解决随机最小顶点覆盖问题的算法，实现了比现有方法更优的近似比。 Mahsa Derakhshan,Naveen Durvasula,Nika Haghtalab cs.DS
